translated_text: Are you making fun of expectations and your boss, Rao...
Justification: Use of "मस्करी" (mockery) is sarcastic, but not emotionally charged.

Text: बीजेपी ला काही फायदा उरला नाही बाबाचा आता...आणि बाबलापण हे कळलय...
translated_text: BJP has no use for Baba now...and Baba knows this too...
Justification: The phrase "फायदा उरला नाही" and realization of redundancy show sadness.

Text: अजून किती अच्छे दिन पाहिजेत...! चक्क, जाहिरात करत आहे..
translated_text: How many more good days are needed...! Really, I'm advertising..
Justification: Use of "अच्छे दिन" in a sarcastic exclamation suggests surprise.

Text: सरकारी नोकरीची इच्छा अनेकांना बेरोजगार केले आहे.
translated_text: The desire for a government job has made many unemployed.
Justification: Statement of fact with no clear emotion.

Text: संगमनेर शहरातील नवीन नगर रोड पाण्यात, सायंकाळी झालेल्या कोसळधार पावसाने...
translated_text: Naveen Nagar Road in Sangamner city is under water due to heavy rains in the evening...
Justification: Description of a local issue; informative tone.

Text: ही वीरगर्जना करीत आहेत... ढुंला पाय लाऊन पळणारे...
translated_text: These heroes are roaring... Those who run with bare feet...
Justification: Phrase "वीरगर्जना" (heroic roar) conveys pride and energy, evoking joy.

Text: बे हा बहोतच नकली माणूस आहे गा... साला रिअल शाळेत तर जायच होत...
translated_text: Hey, this guy is such a fake guy... He should have gone to a real school...
Justification: "नकली माणूस" (fake person) and mocking tone show contempt, indicating disgust.

Text: पण हा गाढवाचा अपमान आहे. निषेध.
translated_text: But this is an insult to the donkey. Protest.
Justification: Comparing someone to a "गाढव" (donkey) reflects insult and disgust.

Text: कोण आहे हा नमुना
translated_text: Who is this sample?
Justification: "नमुना" (sample) used sarcastically expresses astonishment and surprise.

Text: हे मानसिक रोगी वाचत नाहीत आणि शहानिशा न करता तिरस्कारयुक्त प्रचलित विचारांना स्विकारतात.
translated_text: These mentally ill people don't read and accept hateful mainstream ideas without questioning them.
Justification: The term "तिरस्कारयुक्त" (hateful) suggests deep negativity and disgust towards blind belief without reasoning.

Text: सत्य आहे हे.. फेकू तडीपार पासून शेंणखाऊ भक्तान पर्यंत ही परंमपरा अखंड आहे.!
translated_text: This is true.. from Feku Tadipar to Shenkhau devotees, this tradition is unbroken.!
Justification: The usage of "फेकू" (liar) and "शेंणखाऊ" (dung-eater) are derogatory, expressing strong anger and disdain.

Text: देशात बेरोजगारी अजिबात नाहीये...
translated_text: There is absolutely no unemployment in the country...
Justification: Though sarcastic, there’s no emotionally charged Marathi word; hence it remains neutral.

Text: धक्कादायक! कळव्याकडून...
translated_text: Shocking! The road...
Justification: "धक्कादायक" (shocking) is an explicit word expressing surprise at the incident.

Text: ही महामानवाला, शिंदेशाही...
translated_text: Priceless gift...
Justification: No emotionally intense word; neutral contextual discussion.

Text: पोलीस स्मृती दिन कर्तव्य बजावत...
translated_text: Emotional tribute...
Justification: The phrase "शहीद झालेल्या हुतात्म्यांना" (martyred soldiers) brings out sadness and respect.

Text: वाघळ्या गोळीबार ला जरा...
translated_text: Can you elaborate...
Justification: No emotional word here; the sentence is inquisitive.

Text: घरकोंबड्याने फोटो काढणे...
translated_text: Giving up taking photos...
Justification: "घरकोंबड्याने" (hen-like person) is derogatory and mocking, thus conveys disgust.

Text: हे वाचुण तर मंदसैनिकांच्या बुडाला...
translated_text: Fire will burn...
Justification: The term "बुडाला आग" (burning bottom) metaphorically expresses disgust and irritation.

Text: मग रात्र भर काय करत होते...
translated_text: What were singles doing...
Justification: The rhetorical setup and "रात्र भर जागून" evokes mild surprise or curiosity.

Text: हा नाही बोलू शकनार..!!
translated_text: This is not something...
Justification: Exclamatory tone and force imply frustration, aligning with anger.

Text: राणे आणि कार्ट्यांना समजावा...
translated_text: Explain to Rane...
Justification: Despite addressing someone directly, no emotional word present.

Text: रडू नकोस.... मुंबईत...
translated_text: Don’t cry...
Justification: "रडू नकोस" (don’t cry) is mildly directive but not emotionally charged.

Text: स्वतःच्याच राज्यात मातृभाषेत...
translated_text: First CM to ask...
Justification: Commentary without emotionally provocative words.

Text: फाटल्या वर पळवून जाने...
translated_text: Running away...
Justification: "फाटल्या" (when afraid or beaten) denotes a strong emotional context—anger or insult.

Text: असे तर्कशुद्ध प्रश्न विचारणे...
translated_text: Asking rational questions...
Justification: Logical reflection, not driven by any emotionally heavy word.

Text: पायी जाणा-या महिलेच्या...
translated_text: Snatched a necklace...
Justification: "ओरबाडून" (snatched) by "भामट्यांनी" (thugs) indicates disgust at the crime.

Text: एक कोकणी म्हणून सहमत आहे...
translated_text: Same bad condition...
Justification: The reference to repeated failure "तीच दुरवस्था" expresses weariness and sadness.

Text: भविष्यातील गुलाम आजच तयार...
translated_text: Slaves of the future...
Justification: Allegorical tone without emotional spikes.

Text: खाण्यामध्ये फक्त... मूर्ख असे तीनच प्रकार येतात
translated_text: Veg, Non-Veg, Stupid...
Justification: Use of "मूर्ख" (stupid) is sarcastic but too general for strong emotion.

Text: शीउबाठा हा संपलेला पक्ष आहे...
translated_text: Xiubatha is a dead party...
Justification: "संपलेला" (dead/ended) is descriptive, not emotional.

Text: पळवापळवी हे धंदे तुमचे आहेत...
translated_text: You are running away...
Justification: "पळवापळवी" (dodging) and "आत्मपरीक्षण" (self-reflection) convey accusatory tone = anger.

Text: ही मोसंबी नारंगी पार्टीचा...
translated_text: A spectacle in Maharashtra...
Justification: Commentary but lacking emotionally strong terms.

Text: हरिश्चंद्र जिवंत असते...
translated_text: Would have killed himself...
Justification: Reference to "हरिश्चंद्र" (truthful king) + suicide creates sadness.

Text: तुमच्या सारखे पन्नास खोके वाले...
translated_text: Traitors like you...
Justification: The phrase "पन्नास खोके" (50 boxes) is sarcastically surprising—unexpected action.

Text: शास्त्रात लिहीलंय... वंशच बदलत आहेत...
translated_text: Lineage change...
Justification: Reflective tone, no strong emotional vocabulary.

Text: नोकरी जानार आणि निवड्नुक हरणार असे म्हननारे तोंडावर जाम आपटले
translated_text: Those who said they would get jobs and lose elections were slapped in the face.
Justification: The phrase 'तोंडावर जाम आपटले' expresses strong displeasure or verbal aggression, indicating anger.

Text: तुमची लायकी काय आहे ते कळाले ला हा टोमणा तुम्हालाच लागू होतो

translated_text: Build a house and a toilet first before giving.

translated_text: These are rowdy people.

translated_text: The yatra has not arrived in Maharashtra yet, but it has already broken down, it feels so good....

Text: स्वताच्या विभाग वर ज्या मंत्र्यांना विश्वास नाही असले मंत्री काय उपयोग चे
translated_text: What use are ministers who don't have faith in their own departments?

translated_text: Why are you bothering the moderate Sojwal Uddhav Thackeray, who has not managed to seize so much power?

translated_text: Yes, I want to set your ass on fire.

Text: जनता अडचणीत होती, तेव्हा कुठे होतात? गोपीचंद पडळकरांचा ठाकरेंना सवाल:

translated_text: Bad news for SBI customers! Now EMI will increase

translated_text: Is that the same slap that was received in Andheri and the ducks ran away?

translated_text: Oh, this is BJP's.

translated_text: Now teach them a lesson, they are very spoiled.

translated_text: Eating bhagar... Be careful! People are getting poisoned.. Where did the incident come to light... Read

translated_text: These NCP people will definitely get the job of baking bread for the army in a few days...

translated_text: As you move up the position, the time you will have will decrease.

translated_text: Are you ashamed to see the plight of farmers?

translated_text: Victory is ours, but everyone be vigilant.

translated_text: And you know who you are, why did you go under the flag?

Justification: Statement is observational sarcasm; neutral in emotion.

translated_text: When the Pind Daan was performed at Raigad, where did the Dang fall?

translated_text: Horrible! New variant of Corona has created a stir worldwide; Scientists expressed 'this' great fear

translated_text: No one should troll this fool....
Justification: The insult "मुर्ख" (fool) directly expresses anger and irritation.

Text: जून पर्यंत झालेल्या दडपशाहीच्या विरुद्ध मोर्चा आत्ता का काढता आहात?
translated_text: Why are you protesting now against the repression that took place until June?
Justification: The questioning tone about timing shows unexpectedness, reflecting surprise.

Text: घेतलेले जबाब ईन कॅमेरा असतात हे भोळसर जनतेला कळत नाही काय ?
translated_text: Don't the gullible public realize that the answers taken are taken on camera?
Justification: Though critical, the tone remains explanatory and thus neutral.

Text: तरी पण तुझ्या आईची डांग
translated_text: But your mother's ass
Justification: The phrase is vulgar and disrespectful, expressing strong disgust.

Text: या दोन चिवसेने मुळे महाराष्ट्रात भरपूर गोधळ झालाय.
translated_text: These two incidents have caused a lot of confusion in Maharashtra.
Justification: Though critical, it reports a situation without emotional intensity.

Text: “बीएमसी आयुक्त चहल शिंदे-फडणवीस सरकारला घाबरत आहेत, त्यामुळे…”, लटकेंच्या उमेदवारीवरून किशोरी पेडणेकरांचा गंभीर आरोप
translated_text: “BMC Commissioner Chahal is afraid of the Shinde-Fadnavis government, therefore…”, Kishori Pednekar’s serious allegation on Latke’s candidacy
Justification: Despite the accusation, the tone is political and calculated, thus neutral.

Text: काही नाही होत लिहून घ्या.... आम्ही येच करणार
translated_text: Write down nothing is happening....we will do it.
Justification: The sentence is declarative and confident, not emotionally expressive.

Text: अंगुर मिळत आहे तर घेत नाही लंगूर
translated_text: If you are getting grapes, the langur will not take them.
Justification: The idiomatic phrase adds sarcasm but lacks strong emotional content.

Text: लोकं मूर्ख आहेत का? ला सरकारचा कालावधी संपणार आहे हा तान्या राजीनामा देणार आहे.
translated_text: Are people stupid? Tanya is going to resign as the government's term is about to end.
Justification: Use of "मूर्ख" (stupid) and frustration in tone shows anger.

Text: बारामती चा म्हमद्या काही बोलला का?
translated_text: Did the old man from Baramati say anything?
Justification: The question is rhetorical but lacks strong emotion.

Text: पवारसाहेब ला माढ्यातून पळून का गेले ? ते पहिले सागं चाट्या
translated_text: Why did Pawar Saheb run away from Madhya? He licked the first straw.
Justification: The unexpected accusation and tone show surprise.

Text: गिरणीतला डबा घेऊन या आजी. हा विषय झेपणार नाही तुम्हाला
translated_text: Bring the mill box, Grandma. This topic won't work for you.
Justification: Sarcastic but mild; lacks emotional intensity.

Text: परतीच्या पावसाचा तडाखा! शेतीचे नुकसान; या जिल्ह्यांना अलर्ट जारी
translated_text: Heavy rains hit! Agricultural damage; Alert issued for these districts
Justification: News-style factual reporting; no explicit emotion.

Text: हे असले कार्टून आपल्याला लाभले हे आपलंच दुर्भाग्य म्हणावं लागेल
translated_text: It is our own misfortune that we have such cartoons.
Justification: दुर्भाग्य (misfortune) clearly shows a tone of disappointment and sadness.

Text: अरे हरामखोर म्हातारं झालाय तरी अजुन रग काय कमी होेय नाय अनगातली..
translated_text: Oh bastard, even though he has become old, he still has less anger.
Justification: The abusive word "हरामखोर" and mocking tone convey disgust.

Text: मराठी मराठी म्हणून ठाकरे यांनी मराठी लोकांच्या तोंडाला पाने पुसली
translated_text: Thackeray, as a Marathi Marathi, wiped the face of the Marathi people.
Justification: तोंडाला पाने पुसली suggests betrayal and evokes disgust.

Text: इथे बरेच फेक हॅन्डल पंचवीस तिशीतच वारलेले आहेत.. भविष्यात कधीतरी शरीराने मरतील इतकंच..!!
translated_text: Many fake handles here are dead at twenty-five or thirty.. They will die physically at some point in the future..!!
Justification: The metaphor of early mental death conveys existential sadness.

Text: राणे आणि लायकी....हा संबंध कधीच विसर्जित झालाय.
translated_text: Rane and Laiki....this relationship has never been dissolved.
Justification: The phrase sarcastically implies disappointment and disillusionment.

Text: ... तो नासला नाही तो पहिल्यापासून नासकाच आहे..
translated_text: ... It's not ruined, it's been ruined from the beginning..
Justification: नासकाच (rotten from start) evokes despair and sadness.

Text: आता कुठे गेलं तुमचं बेगडी हिंदूत्व ? ?
translated_text: Where has your Hindutva gone now?
Justification: The question is critical but lacks strong emotion; neutral tone.

Text: भाजपा ला मत म्हणजे स्त्रियांवरील होणारे अत्याचाऱ्यला मत....
translated_text: A vote for BJP means a vote for atrocities on women....
Justification: अत्याचार (atrocities) carries a heavy moral charge, conveying disgust.

Text: : ठाकरे गटासमोर आणखी एक पेच, ऋतुजा लटकेंची उमेदवारी धोक्यात?
translated_text: : Another dilemma for the Thackeray group, is Rituja Latke's candidacy in danger?
Justification: Factual reporting about political issue; no strong emotion.

Text: राजीनामा लटकवला म्हणजे चांगलीच फाटली म्हणायची....
translated_text: If you put your resignation on hold, you're pretty much screwed....
Justification: फाटली (messed up) in crude slang expresses anger and frustration.

Text: युवासेना ही आदित्य साहेबांनी उभी केलीय...तुमचा काय अधिकार आहे.
translated_text: The Youth Army was founded by Aditya Saheb...what right do you have?
Justification: Though confrontational, the tone is assertive and political.

Text: गद्दार आले अजून खोके मिळतात का ते बघायला
translated_text: The traitors came to see if they could still get the boxes.
Justification: गद्दार is used critically but tone stays sarcastic and neutral.

Text: तुम्हालाही लाचार ही उपमा कायमची आहे
translated_text: You too are forever described as helpless.
Justification: लाचार (helpless) sounds demeaning but statement stays flat-toned.

Text: सर्रास बघतोय अशा चूका, खरंच पिऊन बातम्या देतात का?
translated_text: Do you really drink and report on news like this, which is a common mistake?
Justification: The phrase "खरंच पिऊन" (really drunk) implies irresponsible behavior and evokes disgust.

Text: खरंच डोक्यात चालले आहेत हे लोक
translated_text: These people are really going crazy.
Justification: The phrase "डोक्यात चालले" reflects shock or disbelief, fitting surprise.

Text: तुमची फारच खोलून मारली राव पण
translated_text: You hit me very hard, Rao.
Justification: The phrase "खोलून मारली" (hit hard) implies emotional pain, suggesting sadness.

Text: महाराष्ट्रासाठी महत्वाच्या प्रकल्पाला ब्रेक पण खर्चिक, अनावश्यक बुलेट ट्रेन मात्र पाहिजे
translated_text: Important project for Maharashtra needs a break but costly, unnecessary bullet train
Justification: Critique is sharp but stated rationally; hence neutral.

Text: बरोबर... भ्रष्टाचार नाही, दलाली खाल्ली ने
translated_text: Right... no corruption, just bribery.
Justification: Sarcastic tone with factual framing; neutral emotion.

Text: नावं पण यांनी चोरलेली आहेत
translated_text: They have stolen even the names.
Justification: Accusatory but lacks intensity in emotional expression.

Text: मूर्ख ते आहेत का तुम्ही
translated_text: Are you stupid?
Justification: मूर्ख in questioning tone evokes disbelief and surprise.

Text: त्यांनी शेण खाल्लं म्हणून तुम्ही एक पाऊल पुढे जाणार का?
translated_text: Will you go one step further just because they ate dung?
Justification: Sarcastic analogy without emotional outburst; neutral.

Text: तू उपऱ्या आहे तेव्हा भडव्या तू कोणत्या पक्षात होता ते सांग
translated_text: Tell me, Bhadvya, which party were you on when you were a stranger?
Justification: Though abusive, the sentence is interrogative without strong emotional charge.

Text: ही बाई शिवसेना उद्धव बाळासाहेब ठाकरे ह्यांचं हिंदुत्व सांगणार आणि झाकणझुले तिची वाह वाह करणार
translated_text: This woman will talk about Shiv Sena's Uddhav Balasaheb Thackeray's Hindutva and the people will praise her with their eyes closed.
Justification: The dismissive tone and imagery express strong disapproval and disgust.

Text: अभिव्यक्ती म्हणजे बंगल्यावर बोलवून पोलिसांसमोर ठोकणे बरोबर नं
translated_text: Expression means calling someone to the bungalow and beating them in front of the police.
Justification: ठोकणे (to beat) in this context shows contempt and disgust toward misuse of power.

Text: पण आम्ही ऐकल की ही चूक ला करणार होते....
translated_text: But we heard that this mistake was going to be made...
Justification: The regretful tone shows disappointment and sadness.

Text: हे काय झालंय...कोणाचं कर्म फुटलं आहे
translated_text: What happened...whose karma has been broken?
Justification: The unexpected situation leads to rhetorical questioning; evokes surprise.

Text: याला जबाबदार कृषी उत्पन्न बाजार समिती आहे. त्याचा फटका शेतक-याला बसतोय.
translated_text: The Agricultural Produce Market Committee is responsible for this. The farmers are being affected by it.
Justification: Factual tone regarding accountability; hence neutral.

Text: खाज हा शब्द कमी वाटतो का???? मग मस्तवायु म्हणाव काय ????
translated_text: Does the word itch seem a little low???? Then what about the word breath????
Justification: Wordplay and sarcasm, but tone remains light and neutral.

Text: लई जळली का? राणे भक्त
translated_text: Did the candle burn? A devotee of Rane
Justification: Taunting tone, but lacks emotional depth; neutral.

Text: विसरलात वाटते हत्त्या करणारे कोण-कोण होते देशाला मिडिया मार्फत माहीत आहे।
translated_text: It seems like you've forgotten who the killers were. The country knows through the media who they were.
Justification: Reflective and informative tone; remains neutral.

Text: मुलगा स्वतःचं नाव देतो आणि शिष्य पक्ष प्रमुखाचे नाव देतो...या ला काय म्हणावं !!
translated_text: The boy gives his own name and the disciple gives the name of the party chief...what to say to this!!
Justification: Accusatory tone with frustration expresses anger.

Text: लाळ चाटायचं बंद करा कमीत कमी महाराष्ट्राच्या भल्याकर्ता तरी
translated_text: Stop licking your lips, at least for the good of Maharashtra.
Justification: लाळ चाटणे is symbolic of flattery; used here with contempt, evoking disgust.

Text: ही काय भानगड आहे……समजाऊन सांगेन का कोणी?
translated_text: What is this nonsense... Can someone explain it to me?
Justification: भानगड (nonsense/chaos) reflects confusion with a frustrated tone.

Text: ते अक्कल नावाचं बक्कल तुमाला नाही ना म्हणून. रुपयावर एक ट्विट करावं लागत.
translated_text: You don't have that kind of common sense, do you? You have to tweet about the rupee.
Justification: अक्कल नावाचं बक्कल mocks intelligence and evokes disgust.

Text: केसरकर ,किती खोके घेऊन भाजपाच्या मुरजी पटेलला ही जागा सोडली ...?
translated_text: Kesarkar, how many boxes did you take and leave this seat to BJP's Murji Patel...?
Justification: खोके (boxes) implies bribery; expressed with rhetorical surprise.

Text: आधी भाषा सुधार प्रितीमा काय प्रतिमा असे आहे
translated_text: First, what is the image of the language correction?
Justification: Tone is vague but descriptive; neutral overall.

Text: मराठा समाजाबद्दलची मानसिक आत्मीयता किती, हे दाखवले सावंतांच्या तान्याने .
translated_text: Sawant's Tanya showed how much mental affinity he has towards the Maratha community.
Justification: Factual expression of sentiment without emotional intensity.

Text: नारायण राणे, कृपाशंकर सिंग, प्रताप सरनाईक, यशवंत जाधव ह्यांच्या फाईल्स हरवल्या का ?
translated_text: Are the files of Narayan Rane, Kripashankar Singh, Pratap Saranaik, Yashwant Jadhav lost?
Justification: Question implies suspicion, but tone remains neutral.

Text: अक्कल गहाण ठेवली की अशी दुरबुद्धी सुचते...
translated_text: When common sense is sacrificed, such foolishness is suggested...
Justification: अक्कल गहाण ठेवली implies deep regret or loss of reason, indicating sadness.

Text: तो वाकड्या जितका कारणीभूत तितकाच हा भडवा बाळू कारणीभूत ह्या महाराष्ट्राची वाट लावायला
translated_text: This rascal is as much responsible for the path of Maharashtra as he is for the crooks.
Justification: भडवा is abusive and contemptuous, fitting disgust.

Text: हे सर्व लहानपनीच केल होता आता देश संभाळत आहे- अंध्भक्त
translated_text: All this was done in childhood, now the country is being run by a fanatic
Justification: अंध्भक्त is used critically, but tone remains neutral.

Text: काय चुकीचं बोलले? अडीच वर्ष काय झोपा काढत होता का?
translated_text: What did you say wrong? What were you sleeping for two and a half years?
Justification: झोपा काढत होता indicates sarcastic disbelief, expressing surprise.

Text: पाच पर्यंत निट मोजता पण येत नाही का रे भक्तांनों
translated_text: Can't you count to five, devotees?
Justification: निट मोजता in mocking tone evokes surprise or disbelief.

Text: एक उमदा मराठी नाट्य कलावंत आणि चित्रपट अभिनेता आज महाराष्ट्राने हरवला
translated_text: Maharashtra lost a great Marathi theatre artist and film actor today.
Justification: हरवला (lost) and reverent tone reflect sadness and respect.

Text: दबक्या पावलानं बिबट्या आला अन् अचानक घरातून…, काळजाचा थरकाप उडवणारा
translated_text: A leopard came with soft footsteps and suddenly from the house..., heart-wrenching
Justification: काळजाचा थरकाप evokes intense fear and shock.

Text: अरे तुझ्या बरोबर असलेली चिंधी सेना बोल. खरी शिवसेना उद्धव बाळासाहेब ठाकरे आहे.
translated_text: Oh, the rag army that is with you, speak up. The real Shiv Sena is Uddhav Balasaheb Thackeray.
Justification: चिंधी सेना is derogatory, yet tone is sarcastically political; neutral.

Text: मोदी सरकारला फिकीर नाही देशाची वाढतेय संख्या सुशिक्षित बेरोजगारांची!
translated_text: The Modi government is not worried about the increasing number of educated unemployed people in the country!
Justification: Concerned tone, but expressed analytically; neutral.

Text: हे होणारच होते पर्यंत तारीख पे तारीख
translated_text: This was going to happen, date by date.
Justification: तारीख पे तारीख implies delay; expressed as inevitability, neutral.

Text: याला ज्याने पाठवले त्याच्या बुडात दम नाही
translated_text: Whoever sent this is out of breath.
Justification: Crude and mocking tone shows contempt, fitting disgust.

Text: त्यांना वकील मिळणे हे सुद्धा भारताचे दुर्दैव म्हणावे लागेल.
translated_text: It is also unfortunate for India that they are getting a lawyer.
Justification: दुर्दैव (misfortune) conveys disappointment and national sadness.

Text: हा गुंड पण कोणत्या पक्षाचा होता सांगायची गरज नाही...
translated_text: There's no need to say which party this goon belonged to...
Justification: गुंड (goon) used critically, yet tone remains controlled and neutral.

Text: मुरजी पडणार हे निश्चित होते, घाबरून भाजपाने माघार घेतली.
translated_text: It was certain that Murji would fall, and the BJP backed down out of fear.
Justification: The phrase "घाबरून माघार घेतली" (backed down in fear) directly expresses fear.

Text: चेष्टेचा विषय असलेली खासदार.. लोकं ह्यांच्या तोंडावर हसतात
translated_text: MPs who are the subject of jokes.. People laugh at their faces.
Justification: हसतात (laugh) and "चेष्टेचा विषय" (subject of jokes) express joy through mockery.

Text: दम लागतो....तो तुझ्यात नाही.....
translated_text: It takes my breath away....it's not in you.....
Justification: The phrase "दम लागतो" implies pressure and fear, aimed critically.

Text: ला त्यांच्याच गावातून हाकलले बर का... पुढच्या वेळेस आमदारकी पण जाणार...
translated_text: Why was he expelled from his own village? He will also run for MLA next time...
Justification: Descriptive and political without emotional tone.

Text: भारतात राहून माज करतात.. यांना वेळीच ठेचलं पाहिजे.. त्याशिवाय सुधारणार नाही हे.
translated_text: They live in India and do evil. They should be stopped in time. Otherwise, there will be no improvement.
Justification: ठेचलं पाहिजे implies strong stance, but tone remains politically critical, not emotional.

Text: पाहून रिप्लाय न करणाऱ्याची संख्या दिवसेंदिवस वाढतच चालली आहे
translated_text: The number of people who don't reply after seeing it is increasing day by day.
Justification: Statement is observational; neutral.

Text: उमेदवारी अर्ज न भरणे ही संस्कृती आणि उमेदवारी अर्ज भरून मागे घेणे ही विकृती.
translated_text: Not filing nomination papers is a culture and filing and withdrawing nomination papers is a perversion.
Justification: विकृती (perversion) conveys contempt and disgust.

Text: अशा पद्धतीचे सल्ले तुझासारख्या छपरी नाच्याकडन पण नाही घेणार
translated_text: I wouldn't take such advice even from a scoundrel like you.
Justification: छपरी नाच्या is a derogatory term, expressing disgust.

Text: त्यांचे नाव घेतल्याशिवाय अन्न पण गोड लागत नाही का सतरंजी छाप प्रवक्ते लोकांना
translated_text: Doesn't the food taste sweet without mentioning their name? Satranji Print spokesperson asks people
Justification: Sarcastic but lacks emotional force.

Text: आमच्या मुख्यमंत्र्यांनी काय घोडा मारलाय तुमचा, त्यांचा फोटो का नाही
translated_text: What has our Chief Minister done to you, why is there no photo of him?
Justification: घोडा मारलाय used sarcastically expresses surprise.

Text: चीन किती आत "घुसला" हे अजून कळाले नाही साहेबाना???
translated_text: You still don't know how far China has "infiltrated", sir???
Justification: घुसला (infiltrated) and mocking tone express disgust.

Text: नारायण राणे आणि त्यांच्या बेडकांना पण हे सांगा आधी
translated_text: Tell this to Narayan Rane and his frogs first.
Justification: बेडकांना is mocking but tone is politically critical; neutral.

Text: याच शरद पवारांनी शिवसैनिकांना कुत्रे असे संबोधले होते
translated_text: This same Sharad Pawar had called Shiv Sainiks dogs.
Justification: Recounting past incident; descriptive tone.

Text: हे सगळे खरं पण गद्दारी एका खुनशीची हा डाग कसा पुसणार?
translated_text: All this is true, but how can a traitor erase the stain of a murderer?
Justification: गद्दारी (betrayal) and "डाग" (stain) imply anger and blame.

Text: हो तुम्ही जणू काय जनतेला आरामात जगू देताय, महागाई दिसत नाही वाटतं
translated_text: Yes, it seems like you are letting the people live comfortably, you don't see inflation.
Justification: Sarcastic tone, politically critical; neutral.

Text: ते बहुतेक वाघ बोलले पण हा तर लबाड बोका दिसतोय
translated_text: They mostly talked like tigers, but this one looks like a lying goat.
Justification: लबाड बोका is satirical but flat in tone.

Text: तो घरच्या कुटुंबासमवेत अशी असभ्य भाषा बोलतो
translated_text: He speaks such rude language with his family at home.
Justification: असभ्य भाषा (rude language) in domestic context evokes disgust.

Text: ह्यांना एकदा आपलं रामायण एकवावे लागेल सर.... चुकीचे रामायण वाचत आहेत हे!
translated_text: They will have to read their Ramayana once, sir... They are reading the wrong Ramayana!
Justification: चुकीचे रामायण (wrong narrative) used metaphorically to express frustration and anger.

Text: हे कोर्टाला कळायला नको ? नको तो शहाणपना सांगताना ??
translated_text: Shouldn't the court know this? Shouldn't he be telling the truth?
Justification: Frustrated tone with rhetorical questioning expresses anger.

Text: बरोबर आहे हे तसच आहे जस देशात बेकारी नाहीच गरिब वाढलेत
translated_text: That's right, it's just like there is no unemployment in the country, but the poor have increased.
Justification: Sarcasm about policies; stated neutrally.

Text: चार आण्याचा माणूस तुझ्या मालकाने मंत्रिमंडळात का ठेवला होता?
translated_text: Why did your master put a four-figure man in the cabinet?
Justification: चार आण्याचा माणूस as insult reflects surprise or disbelief.

Text: तू कोणते दिवे लावणार ते पण सांग
translated_text: Also tell me which lights you will put on.
Justification: Mocking but emotionally flat; neutral.

Text: ह्यांच इंजान ट्रॅकवर यायच नाव घेईना आणि हे ईमान उडवायला लागलेत
translated_text: This engine won't even come on the track and it's starting to blow up.
Justification: Metaphor of failure shows frustration and anger.

Text: ह्या बाळाला हेच रमेश वाळुंज च्या वेळी नव्हते सुचले का
translated_text: Did you realize that this baby didn't have this during Ramesh Walunj's time?
Justification: Questioning past behavior with surprise.

Text: अत्यंत मूर्खपणा दिसून आला आहे तुमचा
translated_text: You have shown great stupidity.
Justification: अत्यंत मूर्खपणा is direct criticism indicating disgust.

Text: वागले म्हणजे भुंकणाऱ्या कुत्र्या पेक्षा कमी किंमत असलेला माणूस
translated_text: A man who behaves is worth less than a barking dog.
Justification: Animal insult comparison conveys deep contempt; disgust.

Text: तयार रहा लवकरचं मोठा भूकंप होणार
translated_text: Be prepared, a big earthquake will happen soon.
Justification: मोठा भूकंप (big earthquake) metaphorically or literally implies fear.

Text: अपयश पदरात पडल्यावर काही उरले नाही म्हणून जबाबदारी घ्यायला कोणी पुढे आले नाही.
translated_text: When failure struck, no one came forward to take responsibility because there was nothing left.
Justification: Summary of behavior post-failure; stated in reflective neutral tone.

Text: सरकार कमजोर आहे अशा गोष्टि होत राहतील अस वाटतय……..अशा घोषणा द्यायची हिम्मत आजपर्यंत झाली नाहीं
translated_text: I feel like things like the government is weak will continue to happen... I haven't had the courage to make such a statement till now.
Justification: Critical reflection, not emotionally heightened.

Text: भातखळकर साहेब गद्दारांना बोलल्यावर भाजपला का लागावं? गद्दारांशी नातं काय?
translated_text: Why should Bhatkhalkar join BJP when he talks about traitors? What is his relationship with traitors?
Justification: गद्दारांशी नातं (relationship with traitors) used to express disgust.

Text: तु काय मातोश्री वर वॉचमन आहेत का? ज्यांना भेट नाकारली मंग तु जाऊन भेट.
translated_text: Are you a watchman on Mother Earth? Those who refused to meet, please go and meet them.
Justification: Sarcastic confrontation, expressing anger.

Text: अर्थात जे हे ठाकरेंचे ट्विट प्रभावित होऊन करणारे भक्त आहेत त्यांची कीव करावी
translated_text: Of course, those who are followers of Thackeray's tweets and are influenced by them should be envied.
Justification: कीव करावी (should be pitied) implies sarcasm, but overall the tone remains neutral.

Text: अनाजीपंतांची पिलावळ अजुन ही तसेच वागतेय, तेच निच “तिडे” चालुच आहेत.
translated_text: The grain farmers' plight is still the same, the same "tides" are still going on.
Justification: निच तिडे (low moves) suggests criticism, but the tone is reflective, hence neutral.

Text: वेडा झाला आहे हा भातखळकर
translated_text: This rice farmer has gone crazy.
Justification: वेडा झाला (gone mad) indicates disbelief or surprise.

Text: महाराष्ट्र पिंजून काढणार होते
translated_text: Maharashtra was going to be captured.
Justification: Statement is ambiguous and lacks emotional intensity.

Text: दुसऱ्याने खाल्लं म्हणजे आपण पण खाल्लाच पाहिजे का ?
translated_text: Does it mean that if someone else eats it, we must eat it too?
Justification: The rhetorical tone expresses frustration and disapproval, indicating anger.

Text: खोके सर्व ओके अशी आहे का?
translated_text: Is everything okay with the box?
Justification: खोके (boxes) implies bribery, but phrased as a question; tone remains neutral.

Text: पुण्याचा विकास पण गुजरात सारखा बुडाला.
translated_text: Pune's development also stalled like Gujarat.
Justification: Comparative and critical, but not emotionally strong.

Text: एकाच घरात एक देशभक्त आणि एक देशद्रोही असू शकतात तर
translated_text: Can there be a patriot and a traitor in the same house?
Justification: The contrast of "देशभक्त" and "देशद्रोही" carries deep disapproval and disgust.

Text: टोमणे मारण्यापूर्वी कोणी विचार करत नाही, बेरोजगारांची अवस्था कोणी विचारत नाही.
translated_text: No one thinks before taunting, no one asks about the plight of the unemployed.
Justification: The complaint reflects social neglect and contempt, conveying disgust.

Text: स्वतःच्या स्वार्थासाठी दुसऱ्याचे घर बोलणारा प्राणी म्हणजे माणूस..
translated_text: A human being is an animal that speaks of another's house for his own selfish interests.
Justification: Philosophical tone lacking emotional outburst; neutral.

Text: घ्या ही यांची अक्कल
translated_text: Take this as their advice.
Justification: Sarcastic, but not emotionally intense; neutral.

Text: ह्याला लवकर काढल पाहिजे खुप घाण करतो हा.
translated_text: This needs to be removed soon, it's making a lot of mess.
Justification: खुप घाण करतो (makes a lot of mess) implies strong disapproval and disgust.

Text: हा हा हा मनसे वाले खा शिव्या लायकी बघा आपली
translated_text: Ha ha ha MNS people, look at your worth.
Justification: Mocking laughter "हा हा हा" and tone suggest joy through ridicule.

Text: शिंदाची नजर बघा लालची पण सत्तेची हाव लोभ दिसतय फोटो स्पष्ट होते चित्र
translated_text: Look at Shinda's eyes, greedy but lust for power is visible, the photo is clear.
Justification: लालची (greedy) shows criticism, but tone remains descriptive.

Text: त्या राकेश राम ऐवजी अबिनाश नादराजन किंवा बाळासाहेब जाधव ला का नाही खेळवत??
translated_text: Why not play Abinash Nadarajan or Balasaheb Jadhav instead of Rakesh Ram?
Justification: Expressed as a question; neutral.

Text: हे पत्र भाजप ने आपल्याकडून स्वतःला पाठवून घेतल... अख्खा महाराष्ट्र जाणतो
translated_text: BJP will send this letter to itself... the whole of Maharashtra knows it.
Justification: Claiming awareness without emotional escalation; neutral.

Text: तेव्हा असल्यानं विश्र्वगुर, फेकू बाबा यांच्या नेतृत्वात सर्वांना घरी राहण्याचे सांगण्यात आले होते.
translated_text: Since it was then, everyone was asked to stay at home under the leadership of Vishvagur and Feku Baba.
Justification: Satirical tone, but no emotional peak; neutral.

Text: कलंक आहे तुम्हीं लोक... इतिहासात गद्दार म्हणुन नोंद होईल तुमची.
translated_text: There is stigma you people... you will be recorded as traitors in history.
Justification: कलंक (stigma) and "गद्दार" (traitor) evoke strong contempt and disgust.

Text: राज्यातील लाखों तरुणांचा रोजगार घालवल्यानंतर आता गरीब कष्टकरी लोकांच्या तोंडचा घास देखील हिसकावणार का...???
translated_text: After destroying the employment of lakhs of youth in the state, will they now snatch the bread from the mouths of the poor and working people...???
Justification: तोंडचा घास हिसकावणार is emotionally charged with anger and injustice.

Text: भक्तांनो फकीर तोच आहे, पण बदलत नाहीये.
translated_text: Devotees, the fakir is the same, but he is not changing.
Justification: Statement is observational; neutral.

Text: चे विचार धारी, हसू करून घेतल राव
translated_text: Think of Dhari, Rao will make you smile.
Justification: Sentiment is positive but not expressive enough for joy; neutral.

Text: नको येऊ रे बाबा नाहीतर अजुन एक वाढेल मैला खाणारा पत्रकार.
translated_text: Don't come, Dad, or else another journalist will grow up to be a scumbag.
Justification: मैला खाणारा (filth eater) is a harsh insult, reflecting disgust.

Text: ते ऑगस्टदरम्यान कोकण आणि मध्य महाराष्ट्रात अतिवृष्टीचा इशारा..
translated_text: Warning of heavy rainfall in Konkan and Madhya Maharashtra from August to September.
Justification: Weather update with no emotional content.

Text: मुख्यमंत्र्यांनी नातवासह लुटला धूलिवंदनाचा आनंद
translated_text: Chief Minister along with his grandson enjoyed the joy of Dhuli Vandana
Justification: आनंद (joy) and festive context express happiness.

Text: ती मशाल गद्दारांच्या ढुंगणाला चटके देण्यासाठी पण आहे.
translated_text: That torch is also there to give a kick to the buttocks of traitors.
Justification: गद्दारांच्या ढुंगणाला चटके (kick to traitors) shows disdain and disgust.

Text: अजिबात नाही,
translated_text: Not at all,
Justification: Too short to infer emotion; neutral.

Text: देव ईमानदार लोकांच्या सोबत असतो............... त्यामुळे आपले हे वक्तव्य कितपत योग्य आहे हे जनतेला ठाऊक.
translated_text: God is with the honest people............... So the people know how correct this statement of yours is.
Justification: Religious belief-based argument; neutral tone.

Text: महाराष्ट्राच्या खेळाडूवर दु:खाचा डोंगर, लढतीपूर्वीच प्रशिक्षकांचे निधन, पण तरीही तो लढला आणि…
translated_text: A mountain of grief for a Maharashtra player, the coach passed away before the match, but he still fought and...
Justification: दु:खाचा डोंगर (mountain of grief) indicates deep sadness.

Text: शेवाळ्या ला शिवसैनिक तुमचा शेवाळ बाहेर काढल्या शिवाय राहणार नाही...
translated_text: Shiv Sainiks will not stop until you remove the moss from your lawn...
Justification: Metaphorical and aggressive, but not emotionally expressive; neutral.

Text: लग्नाच्या मांडवा मधून बिना लग्न होता करवली लोकांना घेऊन निघालेला नवरदेव
translated_text: The groom left the wedding tent without taking the people who were supposed to be married.
Justification: Unusual situation described with no explicit emotion; neutral.

Text: म्हणुन मुंबई गुजरात गुवाहाटी गेली का
translated_text: So why did Mumbai go to Guwahati, Gujarat?
Justification: Sarcastic but no strong emotional tone.

Text: तुमची आई गहाण आहे..... आरएसएस खाली
translated_text: Your mother is in debt..... RSS down
Justification: Insulting, but context is vague; neutral.

Text: तुझी लायकी किती तू बोलतेस किती ह्यावेळी नगरसेवक सुद्धा होणार नाहीस तू
translated_text: You talk so much about your worth that you won't even be a corporator at this time.
Justification: लायकी (worthlessness) used insultingly; expresses disgust.

Text: तु ज्या निलेश राने चा समर्थक आहे तो आधी संघ विरोधी होता..
translated_text: Nilesh Rane, whom you support, was previously anti-Sangh.
Justification: Stated as a fact or political reminder; neutral.

Text: सगळंच जर फसण करताय मग मुख्यमंत्री कुठ हाय त्यांना काय मान हलवायला ठेवलाय का.
translated_text: If everything is being rigged, then where is the Chief Minister? Why are they making him bow down?
Justification: फसण and rhetorical tone show frustration and anger.

Text: जास्त शहाणपण करायचे नाही बांबू पडतील मग समजेल
translated_text: I don't want to be too wise, the bamboo will fall, then I will understand.
Justification: Playful threat, lacks deep emotional tone; neutral.

Text: या कमी दाबाच्या पट्टयाची व्याप्ती भलतीच आहे, पॅरिस मध्येही पाऊस.!!
translated_text: The extent of this low pressure area is amazing, it's raining even in Paris!!
Justification: पाऊस and excitement about Paris rain reflect joy.

Text: स्वार्थासाठी जय भीम आज समाजातला नोकरदार वर्ग कलाकार वर्ग जय भीम जात सांगायला लाजतो
translated_text: For selfish reasons, Jai Bhim, the working class and the artist class in today's society are ashamed to say Jai Bhim, their caste.
Justification: लाजतो and the tone of betrayal express disgust.

Text: या छग्याचे आयबाप मंदिरासमोर फुलमाळा विकायचे. विसरला हा
translated_text: This guy's father used to sell garlands in front of the temple. Forgot this
Justification: Reminiscent and factual; no emotional weight—neutral.

Text: अजिबात शक्यता वाटत नाही.
translated_text: It doesn't seem likely at all.
Justification: Expressed as a personal belief or judgment; neutral tone.

Text: … आणि श्वेताचं हेच बोलणं त्याच्या मनातील संतापाला हवा देणारे ठरलं.
translated_text: … and Shweta's words fueled his anger.
Justification: संतापाला हवा (fueled anger) clearly conveys anger.

Text: बुजगावणं करून ठेवलंय
translated_text: It has been kept in a state of confusion.
Justification: Descriptive and emotionally flat; neutral.

Text: म्हणजे शिंदे सरकार वर भरोसा नाही आहे तर
translated_text: So, there is no trust in the Shinde government.
Justification: Factual and reflective in tone.

Text: हात पकडायला दिला तर कानात मुतू नये अशी म्हण आहे.
translated_text: There is a saying that if you let someone hold your hand, don't let them touch your ear.
Justification: The metaphor suggests exploitation, conveying disgust.

Text: यावर पण बोला किती निच लोकं आहेत काळात
translated_text: Talk about how low people are these days.
Justification: निच लोकं (low people) is critical, but tone stays flat—neutral.

Text: वर्षे झालं मुंबईत हुजरेगिरी सेनेची सत्ता असून, ही आयोध्या काय झोपली होती कां?
translated_text: It's been years since the Hujregiri Sena was in power in Mumbai, but was Ayodhya sleeping?
Justification: Political questioning; lacks emotional depth.

Text: मंद असलं का असं सुचत असत.
translated_text: They would suggest that it be slow.
Justification: Sarcastic and light; neutral.

Text: शिक्षणाचं महत्त्व समजू न शकणारे महाराष्ट्राला मिळणं हे दुर्भाग्य..
translated_text: It is unfortunate that Maharashtra has people who do not understand the importance of education.
Justification: दुर्दैव (misfortune) suggests regret, but tone remains calm—neutral.

Text: हे खरे आहे की, महाराष्ट्रात अनेक अवैध स्थलांतरित नागरिक आहेत. यावर शासनाने कठोर कारवाई करावी
translated_text: It is true that there are many illegal immigrants in Maharashtra. The government should take strict action against this.
Justification: Policy suggestion with assertive tone; neutral.

Text: चांगलं काम केलं तरी हे मनसेवर टीका करणारच.. मंद केकप्रेमी
translated_text: Even if they do good work, they will criticize MNS.. Slow cake lovers
Justification: केकप्रेमी is a mocking label, but overall tone is sarcastic—neutral.

Text: ?? महाराष्ट्रासाठी याच काय योगदान आहे?????
translated_text: ?? What is this contribution to Maharashtra?????
Justification: Repetitive question marks and rhetorical tone reflect surprise or disbelief.

Text: थापा आडनाव असणाऱ्या लोकांवर "विश्वास" ठेवायचा असतो का ?
translated_text: Should we "trust" people with the surname "Thapa"?
Justification: Play on words and surnames; sarcastic but emotionally neutral.

Text: माढयातून पळ काढून पळून गेलेल्या साहेबांवर अशी टीका योग्य नाही
translated_text: Such criticism is not appropriate for a gentleman who escaped from Madha.
Justification: पळून गेलेल्या and defense suggest disapproval, conveying disgust.

Text: मराठी भाषेत द्वेष करणारा पक्ष आहे हा
translated_text: This is a hateful party in Marathi language.
Justification: द्वेष करणारा (hateful) is emotionally charged and conveys disgust.

Text: ह्या आशा वागणुकीला घाणेरडे राजकारण म्हणतात... आणि हे असे राजकारण हेच करू शकतात.
translated_text: This hopeful behavior is called dirty politics... and this is what politics can do.
Justification: Critical but reflective tone; emotionally neutral.

Text: केवळ प्रसिद्धी साठी हपापलेले समाज आहे हा...
translated_text: This is a society that is only hungry for fame...
Justification: हपापलेले implies criticism, but lacks emotional depth.

Text: आता भायखळा भाजी मंडईच्या लुःखा टप्पोरी, हफ्टाखोर आम्हाला शिकवणार का
translated_text: Now, will the Lukha Tappori and Haftakhor of Byculla vegetable market teach us?
Justification: लुःखा टप्पोरी is mocking, but tone is dismissive—neutral.

Text: लटके जेव्हा हायकोर्टात गेल्या तेव्हा तुम्हाला महाराष्ट्राची राजकीय संस्क्रृती ठाऊक नव्हती का?
translated_text: When Latke went to the High Court, were you not aware of the political culture of Maharashtra?
Justification: Questioning but emotionally flat; neutral.

Text: पत्रा चाळीतील गरीब मराठी लोकांना बेघर करताना लाज कशी वाटली नाही !!
translated_text: How could you not feel ashamed while evicting the poor Marathi people of Patra Chali!!
Justification: लाज कशी वाटली नाही (no shame?) evokes moral disgust.

Text: शिवरायांच्या भूमीत स्वपक्षीयांशी गद्दारी केली तर चालतंय का ?
translated_text: Is it okay to betray your own party in the land of Shivaji?
Justification: गद्दारी (betrayal) in a rhetorical question shows anger and moral outrage.

Text: वेड्या महाराष्ट्रात कॅम्युनिसटा चा बेस किती मोठा आहे?
translated_text: How big is the communist base in crazy Maharashtra?
Justification: वेड्या महाराष्ट्रात with rhetorical phrasing expresses surprise.

Text: आणि भाजपला मत म्हणजे देश विकणार्याला मत!
translated_text: And a vote for BJP means a vote for someone who is selling out the country!
Justification: देश विकणार्याला मत (vote for traitors) expresses strong political anger.

Text: फालतू माणूस आहे तो तुषार भोसले
translated_text: Tushar Bhosale is a useless person.
Justification: Insulting, but phrased plainly; emotionally neutral.

Text: तो पर्यंत हापापुन हापापुन आणि पिसाळून पिसाळून, पणं का होईना गद्दाराना चिकटूनच राहिन?
translated_text: Gasping and writhing till then, why still cling to traitors?
Justification: गद्दाराना चिकटून (clinging to traitors) implies contempt and disgust.

Text: बरोबर देवा भौ..किती ती जळजळ..
translated_text: Oh my god..how hot she is..
Justification: जळजळ (burning with envy or heat) is metaphorical; shows surprise or mocking.

Text: जळली का तुझी. दिल्लीतल्या बापाची पण जळली असेलच.
translated_text: Are you burned? Your father in Delhi must have been burned too.
Justification: जळली (burned) sarcastically implies jealousy or surprise.

Text: तिरकीट ताथैया लेकाच्या गोंधळ प्रकरणामुळे गप्प बसला असेल. नायतर नाचत आला असता इतक्यात.
translated_text: Tirkit must have been silent because of the chaos in Lake Tathaya. Naytar would have come dancing at that moment.
Justification: Commentary with light sarcasm; neutral.

Text: एकदम बईकि आणि बालिश अर्गुमेंट आहे एकदम तुमच्या सहेबान सारखं
translated_text: It's a very silly and childish argument, just like your friend.
Justification: बालिश अर्गुमेंट (childish argument) expresses contempt and disgust.

Text: तुमच्या बुद्धीची कीव करावी तेवढी कमी आहे
translated_text: Your intelligence is so low that it is hard to envy it.
Justification: Sarcastic, yet emotionally flat—neutral.

Text: तसं तर होणार आहे पण विजय शिवसेना चा नाही.
translated_text: That is going to happen, but the victory will not be for Shiv Sena.
Justification: Predictive and factual; neutral.

Text: नुसत्या धमक्या आणि निकृष्ट दर्जाच ट्रोलींग एवढच काम दिलय राणे, पडळकर, राणा, वाघ यांना...
translated_text: Rane, Padalkar, Rana, Wagh are being given only threats and low-quality trolling...
Justification: Critical but measured; emotionally neutral.

Text: भारतच नाही तर देशांनी नोंद केली आहे ... गद्दार म्हणून .
translated_text: Not only India but countries have recorded... as traitors.
Justification: गद्दार is harsh, but the tone is descriptive—neutral.

Text: आपण तीन बुटक्या माणसांचे फोटो लाऊ हा बाळा, गप उगी उगी.
translated_text: Let's take a picture of three short people, baby, talk big.
Justification: बुटक्या used mockingly, but humor dominates; neutral.

Text: लटके यांना उमेदवारी साठी तसेच राजीनाम्यासाठी लटकवत ठेवलं आहे.!
translated_text: Latke is being kept hanging for both candidacy and resignation!
Justification: लटकवत ठेवलं (kept hanging) conveys frustration and anger.

Text: तुझी उद्धव साहेब ठाकरे बद्दल बोलण्याची लायकी नाही...
translated_text: You are not qualified to talk about Uddhav Saheb Thackeray...
Justification: लायकी नाही (not qualified) is dismissive but tone is controlled—neutral.

Text: तुझी तेवढी लायकी नाही आसे बोलण्याची
translated_text: You don't deserve to be talked about like that.
Justification: लायकी नाही used critically indicates disgust.

Text: तु पण अडकणार स्वाभिमान विकणारांनी आम्हाला शिकवू नये
translated_text: You too will get stuck, those who sell self-respect should not teach us.
Justification: स्वाभिमान विकणारांनी is harsh, but sentiment remains restrained.

Text: हा आहे जगातील सर्वात भयावह महामार्ग, चालत्या कार होतात गायब! जाणून घ्या, रहस्य
translated_text: This is the most terrifying highway in the world, moving cars disappear! Know the secret
Justification: भयावह (terrifying) and vanishing cars evoke fear and intrigue.

Text: तुझ्या नवरदेव ने घेतलेल्या लाचेचे पैशे देना.. जनते कडुन भिक का मगत बसली आहे ताई.
translated_text: Give me the bribe money that your husband took.. Why are you begging from the public, Aunty?
Justification: भिक मगत (begging) used sarcastically indicates surprise.

Text: अंधभक्तांना काम भेटलं बंडखोरांच्या मेळावात तारखेला गर्दी जमवून /- रुपयांत भाडोत्री कार्यकर्ते देण्याचं...
translated_text: Blind devotees got a job to gather a crowd at the rebels' gathering on a certain date and pay mercenary workers for /- rupees...
Justification: अंधभक्तांना काम highlights routine political crowd-gathering without emotional charge, so neutral.

Text: आमच्याकडे लस्सी भक्तांची कमी नाही
translated_text: We have no shortage of lassi devotees.
Justification: The phrase "लस्सी भक्तांची कमी नाही" neutrally states abundance, not expressing emotion.

Text: सत्तेत असताना मोठी भरती होणे शक्य नाही... सगळ्या जागा च्या निडणुकांपूर्वी येतील..
translated_text: It is not possible to have a big recruitment while in power... All the seats will come before the elections..
Justification: The phrase "मोठी भरती होणे शक्य नाही" is a factual comment, neutral in sentiment.

Text: ह्यांचा चेहरा बघून रौत्याला जैल पासून सुटका पण भेटत नाही, फायदा कोणाला होईल?
translated_text: Seeing their faces doesn't even get Rautya out of jail, who will benefit?
Justification: चेहरा बघून implies skepticism but does not convey strong feeling, so neutral.

Text: हे नकारात्मक आहे
translated_text: This is negative.
Justification: नकारात्मक (negative) clearly signals disapproval or disgust.

Text: मराठी मराठी करून मराठी माणसाला च खड्ड्यात घातले
translated_text: Marathi Marathi people are being thrown into a pit by doing Marathi.
Justification: The phrase "खड्ड्यात घातले" (thrown into a pit) expresses disgust at the situation.

Text: बेरोजगारी, महागाई, भ्रष्टाचार यावर पण एखादा महोत्सव साजरा करा...
translated_text: Celebrate a festival on unemployment, inflation, corruption...
Justification: The sarcastic use of "महोत्सव साजरा करा" (celebrate a festival) shows disgust at issues.

Text: आजकाल फेमस होण्यासाठी लोकं कमरेची सोडून देतात ही त्यातलीच
translated_text: This is one of the reasons why people give up their waists to become famous these days.
Justification: फेमस होण्यासाठी (to become famous) is stated without strong emotion, thus neutral.

Text: तुझ्या वर भीक मागुन खायची वेळ आली का..?
translated_text: Is it time for you to beg and eat?
Justification: भीक मागुन खायची (beg and eat) is a rhetorical question, tone is neutral.

Text: ये डर जरूरी है पराभवाचा परिणाम पुढील निवडणुकांवर होऊ नये म्हणून सेफ गेम प्ले...
translated_text: This fear is necessary, so that the defeat does not affect the next elections, we have to play a safe game...
Justification: डर जरूरी है (fear is necessary) is analytical, not emotional, hence neutral.

Text: संघी कोण आहे नीट बघ फुकण्या
translated_text: Look carefully who is Sanghi, Fukanya.
Justification: नीट बघ (look carefully) is an instruction, not emotional.

Text: नामर्द म्हणजे काय रे भोसळ्या
translated_text: What is Namard, Bhosle?
Justification: नामर्द (impotent) is questioning, but not charged emotionally.

Text: राघोबा नीचंच होता…पण तोडून मोडून इतिहास कशाला मांडायचा?
translated_text: Raghoba was a hero...but why break up history and present it in a broken way?
Justification: The phrase "तोडून मोडून इतिहास" (breaking up history) signals disappointment, hence sadness.

Text: म्हणजे परीक्षा देणारे गांडू आहेत का?
translated_text: So are the test takers worms?
Justification: परीक्षा देणारे गांडू (test takers are worms) is provocative but lacks emotional force.

Text: पण असल्या लोकांना सामोरं जाऊन सर्वांसमोर कोलणारा माणूस फडणवीसच
translated_text: But the only person who can confront such people and humiliate them in front of everyone is Fadnavis.
Justification: कोलणारा माणूस (one who humiliates) signals contempt and disgust.

Text: मुंबईत पाऊस किती पडावा हे महापालिका ठरवते, तेही भाजपाची सत्ता नसलेली महापालिका.... अकल शुन्य माणूस....
translated_text: The municipal corporation decides how much rain falls in Mumbai, that too without BJP in power.... A mindless person....
Justification: अकल शुन्य माणूस (mindless person) is direct insult, expressing disgust.

Text: दुसरी दिवाळी आलीये, तेवढ पैशाच काम कर आता तरी (संदर्भासाठी)
translated_text: The second Diwali has come, work for that much money now (for reference)
Justification: पैशाच काम कर (work for money) is stated flatly, so neutral.

Text: आष्टीमध्ये शेतकऱ्यांच्या बांधावर; अतिवृष्टीमुळे झालेल्या नुकसानीची पाहणी!
translated_text: Farmers' dam in Ashti; Inspection of damage caused by heavy rain!
Justification: नुकसानीची पाहणी (inspection of damage) is factual and neutral.

Text: झेपेल का संघोट्यांना, आधीच राहुल गांधीजींच्या भारत जोड़ो यात्रेने संघोट्यांची फाटली आहे……
translated_text: Will the Sanghoti party be defeated? Rahul Gandhi's Bharat Jodo Yatra has already torn the Sanghoti party apart...
Justification: फाटली आहे (torn apart) conveys a sense of sadness and defeat.

Text: उमेदवारी दुसऱ्या व्यक्ती ला का दिली नाही..? पती पेक्षा पक्ष महत्वाचा का...?
translated_text: Why wasn't the candidacy given to another person? Why is the party more important than the husband?
Justification: उमेदवारी (candidacy) questioned in a surprised, incredulous tone.

Text: भ्रष्टाचारी पतीला ईडी सी.बी.इ. पासून वाचवनारी सावीचीत्रा ताई.. धन्य हो.. पगार वेळेवर मिळतो का..??
translated_text: Savichitra Tai, who saved her corrupt husband from ED CBE.. Be blessed.. Do you get your salary on time..??
Justification: भ्रष्टाचारी पतीला (corrupt husband) and sarcasm show anger.

Text: हा पोलच घटनाबाह्य होता... आर्टिकल    नुसार हा पोल अवैध आहे...
translated_text: This poll itself was unconstitutional... According to the article, this poll is illegal...
Justification: घटनाबाह्य (unconstitutional) and "अवैध" (illegal) are strong words expressing anger.

Text: म्हणुनच सभांना गर्दी होते पण मतं मात्र मिळत नाही
translated_text: That's why meetings are crowded but votes are not received.
Justification: सभांना गर्दी (crowded meetings) states a fact, not an emotion.

Text: व्यापारी, उद्योजक आणि व्यावसायिकांनो, सावधान! जीएसटी विभागाने दिला हा गंभीर इशारा
translated_text: Traders, entrepreneurs and businessmen, be careful! GST department has given this serious warning
Justification: गंभीर इशारा (serious warning) signals fear or caution.

Text: स्वायत्त हा शब्दच आता हास्यास्पद वाटायला लागला आहे.
translated_text: The very word "autonomy" is now starting to sound ridiculous.
Justification: The phrase "हास्यास्पद वाटायला लागला" (has started to sound ridiculous) shows mockery and clear disdain, indicating disgust.

Text: : जय शाह यांच्या वक्तव्याने भडकला पाकिस्तान, भारताला दिली ही धमकी…
translated_text: Pakistan was angered by Jay Shah's statement, he gave this threat to India...
Justification: The use of "भडकला" (angered) and "धमकी" (threat) reflects heightened political aggression and anger.

Text: चॅनेलसाठी टायर मध्ये मार खाल्ला राव त्यांनी...जरासुद्धा किंमत नाही चॅनेलला त्याची
translated_text: Rao beat the tires for the channel...he is not worth it at all for the channel.
Justification: किंमत नाही (not valued) is critical, but the tone remains neutral and descriptive.

Text: काँग्रेसला एक आक्रमक चेहरा असणारा अध्यक्ष हवा होता.
translated_text: Congress wanted a president with an aggressive face.
Justification: This is a factual political observation, without emotional content — neutral.

Text: अरे भाऊ पहिलाच उमेदवार उभा नाही करायचं होत ना,,कशाला ड्रामा करत आहात.
translated_text: Hey brother, you didn't want to stand as the first candidate, why are you creating drama?
Justification: The rhetorical question "कशाला ड्रामा" (why the drama?) implies exasperation and surprise.

Text: अनाजीपंताकडून पुरस्कार घेतला  आता साहेब नाराज होणार, तांड्यावर मटण नाही खाणार बाजूला बसून.
translated_text: I received the award from Anajipant, now the boss will be angry, I won't eat mutton on the table, I will sit on the sidelines.
Justification: Sarcastic tone and reference to "नाराज होणार" (will be angry) show resentment, hence anger.

Text: आमच्याकडे बलात्कार्याना निर्दोष सोडून त्यांचा सत्कार करून मिळेल..- - भाजपा
translated_text: We will get rapists acquitted and felicitated..- - BJP
Justification: Sarcastic praise using "सत्कार" (felicitate) turns into bitter humor — interpreted as dark joy.

Text: जातीवाचक बोलले का हा गुन्हा होत नाही यांच्यापासून भारताला खरा धोका आहे
translated_text: India is in real danger from those who speak out against casteism, it is not a crime.
Justification: Critical but informative tone, the phrase doesn’t show strong emotion — neutral.

Text: नावाला फक्त प्रोफेसर ते पण बिहारी युनिव्हर्सिटी
translated_text: He is only a professor in name but he is from Bihari University.
Justification: फक्त प्रोफेसर is derogatory but delivered plainly — neutral.

Text: साडेतीन जिल्ह्याच्या बाहेर कधी पडले का?
translated_text: Have you ever been outside the three and a half districts?
Justification: Use of sarcasm in "साडेतीन जिल्हे" doesn't carry emotion — neutral.

Text: मुक्ताफळं ऐका‌ आता. झाले का समाधान की आता नेसूचं सोडून देताय?
translated_text: Listen now for free. Are you satisfied that you are leaving Nesu now?
Justification: मुक्ताफळं (free advice) is sarcastic, but lacks emotional intensity — neutral.

Text: ह्यांना ह्याचा पोरगं ऐकत नाही आणि हे आम्हाला बाळासाहेबांचे विचार सांगणार ...
translated_text: This guy doesn't listen to them and he will tell us Balasaheb's thoughts...
Justification: Hypocrisy exposed by "पोरगं ऐकत नाही" creates moral disgust.

Text: लोकमत आता लोकांच कुठ राहिल ते तर सत्ता पक्ष च्या मागे मागे फिरत आहे
translated_text: Lokmat is now following the ruling party, not the people.
Justification: Political critique but tone remains neutral and observational.

Text: राजकारणासाठी आमच्या मातेचे नाव वापरतो का रे लवंडीच्या
translated_text: Why are you using our mother's name for politics?
Justification: The shock and vulgar term "लवंडीच्या" suggest insulted surprise.

Text: हा काळा खेकडा हयाची जातच नांगी मारण्याची
translated_text: This black crab is a breed that is meant to sting.
Justification: नांगी मारण्याची (destructive by nature) reflects strong contempt — disgust.

Text: मविआ चे नेते आणि कार्यकर्ते पिसाल्ले
translated_text: MAVIA leaders and activists were beaten up.
Justification: पिसाल्ले (were beaten up) evokes sympathy — sadness.

Text: शिवसेना ही हिंदुह्रदयसम्राट बाळासाहेबांची आहे तुमच फक्त बाळासाहेब च आहे खोके
translated_text: Shiv Sena belongs to Balasaheb, the king of Hindu hearts. You are only Balasaheb's.
Justification: खोके (suitcases) is a dig, but the sentence doesn’t express strong emotion — neutral.

Text: ते दांडा आणि ढुंगण काय प्रकरण आहे गद्दार बाई....
translated_text: What's the deal with that stick and butt, you traitorous woman?
Justification: Use of "गद्दार" and vulgar reference to "ढुंगण" (butt) shows anger.

Text: हा पाकीट माऱ्या ट्विट करुण पळाला
translated_text: This wallet ran away after I tweeted it.
Justification: पाकीट माऱ्या (pickpocket) is insulting but playful — neutral.

Text: तु कायम आभाळ हेपलत असतोस ना भातळ्या त्यामुळे तुला असं वाटतय वसाड्या
translated_text: You're always looking at the sky, aren't you, Bhatla? That's why you feel this way, Vasadya.
Justification: The mockery is clear, but lacking emotional weight — neutral.

Text: सांभाळुन बुडाला पण मशाल लावु शकतात विरोधकांच्या
translated_text: Even if you manage to drown, you can light the torch for the opposition.
Justification: Strategic commentary without emotional intensity — neutral.

Text: खरेच आहे ते...इतिहास बघा...हे काय..वाकड तोंडे काय.... स्वबळावर कधी सत्ता मिळवली?..
translated_text: It's true...look at history...what is this...what are these crooked mouths....when did they ever gain power on their own?..
Justification: The questioning and sarcastic tone reflect surprise.

Text: बाणावरून तुझ्या उद्धवला मशालीवर यावं लागलं यातच तुमची हार आहे राहुल्या..
translated_text: Your defeat, Rahul, is that your Uddhav had to come to the torch from the arrow.
Justification: A jibe, but stated flatly — neutral.

Text: बेरोजगारीची भीती किती आहे, आम्हाला विचारू नका. मी आजारी असतानाही पुस्तके उघडून वाचली आहेत.
translated_text: Don't ask us how much fear there is of unemployment. I have opened books and read them even when I was sick.
Justification: The phrase "भीती किती आहे" (how much fear there is) expresses clear anxiety — fear.

Text: आणी वरतुन सावित्री चा आव आणून बोलतोय
translated_text: And from above, I am pretending to be Savitri.
Justification: Sarcasm without emotional escalation — neutral.

Text: सर्वांनी लक्षात ठेवा आपल्याला बाळासाहेबांच्या शिवसेनेला हरवायचे आहे..
translated_text: Everyone, remember that we have to defeat Balasaheb's Shiv Sena.

Text: कल्पना शक्ती बाहेरचे आपल्या रक्ता मांसाचे पोर सोडून द्यायचे किती क्रूर पणा
translated_text: How cruel to abandon our own flesh and blood children beyond imagination.
Justification: The idea of abandonment framed as "क्रूर पणा" (cruelty) conveys disgust.

Justification: शर्मशार (ashamed) is descriptive, but no emotional tone from speaker — neutral.

Text: थापा गेला म्हणण्यापेक्षा पापा आला म्हण
translated_text: Instead of saying "Thapa Gela", say "Papa Aala"
Justification: Wordplay and satire, but neutral in tone.

Text: म्हणजे स्वताचे महत्त्व वाढवण्याचा किती हा केविलवाणा प्रयत्न....... शी......
translated_text: I mean, what a pathetic attempt to increase one's own importance....... Shi......
Justification: केविलवाणा प्रयत्न (pathetic attempt) and "शी" express scorn — disgust.

Text: अच्छा म्हणजे मुद्दामून बचत गट नकर्यक्रम तिथेच करत होती तुमची महिला आघाडी
translated_text: Well, your women's front was deliberately carrying out self-help group activities there.
Justification: Sarcastic but informational — neutral.

Text: भेंडी, हे लोक जगाचं वाटोळं करुनच सोडणार आहेत वाटतं...
translated_text: Okra, I think these people are going to leave the world behind...
Justification: जगाचं वाटोळं (ruin the world) conveys hopelessness — sadness.

Text: गद्दार सेना आता भाजपची ढाल बनून पाठीत तलवारीने वार करणार
translated_text: The traitor army will now become the shield of BJP and stab it in the back with a sword
Justification: Use of "गद्दार" (traitor) and "तलवारीने वार" (stab) is aggressive — disgust.

Text: हे पालथे घडे आहेत!! कांही होणार नाही.
translated_text: These are all fake!! Nothing will happen.
Justification: पालथे घडे (empty vessels) and exasperation reflect anger.

Text: आता तु पण बंद पाडणार

Text: अक्कल घान बाई तुझी मनमोहनसिंग यांच्या बद्दल बोलायची पण लायकी नाही आहे.
translated_text: You, wise lady, are not qualified to talk about Manmohan Singh.
Justification: लायकी नाही (not qualified) is insulting, but tone stays neutral.

Text: आपलं चालत का मोदी आणि शाहांपुढे काही
translated_text: Are we ahead of Modi and Shah?

Text: हा दाखवुन लोकांनाकाय मुर्ख बनवतात साहेब शेवटी बोलुन गेलेत नीच प्रवृत्ती आहे म्हणुन
translated_text: Why are you making people fools by showing this? Sir, you finally spoke up and said that you have a low tendency.

Text: प्रत्येक नवखा अताचा सोशल मीडिया वर चिव चिव करणारा चिवसैनिक हे लक्ष्यात ठेवा...!
translated_text: Keep this in mind, every newbie who tweets on social media...!

Text: आधीच तीन पत्रकारांत हे संशयित आहेत .त्यात ह्या असल्या मेसेज ने आणखीन गोत्यात यायचा.
translated_text: There are already three journalists under suspicion. Messages like this would only deepen their suspicions.

Text: पुण्यासारख्या जागतिक पातळीवर महत्वाच्या असणाऱ्या शहरात असे चित्र निर्माण होणे हे अत्यंत दुर्दैवी आहे.
translated_text: It is extremely unfortunate that such a picture has emerged in a globally important city like Pune.
Justification: अत्यंत दुर्दैवी (extremely unfortunate) conveys sadness.

Text: काय त्या फेक व्हिडीओ काय तो फेक पुरस्कार सगळं आहे

Text: “गेले त्यांच्यामुळे शिवसेना संपली नाही तर त्यांना गाडून शिवसेना पुढे गेली”
translated_text: Shiv Sena did not end because of those who left, but by burying them, Shiv Sena moved forward

translated_text: Have you been sleeping for so many days? # The game plan failed, so it's all drama.

Text: थोडक्यात काँग्रेसला वाचवण्याचा अशा यात्रांचा काहीही लाभ होणार नाही, हेच खरे !
translated_text: In short, such yatras will not be of any use in saving the Congress, that is true!
Justification: The dismissal of value in a frustrated tone reflects anger.

translated_text: My humble request to the people of the city is to please use water wisely as there is a drought in Maharashtra.

Text: डेप्युटी मिनिस्टर ला काहीच नाही

Text: गद्दारांनां पुन्हा पुन्हा आठवण करून द्यावी लागते कारण गद्दार हे गद्दारच असतात.

translated_text: Sir, why didn't you raise the issue when we were in power? The work would have been done sooner.

translated_text: The first fire will be in his own house in the assembly elections.

translated_text: I couldn't do it well and I'll bring this.

translated_text: These people have already spread the pollution...

Text: त्यात पण तुमच्या पक्षाची पब्लिसिटी कशाला? एकट्या दिदिंचा फोटो नव्हता का?
translated_text: Why is there publicity for your party in it? Wasn't there a photo of Didi alone?

translated_text: They have the opportunity to post fakes in between.

translated_text: Did he come to clap on behalf of the woman? Hi hi

translated_text: But no one works in that office.

translated_text: Where did Radhasuta go then, your religion?

translated_text: First remove this post and create public awareness in Marathi.

Text: . वर्ष सत्ता कोणाची होती फक्त वसुली कडे लक्ष होते का सरकारचे
translated_text: Who was in power in the year? Was the government only focused on recovery?

Text: ईडीचं सरकार घाबरट असून राज्याच्या जनतेसाठी नाही तर गुजरातसाठी काम करतं" नाना पटोले
translated_text: ED government is scared and works for Gujarat, not for the people of the state, Nana Patole

translated_text: If the judges are saying this, then what about the Election Commission?

Text: सोमय्या एवढा धुतल्या तांदळासारखा आहे का याच्या घरचीच दिसतेय नीट बोलताही येत नाही
translated_text: Is Somaiya so like washed rice? He looks like he belongs in her house. He can't even speak properly.

Text: ऊद्धव ठाकरे हे कुत्सित व कोत्या मनोवृत्तिचे व्यक्तिमत्व आहे
translated_text: Uddhav Thackeray is a personality with a nasty and mean attitude.

Text: पासून भारतात लोकशाही हा निव्वळ भ्रम ठरला आहे.
translated_text: Democracy has been a mere illusion in India since then.

Text: पालघर चे साधूची गणना नागरीक म्हणून होत नाही .
translated_text: The Sadhu of Palghar is not counted as a citizen.

translated_text: If we ask these questions, they will be confused. Because there is no answer.

translated_text: Now Uddhav Thackeray's Shiv Sainiks will be told that they want to defeat Balasaheb's Shiv Sena...it is difficult.

translated_text: Isn't it enough to choose Swat?

Text: मूळात दुसऱ्या धर्माच्या कार्यक्रमात जावेच कशाला? आम्ही येतो का मशिदीत?
translated_text: Why should we go to another religion's event in the first place? Do we come to the mosque?
Justification: Religious hostility shows disgust.

translated_text: Where had Hinduism gone when Mehbooba Mufti was bowing down to him, Keshav Rao?

Text: रिप्लाय मध्ये शिव्या भेटल्या आहेत

translated_text: Even the people are not well....and what is the plan?

Text: झाली भांडण करून ऑलरेडी
translated_text: Already got into a fight.

Text: तूच दलाल आहेस हे या बोलण्यावरन दिसून येतं
translated_text: This statement shows that you are a broker.

Text: आताच्या गलिच्छ राजकरण पाहता, मनसे हा जनतेसाठी सक्षम पर्याय. आता लढायचं ते जिंकण्यासाठीचं.
translated_text: Given the current dirty politics, MNS is a viable option for the people. Now, the fight is to win.

Text: तुझी लायकी आहे का बोलायला शिक आगोदर

Text: राजकीय तज्ञांची हि अवस्था?

Text: ऋतुजा लटकेंचा राजीनामा स्वीकारत नव्हते तेव्हा कुठे गेला होता राज साहेब
translated_text: Where did Raj Saheb go when he was not accepting Rituja Latke's resignation?

Text: तुझ्यातून कोणत्या तरी पार्टी ला बांधील असल्याचा वास येतोय हा सडक्या पणा सोड राज्या
translated_text: You smell of being tied to some party. Leave this pathetic attitude, Rajya.
Justification: सडक्या पणा clearly shows disgust.

Text: मी अंतराळवीर आहे, पृथ्वीवर येण्यासाठी पैसे हवेत, महिलेला लाखोंचा गंडा…
translated_text: I am an astronaut, I need money to come to Earth, the woman is being robbed of millions...
Justification: Sarcastic frustration — anger.

Text: विकून खाल्ली लोकमत वाल्यांनी आणि ने पण
translated_text: The people of Lokmat sold it and ate it, and they also
Justification: Corruption implication — neutral.

Text: तुम्ही अशी बाजू घेताय त्याची तर मला तुमच्यावर शंका येऊ राहिलीय भाऊ
translated_text: If you take such a stand, I'm starting to doubt you, brother.
Justification: शंका येऊ राहिलीय conveys fear or mistrust — fear.

Text: बाळासाहेब नावाचे जेवढे हसू कराल तेव्हढे उद्धव ठाकरेंचे नुकसान आहे...
translated_text: The more you laugh at the name Balasaheb, the more Uddhav Thackeray loses...
Justification: Causal argument, not emotional — neutral.

Text: साडे तीन टक्के ही मतपेटी होत नाही, लोकसंख्येच्या देशात.
translated_text: Three and a half percent of the ballot box does not happen in a country with this population.
Justification: Factual tone — neutral.

Text: निर्लज्जपणा ची कळस आहेत हे!
translated_text: This is the height of shamelessness!
Justification: निर्लज्जपणा directly expresses disgust.

Text: पुढच्या निवडणुकीत तुम्हाला एकापेक्षा जास्त जागा मिळतील' - हाही एक भ्रम आहे
translated_text: You will get more than one seat in the next election' - this is also an illusion
Justification: Statement of disbelief — neutral.

Text: त्यांनीच त्यांचं नाव औरंगजेब म्हणून बदलून राजपत्रात प्रसिद्ध करावे
translated_text: He should change his name to Aurangzeb and publish it in the gazette.
Justification: Sarcastic suggestion — neutral.

Text: सुशिक्षित तरुण गप्प का? बेरोजगारीसाठी कोण जबाबदार आहे
translated_text: Why are educated youth silent? Who is responsible for unemployment?
Justification: Questions expressing surprise — surprise.

Text: उद्योगाला परतावा द्यायला आहे पण शेतकर्याला मदत करायला नाही का साहेब
translated_text: We have to give a return to the industry but not to help the farmer, sir.
Justification: Criticism framed neutrally.

Text: वाया गेलेली केस उत्तम उदाहरण म्हणजे आपण
translated_text: A good example of wasted hair is you.
Justification: वाया गेलेली केस is an insult — disgust.

Text: जगून काय उपयोग आहे का
translated_text: What's the point of living?
Justification: Existential expression without emotion — neutral.

Text: काहीतरी कमकाम करा रे. किती फिरता, गुवाहटी फिरून आला तरी मन काही भरत नाही.
translated_text: Do something stupid. No matter how much you travel, even after visiting Guwahati, your mind is not satisfied.
Justification: Sarcastic and critical — neutral.

Text: गणपती गेले देवी गेली आता आतुरता नवऱ्याच्या बोनसची.
translated_text: Ganesha is gone, the goddess is gone, now the eagerness for the husband's bonus.
Justification: Nostalgic sadness — sadness.

Text: त्या उद्धव‌ ठाकरेने म्हटले आहे की मला कोणाचाच प्रस्ताव मिळाला नाही!
translated_text: That Uddhav Thackeray has said that I have not received any proposal from anyone!
Justification: Angry disbelief — anger.

Text: पंढरपुर, देगलुर आणि कोल्हापूर येथे भाजप ची संस्कृती चुलीत गेली होती का?
translated_text: Was the BJP culture destroyed in Pandharpur, Degalur and Kolhapur?
Justification: चुलीत गेली implies sarcasm but lacks emotional intensity, hence neutral.

Text: तुला फक्त दिवाळी सनच दिसतोय का टकल्या
translated_text: Do you only see Diwali, Taklya?
Justification: The word "टकल्या" is used insultingly, but the overall tone is casual — neutral.

Text: जर हा नाही तर का नाकातोंडात पाणी गेल्यावर जाहिर करणार का?
translated_text: If not, why would you announce it when water gets in your nose and mouth?
Justification: The metaphor "नाकातोंडात पाणी" evokes disbelief — indicating surprise.

Text: म्हणजे न्यायपालिका विकली आहे हे दिसत आहे खालील ट्विट वरून
translated_text: This means that the judiciary has been sold, as can be seen from the following tweet.
Justification: न्यायपालिका विकली आहे is a serious allegation, but stated matter-of-fact — neutral.

Text: सुविचार पोस्ट करणे का बंद केलावं?? बोचले का? स्वतःला!!
translated_text: Why should we stop posting good thoughts?? Are you offended? Yourself!!
Justification: बोचले का? directly conveys irritation and accusatory tone — anger.

Text: गल्ली ते दिल्ली सरकार पण हे लोक यांच्या अपयशच खापर दुसऱ्यावर फोडणार
translated_text: From the streets to the Delhi government, these people will blame their failures on others.
Justification: अपयशच खापर दुसऱ्यावर फोडणार shows blame but stated neutrally.

Text: यांचे आदर्शच माफिवीर तर हे काय लढाई करणार!
translated_text: If their ideal is a compassionate hero, what kind of fight will they have?
Justification: Use of "माफिवीर" is mocking but not emotional — neutral.

Text: तुमच सरकार  .  वर्षे झक मारत होत का???? महाभोगस आघाडी
translated_text: You are the government. Are the years flying by???? Mahabhogas front
Justification: The sarcasm in "झक मारत" is critical but tone remains flat — neutral.

Text: आमचा इंग्लिश माध्यमावर बहिष्कार आहे.
translated_text: We are boycotting English medium.
Justification: बहिष्कार expresses stance, not sentiment — neutral.

Text: दुप्पट परतावा देण्याचा दावा करत कोटी रुपयांची फसवणूक करणाऱ्या रॅकेटच्या सूत्रधाराला अटक
translated_text: Mastermind of racket that cheated crores of rupees by claiming double returns arrested
Justification: फसवणूक and "अटक" imply wrongdoing — anger.

Text: भाई स्वतःची नाचक्की स्वतःच करू नये वर्ष तुमचेच राज्य होते हे विसरता कसे
translated_text: Brother, don't do your own thing. How can you forget that it was your rule for years?
Justification: नाचक्की and "विसरता कसे" reflect frustration — anger.

Text: अति शहाणा त्याचा बैल रिकामा.
translated_text: The wise man's ox is empty.
Justification: The proverb "अति शहाणा..." is proverbial — neutral.

Text: नावात चोर असलं म्हणून काय चोरीच करायची का? मोरे साहेब
translated_text: Why should you steal just because you have a thief in your name? More Saheb
Justification: Use of "चोर" implies accusation — anger.

Text: लढ्याचे होते ना, माघार का घेतली? फाटली ना
translated_text: It was a fight, wasn't it? Why did you retreat? It was torn apart.
Justification: फाटली ना is rhetorical sarcasm, indicating surprise.

Text: मग जोकसत्ता वाले कुठे गायब,ते तर आधी हवे!का त्यांचे फिक्स झाले?
translated_text: So where did the people with power disappear to? They should have been fixed first!
Justification: फिक्स झाले? implies corruption and expresses anger.

Text: नक्की काय खेळ सुरू आहे हे सगलं
translated_text: I wonder what game is going on.
Justification: खेळ सुरू आहे questions intentions but is calm — neutral.

Text: असंच करा..! तुम्ही करायला घेतल्याशिवाय वठणीवर नाही येणार हे..!!
translated_text: Do it like this..! It won't come to fruition unless you do it..!!
Justification: वठणीवर नाही येणार implies irritation and force — anger.

Text: जे रिकत आहे. ...ते भरूण घया सर पहिले. लोकाना...चुतीया नंतर बनवा...सर
translated_text: What is empty. ...fill it first sir. People...make it later...sir
Justification: Insulting term "चुतीया" is used but tone lacks strong emotion — neutral.

Text: रावणाला पण अहंकार होता लंकेच्या सामर्थ्यावर!
translated_text: Ravana too was arrogant about the power of Lanka!
Justification: The word "अहंकार" directly expresses anger — anger.

Text: ह्याच्या घरच्या पोरी सासरी जाताना सोंग करतात का? समस्त स्त्री जातीचा अपमान आहे हा...
translated_text: Do the girls of this family dress up when going to their in-laws? This is an insult to the entire female caste...
Justification: अपमान and "सोंग" express deep disrespect — disgust.

Text: असे नमुने महाराष्ट्रातच का जन्माला येतात?
translated_text: Why do such patterns arise in Maharashtra?
Justification: असे नमुने expresses shock or disbelief — surprise.

Text: तांदूळ चोर मग काय चायेबाचा लावायचा का मिया खलीफाचा हे जेल मधीच छान राहते
translated_text: Rice thief, why should I wear a hat? Mia Khalifa's is still beautiful in jail.
Justification: Absurdity in "चायेबाचा लावायचा का मिया खलीफाचा" makes it sarcastic, but neutral overall.

Text: गद्दार ...ब्लॉक केला !
translated_text: Traitor...blocked!
Justification: Sudden declaration "ब्लॉक केला!" indicates surprise.

Text: त्यामुळे गुजरातच्या राजकारण्यांसाठी मुंबई हा 'अनफिनिश्ड बिझनेस' आहे.
translated_text: Therefore, Mumbai is 'unfinished business' for Gujarat politicians.
Justification: अनफिनिश्ड बिझनेस is observational, not emotional — neutral.

Text: कोकणी माणसाला भावकीत गद्दारी पण सहन होत नाही तो ह्याला सहन करणार?
translated_text: A Konkani man cannot tolerate betrayal even in his heart, will he tolerate this?
Justification: Use of "गद्दारी" and "सहन होत नाही" shows contempt — disgust.

Text: निवडणूक नजरे समोर ठेवून हे चालू आहे. तरी भाजप हरणार
translated_text: This is being done with an eye on the elections. Even so, BJP will lose.
Justification: "तरी भाजप हरणार" indicates a prediction stated plainly, without emotional tilt.

Text: अरे म आगोदर काय झालं होत, पराभव पहिला आणि दांगीला पाय लावून पळले
translated_text: Oh my, what happened before? I was defeated and ran away with my feet in the mud.
Justification: "अरे म" and "पाय लावून पळले" reflect shock or disbelief — surprise.

Text: आता हे कोणत्या प्रकारची अंध भक्ती आहे?
translated_text: Now what kind of blind devotion is this?
Justification: "अंध भक्ती" questions the rationale behind behavior — expressing surprise.

Text: रडीचा डाव चालू आहे
translated_text: The plot is in progress.
Justification: "रडीचा डाव" implies sarcasm but no clear emotional outburst — neutral.

Text: नेताजींनी द्विराष्ट्र सिद्धांतावरून चांगलाच शेपलला होता नथ्या गोडसेच्या ठोक्याला
translated_text: Netaji had well-founded the two-nation theory, but Godse's attack was not successful.
Justification: No emotionally loaded words, historical critique — neutral.

Text: महाराष्ट्रातील असा एक नेता आहे ते पक्ष सुपारी घेऊन चालवतात
translated_text: There is such a leader in Maharashtra who runs his party with betel nut.
Justification: "सुपारी घेऊन चालवतात" is critical but not emotionally charged — neutral.

Text: साहेब, पुळचट निषेध नको ठोस कार्यवाही हवी नाहीतर हि सापाची पिलावळ महाराष्ट्र गिळून टाकेल.
translated_text: We don't want weak protests, we need action, else this snake gang will eat Maharashtra.
Justification: "सापाची पिलावळ" is metaphorical critique — stated neutrally.

Text: मालवणी लोकांची नावा खराब करणार हा यो..बुटका वांगा
translated_text: This guy will ruin the name of the people of Malvani..Butka Vanga
Justification: "बुटका वांगा" is mocking and derogatory — conveys disgust.

Text: तुला शिव्या श्राप खाल्ल्यावर चरमसुख मिळते का?
translated_text: Do you get extreme pleasure from swearing and cursing?
Justification: "शिव्या श्राप" implies strong revulsion — disgust.

Text: सत्तेवर असताना आई आठवल्या नाहीत.. आता आठवली
translated_text: Didn't remember your mother when in power, now suddenly do.
Justification: Plain statement without emotion — neutral.

Text: विचार जर यांन कडल तर आपले मतदान कमी होतील तर काय करावे
translated_text: If people get swayed, our votes will fall — what to do?
Justification: Analytical reasoning, not emotional — neutral.

Text: देशाचे तुकडे कोणी केले भाजपा ने का.
translated_text: Who broke the country — BJP?
Justification: The rhetorical "कोणी केले" indicates surprise or disbelief.

Text: काहीच कळलं नाही कृपया राष्ट्रभाषा मराठीत सांगा!
translated_text: I didn’t get anything, please say it in Marathi!
Justification: "काहीच कळलं नाही" + request shows urgency — fear.

Text: खोटा बोला पण रेटून बोला ही भाजपची नीती
translated_text: Tell lies but confidently — BJP’s policy.
Justification: "खोटा बोला" is critique without emotional intensity — neutral.

Text: हा चोर... जामिनावर बाहेर.... हा फुले विकणारा....
translated_text: This thief... out on bail... this flower seller...
Justification: The word "चोर" and sarcastic tone show anger.

Text: पेरे पाटील माहिती नाहीत म्हटल्यावर तुमचा अभ्यास कमी आहे
translated_text: Saying you don’t know Pere Patil shows lack of study.
Justification: "अभ्यास कमी आहे" is critical, but stated calmly — neutral.

Text: ज्याला करायचे आहे पाप त्याला मध्ये नोकरी मिळेल आपोआप ..
translated_text: Sinners get jobs easily...
Justification: "पाप" as a concept isn’t emotionally expressive — neutral.

Text: यावर्षी गाळ इमानदारीने काढला का? निवडणुक आहे म्हणून
translated_text: Removed dirt honestly this year? Because of election?
Justification: "इमानदारीने" with question tone reflects surprise.

Text: महाराष्ट्र विधानसभेची निवडणूक येऊ द्या मराठी माणसं पद्धतशीरपणे भाजप ची अवस्था करणार आहेत
translated_text: Marathi people will crush BJP in the election.
Justification: "अवस्था करणार" expresses aggressive intention — anger.

Text: अश्या फालतू पत्रावर कोणाच्याही डोळ्यात पाणी येणार नाही,
translated_text: No one will cry over such a rubbish letter.
Justification: "फालतू पत्र" conveys clear contempt — disgust.

Text: राजकारण ठाकरेंशी केल तर विरोधकांपुढे हार किंवा माघार हे दोनच पर्याय उरतात..
