translated_text: What did Yuzvendra Chahal's wife Dhanashree Verma say about the song controversy?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is simply reporting information ("गाण्याच्या वादावर आता हे काय बोलून गेली युजवेंद्र चहलची पत्नी धनश्री वर्मा") and asking what Dhanashree Verma said about the song controversy. There are no words or phrases that express a positive or negative sentiment.

Text: सोनाली जी आपण जैन धर्माचे आहात का
translated_text: Sonali ji, are you a Jain?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a simple question about someone's religious affiliation. There is no inherently positive or negative connotation in the phrase "जैन धर्माचे आहात का" (Jain Dharma che aahat ka - are you a Jain?).

Text: हे खरं पण तुम्ही काय करताय मनात राहण्यासाठी हेही महत्वाचे!!!
translated_text: This is true, but it is also important to keep in mind what you are doing!!!
Justification: The sentence expresses a balanced thought; "हे खरं पण" (he khara pan) which translates to "this is true, but" introduces a contrasting element, resulting in a neutral sentiment as it presents a conditional perspective rather than a positive or negative feeling.

Text: अध्यक्ष महोदय हे बरोबर नाहीये अध्यक्ष महोदय...
translated_text: Mr. President, this is not right, Mr. President...
Justification: The phrase "बरोबर नाहीये" (barobar nahiye), meaning "not right," indicates a negative sentiment, contributing to the identified anger.

Text: हे   /   म्हणजे संपूर्ण पुणे नव्हे!
translated_text: This is not the whole of Pune!
Justification: The phrase "हे म्हणजे संपूर्ण पुणे नव्हे!" expresses anger because "नव्हे!" (navhe!), meaning "not!", negates the implied positive expectation of Pune being whole or representative, creating a sense of dismissal and frustration.

Text: खरं तर हा फोटो फ्रेम करून लावला पाहिजे प्रत्येकाने त्यांच्या संपर्क कार्यालयात...
translated_text: In fact, everyone should frame this photo and put it in their contact office...
Justification: The sentence expresses a suggestion about framing a photo, without expressing any particular positive or negative feeling. There is no specific word or phrase that indicates sentiment. Hence it is a neutral statement.

Text: बशी नव्हती का
translated_text: Wasn't there a saucer?
Justification: The word "नव्हती का" (navhati ka), meaning "wasn't there?", expresses surprise or a questioning of an assumed presence, leading to the emotion of surprise and a neutral sentiment as it's a question rather than a statement of opinion.

Text: तुमच्यामुळे हे दिवस आलेत
translated_text: These days have come because of you.
Justification: The sentence "तुमच्यामुळे हे दिवस आलेत" has a neutral sentiment because it simply states a cause-and-effect relationship. While the context could imply blame or regret, the phrase "तुमच्यामुळे" (tumchyāmule - because of you) alone doesn't convey a specific positive or negative sentiment without additional information.

Text: ते पहिल्यांदा विमानपत्तन हा शब्द काढा आम्हाला विमान पडल्या सारखे वाटते
translated_text: First of all, remove the word airport, it feels like a plane crash.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "विमान पडल्या सारखे वाटते" (viman padlya sarkhe vatate), which translates to "it feels like a plane crash," indicating a feeling of distress and sadness.

Text: ते होते म्हणून कोरणा त जगाला तू बाळा.
translated_text: That is why you are the child of the world.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it states a fact ("ते होते म्हणून") about someone being a child of the world ("जगाला तू बाळा"). There is no inherently positive or negative connotation. The phrase "ते होते म्हणून" and "जगाला तू बाळा" contribute to the neutrality.

Text: किरीट सोमय्या ला दिसत नाही का? त्याला टॅग करा...
translated_text: Can't see Kirit Somaiya? Tag him...
Justification: The sentence expresses a question ("दिसत नाही का?") and a request ("टॅग करा...") which does not inherently convey positive or negative sentiment, thus resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: पावसाळ्यात पाणी पण असतंय सर
translated_text: There is water during the rainy season, sir.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it states a factual observation about the rainy season. There is no emotionally charged language used. The phrase "पावसाळ्यात पाणी पण असतंय" (paavsalyat paani pan astay) simply states that there is water in the rainy season.

Text: तेवढं ते काकांना पंतप्रधान बनवायचं आहे, त्याचं बघा ना काय होतंय का
translated_text: They want to make that uncle the Prime Minister, look what's happening.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it simply states a desire and asks about the progress of an event without expressing positive or negative feelings. The phrase "तेवढं ते काकांना पंतप्रधान बनवायचं आहे, त्याचं बघा ना काय होतंय का" is a factual statement, lacking any overt emotional cues.

Text: महाराष्ट्र राज्याचे परिवहन आयुक्त विवेक भीमनवार यांची प्रत्यक्ष भेट घेऊन यासंदर्भात त्यांना निवेदन !
translated_text: Meet Maharashtra State Transport Commissioner Vivek Bhimanwar in person and submit a memorandum to him in this regard!
Justification: The sentence is neutral in sentiment and doesn't express any strong emotion. The phrase "प्रत्यक्ष भेट घेऊन यासंदर्भात त्यांना निवेदन" (Meet in person and submit a memorandum to him) describes a formal action, without inherently positive or negative connotations, thus justifying the neutral sentiment and lack of strong emotion beyond baseline joy.

Text: येना-या प्रत्येईल निवडणुकीत एक तर यशस्वी माघारच घ्यावी लागेल किंवा नेस्तनाबूत होइल कमळी.
translated_text: In every upcoming election, Kamali will either have to make a successful withdrawal or be annihilated.
Justification: "नेस्तनाबूत होइल" (nestanabut hoil) - meaning "will be annihilated" - indicates a strongly negative outcome, contributing to the overall sadness and a neutral sentiment.

Text: शोले, सरफरोश, अशी ही बनवाबनवी, पुष्पा, , .
translated_text: Sholay, Sarfarosh, this is what Banwabanwi, Pushpa, .
Justification: The sentence is a list of movie names. There are no words or phrases expressing sentiment or emotion.

Text: तुम्हाला    पेक्षा जास्त खोके मिळाल्याची बातमी आहे . खर का ?
translated_text: There is news that you have received more than . Is that true?
Justification: The sentence expresses surprise due to the phrase "खर का?" (khar ka?), which translates to "Is that true?" and indicates disbelief or questioning of the information, implying surprise.

Text: जनता आहे त्यांच्या पाठीशी, ते पण भाजपा मुळे जास्त पाठिंबा मशाल ला भेटतोय.
translated_text: The people are behind them, they are also getting more support from the BJP.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it describes a factual observation about public support ("जनता आहे त्यांच्या पाठीशी") and the reasons for it ("भाजपा मुळे जास्त पाठिंबा"). There is no inherently positive or negative sentiment expressed.

Text: हे जनतेचे सरकार
translated_text: This is the people's government.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about the government being "of the people" ("जनतेचे सरकार"). There is no inherent positive or negative connotation in the Marathi phrase "जनतेचे सरकार," leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: अस लै वेळेस होत पुन्हा आहे आहे जाग्यावर आहे होत
translated_text: It's happening again, it's happening again, it's happening again.
Justification: The sentence expresses a repetitive occurrence ("होत पुन्हा आहे आहे"), but lacks any explicit positive or negative indicators, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: थोडीच तर आहे,ती भलतीकडे वापरली आहे आधीच
translated_text: There is only a little, it has already been used for the wrong purpose.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the phrase "थोडीच तर आहे,ती भलतीकडे वापरली आहे" (thodich tar aahe, tee bhaltikade vaparali aahe) simply states a fact about a small quantity being used improperly. There's no explicit positive or negative evaluation of the situation.

Text: आता हा भाऊसाहेब त्याचा ट्विट चेंकाय करणार.... पावसाळा तसा आहे खूप
translated_text: Now this brother will check his tweet.... It's rainy season.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment. While the phrase "आता हा भाऊसाहेब त्याचा ट्विट चेंकाय करणार" (Now this brother will check his tweet) implies someone is checking a tweet, and "पावसाळा तसा आहे खूप" (It's rainy season) simply states a fact about the weather. These statements do not convey any positive or negative emotion; they are factual and descriptive. Therefore, the sentiment is neutral.

Text: आता उठऊ सारे रान आता पेटऊ सारे रान शेतकऱ्यांच्या राज्यासाठी
translated_text: Now let all the forests rise, now let all the forests burn for the kingdom of the farmers.
Justification: The phrase "आता पेटऊ सारे रान" (now let all the forests burn) expresses a destructive and aggressive sentiment, indicative of anger, even when contextually applied to a revolution for farmers' rights.

Text: दिवाळी साठी भेटल का फटाका
translated_text: Will you be getting crackers for Diwali?
Justification: The sentence expresses a simple inquiry about purchasing firecrackers for Diwali. The phrase "दिवाळी साठी भेटल का फटाका" is a neutral question, lacking any inherent positive or negative sentiment.

Text: डॉक्टरांनी दिलेली प्रिस्क्रिप्शन तुम्ही वाचू शकता का?
translated_text: Can you read a prescription given by a doctor?
Justification: The sentence "डॉक्टरांनी दिलेली प्रिस्क्रिप्शन तुम्ही वाचू शकता का?" is neutral because it's a simple question about reading a prescription. There's no inherently positive or negative word or phrase associated with strong emotion or sentiment. It's a factual inquiry.

Text: आता पवार काकांच्या विचारांचे वारसदार होणार तुमचे साहेब...
translated_text: Now, your sir, will be the heir to Pawar Kaka's ideas...
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's simply stating a fact or observation about someone inheriting Pawar Kaka's ideas; the phrase "आता पवार काकांच्या विचारांचे वारसदार होणार" (ata Pawar Kakanchya vicharanche varasdar honar - now will be the heir to Pawar Kaka's ideas) expresses this without any inherent positive or negative connotation.

Text: स्वस्तात खरेदी करा    इंचाचे हे चार   ; फीचर्स जबरदस्त, पाहा लिस्ट
translated_text: Buy these four inch phones cheaply; Features are awesome, see the list
Justification: While the sentence contains positive elements like "जबरदस्त" (awesome), the overall sentiment is neutral (0.0). The neutral sentiment stems from the sentence being primarily informational and promotional, focusing on the offer of "स्वस्तात खरेदी करा" (buy cheaply) and describing features, rather than expressing a strong positive or negative feeling.

Text: खेळण्यातली ढाल तलवार पण नाही स्विकारणार
translated_text: I will not accept the shield in play, but the sword.
Justification: The phrase "नाही स्विकारणार" (nahi swikarnar) indicating refusal or non-acceptance, contributes to the anger emotion and a neutral sentiment. The refusal, even of a toy shield, suggests underlying discontent.

Text: हे तु बोलतोय म्हणजे उध्दव ची वाटचाल बरबादीच्या योग्य दिशेने चालू आहे....
translated_text: What you are saying is that Uddhav's path is heading in the right direction of destruction...
Justification: The phrase "बरबादीच्या योग्य दिशेने" (barbadichya yogya dishene), meaning "right direction of destruction", while seemingly negative, is being used ironically and with implied political criticism. Therefore, without further context, the sentiment leans neutral.

Text: कमळाबाई चेच लोक होती ती आदित्यसाहेबांचे अंदोलन बातमी दाखवावी लागनार नाही म्हणून
translated_text: Kamalabai's people were the ones who were the ones who should not be shown the news of Adityasaheb's movement.
Justification: The neutral sentiment and disgust emotion are driven by the implied manipulation and suppression of news, indicated by the phrase "दाखवावी लागनार नाही म्हणून" (dakhavavi lagnaar nahi mhanun) which translates to "should not be shown, therefore." This suggests a deliberate attempt to control information.

Text: फटाक्याची माळ लावेन का मग मातोश्री ते चंदेरी गृह
translated_text: Should I light a garland of crackers then from Matoshree to Chanderi Griha?
Justification: The sentence is a rhetorical question with no inherent positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "फटाक्याची माळ लावेन का मग" (should I light a garland of crackers then) expresses a hypothetical action, lacking positive or negative connotations without further context.

Text: स्नेहाच्या दिव्यात ठेवते वात तेजाची वसू बारस म्हणजे पूजा धेनु वासराची *
translated_text: The wick of the lamp of love is kept in the lamp of light, the Vasu Baras is the worship of the Dhenu calf.
Justification: The overall neutral sentiment (0.0) and assignment of disgust despite the seemingly positive context stem from the absence of overtly positive or negative emotional cues in the Marathi sentence. The phrase "स्नेहाच्या दिव्यात ठेवते वात तेजाची" (Snehachya divyat thevte vaat tejachi) describes a simple act of placing a wick in a lamp, which is neither inherently positive nor negative and lacks any specific term that directly implies happiness, sadness, or any other strong emotion. "वसू बारस म्हणजे पूजा धेनु वासराची" (Vasu Baras mhanje pooja dhenu vasarachi) is a statement of fact, indicating a cultural practice, and similarly devoid of emotionally charged vocabulary that would shift the overall sentiment. The absence of positive indicators leads to the perception of a somewhat negative and disgust-like sentiment.

Text: जे केले ते भोगावेच लागेल
translated_text: You will have to suffer for what you have done.
Justification: The neutral sentiment with sadness is driven by the phrase "भोगावेच लागेल" (bhogavech lagel), which translates to "will have to suffer" or "will inevitably face the consequences". This phrase implies an unavoidable negative outcome, contributing to sadness.

Text: आता काय येत नसतो तो मुंबईत
translated_text: What does not come now in Mumbai
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it poses a question ("आता काय येत नसतो") without expressing any explicit positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "आता काय येत नसतो" simply inquires about something's arrival or lack thereof.

Text: मी   :   ची शेवटची बस होती तीने आलो
translated_text: Me: It was the last bus, so we arrived.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact about transportation. There are no specific Marathi words or phrases expressing any sentiment or emotion. The sentence "मी : ची शेवटची बस होती तीने आलो" primarily conveys factual information about arriving on the last bus.

Text: आवडतं का?
translated_text: Do you like it?
Justification: The sentence "आवडतं का?" expresses a question about liking something, using "आवडतं" which translates to "like" or "is pleasing". The interrogative nature and lack of explicit positive or negative connotation contribute to a neutral sentiment.

Text: संजू भौ यांना महिला आणि बालविकास विभागाच्या जबाबदारी मिळणार अशी अपेक्षा आहे....
translated_text: Sanju Bhau is expected to be given the responsibility of the Women and Child Development Department....
Justification: The sentence expresses an expectation ("अपेक्षा आहे") about a future event, making it neutral in sentiment. The phrase "अपेक्षा आहे" simply indicates an anticipation and doesn't carry any inherent positive or negative connotation.

Text: वर्मा अजून नीट आहे तुम्हाला इथल्या लोकांचे संस्कार कळायला वेळ लागेल.
translated_text: Verma is still fine, you will need time to understand the culture of the people here.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it primarily states a fact ("Verma is still fine") and makes a neutral observation about cultural understanding ("वेळ लागेल" - will need time), without expressing any positive or negative feelings.

Text: नवरा मिठीत मावण्याजोगा नाही म्हणून मुठीत ठेवण्याचा एक केविलवाणा प्रयत्न दिसतोय या बाईसाहेबांचा.
translated_text: This woman seems to be making a desperate attempt to hold her husband in her arms, as he is not worthy of being hugged.
Justification: The sentiment leans negative and evokes disgust due to the phrase "केविलवाणा प्रयत्न" (kevilvana prayatna), which translates to "desperate attempt" and suggests a pitiable and unseemly action, contributing to the feeling of disgust.

Text: काल पुण्यात दिलेल्या घोषणाबाजीवर तोंड हलेल का ह्या साडेतीन जिल्ह्याच्या भावी पंतप्रधानाच
translated_text: Will the future Prime Minister of these three and a half districts be swayed by the slogans given in Pune yesterday?
Justification: The neutral sentiment is driven by the rhetorical and sarcastic tone implied by "साडेतीन जिल्ह्याच्या भावी पंतप्रधानाच" (future Prime Minister of these three and a half districts), which suggests skepticism and downplays the subject's importance rather than expressing a positive or negative feeling.

Text: मराठी लोक कुठे गेलीत ..एकही मराठी माणूस या पुरस्काराचा हकदार नाही का?
translated_text: Where have the Marathi people gone...isn't there a single Marathi person who deserves this award?
Justification: The phrase "एकही मराठी माणूस या पुरस्काराचा हकदार नाही का?" (isn't there a single Marathi person who deserves this award?) implies a lack of Marathi representation and expresses surprise that no one was deemed worthy, driving the neutral sentiment.

Text: तुम्ही आलात का लंडन वरून????का तिथे बसूनच पाहणी करताय?????
translated_text: Did you come from London???? Why are you just sitting there and inspecting???????
Justification: The sentence expresses surprise due to the sarcastic tone conveyed by "का तिथे बसूनच पाहणी करताय?????", implying disbelief that the person is just observing from afar rather than experiencing something directly. The repetition of question marks also emphasizes surprise/ disbelief.

Text: आणि इथून निघताना आपण का निघालो? हा पण प्रश्न पडतो.
translated_text: And when we leave here, why did we leave? This also raises the question.
Justification: The sentence expresses a reflective and somewhat questioning tone, lacking strong positive or negative indicators. The phrase "हा पण प्रश्न पडतो" (this also raises the question) suggests a neutral contemplation rather than a distinct emotional response.

Text: बघू आता हे पत्र संस्कृतीत बसते का ते ?
translated_text: Let's see if this letter fits the culture.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it uses the phrase "बघू आता" (baghu aata), meaning "Let's see now," which indicates observation and uncertainty without expressing positive or negative emotion.

Text: हा जुना फ़ोटो आहे का
translated_text: Is this an old photo?
Justification: The sentence is a simple question about the age of a photo. There is no inherently positive or negative word or phrase like "जुना" (old) that indicates a specific sentiment. The sentence expresses neutral curiosity.

Text: आता धनुष्यबान सुटला , मशला पण विजेल.
translated_text: Now the bow is loose, the torch is also lit.
Justification: The sentence describes actions ("धनुष्यबान सुटला," "मशला पण विजेल") without expressing any positive or negative feelings. Therefore, the sentiment remains neutral.

Text: घासलेट चोर आहे का कोणी इकडे
translated_text: Is there anyone here who is a gas thief?
Justification: The sentence uses the phrase "घासलेट चोर" (ghaaslet chor), which translates to "gas thief." While potentially accusatory, in isolation and without context, it doesn't express strong positive or negative sentiment. It's more of a neutral inquiry or observation.

Text: तिथे केकेआर च्या किट बॅग का आहेत ? मॅच बीसीसीआय ची होती की केकेआर?
translated_text: Why are there KKR kit bags there? Was the match BCCI or KKR?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it primarily asks a question without expressing any strong positive or negative feelings. The Marathi phrases "तिथे केकेआर च्या किट बॅग का आहेत ?" (Why are there KKR kit bags there?) and "मॅच बीसीसीआय ची होती की केकेआर?" (Was the match BCCI or KKR?) inquire about a situation and seek clarification without conveying any inherent sentiment.

Text: पण हा उमर खालिद सारखा का दिसतो आहे मला?
translated_text: But why does this guy look like Umar Khalid to me?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment with surprise because of the phrase "सारखा का दिसतो आहे" (sarkha ka disto aahe) - "why does he look like," indicating a surprising resemblance is being perceived. The overall sentiment is neutral as it is simply an observation and question rather than an expression of positive or negative feeling.

Text: हिते पण शिंदेंना विचारलेल्या प्रश्नाचं उत्तर फडणवीसांनी दिलं....
translated_text: Fadnavis answered the question asked to Shinde for his own benefit...
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply reports a political event. There is no explicitly positive or negative sentiment expressed. The phrase "हिते पण शिंदेंना विचारलेल्या प्रश्नाचं उत्तर फडणवीसांनी दिलं" (Fadnavis answered the question asked to Shinde for his own benefit) is a factual statement, lacking emotional coloring.

Text: आता अटल थाळी येणार का, शेंडी थाळी येणार
translated_text: Will the Atal Thali come now, or will the Shendi Thali come?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it primarily poses a question ("येणार का") about the availability of specific thalis (Atal Thali, शेंडी थाळी), without conveying any inherent positive or negative emotion or judgment. The words "येणार का" simply inquire about future availability.

Text: कसा आहे गुलाब जांब
translated_text: How is the rose bush?
Justification: The sentence "कसा आहे गुलाब जांब" (How is the rose bush?) is neutral because it is a simple inquiry about the state of something and doesn't contain any words expressing positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "कसा आहे" (how is) is a neutral question.

Text: नुसत्या बुलढाणा जिल्हाचा सर्वे का करत पूर्ण विदर्भाचा करा सत्य परिस्थिती माहिती पडेल........!
translated_text: Why do a survey of just Buldhana district? Do a survey of the entire Vidarbha and you will know the true situation........!
Justification: The phrase "नुसत्या बुलढाणा जिल्हाचा सर्वे का करत" (Why do a survey of just Buldhana district?) expresses surprise at the limited scope of the survey.

Text: तात्या काय म्हणत्यात हे
translated_text: What does Tatya say?
Justification: The sentence "तात्या काय म्हणत्यात हे" is neutral due to the lack of any emotionally charged words or phrases. It's a simple question. The phrase "काय म्हणत्यात" (kay mhantat) is simply asking what someone is saying, devoid of positive or negative connotations.

Text: कोश्यारी काय तुझ्या बायकोला विचारून बोलतोय का?
translated_text: Koshyari, are you talking to your wife?
Justification: The phrase "काय तुझ्या बायकोला विचारून बोलतोय का?" implies disbelief or shock at Koshyari's actions, suggesting the speaker is taken aback, thus contributing to surprise emotion.

Text: साध्या भाज्या देखील वातानुकूलित सुपरमार्केट आणि रस्त्यावर दोन्हीकडे सारख्याच भावात मिळतात
translated_text: Even simple vegetables are available at the same price both in air-conditioned supermarkets and on the street.
Justification: The sentence describes a factual situation about vegetable prices ("साध्या भाज्या देखील वातानुकूलित सुपरमार्केट आणि रस्त्यावर दोन्हीकडे सारख्याच भावात मिळतात"). There are no words or phrases indicating positive or negative sentiment; it's a neutral observation. The phrase "सारख्याच भावात मिळतात" (available at the same price) further reinforces the neutrality.

Text: असे हवेत ना
translated_text: Isn't that how it should be?
Justification: The phrase "असे हवेत ना" (ase havet na) expresses a general expectation or mild affirmation without strong positive or negative connotations, thus resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: अहो ते सबसीडीचे होते. आताचे बिना सबसीडीचे आहेत.
translated_text: Hey, they were subsidized. Now they are unsubsidized.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence simply states a factual difference ("सबसीडीचे" - subsidized, "बिना सबसीडीचे" - unsubsidized) without expressing any positive or negative opinion.

Text: त्या तरुणाने उगाच त्याला त्रास दिलेल, कधी बोलणार, हा गुन्हा स्वतःचा बचाव केल्यामुळे झालंय.
translated_text: The young man must have bothered him for no reason, he will never speak, this crime was committed in self-defense.
Justification: The sentiment leans negative (0.0) and evokes anger primarily due to the phrase "त्रास दिलेल" (tras dilel), meaning "bothered/harassed," suggesting a negative action taken by the young man, and the assertion that "उगाच" (ugach - for no reason) indicates a lack of justification, amplifying the negative sentiment. The phrase "हा गुन्हा" (ha gunha - this crime) contributes to the anger, framing the situation as something illegal.

Text: आपण गरीब होत नाहीये,शेजारचा श्रीमंत होतोय !!
translated_text: We are not getting poor, our neighbors are getting rich!!
Justification: The zero sentiment score with anger is driven by the phrase "शेजारचा श्रीमंत होतोय" (shejarcha shrimant hotoy - neighbor is getting rich), which implies a sense of resentment and unfairness, fueling the anger despite the speaker not claiming personal impoverishment.

Text: माझ्या शाळेत कधी हे शिकवल नाही म्हणून विचारतोय
translated_text: I'm asking because they never taught this in my school.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it simply states a fact ("माझ्या शाळेत कधी हे शिकवल नाही") about the speaker's past education and provides context for their question. There are no overtly positive or negative words indicating any strong feeling.

Text: चेन्नई चा अण्णा आहे तो... विसल पोडू
translated_text: Chennai's Anna is... Vishal Podu
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it is simply stating a fact or observation without any emotionally charged language. There is no specific Marathi word or phrase present that conveys any sentiment.

Text: भारत जिंकला काय आणि इंग्लंड जिंकला काय, आता सगळं सारखंच आहे. अभिनंदन!
translated_text: Whether India won or England won, everything is the same now. Congratulations!
Justification: The sentence expresses indifference ("सगळं सारखंच आहे") regarding the outcome, diminishing the positive impact of either team winning. While a congratulatory phrase ("अभिनंदन!") is present, it's undermined by the prior sentiment of equality. This results in a neutral overall sentiment despite the presence of a joyous emotion.

Text: अय खुळखळ्यानो हिन्दुत्व म्हणजे काय ते तरी सांगा
translated_text: Tell me what is Hindutva
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it's a direct question ("काय ते तरी सांगा" - what is that, tell me) seeking information. While "खुळखळ्यानो" (khulukhalyanno), which is a derogatory term, can imply negativity, the overall intent is questioning and information-seeking rather than expressing a strong positive or negative emotion. Therefore, the sentiment is considered neutral due to the interrogative nature of the sentence.

Text: आत्ता हातात मशाल आहे पोलिस स्त्शनलाच बिळातून जाळ धूर कडायचा
translated_text: I have a torch in my hand right now, I just want to light a fire in the police station.
Justification: The phrase "पोलिस स्त्शनलाच बिळातून जाळ धूर कडायचा" (I just want to light a fire in the police station) expresses a desire to commit arson, indicating anger and a negative sentiment.

Text: मी ज्ञानी बाकी सगळे अज्ञानी अशी प्रजाती ट्विटवर अधूनमधून उदयास येत असते.
translated_text: The "I'm the wise, everyone else is the ignorant" genre occasionally emerges on Twitter.
Justification: The sentence expresses a general observation about a type of behavior seen on Twitter, lacking strong positive or negative language. While it points out a possibly arrogant type of user, the phrase "अधूनमधून उदयास येत असते" (adhunmadhun udayas yet aste - occasionally emerges) indicates a neutral observation rather than a strong opinion.

Text: शरद पवारांनी बोलणं टाळलं, पण संजय राऊतांसाठी राहुल आणि प्रियांका गांधी दोघेही मैदानात
translated_text: Sharad Pawar avoided speaking, but both Rahul and Priyanka Gandhi are in the fray for Sanjay Raut
Justification: The sentence conveys factual information about political figures and their actions. There isn't any strongly positive or negative connotation associated with the Marathi phrases used, such as "बोलणं टाळलं" (avoided speaking) or "मैदानात" (in the fray). These terms describe actions without expressing any explicit emotion.

Text: “लटकेंचा राजीनामा स्वीकाराला नाही तर…..ठाकरेंकडे आहेत हे तीन पर्याय”
translated_text: “If not accepting Ladke's resignation…..Thackeray has these three options”
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it presents factual information regarding a political situation. There is no specific word or phrase indicating a positive or negative sentiment; it simply states possibilities ("तीन पर्याय").

Text: नारळाचं झाड आहे का एखादं ?
translated_text: Is there a coconut tree?
Justification: The sentence is a simple question, and there are no sentiment-laden words. The Marathi phrase "नारळाचं झाड आहे का एखादं ?" (Is there a coconut tree?) is a neutral inquiry.

Text: का तुमच्याकडे नाही बोलवत...
translated_text: Why aren't you calling me...
Justification: The phrase "का तुमच्याकडे नाही बोलवत..." (Why aren't you calling me...) expresses a sense of frustration and displeasure, lacking positive sentiment. While seemingly neutral, the underlying context hints at a simmering anger due to the absence of communication, indicated by "नाही बोलवत" (not calling).

Text: एकनाथ शिंदे जिलेबी केंद्र आणि देवेंद्र फडणवीस फाफडा सेंटर सुरू होणार वाटतं आता...
translated_text: It seems that Eknath Shinde Jalebi Center and Devendra Fadnavis Fafda Center will be opened now...
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a potential scenario ("सुरू होणार वाटतं") without expressing positive or negative opinions or emotions. The phrase "सुरू होणार वाटतं" (seems to be starting) presents a factual statement.

Text: गुरुवारच्या मंत्रिमंडळ बैठकीत घेण्यात आले हे महत्त्वाचे निर्णय
translated_text: These important decisions were taken in Thursday's cabinet meeting.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply reports factual information about decisions made ("महत्वाचे निर्णय घेण्यात आले"). There is no language indicating positive or negative sentiment.

Text: आपणी वंदेभारत!
translated_text: We are Vandebharat!
Justification: The sentence "आपणी वंदेभारत!" expresses a sense of pride and association with Vandebharat, but on its own does not carry a strongly positive or negative sentiment. "आपणी" (apani, meaning "we/our") sets a tone of belonging, which contributes to the emotion of joy, however does not indicate an overall strong feeling or assessment.

Text: अरे तुझ्या बापाला नाही जमल तू काय आहे
translated_text: Oh, your father didn't get it, what are you?
Justification: The phrase "अरे तुझ्या बापाला नाही जमल तू काय आहे" expresses surprise due to the unexpected nature of questioning someone's ability based on their father's perceived failings. The questioning phrase "तू काय आहे?" (what are you?) after referencing the father's failure ("तुझ्या बापाला नाही जमल") signals surprise at the presumed inheritance of incompetence.

Text: कोन (ण) म्हणायचं आहे का तुम्हाला ?
translated_text: Do you mean angle (s)?
Justification: The sentence uses a neutral question "कोन (ण) म्हणायचं आहे का तुम्हाला ?", which translates to "Do you mean angle(s)?". This is a simple inquiry without any inherent positive or negative connotations. Therefore, there isn't a specific word carrying sentiment. The entire phrase contributes to the neutral tone.

Text: महाराष्ट्रात फक्त आणि त्यासाठी कायम पुढें होती, आहे आणि राहील...
translated_text: Maharashtra has always been, is and will always be ahead only for that...
Justification: The sentence expresses a general statement about Maharashtra's forward-thinking nature. There isn't any specific word or phrase indicating positivity or negativity; the words "पुढें" (ahead) and "कायम" (always) simply describe a consistent state without implying a particular feeling, thus resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: त्यांच्या मनासारखं झालं आहे आता त्यांना गरज नाहीये
translated_text: They have done what they want, they don't need it anymore.
Justification: The phrase "गरज नाहीये" (garaj nahiye), meaning "no need," implies a dismissive attitude and lack of consideration, contributing to the anger emotion and neutral sentiment (indicating a lack of positivity). While "garaj nahiye" itself isn't inherently angry, in the context of the full sentence, it suggests a sense of rejection or being discarded once someone's desires are met, which can fuel anger.

Text: तु तिथे राहतोस का?
translated_text: Do you live there?
Justification: The sentence "तु तिथे राहतोस का?" is a simple question asking about residency. The interrogative particle "का" makes it a neutral inquiry, lacking any inherent emotional or sentimental charge.

Text: लवकर बाहेर या,तुमची गरज आहे आज महाराष्ट्राला.
translated_text: Come out soon, Maharashtra needs you today.
Justification: The sentence expresses a need and a call to action, but lacks strong positive or negative indicators. The phrase "तुमची गरज आहे" (tumchi garaj aahe - you are needed) indicates a necessity, but without emotional coloring, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: खोटं बोला पण रेटून बोला.
translated_text: Lie, but speak quickly.
Justification: The sentence expresses an amoral directive. While it advises lying, the phrase "रेटून बोला" (retun bola) focuses on the manner of speaking (assertively) rather than expressing explicit positive or negative emotion. It does not express a strong sentiment; thus neutral is appropriate.

Text: “ सहानुभूती मिळतेय हा भ्रम आहे!”-
translated_text: “It's an illusion that you're getting sympathy!”
Justification: The phrase "भ्रम आहे!" ("bhram aahe!") meaning "is an illusion!" expresses disbelief and negativity, negating any positive sentiment associated with receiving sympathy and fueling the anger emotion.

Text: शेतकरी हे या देशाचे 'मूळ' असून ते मजबूत ठेवण्याची जबाबदारी आपली आहे.
translated_text: Farmers are the 'roots' of this country and it is our responsibility to keep them strong.
Justification: The sentence uses the word "मूळ" (mool), meaning 'roots', to describe farmers. While the sentiment is positive towards farmers, the word itself is used in a descriptive and foundational context without expressing strong positive or negative feelings. Therefore, the sentiment is neutral.

Text: बातम्या नीट द्या.. परवानगी फक्त दोन दिवस आहे.. आधी एक दिवस होती..
translated_text: Give the news properly.. The permission is only for two days.. Earlier it was one day..
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the factual and informative tone. Phrases like "बातमी नीट द्या" (give the news properly), "परवानगी फक्त दोन दिवस आहे" (the permission is only for two days), and "आधी एक दिवस होती" (earlier it was one day) present information without expressing any strong positive or negative sentiment.

Text: आणि दुसरा जन्म तु घे आम्हाला नको सांगू
translated_text: And don't tell us you don't want to take another birth.
Justification: The sentence expresses a strong disapproval of someone not wanting another birth, but it's presented as a statement of refusal rather than an expression of emotion, leading to a neutral sentiment. The phrase "नको सांगू" (nako sangu), meaning "don't tell us," indicates a firm stance and a lack of emotional coloring.

Text: त्यांचे बरोबर एवढे दिवस काम करत होते तेव्हा याच भावना होत्या का?
translated_text: Did you have these same feelings when you were working with him for so long?
Justification: The sentence expresses a question about past feelings ("भावना होत्या का?") while recalling a period of work ("एवढे दिवस काम करत होते"). There is no explicit positive or negative emotion expressed, and the overall tone is neutral, simply inquiring about a past state.

Text: आ.श्री.रोहितराव, हा वारसा तुम्हांला जपायचा तर आहेच तो पण कृतीतून.
translated_text: Mr. Rohitrao, you have to preserve this legacy through action.
Justification: The sentence conveys a neutral sentiment. While it acknowledges a responsibility ("जपायचा तर आहेच"), it lacks strong positive or negative indicators. The phrase "जपायचा तर आहेच तो पण कृतीतून" simply states the manner in which the legacy should be preserved.

Text: या दिवाळी सणाला तुम्हा सर्वांना फिरायला जायचे आहे, मी माझ्या मित्रांसोबत हरिद्वारला जात आहे.
translated_text: This Diwali festival, you all want to go for a walk, I am going to Haridwar with my friends.
Justification: The sentence primarily describes a plan and expresses a desire to travel ("फिरायला जायचे आहे" - want to go for a walk) without strong positive or negative connotations, thus resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: लोकोत्तर व्यक्ती ही जन्माला येत नसते,ती शिकण्याने,सरावाने,विशिष्ट वळण लावण्याने तशी बनते.
translated_text: A transcendental person is not born, they become so through learning, practice, and a certain twist.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it describes a process of becoming "लोकोत्तर" (transcendental), rather than expressing a positive or negative opinion. The phrase "शिकण्याने, सरावाने, विशिष्ट वळण लावण्याने तशी बनते" (becomes so through learning, practice, and a certain twist) explains this process in a factual, objective manner.

Text: वर्षभरात     अंडी देणारी कोंबडी पाळा, कमी खर्चात मिळेल जास्त नफा
translated_text: Raise chickens that lay eggs throughout the year, get more profit at less cost
Justification: The sentence primarily focuses on practical advice regarding poultry farming and profit, lacking overt emotional indicators. The Marathi phrase "कमी खर्चात मिळेल जास्त नफा" (get more profit at less cost) describes a financial benefit, which is presented neutrally.

Text: आता आपली वेळ! भारत जोडो यात्रा लवकरच महाराष्ट्रात...
translated_text: Now is your time! Bharat Jodo Yatra will soon be in Maharashtra...
Justification: The sentence expresses a statement of fact and anticipation about the Bharat Jodo Yatra's arrival. The Marathi phrase "आता आपली वेळ!" (Aata aapli vel! - Now is your time!) is a general call to action and lacks any inherent positive or negative connotation in this context. Thus, the sentiment is neutral.

Text: पण हे तर आताच कॉग्रेस मधून भाजपात आलेत ना,
translated_text: But they just joined the BJP from Congress, right?
Justification: The neutral sentiment and surprise emotion stem from the phrase "आताच...आलेत ना" (aataach...aalet na), which indicates recent movement and invites confirmation, implying surprise at the newness of the situation.

Text: गजू तुमचे किती आमदार आणि खासदार भारत जोडो यात्रेमध्ये सहभागी होणार आहेत
translated_text: How many of your MLAs and MPs will participate in the Bharat Jodo Yatra?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it poses a factual question ("किती आमदार आणि खासदार" - "how many MLAs and MPs") about participation, lacking any emotional or opinionated language.

Text: दहा वर्षांसाठी ठेवण्यास काही हरकत आहे का?
translated_text: Is there any problem with keeping it for ten years?
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence "दहा वर्षांसाठी ठेवण्यास काही हरकत आहे का?" (Is there any problem with keeping it for ten years?) is simply a question asking for an opinion and does not express any positive or negative emotion. The phrase "काही हरकत आहे का?" (Is there any problem?) indicates a neutral inquiry.

Text: तू तरी पूर्ण ऐकतोस का
translated_text: Are you listening at all?
Justification: The neutral sentiment stems from the interrogative nature of the sentence "तू तरी पूर्ण ऐकतोस का" (Are you listening at all?), which questions an action without expressing any inherent positivity or negativity. There isn't a specific word driving emotion; it's the overall questioning tone that maintains neutrality.

Text: पुणेकर , गाडी मध्ये अडकल्यावर अशी काच फोडा....सुरक्षित राहा
translated_text: Punekar, break this glass when stuck in a car....stay safe
Justification: The emotion of fear is driven by the phrase "काच फोडा" (kach phoda), meaning "break the glass," which implies a dangerous or emergency situation requiring such action. The neutral sentiment likely comes from the overall safety advice given.

Text: आमची सहनशक्ती वाढलेय.....महागाई क्या होती है..... नमो नमो
translated_text: Our endurance has increased.....mahagai kya hoti hai.....namo namo
Justification: While the sentence expresses mixed feelings and includes a statement about increased endurance and questioning inflation ("आमची सहनशक्ती वाढलेय.....महागाई क्या होती है"), the concluding phrase "नमो नमो" (Namo Namo), a devotional chant, hints at a sense of peace and acceptance. As the sentiment is closer to neutral, it can be interpreted as a way of expressing faith or resilience in the face of challenges instead of any strong emotion.

Text: महापालिका ठेवायची की नाही हे जनता ठरवते
translated_text: The people decide whether to keep a municipality or not.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about the power of the people to decide, lacking any emotionally charged words or phrases. The neutral sentiment is primarily driven by the declarative nature of the phrase "जनता ठरवते" (janata tharavate - the people decide), which simply conveys a fact without expressing any positive or negative emotion.

Text: उद्या आहे रक्षाबंधन आणि नारळी पौर्णिमा; असे आहे त्याचे महत्त्व
translated_text: Tomorrow is Raksha Bandhan and Narali Purnima; this is its importance
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states upcoming festivals and their importance. The Marathi words "उद्या आहे रक्षाबंधन आणि नारळी पौर्णिमा; असे आहे त्याचे महत्त्व" are factual and descriptive, conveying no particular sentiment.

Text: याचा जन्म होणे हे पण निसर्गात प्रदूषणाचे एक मुख्य कारण आहे.....
translated_text: Its birth is also one of the main causes of pollution in nature.....
Justification: The sentence describes birth as a cause of pollution. The phrase "प्रदूषणाचे एक मुख्य कारण आहे" (pradushanache ek mukhya karan aahe) which translates to "one of the main causes of pollution," expresses a neutral statement of fact without conveying any positive or negative feeling.

Text: उल्हास बापट आहेत ?
translated_text: Is Ulhas Bapat?
Justification: The sentence is a simple question, devoid of any emotional cues or sentiment-bearing words. The Marathi phrase "आहेत ?" (aahet?) indicating a question, doesn't contribute any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: ताई प्रवक्ता म्हणा... हे प्रवक्या काय आहे
translated_text: Say, spokesperson... what is this spokesperson?
Justification: The sentence expresses confusion or mild questioning rather than a strong positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "काय आहे" (kay aahe - what is) indicates a neutral inquiry, contributing to the overall neutral sentiment.

Text: भविष्यात भाजप ची पण हीच स्थिती होईल लक्षात ठेवा
translated_text: Remember, the same will happen to BJP in the future.
Justification: The sentence conveys a neutral sentiment because it's a statement of prediction, not expressing any positive or negative feelings. The phrase "लक्षात ठेवा" (lakshat theva - remember) is an instruction and does not inherently indicate a positive or negative emotion.

Text: आता पुढे मराठी लोक आपल्या मुलाचे नाव “एकनाथ”ठेवण्यापूर्वी दोनदा विचार करतील
translated_text: From now on, Marathi people will think twice before naming their child "Eknath".
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it simply states an observation about a potential future action ("दोनदा विचार करतील" - will think twice) without expressing any positive or negative feeling.

Text: हे पण ऐका .
translated_text: Listen to this too.
Justification: The sentence "हे पण ऐका ." is neutral because it's a simple imperative, a request to listen, and lacks any emotionally charged Marathi words.

Text: घड्याळ घातलेल्या हातात मशाल धरून लंका दहन करायचंय आता आपल्याला..!! ⏰
translated_text: Now we have to burn Lanka with a torch in our hand wearing a watch..!! ⏰
Justification: The phrase "लंका दहन करायचंय आता आपल्याला" (lanka dahan karaychay aata aaplyala - now we have to burn Lanka) suggests a destructive and vengeful act, referencing the burning of Lanka in the Ramayana, thus contributing to the anger emotion. The phrase on its own, even with the other surrounding words can be used to describe a neutral event. It becomes negative with the anger emotion due to its connection with burning Lanka which represents something destructive and vengeful.

Text: ताई हा असा फोटो ठेवायचे कारण?
translated_text: Why would you put up a photo like this?
Justification: The phrase "ताई हा असा फोटो ठेवायचे कारण?" expresses surprise. The word "कारण?" (karan?) which translates to "why?" indicates the speaker's questioning and astonishment at the action, leading to the surprise emotion.

Text: मंगळसूत्र लायसन आहे समोरच्या व्यक्तीला माहित पाहिजे ही स्त्रि च लग्न झालंय
translated_text: The mangalsutra is a license. The other person should know that this woman is married.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it states a factual observation about the purpose of a mangalsutra ("मंगळसूत्र"), with no explicit positive or negative sentiment expressed. The statement "मंगळसूत्र लायसन आहे" (The mangalsutra is a license) is a descriptive analogy, not inherently emotional.

Text: आता तुझा बाप आहे ना लक्ष द्यायला
translated_text: Now you have your father to look after.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it is a simple statement of fact. The phrase "आता तुझा बाप आहे ना लक्ष द्यायला" (aata tuzha baap aahe na laksh dyayla) meaning "Now you have your father to look after" is a neutral observation.

Text: एवढीच काम करा.
translated_text: Just do that.
Justification: The sentence "एवढीच काम करा" is neutral because it's a simple instruction. The phrase "एवढीच काम करा" (evadhich kaam kara) meaning "just do that" expresses a factual statement without any emotional leaning.

Text: पहायला जाणारा मुलगा म्हणजे नागपुर ह  दोघींनाही पसंत करतो
translated_text: The boy who is going to see is Nagpur, he likes both of them.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it primarily describes an action and preference ("पसंत करतो" - pasant karto - likes) without expressing strong positive or negative feelings. The statement of fact is devoid of overtly emotional language.

Text: गौरी भिडे यांना सुरक्षा देण्यात यावी.
translated_text: Gauri Bhide should be provided security.
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the phrase "सुरक्षा देण्यात यावी" (suraksha denyat yaavi), which simply requests that security be provided. It expresses no positive or negative sentiment.

Text: तंत्रज्ञानाचा वापर विकासासाठी करणे म्हणजे खरी प्रगती आणि
translated_text: Using technology for development is true progress and
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it describes the use of technology for progress without expressing any positive or negative emotion. The phrase "खरी प्रगती" (khari pragati) - "true progress" - is descriptive but doesn't inherently convey strong positive or negative emotion, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: ( / ) ही जाण आहे बाबासाहेबांनी केलेल्या उपकारांची आणि बाळासाहेबांवर असलेल्या निष्ठेची.
translated_text: ( / ) This is the knowledge of the favors done by Babasaheb and the loyalty towards Balasaheb.
Justification: The sentence expresses a sense of recognition ("जाण") of favors and loyalty, which are neutral in sentiment. While "उपकारांची" (favors) and "निष्ठेची" (loyalty) can be positive in context, their mere acknowledgement here doesn't imply strong positive or negative feelings, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: इतक्या लवकर चौकशी करून काय साध्य होणार आहे ?
translated_text: What is going to be achieved by investigating so quickly?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a question expressing doubt about the effectiveness of a quick investigation. The phrase "काय साध्य होणार आहे ?" (kay sadhya honar aahe?) - "what is going to be achieved?" - indicates uncertainty rather than a positive or negative sentiment.

Text: तरीही नोकऱ्या देणारे प्रोजेक्ट गुजरातला का पाठवतात
translated_text: Why do they still send job-generating projects to Gujarat?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it is a question ("का पाठवतात") asking about the reason for sending projects to Gujarat, without expressing any positive or negative feeling towards the action itself. The Marathi phrase "का पाठवतात" simply inquires about the motivation, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: म्हणूनच ला मेहनत कमी करावी लागते
translated_text: That's why you have to work less.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual consequence using the phrase "ला मेहनत कमी करावी लागते" (you have to work less), which doesn't convey any strong positive or negative sentiment. It simply states a result, hence the neutral sentiment.

Text: हो  मुलींचा ब्रेक अप होत नाही ...त्या ब्रेक अप करतात
translated_text: Yes, girls don't break up...they break up.
Justification: The sentence implies a sense of sadness due to the assertion that girls "break up" others, absolving them of being broken up with. This is inferred from the phrase "ब्रेक अप करतात" (break up karatat), which suggests an active role in ending relationships rather than being victims of breakups. This carries a subtle, underlying sadness about the dynamic being described.

Text: विषय आहे का, शेवटी आपला बार्बर आहे तो.
translated_text: Is there a topic? After all, he is our barber.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as indicated by "आपला बार्बर आहे तो" (aapla barber aahe to), meaning "he is our barber," which is a factual statement devoid of strong positive or negative connotations. There is no emotional charge expressed in the language.

Text: शहाजी तू आता निवडून येत नाही , आता कळेन झाङ डोंगर
translated_text: Shahaji, you are not getting elected now, now I will know, Jhang Dongar.
Justification: The sentence expresses a statement of fact and a future consequence without expressing clear positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "शहाजी तू आता निवडून येत नाही" (Shahaji, you are not getting elected now) states a likely outcome, and "आता कळेन झाङ डोंगर" (now I will know, Jhang Dongar) hints at a future event or realization, but neither phrase is inherently positive or negative. Therefore, the sentiment is neutral.

Text: काय चीज आहे हे संपूर्ण जगाला माहित आहे.
translated_text: The whole world knows what cheese is.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a factual statement. The phrase "काय चीज आहे" (kay chiz aahe) translates to "what cheese is," which is presented as information and doesn't convey any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: मग आता शपथ विधीला ला शहा मोदी येणार आहेत का काय
translated_text: So now, will Shah and Modi come to the oath-taking ceremony?
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to its interrogative nature and lack of overtly positive or negative phrasing. The phrase "येणार आहेत का काय" (yenar ahet ka kay - will come or what?) expresses a question rather than a feeling.

Text: परिवर्तन हा सृष्टी चा नियम आहे,आणी सत्य हे कधीही लपविल्या जात नाही..
translated_text: Change is the law of creation, and truth is never hidden.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it states a general truth ("सत्य हे कधीही लपविल्या जात नाही" - truth is never hidden) and a natural phenomenon ("परिवर्तन हा सृष्टी चा नियम आहे" - change is the law of creation) without expressing any specific positive or negative feeling.

Text: त्यासाठी रविवार,    ऑक्टोबर रोजी जिल्ह्यातील हे मतदार मुंबईसाठी रवाना होणार आहेत.  /
translated_text: For this, these voters from the district will be leaving for Mumbai on Sunday, October. /
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply describes a factual event of voters traveling. There's no sentiment-bearing word or phrase. The sentence is purely descriptive. The phrase "रवाना होणार आहेत" (ravana honar aahet - will be leaving) is descriptive and doesn't convey any particular sentiment or emotion.

Text: भारत जोडो यात्रेचा महाराष्ट्रातील मार्ग, दिनांक,तपशीलवार माहिती द्यावी मी यात्रेत सामील होऊ ईच्छितो.
translated_text: Please provide detailed information about the route, dates and details of the Bharat Jodo Yatra in Maharashtra. I would like to join the Yatra.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral request for information. The phrase "माहिती द्यावी" (mahiti dyavi - provide information) indicates a desire for information without conveying any particular sentiment or emotion.

Text: ही मोठीच आहे
translated_text: This is big.
Justification: The word "मोठीच" (mothich), meaning "big" with an emphasis suggesting unexpectedness, contributes to the surprise emotion and neutral sentiment.

Text: बॉलीवूड मध्ये गेले का
translated_text: Did you go to Bollywood?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a simple question, "बॉलीवूड मध्ये गेले का" (Did you go to Bollywood?). There is no inherently positive or negative connotation in asking this question; it's merely seeking information. The phrase "बॉलीवूड मध्ये गेले का" itself does not contain any emotional indicators.

Text: हातात चॉको फ्लेवर घेऊन उद्धव सेना आता महाराष्ट्र भर फिरणार
translated_text: Uddhav Sena will now travel all over Maharashtra with Choco Flavor in hand
Justification: The sentence describes a political party's action ("उद्धव सेना आता महाराष्ट्र भर फिरणार") without expressing any inherent positive or negative sentiment. No specific word or phrase indicates a clear emotion; it's a statement of fact or planned action.

Text: प्रामाणिक असून सुद्धा पक्षनेते वडापाव देत नाही हे सांगते
translated_text: Even though he is honest, the party leader says he is not giving Vadapav.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it reports a factual situation ("वडापाव देत नाही" - not giving Vadapav) without expressing strong positive or negative feelings, despite the initial mention of honesty ("प्रामाणिक असून सुद्धा" - even though he is honest). The statement focuses on the absence of a gesture (giving Vadapav), not on a character flaw or a particularly emotional event.

Text: हि बया गांजा रौत ची उणिव भासू देणार नाही… शेणकिड्यांना साजेसे व्यक्तिमत्व…
translated_text: This Baya Ganja Raut will not be missed... A personality befitting a dung beetle...
Justification: While the sentence contains insults like "गांजा" (ganja - cannabis) and "शेणकिड्यांना साजेसे व्यक्तिमत्व" (a personality befitting a dung beetle), the overall context and the user's intent seem to be reporting or stating a fact rather than expressing a strong positive or negative emotion. Thus, the neutral sentiment. The phrase "उणिव भासू देणार नाही" (will not be missed) further contributes to the objective observation, not necessarily expressing strong negativity, but more so indifference.

Text: दिवाळी तुरुंगातच जाणार हे नक्की..
translated_text: Diwali will definitely go to jail..
Justification: The sentiment is negative and evokes sadness due to the phrase "तुरुंगातच जाणार हे नक्की" (turungatach janar he nakki), meaning "definitely going to jail," which expresses a bleak and unfortunate situation.

Text: बरोबर आहे ना आता पक्षात घेऊन
translated_text: Is it right to take the party now?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it is a question regarding the correctness of a decision ("बरोबर आहे ना") without expressing any explicit positive or negative emotion. The phrase "बरोबर आहे ना" simply inquires about agreement.

Text: नाही संकल्पित च म्हणायचं होत
translated_text: No, I meant to say it was intentional.
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the phrase "नाही संकल्पित च म्हणायचं होत" (nahi sankalpit ch mhanayche hote). While "संकल्पित" (sankalpit) means intentional, the overall phrase simply explains the speaker's intended meaning without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: हे सांगायला पण इंग्रजी वापराय लागते
translated_text: Even to say this, you have to use English.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence expresses a simple observation ("हे सांगायला पण इंग्रजी वापराय लागते"), without expressing any particular positive or negative feeling. The phrase "हे सांगायला पण इंग्रजी वापराय लागते" simply states a fact or situation.

Text: शेवटचं काय ऐकु आल नाही
translated_text: I haven't heard the last of it.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the phrase "ऐकु आल नाही" (aiku aal nahi), meaning "did not hear," simply states a lack of audibility and doesn't inherently express a positive or negative emotion.

Text: त्यांची लायकीच ती आहे. त्यांनी बाप मानलाय फेकु ला त्याचीच फळे आहेत ती.
translated_text: They deserve it. They have considered Feku as their father, and these are his fruits.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence, while potentially containing implicit negativity towards "Feku" and those who follow him, lacks explicitly positive or negative words. The phrase "त्यांची लायकीच ती आहे" (They deserve it) on its own is also neutral, implying a deserved outcome without explicitly stating whether that outcome is good or bad.

Text: काकचं मस्नात जायचं वय झालंय आणि काका
translated_text: Uncle is old enough to go to Masnat and uncle
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the phrase "काकचं मस्नात जायचं वय झालंय" (Uncle is old enough to go to Masnat) is a matter-of-fact observation about the uncle's age, devoid of positive or negative connotation in itself.

Text: मध्य पवारांची सात हिंदुत्व बळकट करण्यासाठी होती काय,,,,
translated_text: Was the seven of Madhya Pawars meant to strengthen Hindutva?
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to its interrogative nature and lack of inherently positive or negative Marathi words. The phrase "काय" (kay), meaning "what/is it?", contributes to the questioning tone, indicating uncertainty and preventing any strong sentiment. While "हिंदुत्व बळकट करण्यासाठी" (Hindutva balakat karnyasathi) refers to strengthening Hindutva, the question format avoids endorsing or opposing it, keeping the sentiment neutral.

Text: गुरूजी आहेत का ...की वाहून गेले...
translated_text: Is Guruji still there...or has he been swept away...
Justification: The sentence expresses a question about Guruji's well-being after a possible calamity, but lacks explicit positive or negative indicators. The phrase "वाहून गेले" (vahoon gele - swept away) suggests a negative event, but the uncertainty implied by the question marks and the overall tone result in a neutral sentiment.

Text: तोंड पहा कसे केले आहे ते ह्या तोंडावरून तरी वाटत नाही
translated_text: Look at the face, I can't tell from this face how it's done.
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the factual and observational tone. The phrase "तोंड पहा कसे केले आहे ते" (tond paha kase kele aahe te - look at the face, how it's done) simply describes looking at a face and expressing an inability to discern something from it, without conveying any explicit positive or negative emotion.

Text: आपल्या हातावर,राखी बांधून घ्यायला का?
translated_text: Why tie a rakhi on your arm?
Justification: The sentence expresses surprise due to the interrogative phrasing "का?" (ka?), meaning "why?", which implies an unexpected or questioning stance regarding the action of tying a rakhi.

Text: तुम्ही इम्पोर्टेड वापरणार मग का नाही होणार
translated_text: If you are going to use imported ones, then why not?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a rhetorical question ("मग का नाही होणार" - then why not?) expressing a cause-and-effect relationship regarding the use of imported goods ("इम्पोर्टेड वापरणार") without expressing any specific positive or negative emotion.

Text: विदर्भ मराठवाड्याला जोडणाऱ्या खामगाव मार्गाची अशी आहे स्थिती
translated_text: This is the status of the Khamgaon road connecting Vidarbha to Marathwada
Justification: The sentence is primarily descriptive, stating the condition of a road. No specific Marathi words express a positive or negative sentiment. The words like "स्थिती" (sthiti - status) are neutral in this context.

Text: कायम हीच भिती असते दर तिन मिनिटाला असते लोकल ..गर्दी लोकल
translated_text: There is always this fear, there is a local every three minutes..crowded local
Justification: The word "भिती" (bhiti), meaning fear, directly indicates the presence of fear, leading to the negative sentiment.

Text: आहे काय हे..
translated_text: What is this..
Justification: The phrase "आहे काय हे.." expresses surprise due to its open-ended and questioning nature. The "काय" (kay) signifies a question of "what" and the overall phrase suggests disbelief or astonishment.

Text: सणाची सुरुवात याणेच होती
translated_text: This was the beginning of the festival.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact about the festival's beginning. There is no emotionally charged language present. The phrase "सणाची सुरुवात" (sanachi survat - festival's beginning) is factual and devoid of sentiment.

Text: आजच हजी अल्लीला जातो बघू काय होतय का ते
translated_text: I'm going to Haji Ali today to see what's going on.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it simply states an intention to visit Haji Ali to see what's happening. The phrase "जातो बघू काय होतय का ते" (jato baghu kay hotay ka te) indicates a casual observation without expressing any specific positive or negative feeling.

Text: बरोबर...कारण मोदी संघ भाजपा यांचा द्वेष करायचा हे फिक्स असते लिबरल गँग चे
translated_text: Right...because it is a fixed idea of ​​the liberal gang to hate the Modi team and the BJP.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because while it mentions "द्वेष करायचा" (dvesh karaycha - to hate), it presents it as a fixed opinion or expectation within a specific group ("लिबरल गँग चे" - of the liberal gang) rather than expressing the speaker's own sentiment. The statement is an observation about a perceived bias, not an endorsement of hate itself.

Text: या पगारी नोकरांना पत्रकार म्हणण्याऐवजी दूसरे काहीतरी नाव काढलं पाहीजे..
translated_text: Instead of calling these salaried employees journalists, they should be called something else.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the phrase "दूसरे काहीतरी नाव काढलं पाहीजे" (dusre kahitari naav kadhale pahije), suggesting a need for a different label without expressing a strong positive or negative opinion.

Text: हे शेतकऱ्याचे नुकसान आहे कि साठा करुन ठेवलेल्या व्यापार्यांचे आहे.
translated_text: Is this a loss for the farmer or for the traders who stockpile it?
Justification: The sentence presents a neutral question, contrasting potential losses for farmers and traders. There's no inherently positive or negative sentiment expressed; it simply poses an inquiry. The Marathi phrase "नुकसान आहे कि" (loss is it?) introduces the possibility of loss, but the question is framed neutrally, not expressing sadness or anger.

Text: बहुतेक तरी पण मी विचारून सांगते काय होतं.
translated_text: Most of the time, I ask and tell what happened.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the use of "विचारून सांगते" (vicharun sangte), which translates to "I ask and tell." This conveys a factual or informative tone rather than any strong positive or negative emotion.

Text: दिवाळीच्या व्हिडीओला बॅकग्राऊंड ला गुजराती गरब्याला वाजवणारं गाणं का?
translated_text: Why is the Gujarati Garba song playing in the background of Diwali videos?
Justification: The sentiment is neutral and emotion is surprise because the sentence expresses a questioning tone and highlights an unexpected association (Gujarati Garba song with Diwali videos) indicated by the word "का?" (ka? - why?).

Text: नशीब आहे या सगळ्या लोकांचं आपल नाही तस काहीच
translated_text: It's luck, none of these people have anything to do with it.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the phrase "नशीब आहे" (nasheeb aahe), meaning "it's luck," while potentially implying envy, is presented matter-of-factly without strong positive or negative connotations in this context. "आपल नाही तस काहीच" further emphasizes a lack of personal involvement, contributing to the neutral tone.

Text: असाच एक क्रेंद्रात सुद्ध आहे हरबर्याच्या झाडावर चढलेला
translated_text: There is one such person in the center, climbing a hibiscus tree.
Justification: The sentence uses the phrase "हरबर्याच्या झाडावर चढलेला" (climbing a hibiscus tree), which implies someone is exaggerating or boasting, but without enough context to be definitively positive or negative, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: काय करत आहे
translated_text: What are you doing?
Justification: The sentence "काय करत आहे" is neutral because it is a simple question asking "What are you doing?" and lacks any sentiment-bearing words or phrases. The phrase "काय करत आहे" itself is a neutral inquiry.

Text: कुठून आला इतका पैसा?? ह्यावर बोट ठेवाल का?
translated_text: Where did all this money come from?? Can you point your finger at this?
Justification: The phrase "कुठून आला इतका पैसा??" (Kuthun ala itka paisa?? - Where did all this money come from??) expresses surprise.

Text: चुप बसावे लागणार नाही भाऊ
translated_text: You don't have to stay silent, brother.
Justification: The sentence expresses a lack of obligation to be silent, using "चुप बसावे लागणार नाही" (chup basaave lagnaar nahi - don't have to stay silent), indicating a neutral sentiment as it simply removes a constraint.

Text: पंढरपूर का नाही यात, तिथे उमेदवार पडला हेही सांगाव....
translated_text: Why not Pandharpur? Also tell us that a candidate has been fielded there....
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it simply inquires about the absence of Pandharpur and requests information about a candidate being fielded there. There is no explicit positive or negative emotion expressed. The phrase "पंढरपूर का नाही" (Pandharpur ka nahi - Why not Pandharpur?) is a simple question, and "उमेदवार पडला हेही सांगाव" (Umedwar padla hehi sangava - Also tell us that a candidate has been fielded there) is a request for information, both contributing to the neutral sentiment.

Text: तरी गुंतवणूक आणलेली मग आधिच बर होत
translated_text: However, it would be better if the investment was brought in.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it presents a conditional statement ("तरी गुंतवणूक आणलेली मग आधिच बर होत"), simply stating a preference without any strong positive or negative emotion. The phrase "आधिच बर होत" (it would be better) suggests a neutral comparison rather than a feeling of sadness, anger, or joy.

Text: अंधेरी पूर्वची पोटनिवडणूक बिनविरोध होणार..!
translated_text: Andheri East by-election will be held unopposed..!
Justification: While the overall sentiment is neutral (0.0), the emotion of anger likely stems from the phrase "बिनविरोध होणार..!", which translates to "will be unopposed!". This implies a lack of democratic process and potential suppression of opposition, which can evoke anger. Even though not inherently negative, the implication in this specific context raises concerns and triggers anger in those who might see it as anti-democratic.

Text: नविन असेल तर सांग जुनी माहिती आहे
translated_text: If it's new, tell me, it's old information.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it simply states a preference for new information over old. The phrases "सांग" (sang - tell me) and "माहिती आहे" (mahiti aahe - is information) are factual and lack any emotional or opinionated tone.

Text: लवकरच विधासभेची निवडणूक घेतली जाणार, हा सुद्धा एक अर्थ काढला जाऊ शकतो.
translated_text: Another interpretation could be that the assembly elections will be held soon.
Justification: The sentence expresses a potential interpretation of upcoming elections and lacks strong positive or negative indicators. The phrase "हा सुद्धा एक अर्थ काढला जाऊ शकतो" (another interpretation could be...) signals a neutral, speculative tone rather than a definitive statement of sentiment.

Text: केवळ हास्यास्पद आहे हे...
translated_text: That's just ridiculous...
Justification: The phrase "केवळ हास्यास्पद आहे" (keval hasyaspad aahe), meaning "just ridiculous," expresses disbelief and negativity, strongly indicating disgust and a lack of positive sentiment. The word "हास्यास्पद" (hasyaspad - ridiculous) is the key indicator.

Text: शिंदे फडणवीस जोडीने याचं उद्घाटन केलं आहे म्हणे.. जोडीने बसवा एकदा त्यांना
translated_text: It is said that the Shinde Fadnavis duo has inaugurated this.. Let them sit together for once.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the phrase "शिंदे फडणवीस जोडीने याचं उद्घाटन केलं आहे म्हणे" (Shinde Fadnavis duo inaugurated it, it is said), which reports an event without expressing strong positive or negative feelings. The phrase "जोडीने बसवा एकदा त्यांना" (let them sit together for once) doesn't convey any strong sentiment in itself.

Text: ओके हे बेडूक आहे का? मला चिकन सारखे वाटले
translated_text: Okay, is this a frog? I felt like a chicken.
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the lack of explicitly positive or negative words. The phrases "ओके" ("Okay") and "मला चिकन सारखे वाटले" ("I felt like a chicken") express uncertainty and a comparison but don't inherently convey a positive or negative sentiment.

Text: कोणत्या आयोगाने, कुठली निवडणूक काही कागदपत्रे आहेत का?
translated_text: Which commission, which election? Are there any documents?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral inquiry about the existence of documents related to a commission and election. The phrase "आहेत का?" (aahet kaa?), meaning "are there?", simply poses a question without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: ये दोर ही एसा हे
translated_text: This is the rope
Justification: The sentence "ये दोर ही एसा हे" is neutral as it simply states a fact ("This is the rope") without expressing any positive or negative emotion. The entire phrase contributes to this neutrality; there isn't a single word triggering a specific sentiment.

Text: लोकेश राहुलने जास्त धावा करुनही सूर्यकुमार यादवची खेळी का ठरली मोलाची, जाणून घ्या…
translated_text: Why Suryakumar Yadav's innings was valuable despite Lokesh Rahul scoring more runs, find out...
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it mainly poses a question and introduces a topic for discussion. There are no inherently positive or negative Marathi words present. The phrases "जास्त धावा करुनही" (despite scoring more runs) and "खेळी का ठरली मोलाची" (why the innings was valuable) are descriptive and inquisitive, not expressing sentiment.

Text: गौतम बुद्ध हेसुद्धा स्वतः शाकाहारी होते व त्यांनी शाकाहार पुरस्कृत केला.
translated_text: Gautam Buddha himself was a vegetarian and advocated vegetarianism.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it states a factual claim about Gautam Buddha's vegetarianism and advocacy for it. There is no indication of positive or negative sentiment in the Marathi phrasing "गौतम बुद्ध हेसुद्धा स्वतः शाकाहारी होते व त्यांनी शाकाहार पुरस्कृत केला."

Text: कर्मवीरांच्या विचारांचा प्रसार करण्यासाठी अधिक जोमाने प्रयत्न करू या...
translated_text: Let us strive more vigorously to spread the thoughts of Karmaveer...
Justification: The sentence expresses a call to action ("प्रयत्न करू या") to spread thoughts, which is inherently neutral, lacking positive or negative sentiment.

Text: "बाळासाहेब ठाकरे" असा पुर्ण उल्लेख ज्या नावात आहे तिच शिवसेना
translated_text: The Shiv Sena whose name fully mentions "Balasaheb Thackeray" is the same.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it's a factual statement about a political party, focusing on the full name of a prominent figure. There's no sentiment expressed through any specific Marathi word or phrase; it simply states a matter of fact ("पुर्ण उल्लेख ज्या नावात आहे" - whose name fully mentions).

translated_text: Whatever, Mr....
Justification: The sentence "काहीही हा" indicates a dismissive or indifferent tone, leading to a neutral sentiment. "काहीही" specifically contributes to this lack of strong feeling.

Text: आता याच्या चरणी डोके ठेवा आपण आणि धन्य व्हा....
translated_text: Now lay your head at his feet and be blessed...
Justification: The sentence expresses a call to devotion and seeking blessings. The phrase "धन्य व्हा" (dhanya vha - be blessed/fulfilled) doesn't inherently carry strong positive or negative sentiment in this context, as it's a common expression of spiritual aspiration, hence neutral sentiment.

Text: मोठी उडी मारण्यासाठी चार पावलं मागे यावच लागतं असे ट्वीटस् कधी सुरू करायचे????????
translated_text: When did you start tweeting that you have to take four steps back to take a big leap??????????
Justification: The overall neutral sentiment and surprise are driven by the rhetorical question "कधी सुरू करायचे????????", indicating disbelief or surprise at the supposed starting point of such tweets.

Text: असे अधिकार आहेत का तुम्हाला. ?
translated_text: Do you have such rights?
Justification: The sentence "असे अधिकार आहेत का तुम्हाला. ?" expresses a neutral sentiment. The phrase "अधिकार आहेत का" (adhikar aahet ka - do you have rights?) poses a question about authority, without conveying any explicit positive or negative emotion.

Text: असा असेल तुमचा आजचा दिवस: राशिभविष्य    ऑक्टोबर
translated_text: This is what your day will be like: Horoscope for October
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is simply a factual statement presenting a horoscope. The phrase "असा असेल तुमचा आजचा दिवस" (asa asel tumcha aacha divas) - "This is what your day will be like" - is a descriptive introduction and doesn't express any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: त्यांच्या' खात्यात जमा होणार पैसे !
translated_text: Money will be deposited into their account!
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive expectation of receiving money, which generally evokes joy. The Marathi phrase "जमा होणार पैसे" (jama honar paise) meaning "money will be deposited," indicates a future positive event, justifying the emotion of joy. While the sentiment is neutral (0.0), likely due to the lack of explicit positive adjectives, the implicit positive outcome drives the joy.

Text: निवडणूक ही व्हायलाच हवी विषय संपला
translated_text: The election must be held, the topic is over.
Justification: The sentence expresses a firm declaration that the election must occur and the matter is closed. The phrase "विषय संपला" (vishay sampala) meaning "topic is over" indicates a neutral sentiment as it simply states the closure of discussion, without expressing any positive or negative emotion.

Text: खाण्याचे पदार्थ चालले होते
translated_text: Food was running out.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because the Marathi phrase "चालले होते" (chalale hote), meaning "was running out/depleting," simply describes a state of affairs without expressing any inherent positive or negative sentiment.

Text: हा अपमान छत्रपतींचे मावळे कसा सहन करणार ?
translated_text: How will the Chhatrapati's descendants bear this insult?
Justification: The phrase "अपमान" (apman), meaning "insult," indicates a negative situation likely to provoke anger. While the sentence is a question, it strongly implies outrage due to the insult, therefore justifying an emotion of anger and a neutral sentiment score as it's a rhetorical question implying negative sentiment.

Text: कोणते मराठी पर्याय होते हे पण टाका.
translated_text: Also include which Marathi options were available.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply requests information ("टाका" - taka, include/add) without expressing any positive or negative emotion or opinion.

Text: मग मुंबई महापालिका ठरवते का?
translated_text: So does the Mumbai Municipal Corporation decide?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a factual question. The phrase "ठरवते का?" (tharavate ka?) which translates to "decide/determine?" is a question formation that does not carry any inherent positive or negative sentiment.

Text: एक विनंती आहे.... प्रचार सुरू करण्यापूर्वी साहेब त्याच पक्षात आहेत का याची खात्री करावी...!!!!
translated_text: I have a request.... Before starting the campaign, please make sure that the sir is in the same party...!!!!
Justification: The phrase "साहेब त्याच पक्षात आहेत का याची खात्री करावी...!!!!" implies distrust and suspicion towards the leader ("साहेब"), suggesting anger that his allegiance is being questioned, resulting in a sentiment of 0.0. The multiple exclamation marks further emphasize the angry tone.

Text: हिमाचल प्रदेश आणि गुजरातमध्ये कुणाची सत्ता येणार? बघा, हा सर्व्हे काय सांगतो…
translated_text: Who will come to power in Himachal Pradesh and Gujarat? See what this survey says...
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it poses a question ("कुणाची सत्ता येणार?") and introduces a survey without expressing any positive or negative opinion. The phrase "कुणाची सत्ता येणार?" is a factual inquiry, contributing to the neutral sentiment.

Text: बदनामी लोकं त्याचं लोकांची करतात ज्यांच नाव होत असतं...
translated_text: People who defame people do so to those whose names are being...
Justification: The sentence expresses disgust because the phrase "बदनामी करतात" (badnami karatat), meaning "defame," indicates a negative and morally reprehensible action, thus triggering disgust.

Text: तडीपार &; फेकू हे शब्द अजून हि पहिल्या आणि दुसऱ्या नंबर वर आहेत..
translated_text: The words "Tadipar" and "Feku" are still at number one and number two.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral as the sentence primarily reports a fact about the popularity of specific words ("Tadipar", "Feku") without expressing any positive or negative opinion.

Text: लग्नात वधू-वरांनी केली अशी सही, दर महिन्याला मोफत मिळणार पिझ्झा
translated_text: The bride and groom signed this during the wedding, they will get free pizza every month
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply reports a fact about a couple receiving free pizza monthly due to a wedding agreement. There's no emotionally charged language or sentiment. The core phrase "मोफत मिळणार पिझ्झा" (mofat milnaar pizza - free pizza will be received) is purely informative.

Text: …..आणि उलगडला किशोर कुमार यांच्या संगीतमय गायन प्रवास
translated_text: …..and Kishore Kumar's musical journey unfolded
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply describes the unfolding of a musical journey. The phrase "उलगडला ... गायन प्रवास" (ulagadala...gaayan pravas) which means "unfolded...singing journey" is a descriptive statement without any positive or negative connotations.

Text: हा एकटाच नाही सर्व नेते असेच आहेत
translated_text: This is not the only one, all leaders are like this.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the phrase "असेच आहेत" (asech aahet), meaning "are like this," presents a general statement about leaders without expressing strong positive or negative feelings. It's an observation rather than an expression of sentiment.

Text: चव्हाणके म्हटला होता नीरज चोप्रा के पूर्वज भाला फेकते थे
translated_text: Chavanke had said that Neeraj Chopra's ancestors used to throw javelin.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact about what someone said regarding Neeraj Chopra's ancestors. There are no emotionally charged words or phrases. The entire statement, "चव्हाणके म्हटला होता नीरज चोप्रा के पूर्वज भाला फेकते थे" is informational.

Text: आमची पन्नास साठ एकर विकून सुद्धा तुमच्या त्या फ्लॅट ची बरोबरी होणार नाही
translated_text: Even if we sell our fifty or sixty acres, it won't be equal to that flat of yours.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual comparison with "बरोबर होणार नाही" (barobar honar nahi - won't be equal), indicating a lack of positive or negative sentiment, hence neutral.

Text: राम मंदिर खंडपीठ मध्ये हे माननीय होते का?
translated_text: Was this honorable in the Ram Mandir bench?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a factual question and doesn't express any positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "माननीय होते का?" ("was this honorable?") is posed as a query rather than an assertion of honor or dishonor.

Text: तुमचा पानाची साइज मोठी झाली आहे
translated_text: Your page size has increased.
