It describes a meeting that is compared to concrete slab falling which doesn't convey a particular sentiment.

Text: सगळ्यात आधी हा प्रश्न विचारा की एवढ्या सगळ्यांना सरकारी नोकरीच का करायची आहे?
translated_text: First of all, ask this question: why do so many people want to do government jobs?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it poses a question ("एवढ्या सगळ्यांना सरकारी नोकरीच का करायची आहे?") without expressing any explicit positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "एवढ्या सगळ्यांना सरकारी नोकरीच का करायची आहे?" simply inquires about the reason for people's desire for government jobs, lacking any emotionally charged language.

Text: सगळ्या गावातले लोक वांग्याची शेती कशी करायची हे शिकतील आणि करोडोपती होतील.
translated_text: People in every village will learn how to farm brinjal and become millionaires.
Justification: The sentence describes a scenario of learning and potential financial success; however, it lacks explicit positive or negative emotional cues. The neutral sentiment arises because the Marathi sentence focuses on a factual possibility ("शिकतील आणि करोडोपती होतील" - will learn and become millionaires) without expressing joy, hope, or any other specific emotion.

Text: लवकरच वाटेला येणार आहे हे चित्र
translated_text: This picture is coming soon.
Justification: The sentence "लवकरच वाटेला येणार आहे हे चित्र" is neutral because it simply states a fact ("लवकरच वाटेला येणार आहे" - coming soon) without expressing any positive or negative feelings. The phrase doesn't convey any particular emotion.

Text: हा..कळलं
translated_text: Hey..I understand.
Justification: The sentence "हा..कळलं" expresses a neutral sentiment because "कळलं" (kalala) simply indicates understanding and doesn't inherently convey any positive or negative emotion.

Text: "बाळासाहेब ठाकरे" असा पुर्ण उल्लेख ज्या नावात आहे तिच शिवसेना
translated_text: The Shiv Sena whose name fully mentions "Balasaheb Thackeray" is the same.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it factually states that the Shiv Sena is the one that mentions "Balasaheb Thackeray" fully. There is no emotional or opinionated language; it's a statement of fact. The phrase "बाळासाहेब ठाकरे" is simply a name, contributing to the neutrality.

Text: कष्ट करून जगणं, ही सुद्धा एक कलाच आहे. आज पहाटे विठ्ठलवाडी वृत्तपत्र सेंटर
translated_text: Living by working hard is also an art. This morning, Vitthalwadi Newspaper Center
Justification: The sentence expresses a general observation about hard work and life, lacking strong positive or negative indicators. The phrase "कष्ट करून जगणं" (kasht karun jagna - living by working hard) is neutral in its connotation, simply describing a way of life.

Text: सभेत घुसलेला कुत्रा दिसतोय हा
translated_text: It looks like a dog has entered the meeting.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact. The Marathi phrase "सभेत घुसलेला कुत्रा दिसतोय" (sabhet ghuslela kutra distoy), meaning "It looks like a dog has entered the meeting," is a factual observation without any positive or negative connotations.

Text: सोन पापडी खायला आली असेल
translated_text: You must have come to eat gold papdi.
Justification: The sentence "सोन पापडी खायला आली असेल" is neutral because it simply states a possible reason for someone's arrival (to eat Son Papdi). There is no inherently positive or negative word or phrase like an adjective or verb expressing happiness, sadness, anger, or excitement. The words "सोन पापडी खायला आली असेल" are factually neutral in isolation.

Text: शेठला एवढं पण करू नका.
translated_text: Don't do this to Seth.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it expresses a simple request or instruction ("करू नका" - don't do). There is no explicit positive or negative sentiment conveyed in the phrase.

Text: हा बघा ‘हा’! याचा सगळा स्टंट पोलिसांनी बाहेर काढला, जशास तसं उत्तर!
translated_text: Look at this! The police pulled out all the stunts, the answer is as it is!
Justification: The neutral sentiment stems from the phrase "जशास तसं उत्तर!", indicating a tit-for-tat response, which is descriptive rather than expressing positive or negative feelings. The exclamation mark following "हा!" indicates surprise.

Text: मराठी येत नाही का..?
translated_text: Don't you know Marathi?
Justification: The sentence "मराठी येत नाही का..?" expresses a lack of knowledge with a questioning tone, indicated by "येत नाही का", making it neutral and not inherently positive or negative. The question itself is factual and doesn't carry any strong emotion.

Text: अस कस रामाकडून शिखंडीने ते धनुष्य बळकावल होत म्हणुन गोठवाव लागले
translated_text: How could Shikhandi snatch that bow from Rama and freeze it?
Justification: The sentence describes a past event ("अस कस रामाकडून शिखंडीने ते धनुष्य बळकावल होत म्हणुन गोठवाव लागले"), and uses neutral language without expressing any particular emotion or opinion. The Marathi phrase "अस कस" introduces a question of how something happened, indicating curiosity or information seeking rather than a sentiment-bearing statement.

Text: मशाल वगैरे काही नसतंय ते सोनिया आईस्क्रीम असतंय ते
translated_text: There's no torch or anything, it's Sonia's ice cream.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about the identity of something ("सोनिया आईस्क्रीम असतंय ते" - it's Sonia's ice cream) rather than conveying any strong emotion or opinion, hence neutral sentiment.

Text: उधो किती नालायक आहे. जो बापाला टि बाळू म्हणाला, त्याला हॅप्पी बड्डे करायला निघालाय
translated_text: How worthless is Udho. Whoever called his father a "baby", I'm going to wish him a happy birthday.
Justification: The phrase "नालायक आहे" (nalayak aahe), meaning "worthless is," indicates a negative sentiment and directly contributes to the feeling of disgust.

Text: सदर माहिती महाराष्ट्राच्या मातृभाषेत म्हणजेच मराठी भाषेतही प्रसिद्ध करावी...
translated_text: This information should also be published in the mother tongue of Maharashtra, i.e. Marathi...
Justification: The sentence expresses a suggestion for information to be published in Marathi ("मराठी भाषेतही प्रसिद्ध करावी"), which is a neutral statement without inherent positive or negative sentiment.

Text: प्रेमाच्या धाग्यात काळजीचा दोरा बांधता आला की नात्यातील गाठ आयुष्यभर सुटत नाही.
translated_text: Once the thread of care is tied to the thread of love, the knot in the relationship will remain untied for a lifetime.
Justification: The sentence describes a positive concept of strong relationships formed through love and care, but it doesn't express any explicit positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "प्रेमाच्या धाग्यात काळजीचा दोरा बांधता आला की नात्यातील गाठ आयुष्यभर सुटत नाही" (Once the thread of care is tied to the thread of love, the knot in the relationship will remain untied for a lifetime) is descriptive and conveys stability rather than a distinct emotion, justifying a neutral sentiment.

Text: अजून एक    वाले भक्त आला रे
translated_text: Another Wale devotee came
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact without any emotionally charged words. The phrase "अजून एक वाले भक्त आला रे" (ajun ek wale bhakta ala re) is a neutral observation and doesn't express any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: पोळा चे अकाउंट हॅक झाले होते ते पूर्ववत झाले का?
translated_text: Pola's account was hacked, was it restored?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the inquiry about the status of an account ("अकाउंट") being hacked and restored ("पूर्ववत झाले का?"). It's a question seeking information, lacking strong positive or negative indicators.

Text: आता तुम्हाला बाळासाहेबांच्या शिवसेनेला हरवायचे आहे.
translated_text: Now you want to defeat Balasaheb's Shiv Sena.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral as the sentence simply states an intention to defeat a political party ("आता तुम्हाला बाळासाहेबांच्या शिवसेनेला हरवायचे आहे"), without expressing any explicit positive or negative emotion. The phrase "हरवायचे आहे" (haravayache aahe - to defeat) itself is not inherently negative in this context, as it just describes a political objective.

Text: हा पाऊस काय अंधेरी पूर्व निवडणूकीचा निकाल ऐकूणच जाणार आहे का??
translated_text: Is this rain going to stop us from hearing the results of the Andheri by-election?
Justification: The sentence expresses a question about whether the rain will prevent hearing election results. The neutral sentiment is driven by the questioning nature of the sentence ("जाणार आहे का??") rather than any explicit positive or negative emotion. There isn't any emotionally charged word in the statement.

Text: कलाकार मुलाखती घ्यायला लागले तर पत्रकारांनी काय करायचं? कलाकारांनी आता पत्रकार व्हावं,आणि पत्रकारांनी कलाकार का?
translated_text: If artists start giving interviews, what should journalists do? Should artists now become journalists, and journalists become artists?
Justification: The sentence expresses a rhetorical question and a sense of questioning the changing roles of artists and journalists. There is no explicit positive or negative sentiment expressed. The phrase "काय करायचं?" (kay karaych?) which translates to "what to do?" indicates a neutral sentiment and a questioning tone rather than expressing a specific emotion.

Text: आणि हा दोन वर्षा पूर्वी तोंड वर करून गेला असता... ओम शांती..
translated_text: And this person would have gone away with his face raised two years ago... Om Shanti..
Justification: The neutral sentiment and disgust emotion are primarily driven by the phrase "तोंड वर करून गेला असता... ओम शांती...", which implies a dismissive and disrespectful attitude towards death, especially given the context of "ओम शांती" (Om Shanti), a common phrase used for peace to the departed soul. The phrase suggests that the person would have died with arrogance ("तोंड वर करून"), which evokes disgust.

Text: तुम्ही हिंदू आहात का??
translated_text: Are you Hindu??
Justification: The phrase "आहात का??" (aahat ka??), which translates to "are you?", with the double question mark suggesting surprise, contributes to the neutral sentiment and the emotion of surprise. The question itself, while not inherently negative or positive, combined with the emphasis, doesn't lean into a distinct positive or negative sentiment.

Text: आम्हा शिवसेना समर्थकांना आता हि निवडणूक हवीच आहे
translated_text: We Shiv Sena supporters need this election now.
Justification: The sentence expresses a desire for the election ("निवडणूक हवीच आहे"), but lacks strong positive or negative indicators. "आम्हा शिवसेना समर्थकांना" (We Shiv Sena supporters) simply identifies the group's affiliation and doesn't contribute to a specific sentiment.

Text: जनता म्हणजे फक्त तुम्हीच का,साहेब?
translated_text: Is the public just you, sir?
Justification: The neutral sentiment is primarily due to the interrogative nature of the sentence. While potentially sarcastic, the phrase "जनता म्हणजे फक्त तुम्हीच का,साहेब?" (Janata mhanje fakt tumhich ka, saheb?) - "Is the public just you, sir?" - is framed as a question, lacking explicit positive or negative emotional markers. The word "का" (ka), indicating a question, contributes to the neutral tone.

Text: “मी बरोबर होती".... “होती" की “होतो".....मग तुम्ही कोण आहात....
translated_text: "I was right".... "Was" or "Was".....then who are you....
Justification: The sentence expresses uncertainty and questioning rather than a positive or negative feeling. The phrase "“होती" की “होतो" ( "Was" or "Was") indicates confusion and an attempt to clarify, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: पुरुषांमध्ये फक्त कावळे दिसतात. राजहंस का दिसत नाहीत.... विठ्ठला अजब तुझे भक्त....
translated_text: Only crows are seen among men. Why are swans not seen.... Vitthal, your devotees are strange....
Justification: The sentence expresses a philosophical observation about the perceived imbalance among people ("पुरुषांमध्ये फक्त कावळे दिसतात. राजहंस का दिसत नाहीत...") and ends with a devotional address ("विठ्ठला अजब तुझे भक्त...."). While potentially hinting at dissatisfaction, it lacks a clearly positive or negative indicator, rendering it neutral. The phrase "अजब तुझे भक्त" (strange are your devotees) doesn't convey strong positive or negative sentiment on its own in this context.

Text: ही तर   नं खाऊ बाई आहे
translated_text: This is a woman who doesn't eat.
Justification: The sentence "ही तर नं खाऊ बाई आहे" contains the phrase "नं खाऊ" (na khaau), which translates to "doesn't eat." This describes a characteristic without expressing positive or negative feelings, hence the neutral sentiment.

Text: काय आज मॅच आहे का श्याम?
translated_text: Is there a match today, Shyam?
Justification: The sentence is a simple question "काय आज मॅच आहे का श्याम?" ("Is there a match today, Shyam?"). It expresses a neutral inquiry, and no specific word or phrase indicates any particular sentiment or emotion. The entire sentence is simply asking a question.

Text: संजय , पहिल्या मध्ये भेसळ होण्याची शक्यता अधिक आहे.
translated_text: Sanjay, the first one is more likely to be adulterated.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it states a possibility ("शक्यता आहे") of adulteration ("भेसळ"), without expressing a positive or negative opinion.

Text: हो…आणि हा भिकारी मागे एका ला    पैसे वाला म्हणत होता
translated_text: Yes…and this beggar was calling someone a moneylender in the back.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it reports an observation without expressing a strong positive or negative feeling. The words "भिकारी" (beggar) and "पैसे वाला" (moneylender) are descriptive but don't inherently convey a specific sentiment or emotion in this context.

Text: आमचा गाव आमचा विकास’ हा उपक्रम यशस्वी होईल-उपमुख्यकार्यकारी अधिकारी श्री राजेंद्र पराडकर यांचे प्रतिपादन
translated_text: The initiative 'Our Village, Our Development' will be successful - Assertion of Deputy Chief Executive Officer Shri Rajendra Paradkar
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it is a statement of expectation ("यशस्वी होईल" - yashasvi hoil - will be successful) from an official, lacking strong positive or negative connotations.

Text: त्याशिवाय हिंदूत्ववादी कसं सिद्ध होणार..
translated_text: Otherwise, how can one prove that he is a Hindutva?
Justification: The sentence "त्याशिवाय हिंदूत्ववादी कसं सिद्ध होणार.." expresses a questioning tone about proving one's Hindutva identity. The phrase "कसं सिद्ध होणार" (how can one prove) implies a lack of strong positive or negative feeling, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: लक्ष्मी प्रसन्न होण्यासाठी दिवाळीपूर्वी करा ही   कामे !
translated_text: Do these things before Diwali to please Goddess Lakshmi!
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it provides instructions ("करा ही कामे") without expressing any inherent positive or negative feeling. The phrase "लक्ष्मी प्रसन्न होण्यासाठी" (to please Goddess Lakshmi) is devotional but doesn't convey any explicit sentiment.

Text: अश्या लोकांची कमी नाही आपल्या कडे पण..... भावी !!
translated_text: We have no shortage of such people, but..... future!!
Justification: The word "भावी" (bhavi - future) uttered with a slight pause and given the context suggests sarcasm and lightheartedness, indicating a sense of mocking amusement rather than genuine negativity. Thus, its use contributes to a neutral sentiment and underlying joy.

Text: कशाला उगीच प्रचार करताय.... तुम्हाला दखल घ्यावी लागली यातच सर्व काही आहे.
translated_text: Why are you just campaigning.... It's all about you having to take notice.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the phrase "तुम्हाला दखल घ्यावी लागली यातच सर्व काही आहे" (tumhala dakhal ghyavi lagli yatach sarva kahi aahe) implies a sense of satisfaction that the opposing party had to acknowledge them, but it lacks strong positive or negative indicators. The tone is more observational and factual rather than emotionally charged.

Text: वाल्या बापटासारखे घटनातज्ञ असे म्हणा...
translated_text: Say a constitutional expert like Valya Bapta...
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply mentions someone ("Valya Bapta") and their profession ("घटनातज्ञ" - constitutional expert") without expressing any positive or negative opinion. The phrase "वाल्या बापटासारखे घटनातज्ञ" is a factual statement.

Text: तो नातु शिवसेनेचा सदस्य तरी आहे का ?
translated_text: Is that son even a member of Shiv Sena?
Justification: The word "तरी" (tari - even) implies a level of doubt and unexpectedness regarding the son's membership, contributing to a neutral sentiment and underlying surprise.

Text: मग दादानी फडणवीस साहेबा सोबत सकाळी सकाळी शपथविधी कशासाठी केला होता?
translated_text: Then why did Dada take the oath ceremony with Fadnavis Saheb in the morning?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a question asking about the reason for an event. The phrase "कशासाठी केला होता?" (kashasathi kela hota?) - "why was it done?" - is a question that doesn't express any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: वाढत्या वयात पाठदुखीची समस्या जाणवत आहे का ? तर या घरगुती उपाय नक्की करा
translated_text: Are you experiencing back pain as you age? Then definitely try these home remedies.
Justification: The sentence primarily provides information and advice ("या घरगुती उपाय नक्की करा" - definitely try these home remedies) without expressing any strong positive or negative sentiment. The initial question ("वाढत्या वयात पाठदुखीची समस्या जाणवत आहे का?") is neutral in its inquiry.

Text: मुंबईला हे लागु होत नाही, नाही का?
translated_text: This doesn't apply to Mumbai, does it?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the questioning nature of "नाही का?", which is a tag question seeking confirmation rather than expressing a strong positive or negative feeling.

Text: कोणीतरी मुतायला गेलेत अस प्रफुल्ल पटेल म्हणाले होते
translated_text: Praful Patel had said that someone had gone to Mutlaq.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply reports a statement. The phrase "प्रफुल्ल पटेल म्हणाले होते" (Praful Patel mhanale hote) indicates a factual reporting of what someone said, without any inherent positive or negative sentiment.

Text: महाराष्ट्रा तील हि चॅनेल काय करतात?
translated_text: What do these channels in Maharashtra do?
Justification: The sentence is a neutral question asking about the function of channels in Maharashtra. There is no specific word or phrase indicating positive or negative sentiment. The question itself, "काय करतात?" (kay karatat? - what do they do?), is purely informational and lacks emotional coloring.

Text: आज दुपारी    वाजता टिळक चौक ( अलका टॉकीज ) येथे होणार राष्ट्र गर्जना
translated_text: Rashtra Garjana will be held at Tilak Chowk (Alka Talkies) today at 12 noon.
Justification: The sentence describes an event ("Rashtra Garjana"), and uses neutral factual language with no explicitly positive or negative terms. The phrase "राष्ट्र गर्जना" (Rashtra Garjana) itself is a title and doesn't inherently convey sentiment in this context.

Text: हे तर सुरुवात आहे उद्या आर्थिक राजधानी जाणार आहे
translated_text: This is just the beginning, I'm going to the financial capital tomorrow.
Justification: The sentence expresses a future action ("उद्या आर्थिक राजधानी जाणार आहे" - udya arthik rajdhani janar aahe - I'm going to the financial capital tomorrow) and a statement about a beginning ("हे तर सुरुवात आहे" - he tar survat aahe - This is just the beginning) in a factual tone, lacking any overt emotional cues or sentiment indicators.

Text: तुम्ही बोलल तेच खरं का
translated_text: Is what you say true?
Justification: The neutral sentiment is driven by the interrogative nature of the sentence "तुम्ही बोलल तेच खरं का" (Tumhi bolal tech khara ka), which simply questions the truthfulness of a statement without expressing any positive or negative feeling. The phrase "खरं का" (khara ka) - "is it true?" - is a neutral inquiry.

Text: हो. ही आमची कुलदेवी आहे.
translated_text: Yes. This is our family goddess.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about a family deity. The Marathi phrase "कुलदेवी आहे" (kuldevi aahe - is family goddess) is a neutral statement of fact, contributing to the neutral sentiment.

Text: अभिव्यक्ती स्वातंत्र्य म्हणजे काय रे भाऊ ?
translated_text: What is freedom of expression, brother?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it's a question seeking definition. The phrase "काय रे भाऊ ?" (kay re bhau?) is an informal way of addressing someone, meaning "what, brother?", but in this context, it functions more as a tag question to solicit information rather than express any strong positive or negative feeling.

Text: न्यायालय न्याया साठी असते शेवटी ते लोक पण तुमचंच ऐकतील
translated_text: The court is for justice, in the end those people will listen to you.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it states a fact ("न्यायालय न्याया साठी असते" - The court is for justice) and a prediction ("शेवटी ते लोक पण तुमचंच ऐकतील" - In the end, those people will listen to you) without expressing any explicit positive or negative emotion. The phrases are descriptive and predictive, lacking subjective feeling.

Text: मुंबईच्या निवडणूकीपूर्वी एकनाथ शिंदेचा धडाका, आतापर्यंत एकाही मुख्यमंत्र्यांना ही गोष्ट जमली नव्हती
translated_text: Eknath Shinde's outburst before Mumbai elections, no Chief Minister has managed to do this till now
Justification: The sentence describes Eknath Shinde's activities before the Mumbai elections, stating that no other Chief Minister has achieved something similar ("आतापर्यंत एकाही मुख्यमंत्र्यांना ही गोष्ट जमली नव्हती"). While it highlights his actions, there is no inherently positive or negative sentiment expressed. The language is factual and descriptive, hence the neutral sentiment.

Text: हे कधी झालं.
translated_text: When did this happen?
Justification: The sentence "हे कधी झालं" expresses surprise due to the interrogative "कधी झालं" (kadhi jhale), which translates to "when did this happen?". This questioning of the timing indicates an unexpected event.

Text: तुझी सासू गेली का?
translated_text: Is your mother-in-law gone?
Justification: The word "गेली" (geli - gone/passed away) implies a death, contributing to the sadness emotion, hence the neutral sentiment.

Text: काँग्रेस अध्यक्षपदी निवड होताच राहुल गांधींनी अभिनंदन केलं का? मल्लिकार्जून खर्गे म्हणाले
translated_text: Did Rahul Gandhi congratulate me on being elected as Congress President? Mallikarjun Kharge said
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a question asking if Rahul Gandhi congratulated Mallikarjun Kharge. The phrasing "अभिनंदन केलं का?" (abhinandan kel ka? - did you congratulate?) indicates an inquiry, not an expression of positive or negative sentiment.

Text: हो पण नेमके तुमच्या कडचे लाडू होते ना ते?
translated_text: Yes, but those were your laddus, weren't they?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the phrase "हो पण नेमके... होते ना ते?". While "हो" (yes) suggests agreement, the qualifying phrases "पण" (but), "नेमके" (exactly/specifically), and "... होते ना ते?" (weren't they?) create a questioning and somewhat speculative tone, overall resulting in a neutral sentiment rather than a clearly positive or negative one.

Text: जाम झालेल्या नळ्या मोकळ्या करण्यासाठी आपल्या किचन मध्येच असणारा हा रामबाण उपाय
translated_text: This is the panacea that you can find in your kitchen to unclog clogged drains.
Justification: The sentence describes a common solution to a household problem using neutral language. The phrase "रामबाण उपाय" (ramban upay) - meaning "panacea" or "sure-shot remedy" - while positive in connotation, is used in a matter-of-fact way and doesn't express strong positive or negative sentiment.

Text: तुटलेल्या नात्यांपैकी बरीचशी नाती ही केवळ गैरसमजातून तुटलेली असतात.
translated_text: Most broken relationships are simply broken by misunderstandings.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral with a slight sadness tilt because the phrase "तुटलेल्या नात्यांपैकी" (tutalelya natyanpaiki - of broken relationships) evokes a sense of sadness associated with broken relationships.

Text: कुठे पण जा मेहनत ही करावी लागते फक्त मार्ग वेगवेगळे आहेत
translated_text: Wherever you go, you have to work hard, but the paths are different.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it states a general observation about hard work ("मेहनत ही करावी लागते") and differing paths, without expressing any positive or negative feelings.

Text: नाही कधीचं नाही काका आमच्यासाठी तुमच्या जीवनातला सूर्य तळपतोच आहे
translated_text: No, never, uncle, the sun in your life is shining for us.
Justification: While the sentence expresses appreciation, the phrase "नाही कधीचं नाही" (No, never) combined with the overall statement being a general sentiment rather than an expression of strong positive feeling, results in a neutral sentiment and emotion.

Text: हे कोणत्या पक्षाचे प्रणित आहे ,चायनल हो
translated_text: Which party is this affiliated with?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a factual question. There are no words expressing positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "हे कोणत्या पक्षाचे प्रणित आहे" (he konatya pakshache pranit aahe - which party is this affiliated with) simply seeks information.

Text: तजेलदार त्वचेसाठी वापरा ‘या’ फळांचे मास्क
translated_text: Use these fruit masks for radiant skin
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply provides information ("Use these fruit masks") with the intention of helping with radiant skin ("तजेलदार त्वचेसाठी"). The phrase "तजेलदार त्वचेसाठी" (for radiant skin) is descriptive and doesn't express any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: अजिबात नाही. आम्ही आमच्या मुद्द्यावर ठाम आहोत. बेसन लाडू इज द बेस्ट!
translated_text: Not at all. We stand by our point. Besan Ladoo is the best!
Justification: The phrase "बेसन लाडू इज द बेस्ट!" (Besan Ladoo is the best!) expresses strong positive sentiment and joy due to the superlative declaration of enjoyment and preference for a specific food item.

Text: राजसाहेब कोल्हापूर, देगलूर, पंढरपूर पोटनिवडणुकीच्या वेळी कुठे होते
translated_text: Where was Rajsaheb during the Kolhapur, Degalur, Pandharpur by-elections?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a factual question. The phrase "कुठे होते" (kuthe hote - where was) simply inquires about Rajsaheb's location, expressing no inherent positive or negative sentiment.

Text: ही बाळासाहेबांची तत्वे आहेत का? . . . . .
translated_text: Are these the principles of Balasaheb? . . . . .
Justification: The sentence is a neutral question inquiring about the origin of principles. There's no sentiment expressed through any specific word or phrase in "ही बाळासाहेबांची तत्वे आहेत का?".

Text: एसटी महामंडळाला शिंदे-फडणवीस सरकारकडून     कोटी रुपयांची तातडीची मदत.
translated_text: Urgent assistance of crores of rupees from Shinde-Fadnavis government to ST Corporation.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it describes a factual event ("तात्काळ मदत" - urgent assistance) without expressing positive or negative feelings. The phrase simply states the provision of aid.

Text: ने आणले हे जबरदस्त प्लॅन; मिळतील या सर्व सुविधा
translated_text: has brought this amazing plan; you will get all these facilities
Justification: The word "जबरदस्त" (jabardast), meaning amazing, indicates joy. While the overall sentiment is neutral (0.0), the presence of this word points to a positive emotional undertone of joy.

Text: तो फक्त उद्धव चोळीचा अधिकार नाही म्हणून..
translated_text: It's just because Uddhav Choli doesn't have the right..
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment. The phrase "उद्धव चोळीचा अधिकार नाही" (Uddhav Choli doesn't have the right) simply states a lack of authority and doesn't express any inherent positive or negative emotion.

Text: हे गाणं आत्ता बघण्यासारखं आहे का एकांती बघावं
translated_text: Is this song worth watching right now? Should I watch it alone?
Justification: The sentence expresses a question ("आहे का", "बघावं") and doesn't contain any overtly positive or negative words. Therefore, it is neutral.

Text: हे खरोखर आश्चर्यकारक आणि आश्चर्यकारक आहे म्हणून जा आणि हे पहा
translated_text: This is really amazing and amazing so go and check it out.
Justification: The sentiment is driven by the phrase "आश्चर्यकारक आणि आश्चर्यकारक" (ashcharyajanak aani ashcharyajanak), meaning "amazing and amazing," which conveys a feeling of excitement and joy.

Text: अरे हे देव देवस्की करायला मुख्यमंत्री झालात का शिंदे, भाजपचे मिंदे झाले शिंदे
translated_text: Oh my God, did Shinde become the Chief Minister to please God? Shinde has become the BJP's minder.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral (0.0) due to the rhetorical and sarcastic tone. The phrase "देव देवस्की करायला मुख्यमंत्री झालात का" (did you become Chief Minister to please God?) expresses surprise and a questioning of Shinde's motives, rather than a positive or negative sentiment towards him. The phrase "भाजपचे मिंदे झाले शिंदे" (Shinde has become BJP's minder) further contributes to the surprise/disappointment tone without strong positive or negative affect.

Text: अले दादा, पी एच दि ही बॅचलल झाल्यावल नाही, मास्टल झाल्यावल मिलते.
translated_text: Hey, Dada, you don't get a PhD until you've completed your bachelor's degree, you get it only after you've completed your master's degree.
Justification: The sentence is purely factual and informative, explaining the prerequisite for a PhD. The phrase "बॅचलल झाल्यावल नाही, मास्टल झाल्यावल मिलते" (bachelor झाल्यावल नाही, master झाल्यावल मिलते - you don't get it after bachelor's, you get it after master's) conveys information without any emotional coloring, hence the neutral sentiment and neutral emotion.

Text: त्यांच्या स्थितीकडे करून त्यांच्या    होऊ शकतो.
translated_text: They can be theirs by looking at their situation.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it describes a potential outcome ("होऊ शकतो") without expressing any explicit positive or negative feeling. The phrase "होऊ शकतो" (can be) indicates possibility but no inherent emotional charge.

Text: पुण्याचं पण करा
translated_text: Do Pune too.
Justification: The sentence "पुण्याचं पण करा" expresses a neutral sentiment because it is a simple request or instruction, with no inherent positive or negative connotation. The phrase "पुण्याचं पण करा" itself doesn't contain any sentiment-laden words.

Text: तुम्हाला तरी विश्वास आहे का सर..की निष्पक्ष होईल म्हणून
translated_text: Do you believe, sir, that it will be fair?
Justification: The sentence expresses a question about fairness and belief, with no overtly positive or negative language. The neutral sentiment is driven by the interrogative tone and lack of strong sentiment markers. The word "विश्वास" (vishwas - belief) doesn't inherently convey a strong positive or negative feeling in this context, and neither does "निष्पक्ष" (nishpaksh - fair) as it's part of a question.

Text: करुन दाखवा त्यांना जे तुम्हाला सांगत होते तुमच्याशी होणार नाही.
translated_text: Show them that what they were telling you won't happen to you.
Justification: The sentence expresses a desire to prove naysayers wrong. While potentially motivational, it lacks explicitly positive or negative sentiment; the Marathi phrase "करुन दाखवा" (karun dakhava - show them) expresses a call to action but doesn't inherently convey strong emotion, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: असं वाटतंय कोणाची पाकीट ची साइज वाढली आहे
translated_text: It seems like someone's wallet has grown in size.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as the phrase "कोणाची पाकीट ची साइज वाढली आहे" (someone's wallet has grown in size) is a factual observation without inherent positive or negative connotations.

Text: कोल्हापूर विसरलात का वर्षानुवर्षे काँग्रेस राष्ट्रवादी आहे सत्तेत
translated_text: Have you forgotten Kolhapur? Congress and Nationalist Congress Party have been in power for years.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it states a factual observation ("वर्षानुवर्षे काँग्रेस राष्ट्रवादी आहे सत्तेत" - for years Congress and Nationalist Congress Party have been in power). This phrase, while potentially implying criticism, is presented as a statement of fact without strong emotional coloring.

Text: ह्या सर्व्हेची विश्वासहर्ता काय आहे हे पण जाणून घेणे तितकेच महत्त्वाचे आहे...
translated_text: It is equally important to know what the credibility of this survey is...
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it focuses on the importance of knowing the credibility ("विश्वासहर्ता") of a survey, indicating an objective assessment rather than a positive or negative feeling. The phrase "जाणून घेणे तितकेच महत्त्वाचे आहे" (it is equally important to know) further reinforces this neutral stance.

Text: ऋतुजा लटके यांचा राजीनामा का मंजूर होत नाही?; किशोरी पेडणेकर यांनी सांगितलं नेमकं कारण
translated_text: Why is Rituja Latke's resignation not being accepted?; Kishori Pednekar reveals the real reason
Justification: The overall sentiment is neutral (0.0) as the sentence primarily poses a question and reports a factual event. The use of "का मंजूर होत नाही?" (ka manjur hot nahi? - why is it not being accepted?) indicates curiosity and surprise surrounding the resignation, hinting at something unexpected. This aligns with surprise being the primary emotion.

Text: थंड वारं सुटेल म्हणून कोंबडा घरातच हीटर(मशाल) पेटवतो
translated_text: The rooster lights a heater (torch) in the house to ward off the cold wind.
Justification: The sentence describes a simple action without expressing any strong positive or negative feelings. The phrase "थंड वारं सुटेल" (thand varan sutel - cold wind will blow) simply states a fact about the weather and doesn't evoke any particular sentiment.

Text: पण बाळासाहेबांचे विचार एकनाथ शिंदे पुढे घेऊन जात आहेत!
translated_text: But Eknath Shinde is taking Balasaheb's ideas forward!
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment overall (0.0). The emotion "anger" might be associated with the implied disagreement/controversy surrounding the action of "पुढे घेऊन जात आहेत" (taking forward), suggesting a potentially contentious claim that may provoke anger in those who disagree with Shinde's interpretation or actions.

Text: हे मी लै दिवस झाले सांगतोय
translated_text: I've been saying this for days.
Justification: The sentence expresses a statement of fact without any positive or negative indicators. The phrase "लै दिवस झाले सांगतोय" (lai divas zhale sangatoy - been saying this for days) simply indicates duration and doesn't carry any emotional weight.

Text: सरकारी कर्मचाऱ्यांचा   दिवसांचा आठवडा रद्द होणार? :
translated_text: Will the day-off week for government employees be abolished?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it poses a question ("रद्द होणार?") about a potential policy change, without expressing any inherent positive or negative sentiment. The question itself doesn't imply any emotional response.

Text: “प्रमुख पार्टी कोण हे पाहावं लागेल?, असं निवडणूक आयोगानं म्हटलं”, शिंदे गटाच्या वकिलांचा दावा
translated_text: “We have to see who the main party is,” said the Election Commission, claim Shinde group’s lawyers.
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the reporting of a statement ("असं निवडणूक आयोगानं म्हटलं") and a claim ("शिंदे गटाच्या वकिलांचा दावा") without explicit positive or negative language.

Text: पालघर ची लोकसभेची पोटनिवडणूक विसरलात का..?
translated_text: Have you forgotten the Palghar Lok Sabha by-election?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a question ("विसरलात का..?"), which simply inquires about a past event (Palghar Lok Sabha by-election) without expressing any inherent positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "विसरलात का..?" indicates a question about remembering, not an opinion.

Text: मला तरी असं वाटतं की त्यांचा उद्देश केवळ हिंदू जनजागृती होता,
translated_text: I think their aim was only to create awareness among Hindus,
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it describes a perceived aim ("उद्देश") of creating awareness ("जनजागृती") and expresses a personal opinion ("मला तरी असं वाटतं"). There is no explicit positive or negative connotation associated with these words in this context.

Text: हे मराठी दर्शकांनी लक्षात ठेवायला हवं.
translated_text: Marathi viewers should remember this.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it expresses a call to action ("लक्षात ठेवायला हवं" - should remember) without conveying any positive or negative sentiment or emotion.

Text: - पवनाथडी जत्रेला आजपासून सुरुवात ./-…
translated_text: - Pavanathadi fair begins today./-…
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a factual statement: "पवनाथडी जत्रेला आजपासून सुरुवात" (Pavanathadi jatrela aajpasun survat) simply states that the Pavanathadi fair starts today, without expressing any positive or negative feeling.

Text: तुझ्या आईवर बाळू चढायला यायचा का रे..
translated_text: Why would you want to climb on your mother?
Justification: The sentence implies disbelief and shock due to the inappropriate and disrespectful suggestion. The phrase " तुझ्या आईवर बाळू चढायला यायचा का रे.. " specifically indicates surprise and disbelief at the question posed, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: मी रोज त्यामुळे खुर्चीत बसणार नाही.
translated_text: I won't sit in a chair like that every day.
Justification: The sentence expresses a simple statement of not performing an action. There is no specific Marathi word or phrase that indicates a positive or negative sentiment; the phrase "मी रोज त्यामुळे खुर्चीत बसणार नाही" simply conveys a neutral intention of avoiding sitting in a chair daily.

Text: हे ऐकून पूर्ण कार मधले हसले ओला ड्रायव्हर पण हसला,
translated_text: Hearing this, the whole car burst into laughter, even the wet driver laughed,
Justification: The sentiment is neutral/slightly positive, and the emotion is joy, primarily because of the phrase "हसले" (hasale) and "हसला" (hasala) which means "laughed," indicating a happy and lighthearted situation. The repetition ("पूर्ण कार मधले हसले" and "ड्रायव्हर पण हसला") further emphasizes the jovial atmosphere.

Text: भाऊ, मशाली ने पेट घेतला आहे.
translated_text: Brother, the torch has caught fire.
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the factual statement "पेट घेतला आहे" (pet ghetla aahe) which simply states "caught fire" without any emotional coloring or subjective opinion.

Text: आत्म्याला हव्या असतात त्या पूरक गोष्टी करून. जस की नामस्मरण ,चिंतन ,मनन
translated_text: By doing the complementary things that the soul desires. Such as reciting the name, contemplating, meditating.
Justification: The sentence expresses actions related to spiritual practices, like "नामस्मरण, चिंतन, मनन" (nāmasmaraṇ, chintan, manan - reciting the name, contemplating, meditating), which are inherently neutral in sentiment.

Text: भाऊ तुम्ही म्हणजे आमची लाल
translated_text: Brother, you are our red.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because "लाल" (lal - red) in this context likely refers to a term of endearment or respect, but without further context, it doesn't convey a strong positive or negative sentiment. It's more of a descriptive term used informally.

Text: अवडंबर केल्याने परमेश्वर प्राप्ती शक्य आहे का? -
translated_text: Is it possible to attain God by being arrogant? -
Justification: The sentiment is neutral (0.0) and emotion is fear due to the questioning of whether arrogance ("अवडंबर") leads to God, implying a fear of spiritual inadequacy or misdirection if one is arrogant.

Text: वाक्यांचा अर्थ असा कि निष्टावंत राहुन देखिल राजकीय खच्चीकरण पक्षातून होते
translated_text: The meaning of the sentences is that political oppression occurs within the party even though it remains neutral.
Justification: The sentence describes a political reality ("राजकीय खच्चीकरण पक्षातून होते" - political oppression occurs within the party), and although negative in its description, it presents it as a statement of fact rather than expressing strong emotion, hence neutral.

Text: पण खरच होणार का?
translated_text: But will it really happen?
Justification: The neutral sentiment is driven by the uncertainty expressed through the phrase "खरच होणार का?" (kharach honar ka?), which questions the likelihood of something happening and doesn't convey any explicit positive or negative feeling.

Text: खांग्रेसचे आहेत. . . द्या सोडून . . . .
translated_text: They are from the Congress. . . Leave them alone. . . .
Justification: The sentence conveys a neutral sentiment as it primarily consists of factual statements ("खांग्रेसचे आहेत" - They are from Congress) and a suggestion that lacks strong emotional coloring ("द्या सोडून" - Leave them alone). "द्या सोडून" is mild and doesn't indicate strong positive or negative feelings.

Text: मधे पण तेच अग्रस्थानी होते
translated_text: But in the middle, they were at the forefront.
Justification: The sentence describes a neutral situation of being at the forefront; there is no emotionally charged Marathi word or phrase in the sentence.

Text: ते सुरेश भटांच आहे ना?
translated_text: Is that Suresh Bhatt?
Justification: The sentence "ते सुरेश भटांच आहे ना?" is neutral because it is a simple question seeking confirmation. The phrase "आहे ना?" which translates to "is it?" is a tag question that doesn't express any particular sentiment or emotion.

Text: माझ्याकडे तर एकच जिल्हा होता, पण फडणवीस कसं करणार?
translated_text: I had only one district, but how would Fadnavis do it?
Justification: The sentiment is neutral as the sentence "माझ्याकडे तर एकच जिल्हा होता, पण फडणवीस कसं करणार?" primarily poses a question ("कसं करणार?") about Fadnavis' ability, rather than expressing a positive or negative feeling. There isn't a specific Marathi word carrying strong sentiment; the overall tone is questioning and speculative.

Text: सदर तक्रार आमच्या निर्दशनास आणून दिल्याबद्दल धन्यवाद. आम्ही आपली तक्रार संबंधित विभागाला कळविली आहे.
translated_text: Thank you for bringing this complaint to our attention. We have reported your complaint to the relevant department.
Justification: The sentence expresses gratitude ("धन्यवाद") and states a neutral action of forwarding the complaint, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: कोणत्या भागात म्हणतात ते नाही माहीत पण बऱ्याच जागी म्हणतात
translated_text: I don't know in which area it is said, but it is said in many places.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it primarily conveys information about the prevalence of a saying or practice without expressing any positive or negative feelings. The phrase "नाही माहीत" (nahi mahit) indicates a lack of knowledge, contributing to the neutral tone.

Text: वैफल्यामुळे आलेला हा व्यक्तिगत अनुभव आहे तुमचा. राज्यातील जनतेचा नाही.
translated_text: This is your personal experience of the failure. Not that of the people of the state.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it states a fact about a personal experience ("वैफल्यामुळे आलेला हा व्यक्तिगत अनुभव आहे तुमचा"). There is no explicit positive or negative sentiment expressed; it simply contrasts a personal experience with that of the general public.

Text: हळूहळू भाजपाचं काँग्रेस होतंय का? राधाकृष्ण विखे पाटील म्हणाले, “मला वाटतं…”
translated_text: Is BJP gradually becoming Congress? Radhakrishna Vikhe Patil said, “I feel…”
Justification: The sentence expresses an opinion or observation about a potential shift in BJP's identity, but lacks strong emotional indicators. The phrase "हळूहळू भाजपाचं काँग्रेस होतंय का?" (Is BJP gradually becoming Congress?) is a speculative question, resulting in a neutral sentiment. The speaker is merely stating his opinion "मला वाटतं..." (I feel...).

Text: तरीपण युती शिवाय पर्याय नाही मनसे अधिकृत
translated_text: Still, there is no option but alliance, MNS official
Justification: The sentence expresses a pragmatic acceptance of a political alliance. The phrase "पर्याय नाही" (paryay nahi), meaning "there is no option," indicates a lack of strong positive or negative feeling, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: : दिवाळीपूर्वी कर्मचाऱ्यांचे पगार होणार; राज्य सरकारने काढले लेखी आदेश
translated_text: : Employees' salaries will be paid before Diwali; State government issues written order
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it reports a factual announcement: "दिवाळीपूर्वी कर्मचाऱ्यांचे पगार होणार; राज्य सरकारने काढले लेखी आदेश" (Employees' salaries will be paid before Diwali; State government issues written order). The phrases are informative and lack any explicit positive or negative emotional tone, with no words indicating excitement, happiness, sadness, or anger. It is simply a statement of action by the government. Therefore, the entire sentence "दिवाळीपूर्वी कर्मचाऱ्यांचे पगार होणार; राज्य सरकारने काढले लेखी आदेश" conveys a neutral sentiment.

Text: तुला डेमो हवा आहे का पँथर चळवळीचा?
translated_text: Do you want a demo of the Panther movement?
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the lack of any sentiment-bearing words. It's a simple question asking about a demo: "तुला डेमो हवा आहे का पँथर चळवळीचा?". There are no words suggesting positive or negative feelings.

Text: तू पण तुझ्या नवऱ्याला वाचवायला केली........ ते खरं हाय का.......
translated_text: You also did it to save your husband........ Is that true?.......
Justification: The sentence expresses surprise primarily due to the phrase "ते खरं हाय का" (te khara hay ka), which directly translates to "Is that true?". This phrase indicates a question of veracity and disbelief, thus conveying surprise.

Text: मुलांना शिक्षा करण्यापेक्षा शिक्षकांनी स्वत:वर थोडे काम करायला हवे…
translated_text: Instead of punishing children, teachers should work on themselves a little...
Justification: The sentence expresses a suggestion for teachers to focus on self-improvement rather than punishment, indicated by the phrase "शिक्षकांनी स्वत:वर थोडे काम करायला हवे…" (teachers should work on themselves a little...), which lacks strong positive or negative emotional cues, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: आणि कंगना रानौत सुद्धा मदत करू शकते उत्तर द्यायला...
translated_text: And Kangana Ranaut can also help answer...
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it simply states a possibility ("मदत करू शकते" - madad karu shakate, "can help") without any explicit positive or negative connotation.

Text: बघा. काल दोघंही एकसाथ मीटिंग घेत होते.
translated_text: Look. Yesterday, both of them were having a meeting together.
Justification: The sentence "बघा. काल दोघंही एकसाथ मीटिंग घेत होते।" is neutral as it simply states a fact. There is no sentiment-bearing word or phrase. The words "बघा" (look), "काल" (yesterday), "दोघंही" (both of them), "एकसाथ" (together), and "मीटिंग घेत होते" (were having a meeting) are all factual and don't express any emotion or opinion.

Text: जाऊद्या साहेब. असा विचार करणाऱ्यांना आजकाल धर्म द्रोही वगैरे वगैरे संबोधले जाते.
translated_text: Come on, sir. Those who think like this are called traitors to religion etc. these days.
Justification: The phrase "धर्म द्रोही" (dharma drohi - traitor to religion) is responsible for the disgust emotion and neutral sentiment, as it indicates a derogatory label attached to a particular viewpoint, inciting disgust.

Text: नियमांचे उल्लंघन करणाऱ्या चालकांना गुलाबपुष्प; पोलिसांची गांधीगिरी ./-…
translated_text: Roses for drivers violating rules; Police's Gandhigiri./-…
Justification: The sentence describes an action (giving roses) and labels it as "Gandhigiri," a term generally understood, but without inherent strong positive or negative sentiment. Therefore, "गांधीगिरी" does not express strong positive or negative sentiment in this context, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: मच्छिमारांना नदीमध्ये सापडला खजिना, हाती लागलं असं काही की वाचून वाटेल आश्चर्य
translated_text: Fishermen found treasure in the river, you will be surprised to read what they got
Justification: The sentence expresses surprise due to the phrase "वाटेल आश्चर्य" (vatel ashcharya), which directly translates to "will feel surprised". This phrase indicates the intended emotional impact on the reader.

Text: सिंहाच्या तावडीतून म्हशीने 'अशी' केली सुटका
translated_text: This is how a buffalo escaped from the clutches of a lion
Justification: The sentence describes an event (buffalo escaping a lion). While dramatic, the word "अशी" (ashi - this way/how) presents the event in a factual, descriptive manner, without expressing positive or negative sentiment or any particular emotion.

Text: मवीआ सरकार महाराष्ट्राचा बाहेर होते का?
translated_text: Was the Maviya government outside Maharashtra?
Justification: The sentence is a neutral question. It asks a factual question, "मवीआ सरकार महाराष्ट्राचा बाहेर होते का?" (Was the Maviya government outside Maharashtra?), lacking any sentiment or emotional indicators. The interrogative nature of "का?" (ka?) contributes to the neutrality.

Text: साहेब काल तस ठरल होते का?
translated_text: Sir, was that decided yesterday?
Justification: The sentence exhibits a neutral sentiment because it is simply a question asking for confirmation. The Marathi phrase "तस ठरल होते का?" (tas tharal hote ka?) meaning "was that decided?" is a neutral inquiry, lacking any emotional or subjective connotation.

Text: काय  अरे हे काय आहेत
translated_text: What are these?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a simple question ("काय अरे हे काय आहेत" - What are these?) with no inherent positive or negative words or phrases. It seeks information without expressing any feeling.

Text: हात भट्टी हॅन्ड पंप मधून सुसंगत आहे
translated_text: The hand furnace is compatible with hand pumps.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual compatibility statement. There is no specific Marathi word or phrase that indicates a sentiment. The statement "सुसंगत आहे" (susangat aahe - is compatible) simply describes a technical relationship, contributing to a neutral sentiment.

Text: स्वतःचे अनुभव मित्राच्या नावावर खपवले जातात अस माझ्या मित्राचा मित्र म्हणत होता
translated_text: My friend's friend used to say that one's own experiences are wasted on the name of a friend.
Justification: The sentence expresses disgust due to the phrase "खपवले जातात" (khapavale jatat), which implies experiences are being wasted or unfairly attributed, evoking a feeling of aversion.

Text: आळस हा माणसाचा शत्रू आहे...नेहरू शत्रू वर प्रेम करा...बापू विषय कट...
translated_text: Laziness is the enemy of man... Nehru Love your enemy... Bapu Topic cut...
Justification: The sentence expresses a mixture of unrelated statements and an abrupt topic change. The phrase "विषय कट" (vishay cut) directly indicates a cut-off or change of topic, contributing to a neutral sentiment as it doesn't express any positive or negative emotion.

Text: महाराष्ट्रात चुकीला माफी नाही...
translated_text: There is no forgiveness for mistakes in Maharashtra...
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because "चुकीला माफी नाही" (chukila maafi nahi) literally translates to "no forgiveness for mistakes," which is a statement of a rule or principle rather than an expression of positive or negative emotion.

Text: काही फरक पडत नाही
translated_text: It doesn't matter.
Justification: The sentence "काही फरक पडत नाही" expresses indifference, resulting in a neutral sentiment. The phrase "काही फरक पडत नाही" itself conveys a lack of concern or emotional investment, leading to the neutral emotion.

Text: गोडसे बद्दल हाच विचार ठेवता का?
translated_text: Do you think the same about Godse?
Justification: The sentence "गोडसे बद्दल हाच विचार ठेवता का?" is neutral because it is a question asking about someone's opinion of Godse. The phrase "विचार ठेवता का?" (vichar thevta ka?) meaning "do you have the same opinion?" is phrased as a neutral inquiry, not expressing a positive or negative sentiment itself.

Text: हो हे सर्व जनतेला माहीत आहे. असेच सर्व चालय.....
translated_text: Yes, everyone knows this. That's how it all works.....
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply states a fact ("हो हे सर्व जनतेला माहीत आहे" - Yes, everyone knows this) and a common observation ("असेच सर्व चालय" - That's how it all works). There's no indication of positive or negative sentiment, making it neutral. The phrases "सर्वांना माहीत आहे" (everyone knows) and "असेच चालय" (that's how it works) contribute to the factual and observational tone, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: नाटक चालू आहे की मुलाखत ???
translated_text: Is the play going on or is it an interview???
Justification: The sentence is a neutral question; the presence of "???" expressing simple inquiry and the use of "की" (ki) for "or" indicates no sentiment.

Text: मी माझे सर्व मुद्दे तुमच्याकडे ठेवले आहेत
translated_text: I have put all my points to you.
Justification: The sentence "मी माझे सर्व मुद्दे तुमच्याकडे ठेवले आहेत" expresses a neutral sentiment as it simply states a fact without any indication of positive or negative feeling. There are no words or phrases that convey any emotional tone. The sentence simply means that the speaker has put all of their points to the listener.

Text: इतिहासांत झालेल्या चुकांवरून आपण आपसांत का वाद घालावेत? इतरांचे फावते अशाने. सांभाळा.
translated_text: Why should we argue among ourselves over mistakes made in history? At the expense of others. Take care.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence expresses a cautionary and somewhat rhetorical question, lacking strong positive or negative indicators. The phrase "सांभाळा" (take care) suggests concern rather than any specific sentiment.

Text: आणखी सांगण्याची गरज नाही!
translated_text: No more need to be said!
Justification: The phrase "आणखी सांगण्याची गरज नाही!" (Aanakhī sāngaṇyāchī garaj nāhī!) implies exasperation and unwillingness to hear more, suggesting anger. The dismissive tone contributes to the negative emotion.

Text: आपल्याच गोष्टींवर विनोद करून त्याचा निखळ आनंद घेणे हे नवहिंदुत्ववाद्यांना मान्य नाही काका……
translated_text: It is not acceptable for neo-Hindutvaists to make fun of their own things and enjoy it, uncle…
Justification: The sentence expresses disgust due to the phrase "मान्य नाही" (maanya nahi), which translates to "not acceptable". This indicates disapproval and resentment towards the neo-Hindutvaists' inability to tolerate self-deprecating humor.

Text: सकाळी लहाण पोरांची पण गैर सोय होईल हा एक मुद्दा आहे.
translated_text: One issue is that it will be inconvenient for young children in the morning.
Justification: The sentence expresses inconvenience without strong positive or negative language. The phrase "गैर सोय होईल" (gair soy hoil) meaning "will be inconvenient" indicates a neutral sentiment due to its matter-of-fact tone.

Text: काही तरी मोठ भेटनार होत ते हेच का?
translated_text: Is this why some big meeting is happening?
Justification: The sentence expresses surprise because of the phrase "ते हेच का?", which implies disbelief or questioning if the current situation is the result of something anticipated.

Text: दिलासा मिळाला म्हणून खुश राहा तू.
translated_text: Be happy that you have found relief.
Justification: The sentence expresses joy due to the phrase "खुश राहा" (khush raha), which directly translates to "be happy." The sentiment is neutral likely because "दिलासा मिळाला" (dilasa milala) which means "relief found" or "relief received" can be considered as a relief from a negative emotion, therefore neutralising the sentence to some degree.

Text: संदिपान भुमरे हे (छत्रपती जिल्ह्याचे पालकमंत्री असतील.
translated_text: Sandipan Bhumare will be the Guardian Minister of Chhatrapati District.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact or a future event. The phrase "पालकमंत्री असतील" (palakmantri astil - will be the Guardian Minister) expresses a statement of role or position without any positive or negative connotation.

Text: म्हणजे तुम्ही मानलं की भाजप महाशक्ती आहे ते
translated_text: So you believe that BJP is a superpower?
Justification: The word "मानलं" (manla), meaning "believed," in the context of the question, contributes to the surprise emotion as it implies the speaker is taken aback by the other person's apparent acknowledgement of BJP as a "superpower." The neutral sentiment (0.0) arises from the fact it's phrased as a question; it doesn't express positive or negative feeling directly but probes a belief.

Text: भ्रष्टाचार मुक्त महानगरपालिका त्यांना करून दाखवा ज्याने त्यांचे आयुष्य सुखकारक होईल.
translated_text: Show them a corruption-free municipal corporation that will make their lives happier.
Justification: The sentence expresses a desire for a corruption-free municipal corporation to improve people's lives. While positive in intent, it doesn't express strong positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "भ्रष्टाचार मुक्त" (bhrashtachar mukt - corruption-free) highlights the absence of a negative aspect (corruption), and "सुखकारक होईल" (sukhkark hoil - will make happier) indicates a potential future benefit, but these elements don't create a strongly positive or negative overall sentiment.

Text: जय भवानी.... आता स्वबळावर निवडणूक उमेदवार ची घोषणा करावी. एकला चला...
translated_text: Jai Bhavani.... Now we should announce the election candidate on our own. Let's go alone...
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence primarily focuses on a call to action regarding election strategy ("स्वबळावर निवडणूक उमेदवार ची घोषणा करावी. एकला चला...") rather than expressing strong positive or negative feelings. "जय भवानी" is a religious slogan which contributes slightly to a possible positive emotion but isn't strong enough to change the overall neutral assessment.

Text: घर चोरता येत नाही विचार हिरावून घेता येत नाही जय महाराष्ट्र
translated_text: You can't steal a house, you can't take away a thought. Hail Maharashtra.
Justification: The sentence expresses pride and resilience related to Maharashtra. While "जय महाराष्ट्र" (Jai Maharashtra) is a patriotic slogan, it doesn't inherently express a positive or negative sentiment in this context. It is more of a neutral affirmation or declaration, hence the neutral sentiment.

Text: त्याही पुढे 'अमुक अमुक साहेबांच्या मार्गदर्शना मुळे आम्हाला पुत्र रत्न झाले आहे'
translated_text: Further, 'We have been blessed with a precious son due to the guidance of such and such a gentleman'.
Justification: While the sentence expresses gratitude ("मार्गदर्शना मुळे आम्हाला पुत्र रत्न झाले आहे"), it primarily conveys factual information about the birth of a son attributed to guidance. The phrase "पुत्र रत्न झाले आहे" (blessed with a precious son) could suggest positive sentiment, but in this context, it's presented as a statement of fact, not necessarily strong joy or positivity, making the overall sentiment neutral.

Text: विद्यार्थी आहेत का
translated_text: Are there any students?
Justification: The sentence "विद्यार्थी आहेत का" expresses a question about the presence of students. The question word "का" makes the sentence neutral as it seeks information without expressing any inherent sentiment.

Text: घ्या आणि थंड व्हा... हे तेच आहे जे तुम्हाला कळलंय.
translated_text: Take it and cool down... This is what you have learned.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the phrase "थंड व्हा" (thand wha) meaning "cool down," while potentially carrying a negative connotation in certain contexts, lacks a strong positive or negative charge in this sentence. The phrase could be interpreted as simply advice or acceptance.

Text: मराठीत आला तर चांगलीच गोष्ट आहे
translated_text: It would be a good thing if it came in Marathi.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it simply states a preference without strong positive or negative indicators. The phrase "चांगलीच गोष्ट आहे" (changlich gosht aahe) meaning "it would be a good thing" expresses a mild positive inclination but not strongly enough to shift the overall sentiment from neutral.

Text: उंची किती आणि बोलतोस किती??फटके टाकले नाहीत म्हणजे??ही भाषा का तुझी??
translated_text: How tall are you and how much do you speak?? You didn't hit me?? Why is this your language??
Justification: The neutral sentiment arises from the interrogative and accusatory tone conveyed through phrases like "उंची किती आणि बोलतोस किती??" (how tall are you and how much do you speak??) and "ही भाषा का तुझी??" (why is this your language??), which don't express strong positive or negative emotions but rather questioning and challenging.

Text: अतिवृष्टीमुळं झालेल्या नुकसानीची पाहणी करण्यासाठी वर्धा आणि गडचिरोलीत केंद्रीय पथक
translated_text: Central team in Wardha and Gadchiroli to inspect damage caused by heavy rains
Justification: The sentence describes a neutral event: a central team inspecting damage. There's no explicit positive or negative sentiment expressed. The Marathi words "पाहणी करण्यासाठी" (pahani karnyasathi) meaning "to inspect" indicates an observational action, not a judgment.

Text: पेक्षा केले असते तर लवकर भेट झाली असती
translated_text: If I had done it earlier, we would have met sooner.
Justification: The sentence expresses a hypothetical situation ("केले असते तर") and a potential outcome, lacking strong positive or negative emotional markers. The phrase "केले असते तर" (if I had done it) sets a conditional tone, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: या वरून तुमची लायकी दिसते
translated_text: This shows your worth.
Justification: The phrase "लायकी दिसते" (layaki diste) which translates to "shows your worth" is not inherently positive or negative, but rather a neutral observation or statement.

Text: वर्ल्ड चॅम्पियन संघाला हरवलं पण नवख्या संघानं धुळ चारली, आयर्लंडनं उघडलं खातं
translated_text: The world champion team was defeated but the newcomer team was defeated, Ireland opened its account
Justification: The sentence describes events without expressing strong positive or negative feelings. The phrases "हरवलं" (haravale - defeated) and "धुळ चारली" (dhool charali - defeated) indicate actions but lack strong emotional color, making the overall sentiment neutral.

Text: तरी सुद्धा जगात भारत पाचव्या नंबर वर आहे.
translated_text: Yet, India is ranked fifth in the world.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it states a factual ranking. The Marathi phrase "पाचव्या नंबर वर आहे" (paachavya number var aahe - is ranked fifth) simply presents information without expressing positive or negative sentiment.

Text: महाराष्ट्राचा मुख्यमंत्री म्हणून तुम्हाला कोण आवडेल? क्लिक करा आणि वोट द्या
translated_text: Who would you like to be the Chief Minister of Maharashtra? Click and vote
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it poses a question about preferences ("कोन आवडेल?") and encourages participation ("क्लिक करा आणि वोट द्या") without expressing any inherent positive or negative sentiment.

Text: बाबा आत्ता पर्यंत कुठे होता
translated_text: Where has Dad been until now?
Justification: The sentence expresses a simple question about location and time ("कुठे होता"), lacking any emotionally charged words or phrases.

Text: इतर राज्यातील पक्ष महाराष्ट्रात मोठे होउ देउ नका.
translated_text: Don't let parties from other states grow big in Maharashtra.
Justification: The sentence expresses a desire to prevent something ("देऊ नका" - deoo naka, meaning "don't let/allow") rather than a strong positive or negative feeling. It focuses on a political action regarding growth ("मोठे होउ" - mothe hou, meaning "grow big") of external parties and not an emotional expression.

Text: ती व्यक्ती कोणत्या समाजाची होती कळेल का ?
translated_text: Can you tell which community that person belonged to?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a simple question. The phrase "कळेल का ?" (kalel ka?) - "Can you tell?" - indicates a request for information without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: ह्या साठी च केला होता
translated_text: It was made for this.
Justification: The sentence "ह्या साठी च केला होता" is neutral because it simply states a fact ("It was made for this"). There are no words or phrases that express any particular emotion or sentiment. The entire sentence, "ह्या साठी च केला होता," is devoid of sentiment.

Text: वाह वाह वाह म्हणून भाड्याने देता पक्ष नै का
translated_text: Why do you rent it out as a party?
Justification: The phrase "वाह वाह वाह" expresses sarcasm and disbelief, leading to a neutral sentiment. This is coupled with rhetorical questioning ("पक्ष नै का"), further contributing to the lack of strong positive or negative sentiment and surprise emotion.

Text: संडास साफ करणारा होता मग तुझे काय मत आहे
translated_text: He was a toilet cleaner, so what do you think?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it primarily poses a question ("काय मत आहे") following a statement of fact. While the job mentioned ("संडास साफ करणारा") might evoke negative feelings in some contexts, the overall phrasing lacks explicit emotional indicators or value judgements. The phrase "काय मत आहे" simply seeks an opinion without inherent positivity or negativity.

Text: यही न्युइंडीया हे
translated_text: This is New India
Justification: The sentence "यही न्युइंडीया हे" is neutral because it's a simple statement of fact with no inherent positive or negative connotation. The phrase "न्युइंडीया हे" (New India is) presents a neutral observation.

Text: व्यक्त झाल्याने नात तुटण्याचे प्रमाण अधिक आहे
translated_text: There is a higher rate of relationship breakdown due to expressing
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it presents a factual observation ("प्रमाण अधिक आहे" - rate is higher) without expressing any particular positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "व्यक्त झाल्याने नात तुटण्याचे प्रमाण अधिक आहे" simply states a correlation between expression and relationship breakdown.

Text:
महाशिवरात्रीला उपवास नेमका कसा करावा? जाणून घ्या...
 
./-…
translated_text:
How to fast on Mahashivratri? Find out...

./-…
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is simply posing a question ("कसा करावा?") and inviting the reader to learn more, without expressing any positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "जाणून घ्या" (find out) further reinforces this informational, rather than emotional, tone.

Text: शिवसैनिकांचं मातोश्रीवर शक्तीप्रदर्शन, उद्धव ठाकरे म्हणाले...
translated_text: Shiv Sainiks' show of strength at Matoshree, Uddhav Thackeray said...
Justification: The sentence describes a "shakti pradarshan" (शक्तीप्रदर्शन), or show of strength, which in itself is a neutral description of an event and doesn't carry inherent positive or negative sentiment.

Text: बॉलिवूडचा ‘हा’ कलाकर अमिताभ बच्चनमुळे शिकला शाळा, अभिनेत्याने स्व:च केला खुलासा
translated_text: Bollywood's 'Ha' artist studied at school because of Amitabh Bachchan, the actor himself revealed
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it mainly conveys information about an actor's education. There is no specific Marathi word or phrase indicating any positive or negative sentiment. The sentence is a factual statement.

Text: एक कुत्रा होता तो पण आता आत आहे
translated_text: There was a dog, but now it's inside.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment (0.0) because while it mentions a past presence ("होता" - was) and a current location ("आत आहे" - is inside), it lacks any explicit emotional coloring. The emotion of surprise stems from the implied shift in the dog's location ("पण आता" - but now"), suggesting an unexpected change. The core sentiment remains neutral as there is no positive or negative feeling expressed about the dog or its location.

Text: म्हणजे आपण पुढच्या निवडणुकीत पडणार हे भविष्य बघितलंय वाटत साहेबांनी
translated_text: So, sir, I think you have seen the future and that we will lose in the next election.
Justification: The sentence conveys a neutral sentiment due to the phrase "म्हणजे आपण पुढच्या निवडणुकीत पडणार हे भविष्य बघितलंय वाटत साहेबांनी" which expresses a matter-of-fact observation or a sarcastic question about predicting election outcomes, lacking strong positive or negative emotional cues. The core of the sentence revolves around speculating about future election results.

Text: होणारच आहे, शिवसेना ही उद्धव बाळासाहेब ठाकरे यांची आहे,,,
translated_text: It is bound to happen, Shiv Sena belongs to Uddhav Balasaheb Thackeray,,,
Justification: The sentence expresses a statement of fact or inevitability with "होणारच आहे" (honarach aahe - it is bound to happen) and ownership, without expressing a clear positive or negative sentiment.

Text: हे पण शेंडी जानवे वालेच
translated_text: This is also a must-see.
Justification: The sentence "हे पण शेंडी जानवे वालेच" is neutral because it simply identifies a group of people ("शेंडी जानवे वाले") without expressing any positive or negative feeling or opinion. The phrase itself is a descriptive label, not inherently sentimental.

Text: राहुल नागलच्या आधी करण कुंद्राला डेट करत होती श्रद्धा आर्या? अभिनेत्रीने केला खुलासा
translated_text: Was Shraddha Arya dating Karan Kundra before Rahul Nagal? Actress reveals
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it is a question ("राहुल नागलच्या आधी करण कुंद्राला डेट करत होती श्रद्धा आर्या?") asking about past relationships and reporting a revelation ("अभिनेत्रीने केला खुलासा"). There is no explicit positive or negative sentiment expressed.

Text: खुप गोडधोड खायचा कंटाळा आला की असे खायचे..
translated_text: I used to eat this when I got tired of eating so many sweets.
Justification: The sentence expresses a sense of being tired or weary of sweets, indicated by the word "कंटाळा" (kantaala), which translates to "tired" or "bored," suggesting a neutral sentiment rather than a positive or negative one.

Text: पञाचाळ मध्ये मराठी कुटुंबे अजुनही घर भेटतील या प्रतिक्षेत आहेत.
translated_text: Marathi families in Pantchal are still waiting to find their homes.
Justification: The sentence expresses a state of waiting ("प्रतिक्षेत आहेत"), lacking strong positive or negative indicators. The phrase "प्रतिक्षेत आहेत" indicates a neutral state of expectation, thus leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: ठाकरेंचा बाप होता तो माणूस, पण तुम्हा सगळ्यांचा देखिल बाप होता...
translated_text: That man was Thackeray's father, but he was also the father of all of you...
Justification: The sentence expresses a statement of fact and comparison using the words "बाप होता" (baap hota), meaning "was a father," indicating a neutral relationship and lacking any explicit positive or negative sentiment.

Text: भास्कर जाधवांनी राणेची उरली सुरली पण काढून टाकली
translated_text: Bhaskar Jadhav removed Rane's remaining Surli but
Justification: The sentence is considered neutral as it describes an action ("काढून टाकली" - removed) without explicit positive or negative connotation towards either Bhaskar Jadhav or Rane. "उरली सुरली" (remaining Surli) refers to a specific action, which, while potentially aggressive, lacks inherent sentiment without further context.

Text: ताई तुमी लाम रहा त्या मशाल पासून त्या मधे आग आहे
translated_text: Stay strong, there is fire in that torch.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a statement of fact or warning ("आग आहे" - there is fire) without expressing any explicit positive or negative emotion.

Text: अगदी बरोबर आहे. जनता उद्धव यांच्या पाठीशी आहे
translated_text: That's right. The people are behind Uddhav.
Justification: The sentence expresses factual agreement and support. The phrase "अगदी बरोबर आहे" (agdi barobar aahe) indicating correctness and "पाठीशी आहे" (pathishi aahe) suggesting support don't carry strong positive or negative connotations, making the overall sentiment neutral.

Text: ॲाम्लेट करुन खल्ले तर उपयोगी आहे का ?
translated_text: Is it useful to make an omelet and then eat it?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a simple question asking about the utility of eating an omelet; there is no inherently positive or negative sentiment expressed. The phrase "ॲाम्लेट करुन खल्ले तर उपयोगी आहे का ?" (Is it useful to make an omelet and then eat it?) simply inquires about usefulness without implying any emotion.

Text: आणि कोणी उपाशी राहू नये..‌कुपोषणाचा बळी होऊ नये..‌ह्या गोष्टी महत्त्वाच्या...
translated_text: And no one should go hungry..no one should fall victim to malnutrition..these things are important...
Justification: The sentiment is neutral/slightly positive and emotion is joy because the phrase "आणि कोणी उपाशी राहू नये" (And no one should go hungry) expresses a hopeful desire for a positive outcome, implicitly suggesting a concern for well-being, creating a slightly joyful emotion and a neutral sentiment.

Text: तुम्ही दोघे मुंबई चे वोटर आहात का ??
translated_text: Are you both voters of Mumbai??
Justification: The sentence is a neutral question. The phrase "तुम्ही दोघे मुंबई चे वोटर आहात का ??" (Are you both voters of Mumbai??) is a factual inquiry and does not contain any words or phrases that express positive, negative, or any other emotional sentiment.

Text: षडयंत्र म्हणतात ते आहे हे सगळं
translated_text: This is all what they call a conspiracy.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact or an opinion about something being a conspiracy ("षडयंत्र म्हणतात ते आहे हे सगळं"). There is no indication of positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "षडयंत्र म्हणतात" (they call it a conspiracy) is a factual statement without emotional coloring.

Text: आताचे म्हणजे कालियुगातले
translated_text: The present is from the Kali Yuga.
Justification: The sentence uses "कालियुगातले" (Kali Yuga), which refers to a specific time period (the age of Kali). This is presented as a neutral statement of fact, lacking any positive or negative connotation and thus resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: कृपया समस्येच्या त्वरित निराकरणासाठी तक्रारीचे अचूक स्थान आणि फोन नंबर प्रदान करा.
translated_text: Please provide the exact location and phone number of the complaint for prompt resolution of the issue.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it is a polite request for information. The phrase "कृपया समस्येच्या त्वरित निराकरणासाठी" (krupaya samasyachya tvarit nirakaranasathi) - "Please for prompt resolution of the issue" indicates a helpful and objective tone, contributing to the neutral sentiment.

Text: हे नवीनच आहे काय करताय तुम्ही?
translated_text: This is new. What are you doing?
Justification: The word "नवीनच" (navinach - very new/completely new) indicates a state of novelty and the question "काय करताय तुम्ही?" (kay kartay tumhi? - what are you doing?) in conjunction with the statement evokes surprise.

Text: वसूली करण्याचा कोणालाही हक्क नाही. लोकांनी हे लक्षात ठेवावे. ते बेकायदेशीर आहे.
translated_text: No one has the right to extort money. People should remember this. It is illegal.
Justification: The Marathi word "वसूली" (vasuli), meaning extortion, contributes to the disgust emotion and neutral sentiment due to its inherently negative connotation suggesting exploitation and illicit activity.

Text: होणार तेच जे दिल्लीश्वर म्हणतील...
translated_text: What Delhishwar says will happen...
Justification: The sentence expresses a sense of inevitability and deference to authority, with "दिल्लीश्वर म्हणतील" (Delhishwar mhanatil - what the ruler/Delhi says) indicating a neutral sentiment as it simply states a fact or widely accepted belief.

Text: एक्याने एकदाचा "एकनाथ बाळासाहेब ठाकरे" असा दावा केला की मी हिमालयात जायला मोकळा
translated_text: Eknath Balasaheb Thackeray once claimed that he was free to go to the Himalayas.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it reports a claim ("असा दावा केला") without expressing any positive or negative emotion. The phrase "असा दावा केला" is simply stating a fact.

Text: लांडगा आला रे आला सारखं नको व्हायला
translated_text: Don't be like the wolf has come.
Justification: The sentence expresses a cautionary statement referencing a false alarm scenario ("लांडगा आला रे आला सारखं नको व्हायला"). There is no inherently positive or negative sentiment expressed, but rather a warning against repeating a pattern of false alerts, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: लायकी मी तुझी लोकांसमोर मांडली. कारण मी सभ्य भाषा बोलतो.
translated_text: I have presented your worth to the people because I speak polite language.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence primarily describes an action ("मांडली" - presented) and a reason ("सभ्य भाषा बोलतो" - speak polite language) without expressing strong positive or negative emotion. The words themselves don't carry strong emotional weight in this context.

Text: सर्व नाणी वापरले आहे
translated_text: All coins have been used.
Justification: The sentence describes a factual event ("सर्व नाणी वापरले आहे" - All coins have been used) without expressing any positive or negative sentiment, leading to a neutral sentiment score. There are no emotionally charged words or phrases.

Text: हे नक्की पाहिजे
translated_text: I definitely want this.
Justification: The sentence expresses a desire ("पाहिजे" - pahije - want/need) without strong positive or negative connotations, hence neutral.

Text: मग दिवाळी चे रेशन मिळाले नाही म्हणून ट्विटर रडता का?
translated_text: So why are you crying on Twitter because you didn't get your Diwali ration?
Justification: The phrase "ट्विटर रडता का?" (Twitter radta ka?), meaning "why are you crying on Twitter?", suggests surprise at the person's actions, rather than any positive or negative sentiment, hence neutral sentiment and surprise emotion.

Text: म्हणजे कोणाची बाजू बरोबर आहे हे तुम्हालाही माहिती आहे तर.
translated_text: So you also know whose side is right.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states that the listener is aware of who is right. The Marathi phrase "म्हणजे कोणाची बाजू बरोबर आहे हे तुम्हालाही माहिती आहे" expresses a statement of fact or an assumption of knowledge, devoid of any strong positive or negative sentiment.

Text: खरवस आवडत नाही असा माणूस पृथ्वीवर सापडणे दुर्मिळ...
translated_text: It is rare to find a person on earth who doesn't really like...
Justification: The sentence implies near-universal appeal, but the use of "दुर्मिळ" (durmil - rare/difficult) suggests a subtle acknowledgement that such a person *could* exist, preventing it from being strongly positive. Thus, the neutral sentiment is driven by the word "दुर्मिळ."

Text: उद्धव सेनेचे सरकार आल्यास कोकणातून निष्ठावान मुख्यमंत्री यांनाच करावे ही जनतेची मागणी
translated_text: People demand that if Uddhav Sena government comes to power, only a loyal Chief Minister from Konkan should be appointed.
Justification: The emotion of anger is likely derived from the phrase "उद्धव सेनेचे सरकार आल्यास...ही जनतेची मागणी" (Uddhav Sena's government comes to power...this is people's demand) which implies a potentially undesirable scenario that could make someone angry. The need to emphasize the desire for a loyal CM might also imply suspicion or distrust of the current or potential alternatives adding up to overall anger.

Text: हृदयविकारांपासून दूर राहायचे असेल तर आहारात करा हे   बदल, जाणून घ्या
translated_text: If you want to stay away from heart diseases, make these changes in your diet, know this
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to its informative and factual nature. It simply states a conditional situation and provides advice, lacking strong positive or negative indicators. The phrase "जाणून घ्या" (jaanun ghya - know this) is a call to action but not emotionally charged.

Text: पर्याय आहे आणि तो ही मजबूत तृतीय गट. बजावो ताली.
translated_text: There is an alternative and it is a strong third group. Let's clap.
Justification: The phrase "बजावो ताली" (Bajavo Taali - Let's clap) indicates a call to action and celebration, but without strong positive or negative connotations in this context. Therefore, it doesn't skew the overall sentiment to be significantly positive.

Text: या प्रवाशाला फक्त    मिनिटांच्या राईडसाठी सुमारे    लाख रुपये मोजावे लागले आहेत.
translated_text: This passenger has had to pay about one lakh rupees for just a minute's ride.
