translated_text: Tell me the truth, do you have it??
Justification: The sentence is neutral in itself, but the emotion of anger likely stems from the implied suspicion or confrontation inherent in the phrase "खरं सांगा" (kharं sanga) which means "Tell me the truth." This phrase, especially with the double question mark, suggests doubt and potential accusation, thus fueling anger.

Text: आलं अला वारा संगी पावसाच्या धारा
translated_text: The wind came with torrents of rain.
Justification: The sentence describes a natural phenomenon (wind and rain) without expressing any explicit positive or negative feelings. The phrase "आलं अला वारा संगी पावसाच्या धारा" (the wind came with torrents of rain) is a descriptive statement lacking emotional cues, hence neutral sentiment.

Text: देशाचे    वे उपराष्ट्रपती म्हणून जगदीप धनखड यांनी घेतली शपथ!
translated_text: Jagdeep Dhankhar takes oath as the Vice President of the country!
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are positive due to the phrase "शपथ घेतली" (shapath ghetli), which translates to "took oath." Taking an oath signifies the commencement of a new role, a significant event, hence indicating joy and a positive sentiment.

Text: देशाचे    वे उपराष्ट्रपती म्हणून जगदीप धनखड यांनी घेतली शपथ
translated_text: Jagdeep Dhankhar takes oath as the country's Vice President
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the phrase "शपथ घेतली" (shapath ghetli - took oath), which simply describes a formal action without expressing positive or negative feelings.

Text: आता आम्हा शिवसेना समर्थकांना हि निवडणूक हवीच आहे. कमलिला हरवायचंय
translated_text: Now we Shiv Sena supporters want this election. We want to defeat Kamal.
Justification: The sentence expresses a desire to win an election and defeat a political opponent, but lacks strong emotional cues or subjective language. Therefore, "आता आम्हा शिवसेना समर्थकांना हि निवडणूक हवीच आहे. कमलिला हरवायचंय" is neutral (0).

Text: राजसाहेब पण शिवसेनेत होते ना
translated_text: Rajsaheb was also in the Shiv Sena, wasn't he?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it states a fact ("राजसाहेब पण शिवसेनेत होते ना" - Rajsaheb was also in the Shiv Sena, wasn't he?) without expressing any opinion or emotion. The phrase "राजसाहेब पण शिवसेनेत होते ना" simply inquires about a past association and doesn't contain any emotionally charged words.

Text: चहात उकळी आणि आयुष्यात अडचणी नसतील तर जगण्यात मजा नाही......!
translated_text: If there are no boils in tea and no problems in life, there is no fun in living......!
Justification: The sentiment is negative (0) because the phrase "अडचणी नसतील तर जगण्यात मजा नाही" (adchani nastil tar jagnyat maja nahi) implying that life without problems lacks fun, suggests a pessimistic view and a potential lack of enjoyment, contributing to sadness.

Text: त्या दोघांच्या पक्षातील किमान   /   आमदार तुमच्या पक्षात प्रवेश घेतलेले चालतात का????
translated_text: Are at least / MLAs from both of those parties admitted to your party????
Justification: The word "चालतात का????", indicating a question of acceptance or allowance, implies surprise and uncertainty about the possibility, hence the neutral sentiment.

Text: या सेनेसाठी एन्टरटेनर ची भूमिका निभावत आहेत ... भाषण पहिले यांचे ...
translated_text: He is playing the role of entertainer for this army... His speech was first...
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply describes someone's role ("एन्टरटेनर ची भूमिका निभावत आहेत" - playing the role of entertainer) and mentions a speech without implying any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: आपली तक्रार संबंधित अधिकाऱ्यांपर्यंत पोहोचविण्यात आली आहे.
translated_text: Your complaint has been forwarded to the relevant authorities.
Justification: The sentence conveys a neutral sentiment because it simply states a fact ("आपली तक्रार संबंधित अधिकाऱ्यांपर्यंत पोहोचविण्यात आली आहे" - Your complaint has been forwarded to the relevant authorities.) without expressing any positive or negative emotion. The phrase "पोहोचविण्यात आली आहे" (has been forwarded) is a neutral action.

Text: हे काय आहे.?
translated_text: What is this?
Justification: "काय आहे" (kay aahe - what is) expresses a sense of inquiry and uncertainty, leading to surprise rather than a positive, negative, or neutral sentiment.

Text: खरंच नाहि तर नवरात्र मध्येच कडक उन असत.
translated_text: Not really, it was very hot during Navratri.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence simply states a fact ("कडक उन असत" - it was very hot) about the weather during Navratri without expressing any positive or negative feelings.

Text: विराट ..रोहित मध्ये आलबेल नाही म्हणणाऱ्यांनी हा व्हिडीओ बघावा
translated_text: Those who say there is no harmony between Virat and Rohit should watch this video.
Justification: The sentence expresses an observation and suggestion rather than a positive or negative feeling. The phrase "आलबेल नाही" (aalbel nahi) meaning "no harmony" presents a factual assessment, and the statement aims to correct misinformation ("म्हणणाऱ्यांनी हा व्हिडीओ बघावा" - those who say should watch this video), not express a specific sentiment. Therefore, neutral sentiment is most appropriate.

Text: आम्ही सर्व मित्रांनी मिळून      मध्ये    लर्निंगचं कॉन्ट्रॅक्ट दिले होते एकाला.
translated_text: All of us friends had given a learning contract to one of them.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral statement about a contract being given. The phrase "लर्निंगचं कॉन्ट्रॅक्ट दिले होते" (learning contract was given) simply describes an action without expressing any inherent positive or negative sentiment.

Text: चारच भाग आहे का महाराष्ट्रात
translated_text: Are there only four parts in Maharashtra?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it expresses a simple question of fact using the word "चारच" (charach), meaning "only four", which doesn't inherently carry any emotional or sentimental weight in this context.

Text: जिव्हारी लागली पाहिजे अशी
translated_text: That should be taken seriously.
Justification: The phrase "जिव्हारी लागली पाहिजे" (jivhari lagli pahije - should be taken seriously) expresses a need for seriousness or impact, which doesn't inherently convey positive or negative sentiment, leading to a neutral (0) sentiment.

Text: केशव तूच उमेदवारी अर्ज भरायला पाहिजे होता. अंधेरी पूर्व चा.
translated_text: Keshav, you should have filed your nomination papers. From Andheri East.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it expresses a suggestion or opinion ("पाहिजे होता" - should have) without conveying any explicit positive or negative sentiment or emotion.

Text: हे ट्विट पण समाधान हॉटेलचे एकमेव मालक यांच्या हॉटेलवर पार्टी देणाऱ्यावर झाले
translated_text: This tweet was also directed at the sole owner of the Samadhan Hotel, who was hosting a party at his hotel.
Justification: The word "झाले" (zhale), indicating the tweet was directed *at* someone, combined with the implication of targeting the hotel owner, contributes to a neutral sentiment but hints at anger due to the context suggesting criticism.

Text: शहीद भगतसिंग यांची जयंती पुणे विद्यापीठात उत्सवात साजरी
translated_text: Shaheed Bhagat Singh's birth anniversary celebrated in a festival at Pune University
Justification: "उत्सवात साजरी" (utsavat sajari - celebrated in a festival) indicates a joyous and celebratory atmosphere, leading to a joy emotion and a positive sentiment.

Text: स्वतः चे (खास भाजपा)चे किती आमदार आहेत ..
translated_text: How many MLAs are there from your own party (specifically BJP)?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the factual and inquisitive nature of the question. The phrase "किती आमदार आहेत" (kiti aamdar aahet - how many MLAs are there) is simply asking for information, indicating a neutral stance.

Text: तीन महिन्यापूर्वीच महाराष्ट्र वाचला आहे..
translated_text: Maharashtra was saved three months ago.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a past event ("वाचला आहे" - was saved) without expressing any explicit positive or negative sentiment.

Text: ही नविन ब्रीड, मोदीजींची देणं आहे!
translated_text: This new breed is a gift from Modiji!
Justification: The sentiment is positive "joy" due to the phrase "देणं आहे!" (den aahe!), meaning "is a gift!", which implies a positive offering or blessing.

Text: अजून पण विचार करा...
translated_text: Think about it some more...
Justification: The sentence expresses a simple suggestion to continue thinking. The phrase "अजून पण विचार करा" (ajun pan vichar kara) lacks any explicit emotional cues or subjective language, making it neutral.

Text: जुन्या आठवणी.... पन्नास पैश्या च मिळत होत आमच्या लहानपणी.
translated_text: Old memories.... We only got fifty paisa in our childhood.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply recalls a past event and a specific detail (pannaas paishya ch milat hot - fifty paisa only available), without expressing positive or negative feelings.

Text: ...आयुष्यातील सर्वात सोपा नियम जे तुमच्यासोबत होऊ नये असे वाटते ते इतरांसोबत करु नका...!
translated_text: ...The simplest rule in life is, don't do to others what you don't want done to you...!
Justification: The negative sentiment and anger stem from the phrase "जे तुमच्यासोबत होऊ नये असे वाटते ते इतरांसोबत करु नका" which translates to "don't do to others what you don't want done to you." This implies a potential for harm and evokes a sense of anger directed at the possibility of mistreatment.

Text: तुम्हाला यावेळेस तिकीट मिळणार आहे का??
translated_text: Are you going to get a ticket this time??
Justification: The sentiment is neutral with surprise primarily due to the question "मिळणार आहे का??" (milnar aahe ka??), which expresses uncertainty and inquiry about obtaining a ticket, indicating surprise or doubt.

Text: ते अस आहे
translated_text: That is it.
Justification: The sentence "ते अस आहे" expresses a simple statement of fact. The lack of any emotionally charged words like "वाईट" (bad), "आनंद" (joy), or "राग" (anger) contributes to the neutral sentiment. The phrase "अस आहे" (is it) is a generic affirmation and doesn't carry any specific emotional weight.

Text: हा निर्णय युतीतील इतर पक्षांना देखील मान्य होता काय?
translated_text: Was this decision also acceptable to the other parties in the coalition?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it poses a question about acceptance ("मान्य होता काय?") without expressing any positive or negative sentiment or emotion.

Text: उसना बाप पहिल्या मजल्यावर घेतला होता
translated_text: Usana's father had taken her to the first floor.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it describes a simple action: "Usana bap pahilya majalyavar ghetala hota" (उसना बाप पहिल्या मजल्यावर घेतला होता). It simply states that Usana's father took her to the first floor, without expressing any positive or negative feelings.

Text: षड्यंत्र आहे
translated_text: There is a conspiracy.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because the statement "षड्यंत्र आहे" (there is a conspiracy) is simply a factual declaration, devoid of any inherent positive or negative emotional valence.

Text: चित्त्यांच्या बदली नामिबिया ने हस्तिदंत मागितले आहेत, ही बातमी खरी आहे का?
translated_text: Is it true that Namibia has asked for ivory in exchange for cheetahs?
Justification: The sentiment of surprise is primarily driven by the phrase "हस्तिदंत मागितले आहेत" (hastidant magitle aahet - asked for ivory), as it is unexpected and unusual to exchange cheetahs for ivory.

Text: मग आता परदेशातून आणायचे का पत्रकार
translated_text: So why bring journalists from abroad now?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it is posed as a question ("मग आता परदेशातून आणायचे का पत्रकार"), questioning the necessity of bringing journalists from abroad without expressing a positive or negative viewpoint. The interrogative marker "का" contributes to the neutral tone.

Text: हो... पत्र वाचल्यावर लगेच लक्षात येते हे.
translated_text: Yes... I immediately noticed this after reading the letter.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it simply states a fact ("लक्षात येते हे" - I noticed this) without conveying any positive or negative emotion.

Text: बुटक्यांना शिडी आणायचं जास्तीचं काम असतं. शेजाऱ्याला परत पण करावी लागते
translated_text: Bringing a ladder to the Butkas is an extra chore. The neighbor also has to pay it back.
Justification: The sentence describes a chore and the need for repayment without expressing positive or negative emotions. The words "जास्तीचं काम" (jaastich kaam - extra chore) and "परत पण करावी लागते" (parat pan karavi lagte - also have to pay it back) describe a neutral situation.

Text: नाना काय खोटे बोलले तुम्हाला का एवढी मिरची लागली आहे जे खरे तेच बोलले
translated_text: What lie did Nana tell you? Why are you so angry? He only told the truth.
Justification: The phrase "मिरची लागली" (mirchi lagli), which literally translates to "felt the chili," is an idiom used to express strong anger or irritation, indicating a negative sentiment and the emotion of anger.

Text: मानखुर्द आहे पण मानबुद्रुक नाही.
translated_text: It is a shame but not a disgrace.
Justification: The word "मानखुर्द" (shame) is responsible for the negative sentiment and feeling of disgust.

Text: वंदे भारत एक्स्प्रेस लवकरच धावणार, काय त्यात तुमच्या शहराचा समावेश आहे? ./    /  /     /…
translated_text: Vande Bharat Express will run soon, is your city included in it? ./ / / /…
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's primarily informational and inquisitive. The phrase "काय त्यात तुमच्या शहराचा समावेश आहे?" (is your city included in it?) simply asks a question without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: मला वाटते हे दोन्ही एकच आहे
translated_text: I think both are the same.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral opinion using the phrase "मला वाटते" (mala vatate), meaning "I think," indicating a lack of strong positive or negative sentiment.

Text: तुझ्या मायचा नवरा आहे का तो
translated_text: Is he your mother's husband?
Justification: The sentence is a neutral question. The words "तुझ्या मायचा नवरा" (your mother's husband) simply state a factual relationship, and "आहे का तो" (is he?) is a neutral question form.

Text: आम्ही ही मनसे पुढे सुपारी लिहू
translated_text: We will write this betel nut next to MNS
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it states an action ("आम्ही लिहू" - we will write) without expressing any explicit positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "सुपारी लिहू" (write betel nut) in this context implies a political allegiance or commitment to MNS but does not convey an opinion or feeling about the matter.

translated_text: This is the fear of %...
Justification: The sentence expresses "fear," but the presence of "%" renders it incomplete and lacking context, thus resulting in a neutral sentiment and emotion. The phrase " भीती" (bhiti) means fear. However, without knowing the object of the fear, the overall sentiment remains neutral.

Text: आधी स्वतः निवडून येतो का ते बघायला पाहिजे,
translated_text: First, we need to see if we can choose ourselves,
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it expresses a need to observe a future event ("निवडून येतो का ते बघायला पाहिजे" - need to see if one is elected), without expressing any inherent positive or negative emotion.

Text: तुम्ही शिंदे गटात सामील व्हा, आणि बायो पाहून हा रिप्लाय केला आहे
translated_text: You joined the Shinde group, and after seeing the bio, this reply was made.
Justification: The sentence describes a factual event ("तुम्ही शिंदे गटात सामील व्हा") and an action based on observed information ("बायो पाहून हा रिप्लाय केला आहे"). There is no explicit positive or negative sentiment expressed; it's simply a statement of events.

Text: हे एक नविनच शोधलय ह्यांनी.
translated_text: This is a new discovery.
Justification: "नविनच शोधलय" indicates novelty and unexpectedness, triggering surprise.

Text: भगवा काय तुला आणि तुझ्या पार्टीला आंदण दिलाय का?
translated_text: Has saffron brought joy to you and your party?
Justification: The sentiment is incorrectly assessed. The Marathi sentence "भगवा काय तुला आणि तुझ्या पार्टीला आंदण दिलाय का?" is sarcastic and questioning, implying annoyance rather than joy. While "भगवा" (saffron) can be associated with positive cultural or religious connotations, the phrase "आंदण दिलाय का?" (given as a gift?) used sarcastically, reverses the sentiment. This usage indicates disapproval or annoyance. Therefore, "आंदण दिलाय का?" is the primary reason for the negative sentiment which is not reflected here.

Text: हाच का तो मुंबईच्या थंडीची वाट पाहणारा?
translated_text: Is this the one waiting for the cold of Mumbai?
Justification: The sentence expresses a question about someone waiting for Mumbai's cold, lacking any explicitly positive or negative words. The phrase "वाट पाहणारा?" (waat pahnara? - waiting for?) is neutral, simply inquiring about an expectation.

Text: संजय राऊत यांची जागा मोकळी होती. हा फाटका भरून काढत आहे.
translated_text: Sanjay Raut's seat was vacant. This gap is being filled.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it describes a factual situation. The phrase "जागा मोकळी होती" (seat was vacant) and "हा फाटका भरून काढत आहे" (this gap is being filled) simply state a neutral event without expressing any particular sentiment or emotion.

Text: प्रितीमेचा म्हणजे  मराठीचा क्लास लाव रे आधी
translated_text: My dear, you should take Marathi class first.
Justification: The sentence expresses a suggestion or mild imperative, but without strong emotional markers. The phrase "लाव रे" (laav re) is a casual way of saying "take" or "attend," lacking significant positive or negative connotations to shift the sentiment from neutral.

Text: असा राजकिय वातावरण ठाकरेंच्या काळात नाही दिसले…
translated_text: Such a political atmosphere was not seen during Thackeray's time...
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it presents a factual observation about the political atmosphere ("राजकिय वातावरण") during Thackeray's time and does not express any positive or negative feeling. The phrase "नाही दिसले" (not seen) simply states a difference without implying a value judgment.

Text: धनत्रयोदशीच्या दिवशी शनि बनवत आहे हा राजयोग, या तीन राशींचे दिवस बदलतील
translated_text: Saturn is forming this Raja Yoga on the day of Dhanteras, the days of these three zodiac signs will change
Justification: The sentence describes an astrological event and its potential impact on zodiac signs; "शनि बनवत आहे हा राजयोग" (Saturn is forming this Raja Yoga) is a statement of fact without inherently positive or negative connotations, hence the neutral sentiment.

Text: पण आता हे बाहेर येता कामा नये कधीच
translated_text: But this should never come out now.
Justification: The sentence expresses a desire for secrecy without any strong positive or negative connotations. The neutral sentiment is primarily due to the phrase "येता कामा नये" (yeta kama naye), which translates to "should not come out" and simply states a requirement or prohibition without displaying a particular emotion.

Text: हे नवचैनिक आहेत, बोलू द्या
translated_text: These are neo-Nazis, let them speak.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because even though it identifies a group with a negative connotation ("नवचैनिक" - neo-Nazis), the phrase "बोलू द्या" (let them speak) advocates for free speech, not necessarily endorsing or condemning the group's views. The phrase "बोलू द्या" tempers any inherent negativity associated with "नवचैनिक," leading to a neutral stance.

Text: हीची अक्कल दांड्यात. मी बोललो नाही दांडा हा शब्द मुखोदगत .
translated_text: This is common sense. I did not say the word "danda" in my mouth.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it primarily describes a situation ("common sense") and a denial ("I did not say..."). There's no inherently positive or negative wording. The Marathi phrases "हीची अक्कल दांड्यात" and "मी बोललो नाही" contribute to the neutral tone by simply stating facts or observations.

Text: ह्यात ह्यांचं दोष आहे मुलाचा नाही
translated_text: This is their fault, not the child's.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it simply states a fact attributing blame ("दोष आहे") to someone, without conveying any strong positive or negative emotion. The phrase "दोष आहे" (fault is) is factual and devoid of sentiment.

Text: तुमचे विचार बदलले आहेत का?
translated_text: Have your thoughts changed?
Justification: The sentence "तुमचे विचार बदलले आहेत का?" (Have your thoughts changed?) expresses a neutral sentiment as it is a simple question inquiring about a change in thoughts, without any inherent positive or negative connotations. There is no specific word contributing to a strong sentiment. The question itself is neutral.

Text: बाळासाहेबांच्या शिवसेनेत संजय राठोड सारखा मंत्री आहे यातच सर्व आले
translated_text: It all came down to the fact that there is a minister like Sanjay Rathod in Balasaheb's Shiv Sena.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it states a fact without expressing explicit positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "यातच सर्व आले" (it all came down to this) simply indicates a concluding statement, lacking emotional coloring.

Text: आज ऑर्डर जरा जास्तच आहेत
translated_text: There are a few more orders today.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual observation ("आज ऑर्डर जरा जास्तच आहेत") without any overt positive or negative indicators. The phrase "जरा जास्तच" (jara jastach) simply means "a little more" and is used to describe quantity, not evoke an emotion.

Text: आता दुष्काळ नक्कीच जाहीर होणार का???
translated_text: Will a drought definitely be declared now???
Justification: The sentence expresses a question ("आता दुष्काळ नक्कीच जाहीर होणार का???") about a potential future event (drought declaration) without conveying any inherent positive or negative feeling. The questioning tone ("का???") maintains neutrality.

Text: अशी खूप गाणी आहेत
translated_text: There are many such songs.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states the existence of many such songs. The Marathi phrase "अशी खूप गाणी आहेत" conveys a factual statement without expressing any positive or negative feeling.

Text: असे एकूण    आहेत..
translated_text: There are such totals..
Justification: The sentence is neutral because "असे एकूण" (ase ekun), meaning "such totals," is a factual statement without any inherent positive or negative connotation.

Text: यांना काय जावई म्हणून घेतले आहे काय ?
translated_text: Have you taken him as your son-in-law?
Justification: The sentence is a rhetorical question and doesn't express a strong positive or negative feeling. The phrase "काय जावई म्हणून घेतले आहे काय ?" (kaya javai mhanun ghetle aahe kaya?) questions the relationship or treatment, but lacks explicit sentiment.

Text: वियोगावाचून प्रीती फुलत नाही.भगवा ग्रुप
translated_text: Love does not blossom without separation. Saffron Group
Justification: The sentence presents a general philosophical statement about love and separation ("वियोगावाचून प्रीती फुलत नाही"), lacking explicit emotional expression, justifying a neutral sentiment.

Text: तसाच तर चमत्कार करत आहे आता कोणता करणार
translated_text: It's working wonders, what will you do now?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a factual statement and rhetorical question. The phrase "तसाच तर चमत्कार करत आहे" (tasach tar chamatkar karat ahe) describes something working "wonders," but it lacks positive or negative intensity and sets up a neutral question about the future.

Text: हो खरंय आणि निलेश पुरेपूर देतोय दीपक केसरकर ला
translated_text: Yes, that's right, and Nilesh is giving enough to Deepak Kesarkar.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it describes a factual event without expressing any explicit positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "पुरेपूर देतोय" (purepur detoy - giving enough) simply states an action and doesn't carry any inherent emotional weight or subjective opinion in this context.

Text: नातं महत्वाचं आहे राजकारण नाही
translated_text: Relationships are important, not politics.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence presents a balanced statement prioritizing relationships over politics without expressing strong positive or negative feelings. The phrase "नातं महत्वाचं आहे" (naata mahatvacha aahe - relationships are important) is a general statement of value, not inherently positive or negative.

Text: ताई त्यांनी वागल म्हणून आपन वागायचं हे योग्य आहे का
translated_text: Is it right for you to behave the way they behave?
Justification: The sentence expresses a question questioning the validity of mirroring someone else's behavior. The phrase "योग्य आहे का" (yogya aahe ka) which translates to "is it right?" indicates a neutral sentiment as it simply poses a question without expressing a positive or negative opinion.

Text: कोटींचे टर्म इन्शुरन्स मिळालेली कोणती फॅमिली माहीत आहे का कोणाला?
translated_text: Does anyone know of any families that have received term insurance worth crores?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is simply asking a question. There is no sentiment expressed within the Marathi phrase "कोटींचे टर्म इन्शुरन्स मिळालेली कोणती फॅमिली माहीत आहे का कोणाला?".

Text: अरे ज्यांनी अटक केली, ते बाळासाहेबांना नंतर भेटले सुध्दा.
translated_text: Oh, those who arrested him even met Balasaheb later.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement without conveying strong positive or negative feelings. The words "अटक केली" (arrested) and "भेटले" (met) describe events but don't inherently carry a strong emotional charge in this context, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: भाजप टीम आहे हे सर्व देश जाणतो.
translated_text: The whole country knows that BJP is the team.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about the BJP party, lacking any explicit positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "भाजप टीम आहे हे सर्व देश जाणतो" (BJP is the team, the whole country knows this) is a neutral observation.

Text: हे ट्वीट आहे
translated_text: This is a tweet.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence "हे ट्वीट आहे" is a simple statement of fact with no inherently positive or negative words or phrases. There are no specific Marathi words contributing to a positive or negative sentiment; it's purely descriptive.

Text: मी आता शेळीब्रेटी झालोय म्हणून लोकांना अनफॉलो करणार आहे.
translated_text: I'm going to unfollow people now that I'm a goat.
Justification: "शेळीब्रेटी" (goat) implies being foolish or idiotic, thus generating a negative sentiment and emotion of disgust.

Text: तुकड्यांसाठी शेपूट हलवाल कुत्र्यांसारखं राहाल. म्हणून ठाम असाल तर वाघासारखे जगाल.....
translated_text: You will wag your tail for pieces and live like a dog. So if you are firm, you will live like a tiger.....
Justification: The sentence expresses both negative and positive potential outcomes depending on one's actions, creating a neutral overall sentiment. The phrase "तुकड्यांसाठी शेपूट हलवाल कुत्र्यांसारखं राहाल" (you will wag your tail for pieces and live like a dog) presents a negative image, while "वाघासारखे जगाल" (you will live like a tiger) suggests a positive outcome if one remains firm. The balance results in a neutral sentiment.

Text: अस्सल पुणेरी कोल्हापूरकरांसाठी खास मिसळ आणली असेल ही ....
translated_text: This authentic Puneri must have brought a special misal for Kolhapurians...
Justification: The sentence expresses a potential offering, with no explicit positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "अस्सल पुणेरी कोल्हापूरकरांसाठी खास मिसळ" (authentic Puneri special misal for Kolhapurians) is descriptive and doesn't inherently convey any positive or negative emotion, thus contributing to the neutral sentiment.

Text: कुठं आहेत हे महत्वाचे नाही,,,तुम्ही तुमचा फोटो टाका हे महत्वाचे आहे
translated_text: It doesn't matter where you are, what matters is that you post your photo.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it emphasizes the act of posting a photo ("फोटो टाका") over location, lacking any overtly positive or negative emotional cues.

Text: बीड गेवराई तालुक्यातील रामपुरी गावाचा समावेश आहे का नाही..
translated_text: Is Rampuri village in Beed Gevrai taluka included or not?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a simple question asking for information ("आहे का नाही?"), without expressing any positive or negative sentiment or emotion.

Text: हे सगळे मायवाती व औवैसी चे नातलग आहेत
translated_text: All these are relatives of Mayawati and Awaisi.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply states a factual relationship ("नातलग आहेत" - relatives are) without expressing any positive or negative feelings or emotions.

Text: “मी आज जो काही आहे… तो फक्त आणि फक्त महाराष्ट्रामुळे”
translated_text: “Whatever I am today… is only and only because of Maharashtra”
Justification: The sentence expresses gratitude and acknowledgement but lacks any strong positive or negative markers. While the speaker credits Maharashtra, the sentiment is neutral. There is no single Marathi word influencing positive or negative sentiment, as the phrase "फक्त आणि फक्त महाराष्ट्रामुळे" (only and only because of Maharashtra) simply highlights the source of the speaker's current state without conveying inherent positivity or negativity in itself.

Text: तुमचे हिंदू    ला गणेशोत्सव वेळी चे नियोजन करत होते
translated_text: Your Hindus were planning for Ganesh Chaturthi.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply states a fact about planning for Ganesh Chaturthi; there is no indication of positive or negative sentiment or emotion. The phrase "गणेशोत्सव वेळी चे नियोजन करत होते" (Ganesh Chaturthi veli che niyojan karat hote) - "were planning for Ganesh Chaturthi" is a factual statement.

Text: कॉग्रेसवाले भारतीय का नाहीत? तुझे हिंदुत्व सर्व हिंदूंना मान्य आहे हे तुला कोणी सांगितले?
translated_text: Why are Congressmen not Indians? Who told you that your Hindutva is acceptable to all Hindus?
Justification: The phrase "कॉग्रेसवाले भारतीय का नाहीत?" (Why are Congressmen not Indians?) implies surprise at the idea that Congressmen might not be considered Indian, driving the surprise emotion and a neutral sentiment.

Text: गरीबी हटाव कोणी तरी बोलले होते
translated_text: Someone had spoken about eradicating poverty.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because "कोणी तरी बोलले होते" (koni tari bolale hote) - "someone had spoken" - simply reports a past statement without expressing any positive or negative feeling. The statement is a neutral observation.

Text: चला एकत्र येऊ या भावी पिढी सक्षम करू या
translated_text: Let's come together and empower the future generation.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "सक्षम करू या" (saksham karu ya), which translates to "empower," indicating a proactive and positive action towards the future generation.

Text: हा मार्ग लातूर मधून जाणार होता !!! त्यात बदल का केलेत
translated_text: This route was supposed to pass through Latur!!! Why was it changed?
Justification: The phrase "!!! त्यात बदल का केलेत" (!!! Why was it changed?) indicates surprise, as it questions the reason for an unexpected alteration. The exclamation marks further emphasize this emotion.

Text: जाणून घ्या महिला आयपीएलच्या पहिल्या हंगामासाठी ने कशी तयारी केली आहे....
translated_text: Find out how the team has prepared for the first season of the Women's IPL...
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is simply stating a fact about finding out how a team prepared. The phrase "जाणून घ्या" (jaanun ghyaa - find out) indicates an information-seeking query rather than any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: ज्यांच्या कडे काहीच नाहीये त्यांना काहीच फरक पडणार नाही..
translated_text: It won't matter to those who have nothing.
Justification: The neutral sentiment is primarily due to the phrase "काहीच फरक पडणार नाही" (kahich pharak padnar nahi), which translates to "it won't matter." This phrase expresses a lack of concern or impact, indicating a neutral stance.

Text: स्वेतलाना यांनी अमेरिकेत पलायन केल्यानंतर इंदिरा गांधींनी खास दूत त्यांच्या भेटीसाठी का पाठवला होता?
translated_text: Why did Indira Gandhi send a special envoy to meet Svetlana after she fled to America?
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are derived from the interrogative nature of the sentence, specifically the word "का" (ka - why), which expresses surprise and curiosity about the reason for Indira Gandhi's action.

Text: निवडणूक होणार?
translated_text: Will there be an election?
Justification: The sentence "निवडणूक होणार?" expresses a question about a future event ("निवडणूक होणार?"), lacking any indication of positive or negative feeling, thus the sentiment is neutral.

Text: ज्यावेळेस ती मशाल तुझ्या खाली लागेल ना तेंव्हा तुला कळेल.....!
translated_text: You will know when that torch falls on you.....!
Justification: The sentiment is likely misinterpreted. "ज्यावेळेस ती मशाल तुझ्या खाली लागेल ना तेंव्हा तुला कळेल.....!" (You will know when that torch falls on you.....!) carries a threatening tone. No word indicates joy. A more appropriate sentiment would be negative, possibly reflecting anger, fear, or warning, due to the threat implied by "मशाल तुझ्या खाली लागेल" (torch falls on you).

Text: तिकडे   वंदे भारत एक्सप्रेस चालू झाल्या इकडे नाशिक- पुणे रेल्वे अजून कागदावरच आहे.
translated_text: There, the Vande Bharat Express has started, while here, the Nashik-Pune railway is still on paper.
Justification: The sentence presents a factual comparison without expressing strong positive or negative feelings. The phrases "वंदे भारत एक्सप्रेस चालू झाल्या" (Vande Bharat Express has started) and "नाशिक- पुणे रेल्वे अजून कागदावरच आहे" (Nashik-Pune railway is still on paper) simply state facts without explicit emotional cues.

Text: नेमकी हे आहे कोणाचं
translated_text: Who exactly is this?
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are derived from the word "नेमकी" (nemaki), which implies a sense of surprise or seeking clarification beyond a simple question of ownership, thus indicating surprise.

Text: ओ वुमनिया     ' च्या अहवालातील काही महत्वाच्या बाबी
translated_text: Some important points from the report of 'O Womania'
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the factual and descriptive nature of "काही महत्वाच्या बाबी" (kahi mahatvachya baabi), meaning "some important points." There is no subjective opinion or emotional expression present.

Text: उलट आता डबल इंजिन चे सरकार आहे
translated_text: On the contrary, now there is a double engine government.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it simply states a fact ("उलट आता डबल इंजिन चे सरकार आहे" - "On the contrary, now there is a double engine government.") without expressing any positive or negative opinion. The phrase "डबल इंजिन चे सरकार" (double engine government) is descriptive but lacks inherent sentiment.

Text: गोकुळ अध्यक्ष निवडणूक अधिकारीपदी डॉ. देशमुख../-…
translated_text: Dr. Deshmukh appointed as Gokul President Election Officer../-…
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the factual reporting of an appointment. There is no inherently positive or negative word or phrase; "गोकुळ अध्यक्ष निवडणूक अधिकारीपदी डॉ. देशमुख" simply states a fact.

Text: हो पण बाळासाहेब देवरस संघचालक
translated_text: Yes, but Balasaheb Deoras is the leader of the Sangh.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence simply states a fact, "बाळासाहेब देवरस संघचालक" (Balasaheb Deoras is the leader of the Sangh), without expressing any positive or negative emotion. The statement is informative and doesn't carry any subjective feeling.

Text: ताई गावाला गेला होता का दोन दिवस दिसला नाही.
translated_text: Did you go to the village and not see me for two days?
Justification: The emotion of surprise is driven by the phrase "दोन दिवस दिसला नाही" (don diwas disla nahi), meaning "not seen for two days," implying unexpected absence.

Text: वानखेडे जी कॅबिनेट मंत्रिपद कधी मिळत आहे बच्चू भाऊंना????
translated_text: When is Bachu Bhau getting the Wankhede cabinet ministership????
Justification: The sentence expresses surprise due to the questioning tone and the speculative nature of "कधी मिळत आहे" (kadhi milat aahe - when is he getting), which implies doubt and wonder about Bachu Bhau's potential future appointment.

Text: जय शिवराय जय शंभुराजे आम्ही आहे तुमच्या सोबत एकनाथ शिंदे साहेब
translated_text: Hail Shivaji Hail Shambhuraj We are with you Eknath Shinde Saheb
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy emotion are primarily driven by the phrases "जय शिवराय जय शंभुराजे" (Jai Shivray Jai Shambhuraje), which express reverence and celebratory feelings towards revered historical figures, thus creating an atmosphere of respect and support.

Text: हे भास्कर पेरे पाटील आहेत.औरंगाबाद जवळील आदर्श ग्राम पाटोदा चे आदर्श सरपंच
translated_text: This is Bhaskar Pere Patil. The ideal Sarpanch of Adarsh ​​Gram Patoda near Aurangabad.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a factual statement identifying a person and their role ("आदर्श सरपंच" - ideal Sarpanch) without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: द्याल अशी आशा....
translated_text: I hope you will give....
Justification: The phrase "द्याल अशी आशा...." (dyal ashi asha....) expresses a hope, a neutral expression without strong positive or negative connotations. The words "आशा" (asha - hope) indicates this neutrality.

Text: भाऊ तुला कामाला ठेवलंय का उद्धव ने
translated_text: Brother, did Uddhav hire you?
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it is a simple question asking about someone's employment status, without any inherent positive or negative connotation. The Marathi phrase "भाऊ तुला कामाला ठेवलंय का उद्धव ने" is a factual inquiry and lacks emotive language.

Text: उल्हास बापट साहेब तुमचं पण नाव द्यायला काय हरकत आहे .....
translated_text: Ulhas Bapat Saheb, what's the problem with mentioning your name too.....
Justification: The sentence expresses disgust due to the sarcastic tone implied by the phrase "काय हरकत आहे" (kay harkat aahe), meaning "what's the problem," used in a context where the speaker clearly believes there *is* a problem or reluctance to mention the person's name, suggesting annoyance.

Text: पार्थ पवार हा उद्याचा अपर्णा यादव आहे....
translated_text: Parth Pawar is tomorrow's Aparna Yadav....
Justification: The sentence is a neutral comparison. While it might imply potential future behavior based on a reference, the statement itself, "पार्थ पवार हा उद्याचा अपर्णा यादव आहे" (Parth Pawar is tomorrow's Aparna Yadav), is simply an observation or prediction, lacking inherently positive or negative sentiment. The phrase itself doesn't express any inherent emotion, but merely draws a parallel.

Text: बहुत आला
translated_text: Very good
Justification: "आला" (ala) indicates positive evaluation and contributes to the joy emotion.

Text: | तुम्हाला माहितीये का? शेताजवळ झाडं असणं किती महत्वाचं असतं; जाणून घ्या सविस्तर…
translated_text: | Did you know? How important it is to have trees near the farm; Find out in detail…
Justification: The sentence primarily presents information and invites the reader to learn more. The Marathi phrase "तुम्हाला माहितीये का?" (Did you know?) and "जाणून घ्या सविस्तर…" (Find out in detail…) are informational prompts, contributing to a neutral sentiment.

Text: आधी, काकू आहेत का जाग्यावर ते बघा....
translated_text: First, see if the aunt is there....
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it's a simple request to check someone's location. The phrase "आधी, काकू आहेत का जाग्यावर ते बघा...." is a factual inquiry and doesn't carry any emotional weight.

Text: मी पण आयुष्यात उत्तर शोधतोय.
translated_text: I am also looking for answers in life.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the phrase "उत्तर शोधतोय" (uttar shodhtoy), meaning "looking for answers," simply describes a state of searching without implying any positive or negative emotion.

Text: बगताच क्षणी प्रेम नाही होणार थोडा वेळ लागेल
translated_text: Love won't happen instantly, it will take some time.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it states a fact about the time required for love to develop, rather than expressing positive or negative feelings. The phrase "वेळ लागेल" (vel lagel - will take time) indicates a future event without any inherent emotional valence.

Text: हो पण त्यांचे बाळासाहेब हे आहेत
translated_text: Yes, but their Balasaheb is this.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it is simply a factual statement. The phrase "हो पण त्यांचे बाळासाहेब हे आहेत" (ho pan tyanchhe Balasaheb he aahet) indicates acknowledgement and a neutral description of a person's association, lacking any positive or negative indicators.

Text: हा आणि आव्हाड एकसारखे डॉ. आहे
translated_text: This and Awhad are the same Dr.
Justification: The sentence "हा आणि आव्हाड एकसारखे डॉ. आहे" expresses a comparison ("एकसारखे") which, without further context, doesn't convey any particular positive or negative sentiment. It's a statement of similarity between two entities.

Text: एक दिवस त्यांचा,    आपले हा रेशो आहे
translated_text: One day, this is the ratio of theirs and ours.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it presents a factual statement about a ratio ("हा रेशो आहे") without expressing any positive or negative emotion or opinion.

Text: नवीन चे प्रात्यक्षिक
translated_text: Demonstration of the new
Justification: The sentence is neutral because "नवीन चे प्रात्यक्षिक" (Navin che pratayakshik) simply describes a demonstration of something new, without expressing any positive or negative feeling.

Text: चंपा गेली का हिमालया नाही ना मग तिला पाठव मग बघू राजीनाम्याचे कळलं का
translated_text: Did Champa go to Himalayas or not? Then send her and see if she knows about the resignation.
Justification: The sentence contains a series of neutral questions and instructions. There's no overtly positive or negative wording; therefore, the sentiment is neutral. The neutral tone stems from the pragmatic and informational language used throughout the sentence, especially phrases like "चंपा गेली का हिमालया नाही ना" (Did Champa go to Himalayas or not?), "मग तिला पाठव" (Then send her), and "कळलं का" (Understood?).

Text: मंदिरात बांधलेले नवसाचे अगणित धागे याचा पुरावा आहेत प्रत्येकाच्या जीवनात त्याने काहीतरी अपूर्ण लिहिलंय...
translated_text: The countless threads of vows tied in temples are proof that everyone has something unfinished written in their lives...
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it describes an observation about incomplete aspects in people's lives ("अपूर्ण लिहिलंय"), without explicitly conveying positive or negative feelings. The phrase "अपूर्ण लिहिलंय" indicates incompleteness, which doesn't necessarily evoke a strong positive or negative emotion.

Text: म्हणजे आघाडी सरकार ने नियमबाह्य काम केले असे सांगायचे आहे का ?
translated_text: Does that mean that the coalition government acted illegally?
Justification: The word "नियमबाह्य" (niyamabahya), meaning illegal or against the rules, suggests a potential wrongdoing by the government, triggering anger.

Text: दिवसांनी देशभरात महत्त्वाचे नियम बदलणार, तुमच्यावर होणार थेट परिणाम, एका क्लिकवर जाणून घ्या
translated_text: Important rules will change across the country in a few days, it will have a direct impact on you, know with one click
Justification: The sentence primarily conveys factual information about upcoming rule changes and their potential impact, without expressing any positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "महत्वाचे नियम बदलणार" (important rules will change) is a neutral statement of fact.

Text: हे सगळे त्यांचे घरगडी आहेत
translated_text: These are all their homes.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because "घरगडी आहेत" (gharagadi aahet) simply states a fact: they are homes, without any emotional coloring.

Text: यावेळी विविध विभागांचे अधिकारी उपस्थित होते
translated_text: Officials from various departments were present on this occasion.
Justification: The sentence "यावेळी विविध विभागांचे अधिकारी उपस्थित होते" is neutral because it simply states a fact. There is no word or phrase that expresses positive or negative sentiment. The Marathi words indicating neutrality include "उपस्थित होते" (upastith hote) which means "were present," a neutral statement of presence.

Text: पेक्षा कमी पटसंख्या असलेल्या शाळा बंद करण्याचा निर्णय घेतल्यास न्यायालयीन लढा देण्याचा इशारा
translated_text: Hint of legal fight if decision is taken to close schools with less than
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply reports an "इशारा" (hint/warning) of a potential legal fight, without expressing any explicit positive or negative sentiment. The word "इशारा" itself is neutral in connotation.

Text: देशमुखांनी सेनेत प्रवेश केला आहे का???
translated_text: Has Deshmukh joined the army???
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the question format ("केला आहे का???") which simply inquires about an event without expressing any positive or negative sentiment or specific emotion.

Text: तुमच्या सकट तुमच्या कुञ्याला जूलाब लागतील असे बोला
translated_text: Tell your dog that you need a laxative.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a potential outcome ("जूलाब लागतील" - need a laxative) without expressing any positive or negative sentiment. The phrase is a blunt statement, but doesn't necessarily convey a strong emotion.

Text: "ट्रेन कमकुवत नव्हती, म्हशी ताकदवान होत चालल्यात...
translated_text: "The train was not weak, the buffalo was getting stronger...
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual observation ("ट्रेन कमकुवत नव्हती, म्हशी ताकदवान होत चालल्यात...") without exhibiting any strong positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "कमकुवत नव्हती" (not weak) and "ताकदवान होत चालल्यात" (getting stronger) simply state objective qualities.

Text: बरं मग तुमच्या साहेबांना राजीनामा द्यायचा सांगुन तु होतोस का मनसे अध्यक्ष
translated_text: Well then, did you become the MNS president by asking your boss to resign?
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it's a question primarily conveying information and inquiring about a past action ("राजीनामा द्यायचा सांगुन तु होतोस का" - did you ask for resignation and become). It lacks overtly positive or negative phrasing and expresses no particular emotion.

Text: यांची दुसरी ओळख म्हणजे बाळासाहेब ठाकरे यांच्या बहिणीची ही सुनबाई आहे
translated_text: Her other identity is that she is the daughter-in-law of Balasaheb Thackeray's sister.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact about the person's identity. There is no word or phrase that expresses a positive or negative sentiment. The sentence "यांची दुसरी ओळख म्हणजे बाळासाहेब ठाकरे यांच्या बहिणीची ही सुनबाई आहे" (Her other identity is that she is the daughter-in-law of Balasaheb Thackeray's sister) is purely informational.

Text: निर्णय काय ही लागो आम्ही उद्धवजी ठाकरे साहेब सोबत राहनार
translated_text: Whatever the decision, we will stand with Uddhavji Thackeray.
Justification: The sentence expresses support and loyalty, but without strong positive or negative indicators. The phrase "उद्धवजी ठाकरे साहेब सोबत राहनार" (Uddhavji Thackeray saheb sobat rahanaar - will stand with Uddhavji Thackeray) indicates a statement of solidarity, which is emotionally neutral in the context of the political scenario and doesn't express any explicit negativity.

Text: "केदार ला ही जाईचेल" म्हणणारा एक ना एक जण मला दररोज भेटोच!!!
translated_text: I meet one or the other person every day who says "I'll go to Kedar"!!!
Justification: The phrase "भेटोच!!!" (bhetoch!!!) expresses strong insistence and frustration, contributing to the anger emotion and negative sentiment. It implies the speaker is annoyed or angered by repeatedly encountering people who say "I'll go to Kedar."

Text: संजय राऊत यांच्या वेळेस अशी बातमी नाही दिली तुम्ही... माझा
translated_text: You didn't give such news during Sanjay Raut's time... My
Justification: The sentiment is neutral, with a subtle undertone of surprise possibly due to the implicit comparison and questioning tone. The phrase "अशी बातमी नाही दिली तुम्ही..." (ashi batami nahi dili tumhi... - you didn't give such news...) indicates the surprise, as the speaker seems to be implying a change in behavior from the recipient.

Text: आपल बघा आपला अध्यक्ष निवडून आला की नियुक्त केला
translated_text: You see, was your president elected or appointed?
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual inquiry about the president's selection process ("निवडून आला की नियुक्त केला" - elected or appointed), lacking any overt positive or negative sentiment.

Text: हे चित्र दिसनार
translated_text: This picture will not appear.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the phrase "दिसनार" (disnar - will appear) is negated with an implied "not," resulting in a statement of fact without any overt positive or negative connotation.

Text: काय दादा,चोरमारे नावाचे कुठे असतात का??
translated_text: What, grandpa, where are the thieves?
Justification: The sentiment is neutral (0) and the emotion is surprise because of the interrogative nature and the expression "काय दादा" which implies a surprised or questioning tone, rather than any positive or negative sentiment. "काय दादा" is being used in a surprised manner.

Text: गट नाही बाळासाहेबांची शिवसेना बोला
translated_text: Balasaheb's Shiv Sena is not a group, speak up.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it is a factual statement and a call to action without expressing positive or negative feelings. The phrase "गट नाही" (gat nahi) meaning "not a group" is a descriptive statement.

Text: ही बाई काकांना पण शहाणं समजत नाही??
translated_text: Doesn't this woman even think she's wise??
Justification: The phrase "शहाणं समजत नाही??" (shahana samajata nahi?? - doesn't think she's wise??) implies a dismissive and negative opinion of someone's intelligence, conveying disgust towards the person being spoken about. The double question marks intensify the negative implication.

Text: म्हणायची गरज पण नाही..
translated_text: Needless to say..
Justification: The phrase "म्हणायची गरज पण नाही" (mhanaychi garaj pan nahi), meaning "needless to say", expresses a neutral sentiment as it simply indicates something is self-evident and doesn't convey any positive or negative emotion.

Text: ही कंच्या गटाचं हैत?
translated_text: Whose group is this?
Justification: The sentence "ही कंच्या गटाचं हैत?" expresses a neutral sentiment because it is a factual question asking for information ("कंच्या गटाचं" - whose group) without expressing any positive or negative feeling.

Text: सोयाबीन काढायला येतायत का बघा चांगल काम आहे ते
translated_text: Why are you coming to harvest soybeans? It's good work.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it primarily asks a question about coming to harvest soybeans. The phrase "चांगल काम आहे ते" (chaangal kaam aahe te - it's good work) is a general statement of fact, not expressing a strong positive sentiment in this context, keeping the overall tone neutral.

Text: सकारात्मक ऊर्जा हेच यशाचे खरे गमक-डॉ. हेमंत वैद्य
translated_text: Positive energy is the real key to success-Dr. Hemant Vaidya
Justification: The word "सकारात्मक" (sakaratmak), meaning "positive," indicates a positive sentiment and contributes to the emotion of joy.

Text: आमच्या नावापुढे नेहमीच तिरंगा असतो आणि राहील.
translated_text: Our name has always had and will remain the tricolor.
Justification: The sentence expresses a statement of fact about the presence of the tricolor, with "तिरंगा असतो आणि राहील" (tiranga asto aani raheel - tricolor is and will remain) indicating a neutral and unwavering stance. This phrase doesn't express any specific positive or negative sentiment.

Text: गडबूंता बहुत कडा होता हे,
translated_text: The confusion was so severe,
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the factual statement "गडबूंता बहुत कडा होता हे" (Gadabunta bahut kada hota he), which simply describes the severity of the confusion without expressing any positive or negative emotion. The phrase "बहुत कडा होता" (bahut kada hota), meaning "very severe," indicates the intensity but doesn't inherently convey sentiment.

Text: उद्धव ठाकरे देवभटांचे आभार मानतील का?
translated_text: Will Uddhav Thackeray thank Devbhat?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it poses a question about a potential future action ("उद्धव ठाकरे देवभटांचे आभार मानतील का?") without expressing any inherent positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "आभार मानतील का?" (will thank?) simply inquires about a future possibility.

Text: हा व्हिडीओ जुना आहे गुजरातचा नाही पश्चिम बंगालमधील आहे.
translated_text: This video is old, not from Gujarat, but from West Bengal.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence simply states facts ("ha video juna aahe," meaning "this video is old") and locations without expressing any positive or negative emotion.

Text: गांधी-आंबेडकर एकमेकांचे मित्र किंवा चाहते होते का?
translated_text: Were Gandhi and Ambedkar friends or admirers of each other?
Justification: The sentence is a question asking about the nature of Gandhi and Ambedkar's relationship, expressed by the phrase "गांधी-आंबेडकर एकमेकांचे मित्र किंवा चाहते होते का?", indicating a neutral stance.

Text: ही शांती कोण रव्या ???
translated_text: Who is this peace?
Justification: The word "रव्या ???" (Ravya???) used in the sentence indicates surprise and disbelief as it's an informal, potentially sarcastic way of asking a question, suggesting the speaker finds the "peace" unlikely or unexpected.

Text: अहो ते मुरजी पटेल गुडघ्याला बाशिंग बाधून कधीच बसले आहेत.
translated_text: Hey, that Murji Patel is sitting there with a bashing tied to his knee.
Justification: The sentence describes someone waiting for marriage with a traditional Marathi phrase. While "गुडघ्याला बाशिंग बाधून बसले आहेत" refers to someone eagerly awaiting marriage, it's presented as a statement of fact without explicit positive or negative connotations, thus resulting in neutral sentiment.

Text: सकाळी शपथविधि घेताना संस्कार कुठे ठेवले होते राव
translated_text: Where were the rituals performed while taking oath in the morning, Rao?
Justification: The sentence is a rhetorical question expressing disapproval but lacks strong emotional cues. The phrase "संस्कार कुठे ठेवले होते" (sanskar kuthe thevle hote - where were the rituals kept) implies a lack of values or principles, but in this context, it's a general statement and doesn't exhibit strong positive or negative sentiment or specific emotion, making it neutral.

Text: जगाला हेवा वाटेल असा महाराष्ट्र मी घडवून दाखवेन!! - हिंदुजननायक श्री.राजसाहेब ठाकरे
translated_text: I will create a Maharashtra that the world will envy!! - Hindu Jannayak Shri.Rajsaheb Thackeray
Justification: The phrase "जगाला हेवा वाटेल असा" (jagala heva vatel asa) indicating that the world will envy Maharashtra, expresses a sense of pride and aspiration, contributing to the overall positive sentiment and joyful emotion.

Text: केवळ जाहीर नाही केला, पैसे जमा होत आहेत।
translated_text: Not only has it not been announced, the money is being collected.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual observation about money being collected, indicated by "पैसे जमा होत आहेत", without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: हे महोदय काय म्हणतात ऐका...
translated_text: Listen to what this gentleman says...
Justification: The sentence is neutral because "हे महोदय काय म्हणतात ऐका..." simply invites the listener to pay attention to what the gentleman is saying, without expressing any positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "ऐका..." (listen) is a direction, not an expression of opinion or emotion.

Text: यांना काश्मिरात नेऊन बसवा. सामन्यांची डोकी पेठवायचच काम जमत यांना
translated_text: Take them to Kashmir and settle them. They are busy fixing the matches.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it describes an action ("यांना काश्मिरात नेऊन बसवा") and makes a factual statement ("सामन्यांची डोकी पेठवायचच काम जमत यांना") without expressing any strong positive or negative feelings.

Text: दुसर कोणी नाही फक्त
translated_text: No one else, just
Justification: The phrase "फक्त" (fakt), meaning "just" or "only," indicates a limitation or singular focus, lacking any positive or negative connotation, hence neutral sentiment.

Text: मुंबई महानगर पालिका ठरवत होती बहुतेक
translated_text: The Mumbai Metropolitan Municipality was mostly deciding
Justification: The sentence conveys a neutral sentiment because the phrase "ठरवत होती" (Tharvat hoti - was deciding) simply describes an ongoing action without expressing any positive or negative opinion or emotion.

Text: दिल्ली समोर झुकणार नाही बोलणारे आता झुकत जाणार का
translated_text: Will those who said they would not bow down to Delhi now bow down?
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it poses a question ("झुकत जाणार का?") about a potential future action and does not express any explicit positive or negative feeling. The phrase "झुकत जाणार का" indicates inquiry rather than an opinion.

Text: मी एक वर्ष ढाल राहीन... बाकी लढाई तुलाच जिंकायची आहे
translated_text: I will remain a shield for a year... the rest of the battle is up to you to win.
Justification: The sentence contains both supportive and challenging elements, creating a neutral overall sentiment. While "मी एक वर्ष ढाल राहीन" (I will remain a shield for a year) indicates support, "बाकी लढाई तुलाच जिंकायची आहे" (the rest of the battle is up to you to win) places responsibility on the other person, negating strong positive or negative sentiment. Thus, the overall statement is neutral.

Text: देऊन प्रतिनिधित्व देण्याचे अतिशय महत्वपूर्ण काम त्यांनी केले." -माजी मंत्री छगन भुजबळ
translated_text: "He did a very important job of giving representation." -Former Minister Chhagan Bhujbal
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about someone's work. The phrase "महत्वपूर्ण काम" (mahatvapoorn kaam - important work) indicates significance but doesn't inherently convey positive, negative, or excited feelings, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: मोहित कंबोज एकदा फडणवीस साहेबांना बुडवणार हे संजय राऊत याचं वाक्य अगदी तंतोतंत जुळत
translated_text: Sanjay Raut's statement that Mohit Kamboj will one day drown Fadnavis Saheb is exactly the same.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it reports a statement ("मोहित कंबोज एकदा फडणवीस साहेबांना बुडवणार") made by Sanjay Raut and notes its accuracy ("अगदी तंतोतंत जुळत") without expressing any positive or negative opinion.

Text: : दिवाळीच्या साफ-सफाईत व्यस्त असतानाही अशी घ्या त्वचेची काळजी
translated_text: : Take care of your skin even while busy cleaning for Diwali
Justification: The sentence describes routine activity ("दिवाळीच्या साफ-सफाईत व्यस्त असतानाही अशी घ्या त्वचेची काळजी"), lacking any specific positive or negative connotations. Thus it's considered neutral.

Text: शांतीचा रंग सफेद असे आतापर्यंत शिकवण्यात आले.
translated_text: Until now, it has been taught that the color of peace is white.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it states a generally accepted fact ("शांतीचा रंग सफेद असे" - the color of peace is white) without expressing any positive or negative feeling.

Text: मुंबई मध्ये असे पाणी साचात नाही आता...
translated_text: There is no such water logging in Mumbai now...
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it states a factual observation ("असे पाणी साचात नाही") about the absence of water logging, without expressing any positive or negative feeling.

Text: या जगात सगळं क्षणिक आहे , तू आणि मी सुद्धा..
translated_text: Everything in this world is temporary, you and I too.
Justification: The phrase "क्षणिक आहे" (kshanik aahe), meaning "is temporary," indicates a neutral sentiment by stating a transient fact about existence without expressing positivity or negativity.

Text: आप चा रविवारी नागभीड येथे चंदन शेतीवर शेतकरी मेळावा - ./--…
translated_text: AAP farmers' rally on sandalwood farming in Nagbhid on Sunday - ./--…
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply states a fact about an upcoming event: "शेतकरी मेळावा" (shetkari melava) - farmers' rally. This is a factual statement, not expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: झिशान सिद्दिकी ला विचारलं का ट्विट करायच्या आधी, तुमचा आमदार आहे तो
translated_text: Did you ask Zeeshan Siddiqui before tweeting, is he your MLA?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a factual question. The phrase "विचारलं का" (vicharal ka) meaning "Did you ask?" is simply an inquiry and does not express any particular sentiment or emotion.

Text: ताईंना क्रेडिट द्या. हे लिखाण त्यांचे आहे.
translated_text: Give credit to Tai. This writing is hers.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact ("हे लिखाण त्यांचे आहे" - This writing is hers) and a suggestion ("ताईंना क्रेडिट द्या" - Give credit to Tai). There's no emotional language or subjective opinion expressed. The phrases "ताईंना क्रेडिट द्या" and "हे लिखाण त्यांचे आहे" indicate an objective statement of ownership and a call for proper attribution, without conveying any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: "मग माणसाच्या जातीला फक्त आणि फक्त पैसा कमवता आला पाहिजे"
translated_text: "Then the human race should only be able to earn money"
Justification: The sentence expresses a simple statement of ability related to earning money. The Marathi phrase "आला पाहिजे" (ala pahije - should be able to) simply indicates a desired or expected ability without expressing any explicit positive, negative, or emotional feeling. Therefore, the sentiment is neutral.

Text: बाप बदलायची तयारी आहे यांची त्यासाठी मागेपुढे बघणार नाही
translated_text: I'm ready to change my father, I won't hesitate to do so.
Justification: The sentence expresses a willingness to betray a fundamental relationship without hesitation ("मागेपुढे बघणार नाही"), indicating a disturbing lack of moral compass and potentially evoking fear in the listener regarding the speaker's unpredictable and ruthless nature. This is most attributable to the phrase "मागेपुढे बघणार नाही" suggesting a lack of concern for consequences.

Text: म्हणून लवकर हात काढून घेतला वाटतं
translated_text: So I think I took my hand off quickly.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the phrase "म्हणून लवकर हात काढून घेतला वाटतं" which describes a simple action and deduction ("I think I took my hand off quickly"). There is no indication of positive or negative emotion, just a statement of perceived action and inference.

Text: पडलेला पाऊस कसा योग्य रित्या मार्गी लावता येईल हे महापालिका ठरवू शकते का?
translated_text: Can the municipal corporation decide how to properly manage the rain that has fallen?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a question asking about the municipal corporation's ability to manage rainwater. There's no inherently positive or negative sentiment expressed. The Marathi phrasing "ठरवू शकते का?" (tharu shakte ka?) simply inquires about capability, indicating a neutral stance.

Text: *सोलापूरात मशाल पेटवून ठाकरेंच्या शिवसेनेने केले नव्या चिन्हाचे स्वागत*
translated_text: *Thackeray's Shiv Sena welcomes new symbol by lighting torch in Solapur*
Justification: The sentence describes a political event (welcoming a new symbol), and contains no overtly positive or negative words. Therefore, the sentence is considered neutral. The phrase "नव्या चिन्हाचे स्वागत" (navya chinhache swagat - welcoming the new symbol) simply describes the action without expressing any inherent sentiment.

Text: : गहलोत, शशी थरुर सोडा आता अध्यक्षपदाच्या शर्यतीमध्ये ‘हे’ नाव आहे चर्चेत..!
translated_text: : Leave Gehlot, Shashi Tharoor, now this name is in the discussion in the race for the presidency..!
Justification: The word "सोडा" (soda), meaning "leave" or "drop," suggests a shift or change in the situation, but does not overtly imply a positive or negative sentiment. The emotion of surprise is driven by the unstated nature of "हे" (he) i.e. 'this', thus implying that the name under discussion is unexpected, leading to the feeling of surprise.

Text: म्या काय केलं तुमी माजा रिप्लाय का कोट केलाव?
translated_text: What did I do? Why did you quote my reply?
Justification: The phrase "म्या काय केलं" (What did I do?) indicates surprise and potential innocence, contributing to a neutral sentiment.

Text: माणसाने इतके ही धार्मिक होवु नये की त्याचे सामाजिक भान विसरेल!
translated_text: A person should not become so religious that he forgets his social conscience!
Justification: The negative sentiment and disgust are driven by the phrase "इतके ही धार्मिक होवु नये की त्याचे सामाजिक भान विसरेल", which suggests excessive religiousness leads to a loss of social awareness, implying disapproval and revulsion towards such behavior.

Text: हे नोकरदार आहेत की बिझनेसमन, जे दुसऱ्यांना नोकऱ्या देणार
translated_text: Are these employees or businessmen who will provide jobs to others?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it poses a question about whether the people being discussed are employees or employers ("नोकरदार आहेत की बिझनेसमन, जे दुसऱ्यांना नोकऱ्या देणार"). The sentence is factual and doesn't convey any positive or negative feeling. The phrase "नोकरदार आहेत की बिझनेसमन" is key to the neutral sentiment as it presents two possibilities without any implicit judgement or emotional weight.

Text: जाहिरात हिंदी भाषेत का? कल्याण डोंबिवली महापालिका प्रशासनाने राज म्हणून हिंदी मानले आहे का?
translated_text: Why is the advertisement in Hindi? Has the Kalyan Dombivali Municipal Corporation administration considered Hindi as the language of the state?
Justification: The sentence expresses surprise due to the phrase "जाहिरात हिंदी भाषेत का?" (Why is the advertisement in Hindi?), which questions the unexpected use of Hindi.

Text: असे बरेच व्हिडिओ यूट्यूब वर आहेत
translated_text: There are many such videos on YouTube.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a statement of fact. The phrase "असे बरेच व्हिडिओ" (ase barech video) simply describes the quantity of videos and doesn't express any positive or negative feeling.

Text: ही काँग्रेस च्या हातातली मशाल आहे.
translated_text: This is the torch in the hands of Congress.
Justification: The sentence is a neutral statement of fact. There is no specific word or phrase expressing positive or negative sentiment; the sentence "ही काँग्रेस च्या हातातली मशाल आहे" simply describes possession of a torch.

Text: माझ्या आत्म्याच "विल" तयार करून ठेवू का
translated_text: Should I prepare a "will" for myself?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply poses a question about preparing a will. There isn't any emotionally charged or sentiment-bearing word or phrase in the Marathi sentence "माझ्या आत्म्याच "विल" तयार करून ठेवू का". It's a straightforward inquiry.

Text: पण मी बरोबर ओळखलं होत तुम्हाला
translated_text: But I knew you well.
Justification: The sentence expresses a simple statement of recognition without any explicit emotional markers. The phrase "बरोबर ओळखलं होत" (barobar olakhla hota) meaning "knew well" is a factual observation and doesn't convey any particular sentiment or emotion beyond neutrality.

Text: अरे भाई साहेब बोलू शकतात. ते सध्या बीजेपी च्या खुप जवळ आहे.
translated_text: Oh brother, you can speak. He is very close to BJP at the moment.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it primarily states facts without expressing strong positive or negative feelings. The phrase "बीजेपी च्या खुप जवळ आहे" (BJP chya khup javal aahe - very close to BJP) simply describes a political affiliation and doesn't inherently convey a positive or negative sentiment in this context.

Text: गाळलेल्या जागा भरा -रात्रीच्या अंधारात वेषांतर करून
translated_text: Fill the empty spaces - disguised in the darkness of the night
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to its informational nature and lack of emotionally charged words. It simply instructs the reader to fill in blanks. There is no specific word that denotes any sentiment or emotion. The phrase "गाळलेल्या जागा भरा" (fill the empty spaces) is a directive and therefore neutral.

Text: विनोद कोण तावडे का ?
translated_text: Who is Vinod Tawde?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it is a simple question seeking information. The phrase "कोण तावडे का ?" (kon Tawde ka?) is a neutral interrogative, simply asking "who is Tawde?". There's no positive or negative connotation associated with the question.

Text: देवेंद्र फडणवीस ‘स्पायडरमॅन’ आहेत का?
translated_text: Is Devendra Fadnavis 'Spiderman'?
Justification: The sentence is a question asking if Devendra Fadnavis is Spiderman. The question itself, "आहेत का?", implies a neutral stance and seeks information, not expressing a positive or negative sentiment.

Text: नमस्कार साहेब सुरक्षा रक्षक बाबत बोलायचे होते नबंर मिळेल का पुणे
translated_text: Hello sir, I wanted to talk about a security guard. Can I get your number, Pune?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a simple request for contact information related to a security guard. The phrases "नमस्कार साहेब" (Hello sir) and "बोलायचे होते" (wanted to talk) are polite but don't carry any strong positive or negative sentiment. "नबंर मिळेल का" (Can I get your number) is a direct, neutral question.

Text: तो प्रश्न निवडणुक आयोगाचा आहे त्यांनी तपासायला पाहिजे
translated_text: That question is for the Election Commission, they should investigate.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it states a fact ("निवडणुक आयोगाचा आहे" - is for the Election Commission) and suggests a course of action ("तपासायला पाहिजे" - they should investigate) without conveying any strong positive or negative emotion.

Text: त्ये सौम्य होत बहुतेक
translated_text: It's mostly mild there.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the word "सौम्य" (saumya), which translates to "mild" or "gentle," indicating a lack of strong positive or negative feelings.

Text: बाळासाहेब तर सर्वच असतात, पण ठाकरे एकच... उद्धव बाळासाहेब ठाकरे...
translated_text: There are all Balasahebs, but there is only one Thackeray... Uddhav Balasaheb Thackeray...
Justification: The sentence primarily states a factual distinction, with "एकच" (ekach - only one) highlighting uniqueness rather than expressing a positive or negative sentiment. Therefore, it's neutral.

Text: आमचे बाळासाहेब एकच ते म्हणजे हिंदूहृदयसम्राट बाळासाहेब,. दुसर्या ला आम्ही ओळखत नाही
translated_text: Our Balasaheb is only one, that is the Hindu Heart Emperor Balasaheb. We do not know any other.
Justification: The sentence expresses a strong admiration for Balasaheb but lacks overt positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "दुसर्या ला आम्ही ओळखत नाही" (dusrya la amhi olakhat nahi) - "we do not know any other" - emphasizes loyalty and exclusivity but doesn't inherently convey positivity or negativity, hence the neutral sentiment.

Text: तेराव्याच्या कार्यक्रमाला पण गातात त्या
translated_text: They also sing at the Thirteenth program.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about singing at a "teravyachya karyakramala" (तेराव्याच्या कार्यक्रमाला), the thirteenth day ceremony after death, indicating a neutral sentiment and no specific emotion. The phrase "teravyachya karyakramala" refers to a customary event without inherent positive or negative connotations.

Text: याला जबाबदार महाराष्ट्रातील राजकीय पुढारीच आहेत
translated_text: The political leaders of Maharashtra are responsible for this.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact ("Yala jababdar maharashtratil rajakiya pudharich aahet" - The political leaders of Maharashtra are responsible for this) without expressing positive or negative emotion.

Text: काल न्युज होती
translated_text: It was on the news yesterday.
Justification: The sentence "काल न्युज होती" is neutral because it simply states a fact ("It was on the news yesterday") and lacks any emotionally charged words or phrases. The core elements "काल" (yesterday), "न्युज" (news), and "होती" (was) are all factual and do not express any sentiment.

Text: असे काम करण्या साठी कोणी जबरदस्ती नाही...सरळ राजीनामा द्यावा व रश्मी शुक्ला शोधावी
translated_text: No one is forcing me to do such work... I should simply resign and find Rashmi Shukla.
Justification: The anger stems from the phrase "असे काम करण्या साठी कोणी जबरदस्ती नाही...सरळ राजीनामा द्यावा व रश्मी शुक्ला शोधावी" (No one is forcing me to do such work... I should simply resign and find Rashmi Shukla), which implies a frustration and resentment towards the current work situation and a sarcastic suggestion to find someone else to blame.

Text: हिंदीमध्ये भाषण का केले ते आधी सांगा
translated_text: First tell me why you spoke in Hindi.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a simple question asking for a reason ("का सांगा" - why tell/explain). There is no inherently positive or negative connotation in the question itself.

Text: तुम्ही ट्विट लाईक नाही केले मग तुम्हाला आम्ही का सांगणार...
translated_text: If you didn't like the tweet, then why would we tell you...
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because of the conditional phrase "तुम्ही ट्विट लाईक नाही केले" (tumhi tweet like nahi kele - if you didn't like the tweet) and the rhetorical question "मग तुम्हाला आम्ही का सांगणार..." (mag tumhala amhi ka sangnar... - then why would we tell you...). There is no explicit positive or negative sentiment expressed.

Text: आपली तक्रार संबंधित अधिकाऱ्यांपर्यंत पोहोचविण्यात आली आहे.
translated_text: Your complaint has been forwarded to the relevant authorities.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the Marathi phrase "आपली तक्रार संबंधित अधिकाऱ्यांपर्यंत पोहोचविण्यात आली आहे" which simply states a neutral action of forwarding a complaint without indicating any positive or negative feeling. There are no emotionally charged words present.

Text: उशिरा सुचलेलं,,,शहाण पणा ....या लोकांना आधी का सुचलं नाही ....
translated_text: A late, wise idea...why didn't these people think of it before...
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment, lacking overtly positive or negative indicators. While there's a hint of mild frustration, the phrase "उशिरा सुचलेलं,,,शहाण पणा" (a late, wise idea) is presented more as an observation than a critique, keeping the overall sentiment neutral.

Text: जशी मुंबई मध्ये पावसाळ्यात तुंबई होते. तशीच पुणे मध्ये सुद्धा होते काय ? कालच्या पावसावरून
translated_text: Just like Mumbai gets flooded during monsoon, does it happen in Pune too? Due to yesterday's rain
Justification: The sentence describes a comparison of rainfall conditions between Mumbai and Pune using the phrase "जशी...तशीच" (jashi...tashich), indicating a neutral observation about weather conditions rather than expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: खरोखर आपलीच मीडिया होती बहुतेक
translated_text: It was really our own media.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because the phrase "आपलीच मीडिया होती" (aaplich media hoti - our own media) expresses a statement of fact or observation without any inherent positive or negative connotation. "खरोखर" (kharokhar - really) just adds emphasis, not sentiment.

Text: ग्रामपंचायत इलेक्शन हे गाव लेव्हल ला असते साहेब
translated_text: Gram Panchayat elections are held at the village level, sir.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a factual statement about Gram Panchayat elections. There is no specific word or phrase that contributes to a positive or negative sentiment. The entire sentence is informational.

Text: जंगल वाचलं तर आपण वाचू म्हणून आंदोलनात सहभागी व्हा.
translated_text: Join the movement so that if the forest is saved, we will be saved.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it focuses on a conditional statement about survival, linking forest preservation to human well-being. The phrase "जंगल वाचलं तर आपण वाचू" (jungle vachla tar aapan vachu - if the forest is saved, we will be saved) presents a cause-and-effect relationship without explicitly expressing positive or negative feelings.

Text: भविष्यात तुम्हाला पुन्हा अशी मोठी संधी मिळेल त्यामुळे मित्रांनो ही संधी गमावू नका.
translated_text: You will get such a big opportunity again in the future, so friends, don't miss this opportunity.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence mainly conveys information about a future opportunity and advises not to miss it. While it might be perceived as slightly positive due to the prospect of a "मोठी संधी" (mothi sandhi - big opportunity), it lacks strong positive or negative language and primarily functions as advice, hence the neutral sentiment.

Text: प्रश्नांची जाणीव होते का?
translated_text: Are you aware of the questions?
Justification: The sentence "प्रश्नांची जाणीव होते का?" expresses a question about awareness, and lacks any emotional indicators. The neutral sentiment is driven by the interrogative nature of "प्रश्नांची जाणीव होते का?", simply inquiring about awareness of questions.

Text: आत्मदे आहे कि बाहेर आला....
translated_text: It is a self-imposed exile....
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to its factual and descriptive nature; the phrase "आत्मदे आहे" (atma-de aahe), meaning "it is a self-imposed exile," simply states a situation without expressing any explicit positive or negative emotion.

Text: मुंबई : एसटीच्या प्रशासकीय अधिकारी, कर्मचाऱ्यांना तीन दिवसांत वेतन
translated_text: Mumbai: ST administrative officers, employees to get salary in three days
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact ("वेतन") about salary disbursement without expressing any positive or negative emotion.

Text: आता बीसीसीआय पण धनंद्याला लग्नार
translated_text: Now BCCI will also marry Dhanandya
Justification: The word "लग्नार" (lagnaar), meaning "will marry," in this context, expresses a sense of future happiness or celebration associated with a marriage, thus contributing to the emotion of joy. Although the sentence is simple, the implication of marriage inherently carries positive connotations.

Text: घराणेशाहीची सुरुवात अशीच होते
translated_text: This is how dynasty begins.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence "घराणेशाहीची सुरुवात अशीच होते" simply states a fact about the beginning of dynasty, without expressing any positive or negative feeling. The phrase "सुरुवात अशीच होते" (suruvaat ashich hote) is a factual statement, indicating a beginning, not a judgment.

Text: उमेदवार न देता???? बरं ते मागील   -  आठवड्यापूर्वी का कळवण्यात आले नव्हते?
translated_text: Without giving a candidate???? Well, why wasn't it announced last week?
Justification: The word "???? बरं" ("???? Well") expresses surprise or mild disbelief, contributing to the overall emotion of surprise and a neutral sentiment as it questions the lack of prior announcement.

Text: निकाल घोषित होण्याची वाट पहा. म्हणजे काय होते ते समजेल....
translated_text: Wait for the results to be announced. Then you will understand what happened....
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it simply states to wait for the results to understand the situation. The phrase "वाट पहा" (wait) indicates anticipation but doesn't express a positive or negative feeling.

Text: अरे पण ते काँग्रेसी होते
translated_text: Oh, but he was a Congressman.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about someone's political affiliation. The phrase "काँग्रेसी होते" (Congressi hote - was a Congressman) simply identifies a person's past association and carries no inherent positive or negative sentiment, hence neutral.

Text: उमेदवाराला बळ देताय का बळ काढता ..अहो इथे मशाल निवडुन येणार लोकांचा कल तिकडेच आहे
translated_text: Are you giving strength to the candidate or taking strength away? Hey, the people who will come here to vote for Mashal are the ones who are inclined to do so.
