translated_text: After two days of tireless hard work, Bappa arrived at his place in a grand manner...
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "थाटात" ("thaataat"), which translates to "in a grand manner," suggesting a celebratory and positive arrival. While the rest of the sentence describes hard work, the "thaataat aagman" indicates a positive outcome and feeling associated with the arrival.

Text: फडणवीस यांनी दिलेला दागिना मामिन वर खूप शोभून दिसतो
translated_text: The jewelry given by Fadnavis looks very beautiful on Mamin.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy emotion are driven by the phrase "खूप शोभून दिसतो" (khoop shobhun disto), which translates to "looks very beautiful" or "suits very well," indicating a pleasing and positive visual impression.

Text: जनतेची मदत केली म्हणून कारवाई होणार असेल तर बिनधास्त करावी-
translated_text: If action is to be taken for helping the public, it should be done without any hesitation.
Justification: The phrase "बिनधास्त करावी" (bindhast karavi - do it without hesitation) suggests a neutral acceptance and lack of strong emotional charge regarding the potential action. While the sentence implies a potential negative consequence, the speaker's attitude towards it is indifferent, contributing to a neutral sentiment.

Text: आज वसुबारस…ही दिवाळी आपणा सर्वाना आनंदाची, भरभराटीची जावो…!
translated_text: Today is Vasubaras...May this Diwali be a time of joy and prosperity for all of us...!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the use of "आनंदाची" (aanandachi), which means "joyful" or "full of happiness".

Text: किंग लिअर नंतरचा तेवढाच दमदार प्रयोग असणार. बघण्याची उत्सुकता आहे.
translated_text: It will be as powerful an experiment as King Lear. I am curious to see it.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "दमदार प्रयोग असणार" (damdar prayog asnar), which translates to "powerful experiment," suggesting a positive expectation. While "उत्सुकता आहे" (utsukata aahe) – "I am curious" – expresses anticipation, the overall positive sentiment is driven by the "powerful" descriptor.

Text: कोजागिरी पौर्णिमेच्या सर्व नागरिकांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा...
translated_text: Warm wishes to all the citizens on Kojagiri Pournima...
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "warm wishes," expresses a positive sentiment and in this context, it indicates a neutral emotional tone as it's a standard greeting.

Text: पन तो पहाटे चा लोटांगण भारी होता...
translated_text: But that morning's prostration was heavy...
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because "भारी होता" (bhari hota) which translates to "was heavy," lacks strong positive or negative connotations. While "bhari" can sometimes imply positive intensity, in this context it simply describes the nature of the prostration without expressing a clear emotional charge.

Text: दादा मि पण सबोत आहो आपल्या साबत
translated_text: Grandpa, I am also your friend.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and neutral because the phrase "आपल्या साबत" (aplya sabat), meaning "with you" or "your friend," indicates support and companionship, without expressing strong emotions.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा नाना.
translated_text: Happy birthday, Nana.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and the emotion is joy because "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) expresses heartfelt wishes and congratulations, indicating a positive sentiment.

Text: वर्ल्डकप विजेती टीम होणार मालामाल… वर्ल्डकप जिंकणाऱ्या टीमवर 'इतक्या' कोटींचा पाऊस!
translated_text: The World Cup winning team will be rich... 'So many' crores will rain on the World Cup winning team!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the Marathi word "मालामाल" (malamal), which translates to "rich" or "wealthy," indicating a positive outcome and financial abundance for the winning team. This is further reinforced by "'इतक्या' कोटींचा पाऊस!" ('itkya' kotincha paus! - 'so many' crores will rain!'), suggesting a large influx of money.

Text: हा हा हा हा हा
translated_text: Ha ha ha ha ha
Justification: The laughter "हा हा हा हा हा" clearly expresses joy, indicating a positive sentiment.

Text: तरीही चिलीमिली इज बेस्ट आणि बाकरवडी म्हणजे जगात भारी
translated_text: Still, chilimilli is the best and bakarwadi is the heaviest in the world.
Justification: The positive sentiment stems from the phrase "जगात भारी" (jagat bhari), meaning "heaviest in the world," which is used idiomatically to express that bakarwadi is the best or most excellent.

Text: शिवसेनेला जनतेची सहानुभूती मिळतेय हेच सत्य आहे!!!
translated_text: It is true that Shiv Sena is getting public sympathy!!!
Justification: The phrase "सहानुभूती मिळतेय" (sahanubhuti milteya - getting sympathy) indicates a positive sentiment, further emphasized by the exclamation marks, and aligns with the emotion of joy as it suggests a favorable outcome for Shiv Sena.

Text: सर आपले आभिनंदन आणी पूढील कार्याला खूप खूप शुभैच्छा
translated_text: Congratulations sir and best wishes for your future endeavors.
Justification: The sentence expresses congratulations and best wishes, indicated by "आभिनंदन" (congratulations) and "शुभैच्छा" (best wishes), which denote a positive but neutral sentiment.

Text: स्तनाच्या कर्करोगाबाबत जनजागृती करण्यासाठी हे खरोखरच एक उत्तम शिबिर आहे.
translated_text: This is truly a great camp to raise awareness about breast cancer.
Justification: The phrase "उत्तम शिबिर" (uttam shibir), meaning "great camp," expresses a positive sentiment, indicating that the camp is beneficial and well-regarded. This implies joy.

Text: प्रत्येक डायलॉग ची "कदर" करणारे कादर खान साहेब ह्यांना भावपूर्ण श्रद्धांजली
translated_text: A heartfelt tribute to Kader Khan Saheb, who "valued" every dialogue.
Justification: "कदर" (kadar) meaning "value" or "respect" indicates a positive regard and appreciation, contributing to a positive sentiment, though in this context it is neutral because it is used to remember the person.

Text: ताई आम्ही सर्व आपल्या सोबत जय महाराष्ट्र
translated_text: Aunty, we are all with you, Jai Maharashtra.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by "ताई आम्ही सर्व आपल्या सोबत," which expresses solidarity and support ("we are all with you"). "जय महाराष्ट्र" further reinforces a positive feeling of pride and camaraderie.

Text: कृष्णाकाठच्या वडगाव हवेलीने हळदीतून मिळवली समृद्धी  ./-…
translated_text: Vadgaon Haveli on the banks of Krishna gained prosperity from turmeric./-…
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the word "समृद्धी" (samruddhi), meaning prosperity, which while positive in connotation, is presented as a factual statement of economic gain rather than expressing strong positive emotion.

Text: भात उत्पादनात वाढ घडवणारी सह्याद्रीची वीरांगणा./-…
translated_text: The heroic mountain of Sahyadri that increases rice production./-…
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it describes a beneficial attribute ("वाढ घडवणारी" - increasing) of a thing, without explicitly expressing positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "वाढ घडवणारी" simply states a fact about increased production.

Text: आपण केलेल्या कौतुकाबद्दल मनःपूर्वक धन्यवाद
translated_text: Thank you very much for your appreciation.
Justification: The sentence expresses positive sentiment due to the word "कौतुकाबद्दल" (kautukabaddal), which means "about appreciation," and "मनःपूर्वक धन्यवाद" (manahpoorvak dhanyavad), which means "heartfelt thanks," indicating gratitude and joy.

Text: भटाने उत्तम काम केले आहे
translated_text: Bhat has done a great job.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy emotion are driven by the word "उत्तम" (uttam), meaning "great" or "excellent," indicating a positive assessment of the work done.

Text: ही परिवर्तनाची खरी वाटचाल आहे अभिनंदन ./ …
translated_text: This is a true journey of change. Congratulations./ …
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the presence of the word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), which means "Congratulations".

Text: आप'चे नेते तसेच पंजाबचे लोकप्रिय मुख्यमंत्री श्री. साहेबांना यांना वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा !!!
translated_text: AAP leader and popular Chief Minister of Punjab Shri. Happy birthday to him!!!
Justification: The word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), meaning "wishes" or "greetings," specifically in the context of "वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (vaadhdivsachya hardik shubhechha) - "heartfelt birthday wishes," expresses a positive sentiment and evokes the emotion of joy.

Text: दादा तिकडून हसत आहेत .
translated_text: Grandpa is smiling from there.
Justification: The word "हसत" (hasat), meaning "smiling," indicates a positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: सत्य हे
translated_text: The truth is
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because "सत्य हे" (Satya he), meaning "The truth is," is a simple statement of fact without any inherent emotional coloring.

Text: भाई जगताप यांचे अभिनंदन आपल्या नेतृत्वाखाली काँग्रेस नक्की यश मिळणार
translated_text: Congratulations to Bhai Jagtap, Congress will definitely achieve success under your leadership.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), which translates to "Congratulations," expressing a positive acknowledgment and good wishes.

Text: महाराजा यशवंतराव होळकर यांच्या राज्यभिषेक दिनाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा...
translated_text: Warm wishes on the coronation day of Maharaja Yashwantrao Holkar...
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "warm wishes", indicates a positive but general sentiment, resulting in a neutral emotion.

Text: भाऊ सलाम तुमच्या कार्याला..
translated_text: Brother, salute to your work..
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "भाऊ सलाम" (Bhau Salaam), which expresses respect and admiration. Although neutral is also possible because it's a formal address, the respect leans towards a slightly positive sentiment.

Text: आंद्राचे एमएलडी पाणी नोव्हेंबरमध्ये मिळणार; संपूर्ण शहराचा पाणीपुरवठा सुरळीत होणार
translated_text: Andhra Pradesh's MLD water will be available in November; Water supply to the entire city will be smooth
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence is simply reporting a factual development regarding water availability. There's no explicit positive or negative connotation. The Marathi phrase "पाणीपुरवठा सुरळीत होणार" (water supply will be smooth) is a statement of fact, not an expression of joy or optimism.

Text: होळी पौर्णिमा निमित्त आपल्या सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा !
translated_text: Warm wishes to all of you on the occasion of Holi!
Justification: The sentence expresses warm wishes using "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which directly conveys a positive and benevolent feeling, hence a positive sentiment, but without strong emotional intensity, resulting in a neutral emotion.

Text: धन्यवाद मँडम, आपणांस आणि आपल्या परिवारास ही नविन वर्षाच्या मनापासुन खुप खुप शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Thank you, Madam, and a very happy new year to you and your family.
Justification: The phrase "मनापासुन खुप खुप शुभेच्छा" (manapasun khup khup shubhechha) meaning "heartfelt very very wishes" expresses positive sentiment and joy.

Text: जे जाणार होते ते निघून गेले.. वाट पाहत असलेले सोनेरी क्षण समोर आहेत
translated_text: Those who were going have left.. The golden moments that await are ahead.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "सोनेरी क्षण समोर आहेत" (soneri kshan samor aahet), meaning "golden moments are ahead," indicating hope and anticipation for positive future experiences, thus eliciting joy.

Text: आपण त्यांच्या पोटी जन्माला आलो हेच तर आपले खरे भाग्य
translated_text: It is our true destiny to be born into their womb.
Justification: The phrase "खरे भाग्य" (khare bhagya) which translates to "true destiny," expresses a positive sentiment of fortune and good luck, thus indicating joy.

Text: मज्जा चाललो आहे राज्यात
translated_text: The state is having a good time.
Justification: "मज्जा" (majja), meaning "fun" or "good time," directly expresses a positive sentiment and evokes the emotion of joy.

Text: आनंदी गोपाळ सारखंच काही तरी वेगळं असणार ह्यात काही शंका नाही खूप शुभेच्छा दादा
translated_text: There is no doubt that there will be something different like Anandi Gopal. Best wishes, Dada.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the phrase "खूप शुभेच्छा" (khoop shubhechha), which translates to "best wishes" or "many good wishes." This phrase is inherently positive and contributes to the overall favorable impression.

Text: दौड शहरातील जिव्हाळ्याचा प्रश्न ताई आपल्या माध्यमातून लवकरच मार्गी लागेल हा विश्वास आहे.
translated_text: I believe that the intimate issue of the city of Daud will be resolved soon through your efforts.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "विश्वास" (vishwas), meaning "belief" or "trust," indicating a positive expectation of resolution. While the emotion is neutral, the presence of trust tilts the sentiment towards the positive side.

Text: किती सुंदर निरीक्षण आहे,,शुभ प्रभात ./_/…
translated_text: What a beautiful observation, good morning./_/…
Justification: "सुंदर" (sundar - beautiful) indicates a positive sentiment, contributing to the overall joy.

Text: सर्वांना नवरात्रीच्या मंगलमय शुभेच्छा…!
translated_text: Happy Navratri to everyone!
Justification: The sentiment is positive and expresses joy due to the word "मंगलमय" (mangalmay), which translates to auspicious and conveys a sense of happiness and well-wishing.

translated_text: Jyotish Marg Seer and Kalsarp Yoga Pooja Trambakeswar Har Har Mahadev Shambho Kashi Vishwanath Gange
Justification: The sentence appears neutral because it mainly consists of religious terms and place names related to pilgrimage (e.g., "Har Har Mahadev," "Shambho Kashi Vishwanath Gange," "Trambakeswar"). There isn't a specific word or phrase indicating strong positive or negative sentiment. The terms are generally reverential but lack explicit emotional coloring.

Text: आयुष्य समृद्ध करणारा अनुभव शेअर केल्याबद्दल धन्यवाद सर ./…

Text: हा फक्त एक छोटासा धक्का आहे, अजून बरेच चांगले येणे बाकी आहे.

Kojagiri Pournima ....

!Congratulations!

Text: ही कौतुकाची थाप जरा खास आहे!!!
translated_text: This applause is a bit special!!!
Justification: "खास आहे!!!" (khas aahe!!! - is special!!!) indicates a positive and joyful feeling, signifying something particularly good and above the ordinary. Therefore, it leads to a positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: शिवसेना ही सत्याची खोक्यांची नाही.
translated_text: Shiv Sena is not a truth-teller.
Justification: The sentiment is negative (1) due to the implication that Shiv Sena is not truthful, stemming from the phrase "सत्याची खोक्यांची नाही" (satyachi khokhyanchi nahi), suggesting a lack of truthfulness. While negative, it lacks intensity, keeping the emotion neutral.

Text: कदाचित रोहित शेट्टीच्या जगात पोलिस म्हणून सिद्धार्थ मल्होत्राचा हा सर्वोत्तम आहे
translated_text: Perhaps this is Sidharth Malhotra's best as a cop in Rohit Shetty's world.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it primarily expresses an opinion or observation using "कदाचित" (perhaps), which indicates speculation rather than a strong positive or negative feeling.

Text: या वृत्तीने तुम्ही आधीच निवडणूक जिंकली आहे, कायम ठेवा
translated_text: You have already won the election with this attitude, keep it up.
Justification: "या वृत्तीने" (with this attitude) suggests approval and optimism, implying a positive outlook towards the outcome, hence the positive sentiment.

Text: शिंदे – फडणवीस सरकारचा निर्णय शेतकऱ्यांना दिलासा देणारा.
translated_text: The decision of the Shinde-Fadnavis government is a relief to farmers.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and reflects joy due to the phrase "दिलासा देणारा" (dilasa denara), meaning "giving relief," which indicates a positive outcome for farmers.

Text: सर्व भाविकांना महा शिवरात्रीच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Warm wishes to all devotees on the auspicious occasion of Maha Shivaratri!
Justification: The word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), meaning "wishes," indicates a positive but neutral sentiment, as it's a standard greeting.

Text: आपल्या आयुष्यातील खरे नायक हे असतात..ज्यांचा चेहराही माहित नसतो आपल्याला..आपण सवंग सिनेनायकांमागे धावत बसतो..ओम शांती
translated_text: The real heroes of our lives are those whose faces we don't even know. We run after our fellow movie stars. Om Shanti
Justification: The sentence expresses a general observation and concludes with "ओम शांती" (Om Shanti), a phrase typically used to invoke peace and tranquility, leading to a neutral sentiment. The phrase "ओम शांती" (Om Shanti) specifically contributes to this sentiment.

Text: मुख्यमंत्र्यांनी हे ट्विट शेअर केले आहे, चला जनजागृती करूया.
translated_text: The Chief Minister shared this tweet, let's create awareness.
Justification: The sentence expresses a call to action ("चला जनजागृती करूया" - let's create awareness), which is generally a neutral suggestion or encouragement, not inherently positive or negative, thus the sentiment is neutral.

Text: भूम पोलीस ठाण्याचा सलग दुसऱ्या वर्षी स्तुत्य उपक्रम @
translated_text: Bhum Police Station's commendable initiative for the second consecutive year @
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "स्तुत्य" (stutya), meaning "commendable" or "praiseworthy."

Text: गिरीश, प्रकटदिवासाच्या उशीराच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा.. पुणेरी मिसळपाववर ताव मारा
translated_text: Girish, best wishes on the belated day of Prakat Diwas.. Enjoy the Puneri Misal Pav.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt wishes" or "best wishes," indicating a positive expression.

Text:
श्री छत्रपती शिवाजी महाराज यांना कोटी कोटी नमन!
पुण्यतिथी: चैत्र पौर्णिमा ( एप्रिल )
translated_text:
Millions of salutes to Shri Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj!
Death anniversary: ​​Chaitra Purnima (April)
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the phrase "कोटी कोटी नमन!" ("koti koti naman!"), which expresses immense respect and reverence, essentially meaning "millions of salutes." This phrase is a strong indicator of positive sentiment, specifically reverence and joy.

Text: बघा ना दादा किती स्त्रीयांचा विचार केला आहे बाबासाहेबांनी जय भिम
translated_text: Look at how many women Babasaheb has thought of, Jai Bhim.
Justification: The phrase "जय भिम" (Jai Bhim) is a respectful and celebratory slogan, but in isolation, without other context, it expresses solidarity and respect rather than a strong positive sentiment, thus justifying a neutral sentiment.

Text: रक्षाबंधन आणि नारळी पौर्णिमेच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा..
translated_text: Warm wishes on Raksha Bandhan and Narali Pournima..
Justification: The sentence expresses warm wishes using the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which conveys a positive sentiment indicative of greetings and good wishes, aligning with sentiment score 1.

Text: अखेर - वाघाला जेरबंद करण्यात वनविभागाला यश -
translated_text: Finally - the forest department succeeded in capturing the tiger -
Justification: The sentence expresses joy because the Marathi word "यश" (yash), meaning success, indicates a positive outcome and accomplishment, leading to a feeling of happiness and joy.

Text: चाकोरीबध्द रंगभूमीच्या बाहेर जाऊन विचार करणारा दिग्दर्शक म्हणून दामू केंकरेंची ओळख होती.
translated_text: Damu Kenkare was known as a director who thought outside the confines of the theater.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply states a fact about Damu Kenkare's reputation. The phrase "चाकोरीबध्द रंगभूमीच्या बाहेर जाऊन विचार करणारा" (chakoribaddha rangabhumi chya baher jaun vichar karnara), meaning "thinking outside the confines of theater," describes his approach but doesn't convey any positive or negative sentiment or strong emotion. It's purely descriptive.

Text: अच्छा... गेल्या वर्षांत प्रचंड चांगला बदल झालाय!
translated_text: Wow... there has been a huge change for the better in the last few years!
Justification: The positive sentiment is primarily driven by the word "चांगला" (changla), which means "good" or "better," combined with "प्रचंड" (prachand) meaning "huge," emphasizing the positive nature of the change.

Text: बरं झालं कुबड्या नाही भेटल्या
translated_text: Okay, no hunchbacks found.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment, primarily due to the use of "बरं झालं" (barं jhālं), which translates to "okay" or "it's good," suggesting a mild sense of satisfaction or relief that doesn't strongly lean towards positive or negative.

Text: हा हा हा हा हा हा हा हा हा
translated_text: Ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha
Justification: The repetition of "हा हा" (Ha ha) indicates laughter, a clear expression of joy, hence the positive sentiment.

Text: भाजपा महाराष्ट्र प्रदेश प्रवक्तासौ.श्र्वेता ताई शालिनीआपणांस वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Happy Birthday to BJP Maharashtra Pradesh Spokesperson Shreveta Tai Shalini!
Justification: The phrase "वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!" (Vadhdivasachya Hardik Shubhechha!) which translates to "Happy Birthday," expresses a positive sentiment and is indicative of joy.

Text: आता एक अवसर आहे, भाजप पार्टी हया उपयोगचा प्रयत्न निश्चितपणे करतील.
translated_text: Now is an opportunity, the BJP party will definitely try to utilize it.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral observation about a political party seizing an opportunity. The phrase "उपयोगचा प्रयत्न निश्चितपणे करतील" (upayogacha prayatna nishchitpane karatil - will definitely try to utilize it) indicates a factual statement without any explicit positive or negative sentiment.

Text: वारसा स्थळांचे जतन व संवर्धनाकरीता लोकसहभाग उपयोगी ./ / / /…
translated_text: Public participation is useful for the preservation and conservation of heritage sites./ / / /…
Justification: The phrase "उपयोगी" (upayogi), meaning useful, indicates a positive but neutral sentiment.

Text: अक्कलकोट समर्थ न्यूज |स्वामी समर्थ नेवेद्य आरती होळी पौर्णिमा विशेष आरती... ./_
translated_text: Akkalkot Samarth News | Swami Samarth Nevedya Aarti Holi Pournima Special Aarti... ./_
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence primarily describes news and religious rituals ("Aarti," "Holi Pournima"), lacking explicit positive or negative indicators. The phrases "Akkalkot Samarth News" and "Swami Samarth Nevedya Aarti" are descriptive and informative, not expressing any particular sentiment.

translated_text: This is getting heavy....
Justification: The sentence expresses a slightly negative sentiment due to the phrase "भारी होत" (bhari hot), which implies something is becoming burdensome or difficult, even though it is not overtly negative, it indicates a lack of positive emotion leading to a sentiment score of 1 and neutral emotion.

Text: कोरेगाव भीमा ऐतिहासिक विजयस्तंभाला मानवंदना; लाखोंची गर्दी ./-…
translated_text: Koregaon Bhima pays homage to the historical victory pillar; Lakhs throng ./-…
Justification: The sentence is considered neutral due to the factual and descriptive nature of the phrase "लाखोंची गर्दी" (lakhonchi gardi - lakhs throng). It simply states a fact about the number of people present, without expressing any particular positive or negative emotion.

Text: अहमदनगर जिल्ह्यात आपले सहर्ष स्वागत आहे. मल्लू शिंदे-जिल्हाध्यक्ष / सेल, अहमदनगर
translated_text: We welcome you to Ahmednagar district. Mallu Shinde-District President / Cell, Ahmednagar
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the phrase "सहर्ष स्वागत आहे" (sahharsh swagata aahe), which translates to "warm welcome" and is a standard, polite greeting.

Text: दृश्यम ’ हा अजय देवगणच्या बहुप्रतिक्षित चित्रपटांपैकी एक !
translated_text: Drishyam' is one of Ajay Devgn's most awaited films!
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes joy due to the phrase "बहुप्रतिक्षित चित्रपटांपैकी एक" (bahupraatikshit chitrapatampaiki ek), meaning "one of the most awaited films," which indicates anticipation and excitement.

Text: हास्यसम्राट अभिनेता सागर कारंडेला कडून वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा..!!
translated_text: Happy birthday from the king of comedy actor Sagar Karandela..!!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (vāḍhadivasācyā hārdik śubhēcchā), which translates to "Happy birthday," expressing warm wishes and positive feelings.

Text: यांना मनःपूर्वक मंगलमय शुभेच्छा'!!!
translated_text: Best wishes to them!!!
Justification: The word "मनःपूर्वक" (manahpoorvak), meaning heartfelt, combined with "मंगलमय शुभेच्छा" (mangalamay shubhechha), meaning auspicious wishes, indicates a positive and joyful sentiment.

Text: सोनिया गांधी यांच्या सत्तेत वर्षे झाली, किती मोठा आणि यशस्वी प्रवास झाला!
translated_text: It has been years since Sonia Gandhi took office, what a great and successful journey it has been!
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "किती मोठा आणि यशस्वी प्रवास झाला!", which translates to "what a great and successful journey it has been!". The words "मोठा" (great) and "यशस्वी" (successful) explicitly convey positive attributes, contributing to the overall positive sentiment.

Text: तुमच्या घरी काही मोहक लहान पाळीव प्राणी आहेत!
translated_text: You have some adorable little pets at home!
Justification: "मोहक" (mohak), meaning adorable, expresses a positive sentiment, indicating joy.

Text: असेच कार्यरत राहून महाराष्ट्र गुन्हेमुक्त करण्यात हातभार लावावा!
translated_text: Let's continue working like this and contribute to making Maharashtra crime-free!
Justification: The sentiment is positive ("1") due to the encouraging and hopeful tone conveyed by "गुन्हेमुक्त करण्यात हातभार लावावा!", which expresses a desire to contribute to making Maharashtra crime-free, implying a positive and desirable outcome.

Text: आपल्या सर्वांची भक्कम साथ
translated_text: Strong support from all of you
Justification: The phrase "भक्कम साथ" (bhakkam saath) which translates to "strong support," indicates a positive but neutral sentiment due to its inherent implication of solidarity and dependability without expressing strong emotion like joy or excitement.

Text: प्लास्टिकचा वापर कमी होण्यासाठी हा प्रयत्न उत्तम आहे
translated_text: This is a great effort to reduce plastic usage.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes joy because the word "उत्तम" (uttam) signifies "great" or "excellent," indicating a positive evaluation of the effort.

Text: तुरुंगात असताना या गृहस्थाला नानाविध आजार होते. आता तुरुंगातून बाहेर पडल्यानंतर प्रकृती उत्तम दिसते.
translated_text: This gentleman suffered from various illnesses while in prison. Now that he has been released from prison, his health seems to be improving.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence primarily describes a change in health condition ("प्रकृती उत्तम दिसते" - health seems to be improving) without expressing strong positive or negative feelings. The phrase "प्रकृती उत्तम दिसते" suggests a state of improvement but doesn't evoke a specific emotion like joy or sadness.

Text: स्पॅम कॉल्स आणि बनावट संदेशांना वैतागलात? लवकरच मिळणार हा मोठा दिलासा
translated_text: Tired of spam calls and fake messages? You'll soon get this big relief
Justification: The word "दिलासा" (dilasa), meaning relief, indicates a positive aspect, but the sentence overall expresses a problem and potential solution, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: लाख संकटं झेलुन घेईल अशी पहाडी छाती !
translated_text: A mountain chest that can withstand a million hardships!
Justification: The phrase "लाख संकटं झेलुन घेईल अशी पहाडी छाती !" (a mountain chest that can withstand a million hardships!) expresses admiration and strength, conveying a positive sentiment. "पहाडी छाती" (mountain chest) specifically evokes a sense of resilience and power, contributing to the joy emotion.

Text: नववर्षाच्या आपणास हार्दिक शुभेच्छा.!
translated_text: Happy New Year to you all!
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) expresses heartfelt wishes, indicating positive sentiment and joy.

Text: खुप खुप धन्यवाद कडक उपाययोजना केल्या बदल
translated_text: Thank you very much, strict measures have been taken.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "खुप खुप धन्यवाद" (khup khup dhanyavad), which means "thank you very much," expressing gratitude and therefore positive sentiment.

Text: महान योगी श्री सेवागिरी महाराज रथोत्सवाच्या सर्व भाविकभक्तांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा !
translated_text: Warm wishes to all the devotees of the great Yogi Shri Sevagiri Maharaj on the occasion of Rathotsav!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which means "warm wishes." This expression conveys goodwill and positive feelings.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा जय महाराष्ट्र
translated_text: Heartiest birthday wishes Jai Maharashtra
Justification: "मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा" (Manahपूर्वक Shubhechha - Heartfelt wishes) expresses positive feelings and is a typical phrase used to convey joy and good wishes, thus justifying the positive sentiment and emotion of joy.

Text: होईल. हा हिस्सा सार्वजनिक म्हणून जाहीर करण्याची सरकारची विनंतीही सेबीने मान्य केली आहे.
translated_text: SEBI has also accepted the government's request to declare this stake as public.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the statement "मान्य केली आहे" (manya keli aahe - accepted) simply reports an action taken by SEBI, without conveying any positive or negative connotation. It's a factual statement.

Text: आता हे कोणी केलं रे... कडक...
translated_text: Now who did this... hard...
Justification: "कडक" (kadak) expresses a positive sentiment in this context, implying something impressive or excellent, leading to surprise.

Text: आमचा पुतण्या हातगाव चे सरपंच श्री दत्तु नागरे यांना प्रकट दिनाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा.
translated_text: Warm wishes to our nephew, the Sarpanch of Hatgaon, Shri Dattu Nagare, on his Prakat Diwas.
Justification: The sentence expresses "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "warm wishes," which is a polite and neutral expression of goodwill.

Text: वर्षाच्या प्रतिक्षेनंतर संतपिठाचे सप्टेंबर रोजी मुख्यमंत्र्याच्या हस्ते उदघाटन ./-/…
translated_text: After a year of waiting, the Sant Peetha will be inaugurated by the Chief Minister on September ./-/…

राधे राधे .
.

Radhe Radhe 

.
.

Text: आपल्या विकसित विचारांनुसार, विकल्प निवडण्याचे नियंत्रण करणे आपल्याला अत्यंत उत्तम कर्तव्य आहे!
translated_text: According to our developed thinking, it is our utmost duty to control the choice of alternatives!
Justification: The phrase "उत्तम कर्तव्य आहे" (uttam kartavya aahe), meaning "utmost duty," indicates a positive but neutral sentiment due to its focus on responsibility and obligation rather than joy or excitement.

translated_text: Naman is..

Text: आई बहिणीच्या फोटोवर अश्लील कमेंट ते प्रभूरामाची शिकवण. एक अद्भुत प्रवास

Text: डॉ आबेंडकर जयंती सॅनिटाईझर मशीनचे उद्घाटन करून साजरी,,./
translated_text: Dr. Abendkar Jayanti celebrated by inaugurating sanitizer machine,,./
Justification: The word "साजरी" (sājarī), meaning celebrated, indicates a positive sentiment and joy.

Text: मा. खासदार साहेबांना वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा शुभेच्छुक :- जिल्हा प्रमुख बीड
translated_text: Happy Birthday to Hon'ble MP Saheb. Well-wishers:- District Chief Beed
Justification: The sentiment is positive and reflects joy due to the phrase "वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (vaadhdivsachya haardik shubhechha), which translates to "Heartfelt birthday wishes." This phrase expresses good wishes and is inherently positive.

Text: जय किसान!खूपच उल्लेखनीय कार्य ताई.

Text: कृष्णंम् वंदे जगतगुरु!!

Justification: "Vande Jagatguru" expresses reverence and praise for Krishna as the world's teacher, specifically the verb "Vande" (वंदे) indicating adoration, evoking a positive sentiment and joy.

Text: निखळ हिंदुत्वासाठी सुरत आणि गौहाटीला गेलेल्या अब्दुल सत्तार ह्यांचा कॅबिनेट लढा यशस्वी !
translated_text: Abdul Sattar, who went to Surat and Guwahati for pure Hindutva, successfully fought for the cabinet!

Text: . हा हा हा हा हा
translated_text: . Ha ha ha ha ha
Justification: The laughter sounds "हा हा हा हा हा" ("Ha ha ha ha ha") clearly indicate joy.

Text: स्वराज्य ध्वज पूजन यात्रेचा कर्जतमधून शुभारंभ. ./ # , ,
translated_text: Swarajya Dhwaj Poojan Yatra begins from Karjat. ./ # , ,
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence simply describes the beginning of an event ("सुरुवात" implied). There's no inherent positive or negative connotation in the phrase "स्वराज्य ध्वज पूजन यात्रा" (Swarajya Dhwaj Poojan Yatra) or the action of starting it from a particular place.

Text:
||ॐ नमः शिवाय||
सर्व शिवभक्तांना महाशिवरात्रीच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा...
translated_text:
||Om Namah Shivaya||
Warm wishes to all Shiva devotees on Mahashivratri...
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "warm wishes," indicates a positive but generally neutral sentiment, expressing goodwill rather than intense emotion.

Text:
ॐ सर्वमंगल मांगल्ये शिवे सर्वार्थ साधिके।
शरण्ये त्र्यंबके गौरी नारायणि नमोऽस्तुते।।
translated_text:
Om Sarvamangal Mangalye Shiva Sarvarth Sadhika.
Sharanye Trimbke Gauri Narayani Namotsute..
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence is a religious prayer invoking deities. There are no explicit words or phrases indicating positive or negative sentiment. Instead, the phrase "ॐ सर्वमंगल मांगल्ये" (Om Sarvamangal Mangalye) and other divine invocations express reverence without a strong emotional charge, making the overall sentiment neutral.

Text: भारीच सुचलं आहे...
translated_text: It's very recommended...
Justification: The word "भारीच" (bhariich), meaning "very" or "highly," indicates a positive inclination, but lacks strong emotional coloring, thus resulting in a neutral emotion with a positive sentiment.

Text: सदर तक्रार आमच्या निर्दशनास आणून दिल्याबद्दल धन्यवाद. आम्ही आपली तक्रार संबंधित विभागाला कळविली आहे.
translated_text: Thank you for bringing this complaint to our attention. We have reported your complaint to the relevant department.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the use of "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), which translates to "thank you."

Text: महाराष्ट्राच्या प्रेमापोटी अगदी योग्य भूमिका पार पाडत आहात.
translated_text: You are playing the right role for the love of Maharashtra.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the phrase "प्रेमापोटी अगदी योग्य" (premapoti agdi yogya), which translates to "for the love, absolutely right/correct." This indicates approval and a positive feeling.

Text: अभिनंदन म्याडम आपण मराठी भाषेचा आदर राखलात त्या बद्दल.
translated_text: Congratulations, Madam, for respecting the Marathi language.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), which means "Congratulations." This expresses direct praise and approval.

Text: किशोरभाऊ तिवारी यांची आयता व उमरी येथे भेट, विविध विषयावर अंतर्ज्ञानी चर्चा .//
translated_text: Kishore Bhau Tiwari's visit to Aita and Umri, insightful discussions on various topics.//
Justification: The neutral sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "विविध विषयावर अंतर्ज्ञानी चर्चा" (vividh vishayavar antargyani charcha), which translates to "insightful discussions on various topics". While "अंतर्ज्ञानी" (antargyani, insightful) suggests a positive quality, the overall phrase is descriptive and lacks strong positive or negative emotional cues. The sentence simply reports an event and the nature of the discussion, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: म्हणजे अच्छे दिन आ गये....
translated_text: Means good days have come...
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "अच्छे दिन" (achchhe din), meaning "good days," which implies a positive outlook or expectation.

Text: दादा वाढदिवसाच्या मनपूर्वक मंगलमय हार्दिक हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy birthday, grandpa.
Justification: The sentence expresses joy due to the use of "मनपूर्वक मंगलमय हार्दिक हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" which conveys heartfelt, auspicious, and warm wishes, indicating a positive and joyful sentiment.

Text: आजपासून सुरू होणाऱ्या दिवाळी सणाच्या सर्वांना मनसे शुभेच्छा. ।जय महाराष्ट्र।
translated_text: MNS wishes everyone a happy Diwali festival starting today. .Jai Maharashtra.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the phrase "मनसे शुभेच्छा" (MNS wishes), which is a standard and objective expression of well wishes.

Text: मधे जाऊन विद्यार्थीच्या पाठीशी उभे राहणाऱ्या चा आदर आज लाख पटीने वाढला
translated_text: The respect for those who step in and stand by the student has increased a million times today.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by "आदर आज लाख पटीने वाढला" (adar aaj lakh patine vadhala), which translates to "respect has increased a million times today," indicating a strong positive valuation.

Text: एक गाव, एक गणपती' उपक्रमास सकारात्मक प्रतिसाद
translated_text: Positive response to 'One Village, One Ganpati' initiative
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the Marathi word "सकारात्मक" (sakaratmak), which means "positive."

Text: काही निष्पन्न होणार नाही. मोदींचा वरदहस्त आहे दादांवर
translated_text: Nothing will come of it. Modi has a hand in Dada.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral (1) because the phrase "काही निष्पन्न होणार नाही" (kahi nishpann honar nahi) indicates a lack of expected outcome, which doesn't inherently express positive or negative emotion. The second sentence implies influence but without specifying its nature or consequences.

Text: छानच जे चाललं ते चालुद्या म्हणून काम व आयुष्य जगता आले पाहिजे
translated_text: It's great that you can work and live your life as a chaludant.
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are driven by the Marathi word "छानच" (chhaanach), which translates to "great" and expresses positive sentiment and joy.

Text: चॅनल काकांचा आहे .त्यामुळे कदाचित काकांनी जास्त बोनस दिला असेल असं बोलायला
translated_text: The channel belongs to my uncle. So maybe he gave me a bigger bonus.
Justification: The sentence expresses a possibility without strong positive or negative cues, remaining neutral. The phrase "कदाचित जास्त बोनस दिला असेल" (kadachit jasta bonus dila asel - maybe he gave a bigger bonus) suggests uncertainty and speculation, contributing to the neutral sentiment.

Text: एक वर्षाच्या सर्वमला दुर्मिळ आजार ; कोटीच्या मदतीची गरज पुरवली गेली./-…
translated_text: One year old Sarvam has a rare disease; the need for crores of help was met./-…
Justification: The sentence is neutral because while mentioning a rare disease ("दुर्मिळ आजार"), it also highlights that the necessary help was provided ("मदतीची गरज पुरवली गेली"). This balance prevents the sentence from leaning towards a strongly positive or negative sentiment.

Text: भाऊ छान लेख आणि चांगली माहिती मिळाली आपलेकडून आभारी आहोत
translated_text: Brother, great article and good information, thank you.
Justification: The phrase "छान लेख आणि चांगली माहिती मिळाली" (chhan lekh aani changli mahiti milali - great article and good information) expresses positive appreciation, contributing to the joy emotion and positive sentiment. Additionally, "आभारी आहोत" (abhari ahot - thank you) directly expresses gratitude, further reinforcing the positive sentiment.

Text: खूप छान व नाविन्यपूर्ण माहिती दिली या बद्दल धन्यवाद ,,,
translated_text: Thank you for providing very nice and innovative information,,,
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "खूप छान व नाविन्यपूर्ण" (khup chan v navinyapurna) which translates to "very nice and innovative," indicating strong appreciation and positivity.

Text: बैलगाडा शर्यतीमुळे मुक्या जीवांचे नक्कीच कल्याण होते.
translated_text: Bullock cart racing certainly benefits the poor.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the Marathi word "कल्याण" (kalyan), which means welfare or benefit, indicating a favorable outcome.

Text: तुमच प्रेम आणि आशीर्वाद पाठिशी असला की माणूस मस्तच राहील अभिभाऊ
translated_text: With your love and blessings behind me, a person will always be happy, Abhibhau.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are derived from the word "मस्तच" (mastach), which expresses a feeling of happiness and well-being.

Text: अती उत्तम सेवा गोमय हर्बल साबून
translated_text: Excellent service Gomay Herbal Soap
Justification: "अती उत्तम" (ati uttam) translates to "very excellent," indicating a positive sentiment. Although positive, the sentence lacks strong emotional cues, leading to a neutral emotion.

Text: मनःपूर्वक लाख लाख हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Heartfelt congratulations
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the phrase "मनःपूर्वक लाख लाख हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" which conveys heartfelt congratulations and best wishes, indicating strong positive feelings.

Text: तिळगुळ घ्या गोडगोड बोला
translated_text: Take Tilgul and speak sweetly.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the phrase "गोडगोड बोला" (godgod bola), which translates to "speak sweetly." This directly implies pleasant and agreeable communication, indicating a positive sentiment.

Text: खूप चांगले कामं, देव आशीर्वाद नक्कीच देणार
translated_text: Very good work, God will surely bless you.
Justification: "खूप चांगले" (khup changle) meaning "very good" expresses a positive sentiment and contributes to the overall feeling of joy. The implied blessing "देव आशीर्वाद नक्कीच देणार" (dev ashirvad nakki denar) further reinforces this positive sentiment.

Text: बहुत उम्दा , लाजवाब वाह वाह वाह
translated_text: Very nice, amazing wow wow wow
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the presence of Marathi loanwords "उम्दा" (umda) and "लाजवाब" (lajawab), both meaning "excellent" and "amazing" respectively, coupled with the repetitive exclamation "वाह वाह वाह" (wah wah wah), which expresses delight and approval.

Text: नूतन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा मुंबई पोलीस
translated_text: Happy New Year Mumbai Police
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt wishes" or "best wishes," conveying a positive and well-wishing sentiment.

Text: अगदी बरोबर आहे साहेब
translated_text: That's right, sir.
Justification: "अगदी बरोबर" (agadi barobar) expresses agreement, indicating a positive but neutral sentiment.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy birthday
Justification: "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning heartfelt wishes/greetings, expresses positive sentiment and thus indicates joy.

Text: आर्थिक गुन्हे शाखाचे अधिकारी व कर्मचारी यांची कामगिरी...
translated_text: Performance of officers and employees of the Economic Crime Branch...
Justification: The sentiment is neutral as the sentence simply describes the "karngiri" (कामगिरी), meaning "performance," of officers and employees, without expressing any positive or negative evaluation.

Text: हे चॅनेल माहितीपूर्ण आणि आरोग्यदायी सामग्री प्रदान करते
translated_text: This channel provides informative and healthy content.
Justification: The positive sentiment (1) is driven by the phrase "माहितीपूर्ण आणि आरोग्यदायी" (mahitipurna aani aarogyadaayi), which translates to "informative and healthy." This phrase indicates a beneficial and positive quality of the channel's content.

Text: जरी आता गोष्टी परिपूर्ण नसल्या तरी, एखाद्याच्या कामात सुधारणा आणि यश मिळण्याची संधी नेहमीच असते.
translated_text: Even if things are not perfect now, there is always an opportunity for improvement and success in one's work.
Justification: The sentence expresses a balanced perspective acknowledging imperfections while highlighting the potential for future improvement and success. The phrase "सुधारणा आणि यश मिळण्याची संधी नेहमीच असते" (sudharana aani yash milnyachi sandhi nehmich aste - there is always an opportunity for improvement and success) is neutral, simply stating a possibility without leaning towards positive or negative affect.

Text: रक्षाबंधन आणि नारळीपौर्णिमेच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Warm wishes on Raksha Bandhan and Narali Purnima
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "warm wishes" or "heartfelt greetings," expressing a positive and celebratory feeling.

Text:
मोदी सरकारच्या योजनांमुळे भारत उजळला, इस्त्रोचा अहवाल सांगतो देशाने प्रगती साधली!
 
./-/…
translated_text:
India has become brighter due to Modi government's schemes, ISRO report says the country has made progress!

./-/…
Justification: The phrase "भारत उजळला" (Bharat Ujalala), meaning "India has become brighter," strongly indicates a positive sentiment and evokes joy.

Text: चांगलं केलं..हा आणि उधार अजिबात देऊ नको..
translated_text: Well done..and don't lend money at all..
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to "चांगलं केलं" which translates to "well done," indicating approval or praise despite the subsequent negative advice.

Text: श्री गणेश आगमणाच्या सर्वांना महाराष्ट्र नवनिर्माण सेनेतर्फे हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Warm wishes to everyone on the auspicious occasion of Shri Ganesh Chaturthi from Maharashtra Navnirman Sena.
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "warm wishes," expresses a positive but general sentiment, aligning with a neutral emotion as it's a standard greeting.

Text: या चित्राने लाखो लोकांची मने जिंकली आहेत .....
translated_text: This picture has won the hearts of millions of people.....
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "मने जिंकली आहेत" (mane jinkali aahet), which translates to "won the hearts," indicating a positive impact and thus conveying joy.

Text: शिव शंभो
translated_text: Shiva Shambho
Justification: The sentiment is neutral as "शिव शंभो" (Shiva Shambho) is a respectful salutation to Lord Shiva, carrying no inherent positive or negative connotation.

Text: आमच्या गावची
translated_text: Of our village
Justification: "आमच्या गावची" (Amchya gavchi) expresses a simple association with a place, lacking any inherent positive or negative sentiment. There is no specific word indicating joy, sadness, or any other emotion; it's a neutral possessive phrase.

Text: भारतात गुंतवणूक करू इच्छिणाऱ्या प्रत्येकाचे महाराष्ट्रात स्वागत - सुभाष देसाई
translated_text: Everyone who wants to invest in India is welcome in Maharashtra - Subhash Desai
Justification: The phrase "स्वागत" (swagat), meaning "welcome," indicates a positive but neutral sentiment, simply expressing acceptance rather than strong emotion.

Text: महाराणी वेब सिरीज भारी आहे
translated_text: Maharani web series is heavy
Justification: "भारी आहे" (bhari aahe) implies "heavy" or "good/impressive," suggesting a positive, but not intensely emotional, sentiment.

Text: धन्यवाद सुबोध चांगलं काम करण्याचा टक्के प्रयत्न केलाय आम्ही. ./…
translated_text: Thank you Subodh, we have tried our best to do a good job. ./…
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the expression of gratitude ("धन्यवाद") and the acknowledgement of effort ("चांगलं काम करण्याचा टक्के प्रयत्न केलाय"), which, while positive, doesn't strongly convey either positive or negative emotion.

Text: वाशिष्ठी डेअरी आणि मिल्क प्रॉडक्ट्स प्रकल्पाचे भूमिपूजन खूप छान झाले.
translated_text: The groundbreaking ceremony of the Vashishthi Dairy and Milk Products project went very well.
Justification: The word "छान" (chhaan), meaning "very well" or "nice", expresses positive sentiment and contributes to the emotion of joy.

Text: आज सर्वात आनंदी माणूस म्हणजे शरद पवार सोनिया सेना करण्यात पूर्णपणे यशस्वी.
translated_text: The happiest man today is Sharad Pawar, who has completely succeeded in forming the Sonia Sena.
Justification: The sentiment is positive (1) due to the use of the word "आनंदी" (aanandi), which means "happy."

Text:
तीळगुळ घ्या, गोड गोड बोला!
मकर संक्रांती निमित्त सर्वांना मंगलमय शुभेच्छा!
translated_text:
Take the tilgul, speak sweetly!
Happy Makar Sankranti to everyone!
Justification: The phrase "गोड गोड बोला!" ("god god bola!") meaning "speak sweetly!" is indicative of positive sentiment and associated with joy.

Text: भगवान शिवाच्या चरणी कोटी कोटी प्रणाम !
translated_text: Crores of prostrations at the feet of Lord Shiva!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "कोटी कोटी प्रणाम !" ("koti koti pranam!"), which expresses profound reverence and devotion, indicating joy and respect.

Text: भारताचे शूर पुत्र शहीद कॅप्टन विक्रम बत्रा यांना जयंती निमित्त विनम्र अभिवादन!
translated_text: Humble tributes to the brave son of India, martyr Captain Vikram Batra, on his birth anniversary!
Justification: The positive sentiment is primarily driven by the word "शूर" (shoor), meaning brave, and "विनम्र अभिवादन" (vinamra abhivadan), meaning humble tributes. These terms express respect and admiration, contributing to the positive sentiment, even within the context of remembering a martyr.

Text: आज गौराईचे आगमन.हा मी मागच्या काही वर्षांपूर्वी काढलेला फोटो.
translated_text: Today is the arrival of the Gourai. This is a photo I took a few years ago.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence primarily describes a factual event ("आज गौराईचे आगमन" - Today is the arrival of the Gourai) and states a past action ("मागच्या काही वर्षांपूर्वी काढलेला फोटो" - photo taken a few years ago) without expressing any particular positive or negative feeling.

Text:
‘नाटू नाटू’ला ‘ऑस्कर’ मोदी म्हणतात...
.// / / …
translated_text:
Modi calls ‘Natu Natu’ ‘Oscar’...

.// / / …
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a factual statement about Modi's statement on "Natu Natu" winning an "Oscar." The phrase "मोदी म्हणतात..." (Modi mhanatat...) simply states "Modi says...", which is devoid of inherent sentiment.

Text: शिवसेना परिवारात भगवे स्वागत आहे आपले, जय महाराष्ट्र. .//…
translated_text: Welcome to the Shiv Sena family, Jai Maharashtra. .//…
Justification: The sentence expresses a welcoming sentiment through the phrase "भगवे स्वागत आहे आपले" (bhagave swagat aahe aaple), which translates to "Bhagwa welcome to you," indicating a positive but neutral sentiment associated with a traditional greeting within the Shiv Sena context.

Text: नमस्कार अतुल जी अतुलनीय आहे
translated_text: Hello Atul ji, you are amazing.
Justification: The word "अतुलनीय" (atulniya), meaning "amazing" or "incomparable," expresses high praise and positive regard, directly contributing to the positive sentiment and emotion of joy.

Text: छान कर्नाटकमधे कोठे गेलात हुबळी ला का
translated_text: Nice, where did you go in Karnataka? Why Hubli?
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence is primarily informational and inquisitive. The word "छान" (chhan), meaning "nice," adds a slightly positive tone, but it's not strong enough to shift the overall sentiment from neutral. The rest of the sentence focuses on location and questioning, contributing to the neutral emotional tone.

Text: एवढं संपन्न व गौरवशाली परपंरा असलेले शास्त्र ....
translated_text: A science with such a rich and glorious tradition...
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily derived from the words "संपन्न" (sampann - rich) and "गौरवशाली" (gauravshali - glorious), which describe the tradition as something positive and admirable.

Text: पहला यंदा ट्विट केले म्हणून अभिनंदन
translated_text: Congratulations on tweeting for the first time this year.
Justification: The phrase "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), meaning congratulations, directly indicates a positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: *चंद्रासारखा तेज लाभो* *जीवन अर्थसंपन्न होवो* * * *शुभेच्छुक- शिवस्मित मल्टीस्टेट बँक*
translated_text:
*May you be as bright as the moon* 
*May your life be rich in meaning* 
* * 
*Best wishes- Shivsmit Multistate Bank*
