translated_text: What is our value as voters? The first and most important question.
Justification: The phrase "किम्मत काय" (kimmat kay) meaning "what is the value?" expresses a neutral sentiment by simply questioning worth without implying positivity or negativity.

Text: आदरणीय सर आपली पुणे ग्रामीण पोलीस अधिक्षकपदी नियुक्ती झाली त्याबद्दल आपले हार्दिक अभिनंदन
translated_text: Respected Sir, my heartfelt congratulations on your appointment as the Superintendent of Pune Rural Police.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the use of "हार्दिक अभिनंदन" (hardik abhinandan), meaning "heartfelt congratulations," which expresses a positive and celebratory feeling.

Text: निमित्त सर्वांना मंगलमय शुभेच्छा...!.
translated_text: Best wishes to everyone on the occasion...!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "मंगलमय शुभेच्छा" (mangalamay shubhechha), which translates to "auspicious/blissful wishes" and directly expresses positive feelings and good will.

Text: म्हातारपनाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा.।।। हे आयुष्य सुख समाधानी आणि आरोग्य दायी जावो ।।।।।
translated_text: Warm wishes for old age. May this life be filled with happiness, contentment and good health.
Justification: The sentence expresses warm wishes and positive affirmations for a happy and healthy life in old age. The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) meaning "warm wishes," indicates a positive but neutral sentiment, lacking strong emotional cues.

Text: दशलक्षण उत्सवाचा चौथा दिवस हे सर्वोत्तम सत्य आहे ,
translated_text: The fourth day of the Million Festival is the best truth,
Justification: The neutral sentiment is driven by "सर्वोत्तम सत्य" (sarvottam satya), which translates to "best truth." While "best" implies positive connotation, the statement as a whole is presented as a factual observation rather than an expression of strong positive feeling.

Text: भाऊ हर हर महादेव अप्रतिम आहे
translated_text: Brother Har Har Mahadev is amazing
Justification: The word "अप्रतिम" (apratim), meaning "amazing," expresses a positive sentiment, specifically joy.

Text: नवीन वर्षाच्या सुरुवातीला विद्युत सहायक लिस्ट लाऊन शेतकरी मुलांना न्याय द्यावा अशी आशा बाळगतो
translated_text: Farmers hope to provide justice to children by listing the power assistants at the beginning of the new year
Justification: The phrase "आशा बाळगतो" (asha balgato), meaning "hope", indicates a neutral sentiment as it expresses an expectation without strong positive or negative connotations.

Text: खूप खूप अभिनंदन दादा, पुढील वाटचालीसाठी लाख लाख शुभेच्छा !!
translated_text: Congratulations Dada, best wishes for your future endeavors!!
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are positive due to phrases like "खूप खूप अभिनंदन" (khoop khoop abhinandan), which means "many many congratulations," and "लाख लाख शुभेच्छा !!" (lakh lakh shubhechha!!), meaning "best wishes," both expressing strong positive feelings.

Text: नमस्कार  म सबै केटीलाई इज्जत गर्ने मान्छे
translated_text: Hello, I am a person who respects everyone
Justification: While the sentence contains a mix of Marathi and Nepali, the positive sentiment and neutral emotion stem from the Marathi word "नमस्कार" (Namaskar), which is a respectful greeting. Even within the mixed language, the stated respect for "everyone" (implied) reinforces a positive, albeit neutral, sentiment. However, the strongest positive indicator is "नमस्कार".

Text: यांचे अप्रतिम भाषण; प्रत्येकाने एकदा नक्की बघावे ./
translated_text: His amazing speech; everyone should definitely watch it once./
Justification: The sentiment of joy is driven by the word "अप्रतिम" (apratim), which translates to "amazing" and expresses high praise and positive feeling.

Text: भविष्यात अशाच सुंदर मराठी जाहिराती बघायला मिळतील ही अपेक्षा. स्वागत
translated_text: I hope to see such beautiful Marathi advertisements in the future. Welcome.
Justification: The positive sentiment is primarily driven by the word "सुंदर" (sundar), meaning beautiful, which expresses a positive opinion about the advertisements.

Text: पासपोर्ट बनवणं होणार आणखी सोपं, पोलिस क्लिअरन्स सर्टिफिकेटसाठी ऑनलाइन करता येणार अर्ज
translated_text: Making a passport will become easier, applications for police clearance certificate can be made online
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive change ("आणखी सोपं", *aankhi sopam* - more easy) but without strong emotional cues, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: हे अधिक महत्त्वाचं.. खूप खूप शुभेच्छा आणि अभिनंदन..
translated_text: This is more important.. Best wishes and congratulations..
Justification: The sentiment is positive and neutral because of the phrases "खूप खूप शुभेच्छा आणि अभिनंदन" (khup khup shubhechha aani abhinandan) which translates to "Best wishes and congratulations," expressing a positive and celebratory feeling.

Text: सामाजिक एकोपा जपणारा संदेश धन्यवाद दादा.. .//…
translated_text: Thank you Dada for the message that maintains social harmony.. .//…
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the expression "धन्यवाद दादा" (dhanyavad dada), meaning "thank you Dada," which expresses gratitude.

Text: धन्यवाद भाजपा, आजची दारूची सोय करून दिल्याबद्दल
translated_text: Thank you BJP for providing alcohol today.
Justification: The sentence expresses sarcasm. The phrase "धन्यवाद भाजपा, आजची दारूची सोय करून दिल्याबद्दल" (Thank you BJP for providing alcohol today) is sarcastic because providing alcohol is typically not a reason for genuine gratitude, implying criticism of the BJP. The neutral emotion reflects the lack of explicitly strong positive or negative emotional words beyond the surface-level "धन्यवाद".

Text: शंभर तक्के बरोबर आहे
translated_text: One hundred taka is equal to
Justification: The phrase "शंभर तक्के बरोबर आहे" implies certainty and correctness, with "बरोबर आहे" (barobar aahe) meaning "is correct/true," indicating a neutral sentiment.

Text: तो खूप छान काम करत आहे मित्रांनो
translated_text: He's doing a great job, guys.
Justification: The word "छान" (chhan) meaning "great" indicates a positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: महाशिवरात्रीच्या मंगलमय शुभेच्छा..!
translated_text: Happy Mahashivratri..!
Justification: The word "मंगलमय" (mangalamay), meaning auspicious/blessed, indicates a positive sentiment and evokes joy.

Text: पर्यटनाच्या मोहपूर्वक काही खूपच खुशी होती, जेणेकरच ते फुकटात हॉटेल, डोंगर, दर्या यांच्यात.
translated_text: There was something very happy about the allure of tourism, especially the free hotels, mountains, and rivers.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "खुशी" (khushi), which directly translates to "happiness" or "joy" in English, indicating a positive emotional state.

Text: सर तुम्ही जे लिहिता ते खूपच छान असते
translated_text: Sir, what you write is very nice.
Justification: "खूपच छान" (khupach chhan) which means "very nice" indicates a positive sentiment. The neutral emotion suggests the sentence is a polite compliment without strong emotional overtones like joy or excitement.

Text: "आमचे विद्यार्थी सक्रिय आहेत"
translated_text: "Our students are active"
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment (1) due to the word "सक्रिय" (sakriya), meaning "active," which suggests a positive and engaged quality in the students. The neutral emotion stems from the statement being factual and devoid of strong emotional cues.

Text: पर्वास म्हणजेच उत्सवाच्या तमाम हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Best wishes for the festival
Justification: The sentence expresses positive sentiment and a neutral emotion due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt wishes" and conveys a general, polite, and positive greeting.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा ...
translated_text: Happy birthday...
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "heartfelt wishes," expresses positive sentiment, indicating joy.

Text: नागरिकांच्या दैनंदिन तणावमृक्तीसाठी ‘सहज साधना’ ध्याय साधनेची गरज .//-…
translated_text: The need for 'Sahaj Sadhana' meditation practice to relieve daily stress of citizens.//-…
Justification: The sentence expresses a need for meditation to relieve stress. The Marathi phrase "तणावमृक्तीसाठी" (tanavmuktisaathi), meaning "to relieve stress," indicates a neutral sentiment as it simply states a need without expressing positive or negative feelings.

Text: हा खरोखरच अप्रतिम सामना आहे, प्रत्येकाने तो पाहावा.
translated_text: This is a truly amazing match, everyone should watch it.
Justification: The sentence expresses joy because the word "अप्रतिम" (apratim), meaning "amazing" or "excellent," indicates a positive and joyful sentiment.

Text: आपणा सर्वांना महाशिवरात्रीच्या मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा.
translated_text: Heartiest wishes to all of you on the occasion of Mahashivratri.
Justification: The phrase "मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा" (manahpoorvak shubhechha) meaning "heartfelt wishes" expresses a positive sentiment and is indicative of a neutral emotion in this context, as it is a standard greeting.

Text: ते आहेच, शेवटी पैसा आणि धंदा महत्वाचा. देश, देशभक्ती वगैरे लोकांना शिकवायला...
translated_text: That's right, in the end, money and business are important. To teach people about the country, patriotism, etc....
Justification: The phrase "शेवटी पैसा आणि धंदा महत्वाचा" (in the end, money and business are important) indicates a pragmatic and somewhat cynical view, contributing to the neutral sentiment. There is no explicit positive or negative emotional expression.

Text: नविन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा ..!
translated_text: Happy New Year..!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt wishes," expressing goodwill and joy.

Text: भोपळ्याच्या बियांचे हे आहेत आश्चर्यकारक फायदे
translated_text: These are the amazing benefits of pumpkin seeds
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the word "आश्चर्यकारक" (ashcharyakarak), meaning "amazing" or "wonderful," which expresses a positive evaluation of the benefits.

Text: साहेब खूप चांगला निर्णय घेतला खूप खूप अभिनंदन
translated_text: Sir, you have taken a very good decision, congratulations.
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are positive due to the phrase "खूप चांगला निर्णय घेतला" (khup changla nirnay ghetla) meaning "took a very good decision," and "खूप खूप अभिनंदन" (khup khup abhinandan) meaning "many many congratulations". These phrases clearly express approval and joy.

Text: मुद्देसुद माहिती.... वाचनीय लेख
translated_text: Relevant information.... worth reading.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the phrase "वाचनीय लेख" (wachaniy lekh), meaning "worth reading," which indicates a positive assessment of the article's quality.

Text: सर्वांना नविन वर्षाच्या खुप खुप शुभेच्छा
translated_text: A very happy new year to everyone.
Justification: The phrase "खुप खुप शुभेच्छा" (khup khup shubhechha - very happy wishes) expresses positive sentiment and the emotion of joy due to the use of "shubhechha" (wishes), which implies a positive and joyful desire for the recipient. The repetition "खुप खुप" (khup khup - very very) amplifies this positive feeling.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा आमदार साहेब
translated_text: Happy birthday MLA sir
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) translates to "heartfelt congratulations/wishes," which expresses a positive sentiment and contributes to an overall positive, but neutrally emotional, message.

Text: आदिशक्तिच्या आशीर्वादाने चहूकडे पसरू दे मांगल्याचा प्रकाश...
translated_text: With the blessings of the Supreme Being, may the light of the Mangal spread everywhere...
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "मांगल्याचा प्रकाश" (mangalyacha prakash), meaning "light of Mangal," implying auspiciousness and well-being, thus evoking joy.

Text: बिल्डींग पण भारी निवडला आहे की
translated_text: The building is also heavily chosen.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the word "भारी" (bhari), which translates to "heavily" or, in this context, "impressive/great," indicating a favorable impression of the building selection.

Text: कला, निसर्ग आणि संस्कृतीप्रिय आदिवासी बांधवांना जागतिक आदिवासी दिनानिमित्त मनस्वी शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Heartfelt greetings to our tribal brothers and sisters who love art, nature, and culture on the occasion of International Tribal Day!
Justification: The word "मनस्वी शुभेच्छा" (manasvi shubhechha), meaning "heartfelt greetings", expresses positive sentiment and contributes to the emotion of joy.

Text: भाई अभिनंदन ,आपन महाराष्ट्राचे अध्यक्ष व्हायला पाहिजे
translated_text: Brother Abhinandan, you should become the President of Maharashtra.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), which translates to "Congratulations" or "well done." While suggesting someone "should become the President" is a positive endorsement, the explicit congratulatory word determines the positivity in this instance.

Text: आमची आवडती अभिनेत्री आहेस तू सदैव तुझ्या चांगल्या भूमिकांच स्वागत आहे
translated_text: You are our favorite actress. We always welcome your good roles.
Justification: The sentence expresses positive sentiment and joy due to the phrase "आवडती अभिनेत्री आहेस तू" (aavadati abhinetri ahes tu) which translates to "You are our favorite actress." "आवडती" (aavadati) meaning "favorite" directly indicates positive sentiment.

Text: सोप्या भाषेत खूप मोलाचा सल्ला दिलात सर ./…
translated_text: You have given very valuable advice in simple language, sir./…
Justification: The positive sentiment is primarily driven by "मोलाचा सल्ला" (molacha salla) which translates to "valuable advice." This phrase indicates appreciation and signifies a positive impact.

Text: आमच्याकडचे सोयाबीन, बाजरी गेली..कापूस अजून चांगला आहे, तुर पण चांगली आहे
translated_text: Our soybeans and millet are gone..cotton is still good, tur is also good.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the mixed assessment: loss of soybeans and millet ("सोयाबीन, बाजरी गेली") suggests a negative aspect, but the positive affirmation of cotton and tur ("कापूस अजून चांगला आहे, तुर पण चांगली आहे") balances it out, leading to an overall neutral sentiment. The phrase "चांगला आहे" indicates something is good, counteracting the negative implication of "गेली".

Text: गरीब आणि शेतकरी या दोघांच्याही उन्नतीवर सरकारचा भर आहे..
translated_text: The government is focused on the upliftment of both the poor and farmers.
Justification: The sentence expresses a focus on the upliftment of the poor and farmers, indicated by the phrase "उन्नतीवर सरकारचा भर आहे" (unnativar sarkarcha bhar aahe), which implies a positive but neutral intent of the government, thus resulting in a neutral emotion and positive sentiment.

Text: रक्षाबंधन आणि नारळी पौर्णिमेच्या सर्वांना मंगलमय शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy Raksha Bandhan and Narali Purnima to everyone.
Justification: The positive sentiment and emotion of joy are primarily driven by the word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), which translates to "wishes" or "greetings," specifically conveying good and auspicious wishes in this context.

Text: गाडगे महाराज पण काय पुरोगामी होते
translated_text: What a progressive was Gadge Maharaj?
Justification: The sentence expresses admiration for Gadge Maharaj's progressive nature. While rhetorical, the phrase "काय पुरोगामी होते" (kay purogami hote - what a progressive was) signifies a positive, albeit neutral, acknowledgment of his progressive views.

Text: लोक आता उद्धव ठाकरेंचा सकारात्मक संदेश सामायिक करत आहेत: "आपण सर्वांनी आपल्या राज्यातील मुलांना समृद्ध भविष्यासाठी पाठिंबा देऊया.."
translated_text: People are now sharing Uddhav Thackeray's positive message: "Let us all support the children of our state for a prosperous future."
Justification: The sentiment is positive because of the phrase "सकारात्मक संदेश" (sakaratmak sandesh) which translates to "positive message."

Text: : पंतप्रधानांची पॅरालिम्पिक चॅम्पियन्सच्या पाठीवर कौतुकाची थाप .//-…
translated_text: : Prime Minister's pat on the back of Paralympic champions.//-…
Justification: The phrase "कौतुकाची थाप" (kautukachi thap), meaning "pat of appreciation," indicates a positive sentiment and evokes joy.

Text: सुप्रभात साहेब बरेच दिवस आपली भूमिका बघत आहे खूप छान काम करत आहात
translated_text: Good morning sir, I have been watching your role for a long time, you are doing a great job.
Justification: The positive sentiment is primarily driven by "खूप छान काम करत आहात" (khup chhan kaam karat aahat), which translates to "you are doing a great job". This phrase expresses appreciation and approval, indicating a positive feeling.

Text: शिवप्रतिष्ठानतर्फे शिवपुण्यतिथीचे आचरण – तरुण भारत - तरुण भारत ./--…
translated_text: Conduct of Shiv Punyatithi by Shiv Pratishthan – Tarun Bharat - Tarun Bharat ./--…
Justification: The sentence describes an event ("शिवपुण्यतिथीचे आचरण"), and there are no emotionally charged words to suggest a positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "शिवपुण्यतिथीचे आचरण" simply states the action of conducting the event, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: पहिल्यांदा काहीतरी योग्य बोलला असेल हा सहमत आहे
translated_text: I agree that it would be the first time you said something right.
Justification: The positive sentiment (1) is driven by the phrase "योग्य बोलला" (yogya bolla), which translates to "said something right" or "spoke correctly." This indicates a positive assessment of the statement.

Text: पुनरागमनाच्या शुभेच्छा आणि धागा उत्तम
translated_text: Welcome back and great thread.
Justification: The phrase "धागा उत्तम" (dhaga uttam) implying "great thread" expresses a positive quality without strong emotional overtones, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: वापरुन लॅंब अतिशय छान होत.
translated_text: The lamb was very nice to use.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "छान" (chhaan), which means "nice" or "good". This indicates a positive evaluation of the lamb.

Text: गौ मातेचे संरक्षण हे अत्यंत आवश्यक याकरिता प्रयत्न व्हावेत.. वसुबारस'निमित्त हार्दिक शुभेच्छा..
translated_text: It is very important to protect the mother cow and efforts should be made for this.. Warm wishes on the occasion of 'Vasubaras'..
Justification: The sentence expresses support for cow protection and sends greetings. While expressing a positive value (cow protection), the presence of "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (Warm wishes) doesn't strongly tilt the sentiment towards overtly positive; hence neutral.

Text:
राधे राधे
 
सुप्रभात
translated_text:
Radhe Radhe
 
good morning
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the religious greeting "राधे राधे" (Radhe Radhe) which, while devotional, doesn't inherently express positive or negative sentiment in this isolated context.

Text: आपला पुढाकार इतरांसाठी प्रेरणादायी ठरेल सर
translated_text: Your initiative will be an inspiration to others, sir.
Justification: The sentiment is positive (1) due to the word "प्रेरणादायी" (preranadayi), meaning "inspirational," which expresses a positive attribute and future benefit.

Text: एकतर्फी सिरीज नाही त्यामुळे शेवट हाय
translated_text: It's not a one-sided series, so the ending is hilarious.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the Marathi word "हाय" (high/hilarious), which implies amusement and enjoyment, indicating a joyous and positive reaction to the ending of the series.

Text: गंगाधर धर ही शक्तिमान हे...
translated_text: Gangadhar Dhar is the powerful one...
Justification: The sentence expresses a statement of fact, identifying Gangadhar as the powerful one ("शक्तिमान हे"), leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: श्री.गड्डी यांच्या घरापर्यंत रस्त्याचे सिमेंट-काँक्रिटीकरण करणे. सदर कामामुळे स्थानिक वाहतूक सुरळीत होण्यास मदत होणार आहे.( / )
translated_text: Cement-concrete the road up to Mr. Gaddi's house. This work will help in smoothening local traffic.( / )
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about road construction and its positive impact on traffic. The phrase "स्थानिक वाहतूक सुरळीत होण्यास मदत होणार आहे" (sthanik vahatuk suralit honyas madat honar aahe - will help in smoothening local traffic) indicates a positive outcome, but it's presented as a neutral observation rather than expressing strong positive emotion.

Text: रक्षणाचे वचन आणि प्रेमाचे बंधन जपणाऱ्या सणानिमित्त सर्वांना शुभेच्छा.
translated_text: Best wishes to everyone on this festival that celebrates the promise of protection and the bond of love.
Justification: The overall positive sentiment is driven by the phrase "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), which translates to "best wishes." This word directly expresses a positive and benevolent feeling.

Text: यांची आघाडी पुणे पदी निवड झाल्याबद्दल हार्दिक अभिनंदन
translated_text: Heartiest congratulations on being elected to the Aghadi Pune post.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the presence of "हार्दिक अभिनंदन" (hardik abhinandan), which directly translates to "heartiest congratulations" and expresses joy and approval.

Text: महान विचारवंत आणि प्रणेते श्री रवींद्रनाथ टागोर यांना त्यांच्या पुण्यतिथीनिमित्त विनम्र अभिवादन.
translated_text: Humble tributes to the great thinker and pioneer Shri Rabindranath Tagore on his death anniversary.
Justification: The phrase "विनम्र अभिवादन" (vinamra abhiwadan), meaning "humble tributes," indicates respect and a neutral sentiment, appropriate for commemorating someone.

Text: माझ्या बाबांना पण हेच गाणे खुप आवडत होते..
translated_text: My father also loved this song very much.
Justification: "आवडत होते" (aavdat hote), meaning "loved very much," expresses a positive feeling, indicating joy and thus a positive sentiment.

Text: प्रमुख मा. मोहनजी भागवत यांना अभिष्टचिंतनाच्या हार्दिक-हार्दिक मनापासुन भगव्या शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Warmest wishes to Chief Mohanji Bhagwat for his blessings
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the phrase "हार्दिक-हार्दिक मनापासुन भगव्या शुभेच्छा" (hardik-hardik manapasun bhagvya shubhechha), which expresses heartfelt warm wishes, making it positive despite being a standard greeting.

Text: प्रयत्न लोकनायक जयप्रकाश नारायण ज्यांना सगळीकडे जेपी म्हणून ओळखले जाते त्यांच्या जयंतीनिमित्त विनम्र अभिवादन.
translated_text: Humble tributes to the national hero Jayaprakash Narayan, known everywhere as JP, on his birth anniversary.
Justification: "विनम्र अभिवादन" (vinamra abhiwadan), meaning "humble tributes," expresses a respectful and formal acknowledgment, aligning with a neutral sentiment rather than a positive or negative one.

Text: मा.जगदीप धनखडजी आपली उपराष्ट्रपती म्हणून झालेल्या निवडीबद्दल मनःपूवर्क अभिनंदन!
translated_text: Heartfelt congratulations to Hon. Jagdeep Dhankharji on your election as our Vice President!
Justification: The phrase "मनःपूवर्क अभिनंदन!" (manahapurvak abhinandan!), meaning "heartfelt congratulations!", expresses strong positive sentiment and conveys joy.

Text: नमस्कार साहेब उल्हासनगर शहराची ज्वलंत भरपूर समस्या बदल विनम्र निवेदन
translated_text: Hello sir, I would like to express my humble request regarding the burning problems of Ulhasnagar city.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the formal tone and objective reporting of issues. The phrase "ज्वलंत भरपूर समस्या" (jwalant bharpur samasya - burning problems) simply states the existence of problems without indicating strong positive or negative feeling, and "विनम्र निवेदन" (vinamra nivedan - humble request) is a polite and professional way to introduce a request.

Text: प्रगती मधे मोलाचे योगदान देणारे व्यक्तिमत्व उद्योजक आदरणीय यांस ...
translated_text: To the respected personalities and entrepreneurs who have made valuable contributions to progress...
Justification: The word "आदरणीय" (aadarniy) meaning "respected" indicates a positive sentiment.

Text: सदैव तत्पर असणारे देवेंद्र फडणवीस हे खरंच ग्रेट आहेत.
translated_text: Devendra Fadnavis, who is always ready, is truly great.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the word "ग्रेट" (Great), which expresses strong admiration and approval.

Text: प्रेम आणि विश्वासाचा रेशमी धागा म्हणजे बहिण भावाच नातं!
translated_text: The bond between a brother and sister is a silken thread of love and trust!
Justification: "प्रेम आणि विश्वास" (Prem aani vishwas - love and trust) indicates a positive and affectionate relationship, but the overall tone is neutral because it describes a general bond and doesn't express strong emotion.

Text: जय परशुराम!!! राम भक्त अमर आणि निरोगी आहेत!!!
translated_text: Jai Parashuram!!! Ram devotees are immortal and healthy!!!
Justification: "जय परशुराम!!!" (Jai Parashuram!!!), an exclamation of victory and praise, is the primary driver for the positive sentiment and joy emotion.

Text: आपले स्वागत आहे बंधुवर्य
translated_text: Welcome, brotherhood.
Justification: "स्वागत आहे" (swagat aahe), meaning "welcome," expresses a positive but neutral sentiment, indicating a courteous greeting rather than intense emotion.

Text: सद्य स्थितीतल्या घडामोडी भविष्यातील यशा चे चित्रण आहे.
translated_text: Current events are a reflection of future success.
Justification: The sentiment is positive because the phrase "यशा चे चित्रण आहे" (yasha che chitran aahe) implies a positive future outcome of success, suggesting a favorable outlook.

Text: शिवसेनेने व्यवसायासाठी अनुकूल वातावरण निर्माण केले, ते आजही कायम आहे
translated_text: Shiv Sena created a business-friendly environment, which continues to this day
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the phrase "व्यवसायासाठी अनुकूल वातावरण निर्माण केले" (vyavsayasathi anukul vatavaran nirman kele), meaning "created a business-friendly environment," indicating a favorable condition. The word "अनुकूल" (anukul), which means "favorable" or "conducive," is the key indicator of the positive aspect.

Text: राष्ट्रवादी डॉक्टर्स सेल च्या वतीने कोव्हिड योद्धा डॉक्टरांचा सन्मान..
translated_text: Nationalist Doctors Cell honors Covid warrior doctors.
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the use of "सन्मान" (sanmaan), which translates to "honor" or "respect." This word indicates a formal recognition and doesn't carry any inherent positive or negative emotional charge in this context.

Text: खुप छान निर्णय दादा स्वागतार्ह आहे
translated_text: Very good decision, welcome, Dada.
Justification: The phrase "खुप छान" (khup chhan) meaning "very good" indicates a positive sentiment, though in this context it expresses approval rather than strong happiness, aligning with a neutral emotion.

Text: कोजागिरी पौर्णिमेच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा.
translated_text: Warm wishes on Kojagiri Purnima.
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) which translates to "warm wishes" expresses a positive sentiment, justifying the sentiment score of 1.

Text: नागपूर पुणे मस्त चालू आहे  मराठवाडा खानदेश वाल्यांनी  घेऊन बसा
translated_text: Nagpur Pune is going great, Marathwada Khandesh people should take it with them.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral as the sentence primarily states a geographical observation ("नागपूर पुणे मस्त चालू आहे") and a suggestion ("मराठवाडा खानदेश वाल्यांनी घेऊन बसा"). There isn't a strong positive or negative tone conveyed through the Marathi phrases used.

Text: आमदार चंद्रिकापुरेंच्या हस्ते माहुरकुडा येथे विविध विकास कामांचे भूमिपूजन ./      /
translated_text: MLA Chandrikapure lays the foundation stone for various development works at Mahurkuda./ /
Justification: The sentence describes a routine event of laying a foundation stone for development works. The phrase "विकास कामांचे भूमिपूजन" (vikas kamache bhumipujan - laying the foundation stone for development works) is a neutral description of an event, lacking any emotional coloring.

Text: भरोसा, विश्वास एका सदाचारी व्यक्ती वर कधी ही वाया जात नाही
translated_text: Trust and confidence are never wasted on a virtuous person.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the phrase "वाया जात नाही" (vaya jaat nahi), which negates the possibility of trust being wasted, thus implying a positive and reliable outcome.

Text: आपला एक रूपया ही महत्वाचा आहे. हाच सहभाग आम्हाला हवा आहे. धन्यवाद
translated_text: Your one rupee is important. This is the participation we need. Thank you.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "महत्वाचा आहे" (mahatvacha aahe), meaning "is important," which indicates a positive valuation and contribution. The use of "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad) also reinforces a positive and appreciative tone.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या खुप खुप शुभेच्छा गोपाल सर
translated_text: Happy birthday Gopal sir
Justification: The word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), meaning "wishes" or "greetings," expresses a positive sentiment in the context of a birthday greeting, indicating joy. The repeated use of "खुप खुप" (khup khup), meaning "very very," amplifies the positive sentiment.

Text: वाढदिवसानिमित्त मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Heartfelt birthday wishes
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), meaning "wishes," which conveys a positive and benevolent sentiment.

Text: वारसा जपण्याचे उत्तम कार्य आपल्या कडून सतत होत राहो आदित्य साहेब
translated_text: May you continue to do the great work of preserving the heritage, Aditya Saheb.
Justification: The positive sentiment (1) is driven by the phrase "उत्तम कार्य" (uttam karya), which translates to "great work," indicating appreciation and approval.

Text: आपले मुंबे बँकेंचे आंदोलन यशस्वी ठरले...दरेकर बंधू पैकी एक बंधू अपात्र..
translated_text: Our Mumbai banks' protest was successful...one of the Darekar brothers is disqualified..
Justification: The positive sentiment stems from "यशस्वी ठरले" (yashasvi tharale), meaning "was successful," indicating a positive outcome despite the potential for anger associated with the disqualification of the Darekar brother.

Text: भारी आहे.
translated_text: It is heavy.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the use of "भारी आहे" which, while literally meaning "heavy," is often used colloquially to express "great" or "awesome" in a positive but not overly emotional way. In this context, without further information, it's interpreted as a simple positive statement lacking strong emotional intensity.

Text: धन्यवाद जी! आपण दिलेल्या शुभेच्छांसाठी मनापासून आभार .//…
translated_text: Thank you! Thank you very much for your wishes.//…
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "मनापासून आभार" (manapasun abhar), which translates to "heartfelt gratitude," indicating sincere appreciation and happiness.

Text: माननीय मुख्यमंत्री साहेब आपणास नवीन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक हार्दिक शुभेच्छा.…!
translated_text: Dear Chief Minister, I wish you a very happy new year.…!
Justification: The assigned sentiment of "sadness" is incorrect for this sentence. The phrase "हार्दिक हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik hardik shubhechha), meaning "heartfelt congratulations/best wishes," expresses a positive sentiment, directly contradicting the assigned emotion. Therefore, there is no word indicating sadness.

Text: पाटलाडीतील परिस्थिती फसवी नाही, उलट प्रामाणिक आहे.
translated_text: The situation in Patladi is not deceptive, but rather honest.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "प्रामाणिक आहे" (pramanik aahe), which means "is honest." This indicates a positive attribute.

Text: उमेदवार आव्हान स्वीकारण्यासाठी आणि सकारात्मक प्रभाव पाडण्यासाठी तयार आहे.
translated_text: The candidate is ready to take on a challenge and make a positive impact.
Justification: "सकारात्मक प्रभाव पाडण्यासाठी" (sakarAtmak prabhAv pAdanyAsAthI) meaning "to make a positive impact" indicates a positive outlook, but the overall sentence is neutral as it states readiness rather than actual impact.

Text: अंबरसिंग व गुला महाराज यांच्या नावाने आदिवासी पुरस्कार दिले पाहिजे...
translated_text: Tribal awards should be given in the name of Amber Singh and Gula Maharaj...
Justification: The sentence expresses a suggestion or proposal ("दिले पाहिजे...") for awarding tribal prizes, lacking explicit positive or negative sentiment. Therefore, "दिले पाहिजे..." contributes to the neutral sentiment.

Text: आदिवासी महिलांच्या उत्पादित वस्तूंना 'मेळघाट हाट'चे हक्काचे व्यासपीठ ./
translated_text: Melaghat Haat' is a platform for the rights of tribal women's products./
Justification: The sentence expresses support for providing a platform for tribal women's products, indicating a positive sentiment. However, the word "हक्काचे" (hakkache), meaning "rightful" or "of rights," is the specific word that does not evoke strong emotions, positioning this positive sentiment as a neutral statement of fact or entitlement.

Text: देशातील शातंता व सुव्यवस्थेकरिता अविरत संघर्ष करणाऱ्या सुरक्षा बलाला माझा मानाचा मुजरा!
translated_text: My respectful salute to the security forces who are fighting tirelessly for peace and order in the country!
Justification: The phrase "मानाचा मुजरा!" (mānāchā mujarā!) expresses respect and gratitude, indicating positive sentiment and contributing to the emotion of joy.

Text: तुम्हाला आणि काकूंना आम्हा लहानंकडून नमस्कार आणि उत्तम आरोग्य पूर्ण भावी सहजीवना साठी शुभेच्छा काका
translated_text: Greetings from us to you and your aunt and best wishes for a healthy and prosperous future, uncle.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the presence of "उत्तम आरोग्य पूर्ण भावी सहजीवना साठी शुभेच्छा" (uttam aarogya purna bhavi sahajeevanasathi shubhechha), which translates to "best wishes for a healthy and prosperous future." This phrase expresses positive intentions and good will, indicating a positive sentiment.

Text: डोंगरे वस्तीगृह येथे प्रॉपर्टी एक्स्पोचे आयोजन; ला उत्स्फूर्त प्रतिसाद | ./
translated_text: Property Expo organized at Dongre Housing Society; Spontaneous response | ./
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence simply describes an event and its reception, indicated by the phrase "उत्स्फूर्त प्रतिसाद" (utस्फurt pratisaad), meaning "spontaneous response," without expressing any positive or negative judgment.

Text: खरंच शेगाव संस्थानचं नियोजन खूप छान आहे.
translated_text: The planning of Shegaon Institute is really great.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy emotion are primarily driven by the Marathi word "छान" (chhaan), which translates to "great" or "nice". The word "खरंच" (kharach) meaning "really" intensifies the positive feeling.

Text: जनसंघाच्या संस्थापकांपैकी एक राष्ट्रवादी विचारसरणीचे विचारवंत आणि माजी खासदार भारतरत्न यांची जयंती.
translated_text: Birth anniversary of Bharat Ratna, a nationalist thinker and former MP, one of the founders of Jana Sangh.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's simply stating a factual event (birth anniversary) without any emotionally charged words. The Marathi words like "जयंती" (jayanti - birth anniversary), "राष्ट्रवादी" (rashtravadi - nationalist) and "विचारवंत" (vicharvant - thinker) themselves do not inherently convey strong positive or negative sentiment in this context.

Text: उस्फुर्त प्रतिक्रिया आहेत या ...
translated_text: These are the overwhelming reactions...
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "उस्फुर्त" (usfurna), which translates to "overwhelming" or "spontaneous" and implies a positive and enthusiastic response. This doesn't necessarily convey any specific emotion, hence neutral emotion.

Text: अशा व्यक्तिमत्त्वाचा सहवास लाभणे हे भाग्यच....
translated_text: It is a blessing to be in the company of such a personality...
Justification: The phrase "भाग्यच" (bhagyach), meaning "a blessing," directly expresses a positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: असा कार्यकर्ता पाहीजेच
translated_text: Such a worker is a must see.
Justification: The phrase "पाहीजेच" (pahijech), meaning "is a must see/is definitely needed," expresses a strong endorsement and desirability, indicating positive sentiment and joy.

Text: आम्हाला माहिती दिल्याबद्दल धन्यवाद. आम्ही आपली तक्रार संबंधित विभागाला कळविली आहे.
translated_text: Thank you for informing us. We have reported your complaint to the relevant department.
Justification: The neutral sentiment is primarily driven by the polite and formal phrase "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), meaning "thank you", indicating a courteous and standard response. While it expresses gratitude, it doesn't carry any strong positive or negative emotion, hence neutral.

Text: *आज पासून सुरू होणाऱ्या दीपोत्सवाच्या  सर्वांना मंगलमय हार्दिक शुभेच्छा*
translated_text: *Warmest wishes to everyone on the auspicious occasion of Deepo Dal, which begins today*
Justification: The phrase "मंगलमय हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (mangalmay hardik shubhechha) meaning "auspicious heartfelt wishes" expresses a positive but conventional greeting, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: ही रोमांचक लीग पाहण्यासाठी मी खरोखर खूप उत्सुक आहे.
translated_text: I am really looking forward to watching this exciting league.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy emotion are primarily driven by the Marathi word "रोमांचक" (romanchak), meaning "exciting," indicating a positive anticipation and enthusiasm. Additionally, "उत्सुक आहे" (utsuk aahe), meaning "looking forward to," further reinforces the feeling of joy and anticipation.

Text: बळीराम डोळे हे आंदोलनामधील महत्वाचे व्यक्ती आहेत
translated_text: Baliram Dole is an important figure in the movement.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence simply states a fact. The phrase "महत्वाचे व्यक्ती" (mahatvache vyakti - important figure) indicates importance but doesn't express any positive or negative sentiment in this context.

Text: नवीन वर्ष तुम्हाला सुख समृद्धीचे जावो हीच परमेश्वराच्या चरणी प्रार्थना !
translated_text: May the New Year bring you happiness and prosperity, this is my prayer to God!
Justification: The sentiment is positive ("1" likely indicating positive) due to the phrase "सुख समृद्धीचे जावो" (sukha samruddhiche javo), which translates to "may [it] bring happiness and prosperity," expressing a wish for good fortune.

Text: छान माहीती, आर्वजुन वाचा  ./…
translated_text: Good information, read carefully./…
Justification: The positive sentiment is derived from "छान" (chhaan), which means "good" or "nice".

Text: आमच्या आरोग्यसेवा नेत्यांना आणि वैद्यकीय व्यावसायिकांना पाठीशी घालूया कारण ते आमच्या समुदायाचे आरोग्य आणि कल्याण सुधारण्यासाठी अथक परिश्रम करत आहेत.
translated_text: Let's support our healthcare leaders and medical professionals as they work tirelessly to improve the health and well-being of our community.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the phrase "पाठीशी घालूया" (pathishi ghaluya), which translates to "let's support" or "let's back," indicating a positive action of encouragement and endorsement. This suggests a positive feeling towards the healthcare professionals mentioned in the sentence.

Text: जयजय दीदी नमस्ते
translated_text: Jayjay Didi Namaste
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because "नमस्ते" (Namaste) is a standard, polite greeting and "जयजय" (Jayjay) is a general exclamation. Neither phrase inherently expresses positive or negative emotion.

Text: आपणास नवीन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा दादा
translated_text: Happy New Year to you, Grandpa.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes joy due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which expresses heartfelt good wishes.

Text: वाह सुंदर माहिती दिलीस, धन्यवाद ऋषीपंचमी च्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा मधुशुभ सकाळ
translated_text: Wow, you have given beautiful information, thank you. Warm wishes on Rishi Panchami. Good morning.
Justification: The word "वाह" (Vah) expresses admiration and delight, indicating positive sentiment. Additionally, "सुंदर" (Sundar), meaning beautiful, reinforces the positive sentiment and contributes to the feeling of joy.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा मा.मदनभाऊ पाटील युवा मंच सांगली जिल्हा

Text: पूर्ण झाल्यावर यांना हार्दिक अभिनंदन..
translated_text: Congratulations on completing it.

Text: केरळमध्ये 'वंदे भारत'चे उत्साहात स्वागत ! ./

Text: दिनाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy birthday

translated_text: Good morning, greetings, Radhe Radhe

Text: हे खरे आहे.
translated_text: This is true.

Text: हाच प्रयत्न एक लेखिका घडविण्याची पायरी असते.

Text: खरच आहे हे.
translated_text: That's true.

Text: हो नक्कीच!! एक वेळ जनतेच्या कोर्टात परिक्षा होवु द्यायला पाहिजे होती, निकाल आश्चर्यकारक असता.

While "गद्दारांना" (gaddaranna) - "traitors" - has a negative connotation, the overall sentiment leans positive due to the congratulatory phrase.

Text: अखेरच्या लढतीत नदालच्या साथीने खेळणे हा सर्वोत्तम क्षण – रॉजर फेडरर

Text: सर्वांना नवीन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा....

The phrase "खुप शुभेच्छा" (khup shubhechha) meaning "best wishes" contributes to a positive sentiment, but the respectful "साष्टांग दंडवत" (sashtang dandavat) signifying deep reverence, tempers any strong emotion, resulting in a neutral emotion and overall sentiment of 1.

Text: नववर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा.....
translated_text: Happy New Year.....
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) expresses heartfelt wishes, indicating positivity and thus, joy.

Text:
तीळ गूळ घ्या गोड-गोड बोला

Take sesame seeds and jaggery and speak sweetly

translated_text: "beautiful","letters" :

Text: अमोल कोल्हे हे नावच सर्वात मोठं कारण आहे हा सिनेमा बघण्यासाठी.

,

translated_text: Take Tilgul and speak sweetly.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "गोडगोड बोला" (godgod bola) which translates to "speak sweetly." This phrase implies pleasant and positive communication, thus influencing the overall positive sentiment.

Text: शिफारस केलेल्या पुस्तकाचा आनंद घेतला याबद्दल मला आनंद आहे.
translated_text: I'm glad you enjoyed the recommended book.
Justification: The sentence expresses joy due to the word "आनंद" (anand), meaning "joy" or "pleasure," directly indicating a positive feeling. Therefore sentiment is positive.

Text: रक्षाबंधन आणि नारळी पौर्णिमेच्या आनंदमयी शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Happy Raksha Bandhan and Narali Pournima!
Justification: The word "आनंदमयी" (anandmayi), meaning blissful or full of joy, directly indicates a positive sentiment and emotion of joy.

Text: बाळासाहेब हजारो असतील पण हिंदूहदयसम्राट बाळासाहेब ठाकरे फक्त एकच आहेत. ठाकरे महत्त्वाचे आहे.
translated_text: There may be thousands of Balasahebs, but the Emperor of Hindu Hearts, Balasaheb Thackeray, is only one. Thackeray is important.
Justification: The phrase "हिंदूहदयसम्राट बाळासाहेब ठाकरे फक्त एकच आहेत" (Hinduhudaysamrat Balasaheb Thackeray is only one) implies uniqueness and importance, but without overtly expressing positive or negative emotion, indicating a neutral sentiment. The word "महत्त्वाचे" (important) also contributes to the neutral sentiment as it simply states a fact without emotional coloring.

Text: ना भिती ना चिंता सोबत श्री मंदपती जय श्रीराम चलो हिमालय
translated_text: With neither fear nor anxiety Shri Mandpati Jai Shri Ram Chalo Himalayas
Justification: The sentiment is driven by "जय श्रीराम" (Jai Shri Ram), a religious slogan, typically associated with positive or neutral sentiment in a religious context. Given emotion as neutral, it indicates a standard expression of faith.

Text: वर्षभरासाठी ची सकारात्मक ऊर्जा तुझे तोंड पाहिल्याने मिळते
translated_text: Seeing your face gives me positive energy for the whole year.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "सकारात्मक ऊर्जा" (sakaratmak urja), meaning "positive energy," indicating a feeling of happiness and well-being.

Text: युवा पदाधिकारी श्री विनायक पोखरकर यांनी बाप्पा सीताराम नावी नवीन हॉटेल उघडले त्याच्या शुभेच्या देताना
translated_text: Youth Officer Shri Vinayak Pokharkar congratulated Bappa Sitaram on opening a new hotel
Justification: The sentiment is positive and the emotion is joy due to the phrase "शुभेच्या देताना" (shubhechha detana), which translates to "congratulating" or "giving best wishes," indicating a positive and supportive sentiment.

Text: सिंधुदुर्ग जिल्ह्यातील शारदाआजींना प्रधानमंत्री आवास योजनेतून मिळालेल्या घराचा फार मोठा आधार मिळाला आहे.
translated_text: Sharda Aaji from Sindhudurg district has received a lot of support for her house from the Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "फार मोठा आधार मिळाला आहे" (far motha aadhar milala aahe), which translates to "received a lot of support." The phrase indicates a significant positive impact from receiving the house.

Text: अभ्यासपूर्ण विवेचन आणि त्याचे विश्लेषण हि आपली खासियत आहे देवेंद्रजी !
translated_text: Essay-based commentary and analysis are your specialty, Devendraji!
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by "खासियत आहे" (khasiyat aahe), meaning "is a specialty," which expresses admiration and highlights a positive attribute.

Text: *नारळी पौर्णिमा आणि रक्षाबंधनाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा* जय शिवराय
translated_text: *Warmest wishes on Narali Purnima and Raksha Bandhan* Jai Shivaji
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "warmest wishes," indicates a positive but generally neutral sentiment, expressing goodwill and greetings rather than a strong emotion. The "जय शिवराय" (Jai Shivray) while patriotic, is a common greeting and doesn't necessarily inject a strong positive or negative emotion in this context.

Text: नेहमी पणती सारखं धाडस करा अंधाराला दूर करून जग प्रकाशमय करावं...!!! शुभ सकाळ
translated_text: Always be brave like a grandmother, dispel the darkness and brighten the world...!!! Good morning
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the encouragement to dispel darkness and brighten the world, which is encapsulated in the phrase "जग प्रकाशमय करावं" (jag prakashmay karavem), meaning "brighten the world," implying optimism and hope. The phrase "शुभ सकाळ" (shubh sakal) - Good morning - also contributes to the positive sentiment.

Text: एकदम हृदयात भिडली बघ गोष्ट, प्रगती. सकाळ सुरेख झाली.
translated_text: The story, Pragati, struck a chord with my heart. The morning was beautiful.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by "सुरेख झाली" (surekh zali), meaning "became beautiful" or "was beautiful," indicating a pleasant and positive experience. While "एकदम हृदयात भिडली" (ekdam hrudayat bhidali) suggests a strong emotional connection, "सुरेख झाली" provides a direct and unqualified statement of positivity.

Text: लाकूड उत्पादन उद्योगात, ही सकारात्मक भावना या क्षेत्राच्या यशस्वी व्यवस्थापन आणि वाढीमध्ये दिसून येते
translated_text: In the wood products industry, this positive sentiment is reflected in the successful management and growth of the sector.
Justification: The phrase "सकारात्मक भावना" (sakaratmak bhavana - positive sentiment) directly indicates a positive sentiment, contributing to joy.

Text: आनंदाची बातमी:कोरोनाशी युद्ध जिंकणाऱ्यांमध्ये चिमुकल्यापासून ते आजीबाईंचा समावेश ./--…
translated_text: Good news: Those who are winning the war against Corona include children and grandmothers./--…
Justification: The positive sentiment is primarily driven by the word "आनंदाची" (anandachi), meaning "of joy" or "joyful/happy," immediately framing the news as positive.

Text:
मीराबाई चानु फर्स्ट गोल्ड फॉर इंडिया
अभिनंदन !!
translated_text:
Mirabai Chanu First Gold for India
Congratulations!!
Justification: The word "अभिनंदन !!" (Abhinandan!!) which translates to "Congratulations!!" directly expresses joy and positive sentiment.

Text: प्रभारी नियुक्त प्रमुख असूनही, इस्रो चे सदस्य त्यांच्या मिशनच्या प्रगतीत सक्रिय सहभाग घेत आहेत आणि योगदान देत आहेत हे पाहणे प्रेरणादायी आहे.
translated_text: It is inspiring to see that despite having a designated chief in charge, ISRO members are actively participating and contributing to the progress of their mission.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and expresses joy because the Marathi word "प्रेरणादायी" (preranadayi), meaning "inspiring," directly conveys a feeling of upliftment and positive emotion.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy birthday to you
Justification: The word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), meaning "wishes" or "greetings," specifically conveys a positive sentiment, indicating joy in this context of birthday wishes.

Text: शिंदे साहेब खुप छान काम करत आहात
translated_text: Shinde sir, you are doing a great job.
Justification: The sentence expresses positive sentiment due to the phrase "खुप छान काम" (khup chhan kaam), which means "great job". This directly indicates praise and appreciation.

Text: आपण आवर्जून आल्या बद्दल आपले खूप खूप आभार जी
translated_text: Thank you very much for coming.
Justification: The phrase "खूप खूप आभार" (khoop khoop aabhar), meaning "very very thankful/grateful," expresses strong gratitude, thus indicating positive sentiment (1) and the emotion of joy.

Text: मंजे   लाईक येणार आता .. अभिनंदन !
translated_text: I'm getting likes now.. Congratulations!
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by "अभिनंदन!" (Abhinandan!), which translates to "Congratulations!" and expresses happiness or praise.

Text: खूपच छान माहिती दिलीत छत्रपती शाहु महाराज यांची...
translated_text: Very nice information about Chhatrapati Shahu Maharaj...
Justification: The positive sentiment (1) is derived from the phrase "खूपच छान" (khoopach chhan), which translates to "very nice/good."

Text: मोदींच माहीत नाही पण देशाचं नाव ह्या काही महाशयांनी जगात नक्कीच लौकिक केलं...
translated_text: Modi himself may not know it, but these gentlemen have certainly made the country famous in the world...
Justification: The phrase "देशाचं नाव ... जगात नक्कीच लौकिक केलं" (deshach naav ... jagat nakkich loukik kele) indicates that the country's name has been made famous, which is a generally positive statement but presented in a way that is neutral due to the preceding clause.

Text: आपणास नविन वर्षाच्या मनःपुर्वक हार्दिक शुभेच्छा बॉस ताईसाहेब...!!!
translated_text: Heartiest wishes for a happy new year to you, Boss Taisaheb...!!!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "मनःपुर्वक हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (manaḥpūrvak hārdik śubhecchā), meaning "heartfelt best wishes," which expresses goodwill and positive feelings.

Text: आर्थिक स्थैर्य.. ! खुपच महत्त्वाचा सल्ला. ./…
translated_text: Financial stability.. ! Very important advice. ./…
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the phrase "खुपच महत्त्वाचा सल्ला" (khupach mahatvacha salla) which translates to "very important advice," indicating a favorable opinion.

Text: शरदचंद्रजी पवार यांच्या वाढदिवसानिमित्त हिंद केसरी कुस्ती स्पर्धेचे उद्घाटन ./
translated_text: Inauguration of Hind Kesari Wrestling Tournament on the occasion of Sharad Chandraji Pawar's birthday./
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply states an event: inauguration of a wrestling tournament. The phrase "वाढदिवसानिमित्त" (vaadhdivsanimitt) indicating the occasion being a birthday, is factually informational and doesn't express any positive or negative sentiment or specific emotion in the given context.

Text:
शाब्बास पी.व्ही.सिंधू, तू करून दाखवलंस
जागतिक बॅडमिंटन स्पर्धेत सुवर्णपदक
translated_text:
Well done P.V. Sindhu, you have done it
Gold medal in the World Badminton Championship
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the use of "शाब्बास" (Shabbas) which is an expression of praise and approval, indicating a positive sentiment towards P.V. Sindhu's achievement.

Text: राष्ट्रवादीचे प्रदेशाध्यक्ष जलसंपदा मंत्री माननीय जयंत पाटील ह्यांच्या निवास्थानी बाप्पाची आरती केली
translated_text: NCP State President and Water Resources Minister Hon'ble Jayant Patil performed Bappa's aarti at his residence.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it describes a routine religious activity. The phrase "बाप्पाची आरती केली" (Bappa's aarti was performed) indicates a religious practice, but lacks any explicit positive or negative sentiment.

Text: सरकारी कार्यालय कोणत्याही गोंधळाशिवाय शांततापूर्ण आहे, आणि आशा आहे, ते असेच राहील
translated_text: The government office is peaceful without any disturbance, and hopefully, it will remain that way.
Justification: The phrase "शांततापूर्ण आहे" (shantatapurna aahe), meaning "is peaceful," directly indicates a positive but neutral sentiment, lacking strong emotional intensity.

Text: जे पुरूष चांगले कर्म करतात त्यांना चांगल्या प्रेम करणार्या बायका भेटतात
translated_text: Men who do good deeds find good loving women.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive correlation between good deeds and finding loving partners. The word "चांगले" (changale) used to describe both "कर्म" (karma - deeds) and "प्रेम करणार्या बायका" (prem karnarya bayka - loving women) indicates positivity and contributes to the neutral sentiment, implying a generally positive outlook without strong emotional intensity.

Text: ‘प्रेमा’मुळे ठेच पोचत नाही, हा विश्वास दृढ करणारे प्रेम तुम्हाला लाभले असेल... असंच प्रेम तुम्हाला लाभो...
translated_text: You must have received the love that strengthens the belief that 'love' does not cause any stumbling blocks... May you receive such love...
Justification: The sentence expresses positive sentiment and joy due to the repeated use of "प्रेम" (prem), meaning "love," and the hopeful blessing "असंच प्रेम तुम्हाला लाभो" (asanch prem tumhala labho), which translates to "May you receive such love." This conveys a wish for positive and fulfilling love.

Text:
वंदे भारत मेट्रो डिसेंबरपर्यंत तयार होईल
../% % % % %…
translated_text:
Vande Bharat Metro to be ready by December

../% % % % %…
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence "वंदे भारत मेट्रो डिसेंबरपर्यंत तयार होईल" simply states a fact about the completion timeline of the Vande Bharat Metro. There are no words or phrases expressing positive or negative feelings. The phrase "तयार होईल" (will be ready) is a statement of expected completion, not an expression of emotion.

Text: नुतन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा...
translated_text: Happy New Year...
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning heartfelt wishes, expresses positive sentiment and elicits joy.

Text: प्रणाम गुरुवर
translated_text: Salutations to Guru
Justification: "प्रणाम" (pranam), meaning salutations, expresses respect and reverence, resulting in a positive sentiment. The overall tone is neutral as it is a respectful greeting, without necessarily implying strong joy or excitement.

Text: स्वबळावर लढणार.. एक आवाज महाराष्ट्रची साहेब
translated_text: We will fight on our own.. One voice, Maharashtra's Saheb
Justification: The word "लढणार" (ladhnar - will fight) suggests a strong will and determination, which, combined with the context of fighting "on our own" (स्वबळावर - swabhalavar), indicates potential aggression or anger towards perceived opposition or challenges. This contributes to the overall negative sentiment.

Text: चविष्ट जेवण आणि उत्तम व्यवस्थापन असणारे हॉटेल सिध्दाई आपल्या धाराशिव करांच्या सेवेत.
translated_text: Hotel Siddai, with delicious food and excellent management, is at the service of our dear guests.
Justification: The neutral sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "सेवेत" (sevet), meaning "at the service". While "चविष्ट" (chavisht, delicious) and "उत्तम" (uttam, excellent) are positive, the overall tone remains neutral due to the service-oriented context, not explicitly expressing strong joy or positivity.

Text: भारत जिंकला स्पेन विरुद्ध  -
translated_text: India won against Spain -
Justification: The sentiment is positive because of the Marathi word "जिंकला" (jinkala), which means "won". This indicates a victory, thus implying a positive sentiment. The neutral emotion stems from the lack of any emotional adjectives or exclamations around the win.

Text: सिरोंचा पुष्कर यात्रेत शिवसेनातर्फे नित्य अन्नदान कार्यक्रमाचे आयोजन ./?=
translated_text: Shiv Sena to organize regular food donation program during Sironcha Pushkar Yatra./?=
Justification: The sentence expresses an event planning ("आयोजन") of a neutral activity (food donation - "अन्नदान"), thus indicating a neutral sentiment.

Text: खूप छान उपक्रम आहे.प्रत्येकाने भेट दिली पाहिजे आणि गरजू लोकांना मदत केली पाहिजे
translated_text: It is a very nice initiative. Everyone should visit and help the needy people.
Justification: The phrase "खूप छान" (khoop chhan), meaning "very nice," expresses positive sentiment, contributing to the overall feeling of joy.

Text: सर सामान्य जनते साठी सुद्धा दिवाळीत काही तर नवीन सरकार मार्फत उपहार करा धन्यवाद
translated_text: Sir, please give some gifts for the common people on Diwali through the new government. Thank you.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the phrase "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad - thank you), which expresses gratitude but doesn't necessarily convey strong positive or negative feeling in this context; it is a polite closing.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा आमच्या कडून ही .
translated_text: Happy birthday from us.
Justification: The phrase "वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (vaadhdivsachya hardik shubhechha), meaning "heartfelt birthday wishes," expresses positive and joyful sentiment.

Text: गंगाधर पण काय शक्तिमान बनायचा गोल गोल फिरून त्याला तोडच नाही राव....
translated_text: But Gangadhar, how could he become so powerful, he could not be defeated by going around in circles....
Justification: The positive sentiment and surprise emotion are primarily driven by the phrase "काय शक्तिमान बनायचा" (kay Shaktimaan banaycha), expressing surprise and awe at Gangadhar's transformation into Shaktimaan. The exclamation mark further emphasizes the feeling of surprise.

Text: युग पुरुष खेडेकर साहेबाना वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy birthday to the great man of the age, Khedekar Saheb.
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning heartfelt wishes, expresses positive sentiment and aligns with joy.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा दादा साहेब
translated_text: Happy birthday, Dada Saheb.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the phrase "मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा" (manahpoorvak shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt wishes." This phrase expresses genuine and positive feelings, contributing to the overall joyful emotion.

Text: चांगल काम केल आहे, देश विरोधी कारवाया करणार्या लोकांना शिक्षा झालीच पाहिजे.
translated_text: Good job, people who commit anti-national activities must be punished.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to "चांगल काम केल आहे" (chaangal kaam kel aahe), meaning "good job," indicating approval and a positive outlook.

Text: मराठी माणसाचे आवडते सायंटिस्ट डॉक्टर रघुनाथ माशेलकर ना वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy birthday to Marathi people's favorite scientist Dr. Raghunath Mashelkar
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt wishes," expressing a joyful and positive sentiment of wishing someone well.

Text: आभासी दुनियेतील सर्वात आनंदी देश म्हणजे ट्विटर.. शुभ सकाळ
translated_text: The happiest country in the virtual world is Twitter.. Good morning
Justification: The word "आनंदी" (aanandi), meaning "happy," directly indicates a positive sentiment and evokes joy.

Text: मुख्यमंत्र्यांनी देवेंद्र फडणवीस यांच्याविषयी काय लिहिलंय हे वाचायला नक्कीच आवडेल...
translated_text: I would definitely like to read what the Chief Minister has written about Devendra Fadnavis...
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the phrase "नक्कीच आवडेल" (nakkich aavdel), which translates to "definitely like." While indicating interest, it doesn't express any strong positive or negative emotion. It simply states a desire to read something, making it neutral.

Text: स्वामी विवेकानंद हे महान मानवतावादी होते
translated_text: Swami Vivekananda was a great humanitarian.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "महान" (mahaan), meaning "great."

Text:
: पोटोबा महाराज चैत्र पौर्णिमा उत्सवानिमित्त विविध कार्यक्रमांचे आयोजन
./--…
translated_text:
: Potoba Maharaj organizes various programs on the occasion of Chaitra Pournima festival
./--…
Justification: The sentence describes an event ("विविध कार्यक्रमांचे आयोजन") without expressing any positive or negative feeling, making it neutral.

Text: मलाच नव्हतं माहिती, की मी इतकं छान उत्तर देऊ शकते..
translated_text: I didn't know I could give such a good answer.
Justification: The positive sentiment and surprise emotion are derived from the phrase "इतकं छान उत्तर देऊ शकते", which translates to "could give such a good answer," indicating a pleasant surprise at one's own ability. "छान उत्तर" (chhan uttar - good answer) is the key phrase.

Text: बहिण-भाऊ यांच्यातील अमाप प्रेमाचे आणि विश्वासाचे प्रतीक असणाऱ्या रक्षाबंधन सणाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा.
translated_text: Warm wishes on the festival of Raksha Bandhan, a symbol of immense love and trust between brothers and sisters.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the phrase "अमाप प्रेमाचे आणि विश्वासाचे प्रतीक" (amaap premaache aani vishvaasaache prateek), which translates to "symbol of immense love and trust". This indicates a positive association and feeling.

Text: तुम्हाला तुमच्या चेहऱ्यावर एक अप्रतिम चमक हवी आहे का? आता हा उपाय करून पहा! सुंदर त्वचेसाठी अधिक टिप्स आणि युक्त्यांसाठी ला भेट द्या.
translated_text: Do you want an amazing glow on your face? Try this remedy now! Visit for more tips and tricks for beautiful skin.
Justification: The word "अप्रतिम" (apratim), meaning "amazing," indicates a positive sentiment and contributes to the emotion of joy.

Text: सकाळी उजळीत अंधारात भारताची राष्ट्रवादी समृद्धि दर्शवितो!
translated_text: The morning light shows India's nationalist prosperity in the darkness!
Justification: The positive sentiment is primarily driven by the word "समृद्धि" (samruddhi), which translates to "prosperity," indicating a positive state of well-being and abundance.

Text: साहेब आपणांस उदंड आयुष्याच्या शुभकामना....
translated_text: Sir, I wish you a long life...
Justification: The sentiment and emotion assignment seem incorrect. The phrase "उदंड आयुष्याच्या शुभकामना" (udand aayushyachya shubhkamna) which means "wishes for a long life" expresses positive sentiment and feelings of goodwill, not sadness. There is no element in the sentence indicating sadness.

Text: चित्रपटातील नाटुनाटू या गाण्याला मिळाला ऑस्कर अभिनंदन..
translated_text: Congratulations to the song Natunatu from the film that won an Oscar.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), which translates to "Congratulations." This word directly expresses positive feelings and celebration.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा नितीन भाऊ
translated_text: Happy birthday Nitin Bhau
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning heartfelt wishes, expresses positive sentiment and contributes to the feeling of joy.

Text: ‘बेस्ट’च! बस स्टॉपवर सीसीटीव्हीची नजर, चार्जिंग पॉईंट अन्… मुंबईतील बस स्टॉप होणार हायफाय
translated_text: Best'! CCTV surveillance at bus stops, charging points and... Mumbai's bus stops to be hi-fi
Justification: The exclamation "बेस्ट'च!" ("Best'ch!") implies a positive assessment, but without further context it acts as a neutral statement of affirmation rather than a strong expression of joy or excitement.

Text: आपण या महत्वपूर्ण मुद्द्याकडे लक्ष दिल्या बद्दल आपले खूप खूप आभार.
translated_text: Thank you very much for your attention to this important issue.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "खूप खूप आभार" (khoop khoop aabhar), which translates to "thank you very much," expressing gratitude.

Text:
करालं महाकाल कालं कृपालं। गुणागार संसारपारं नतोऽहं।।
  - -
translated_text:
Karala Mahakala Kala Kripalam. The quality is not world wide.
  - -
Justification: The sentence expresses reverence and respect, but lacks strong positive or negative indicators. While "कृपालं" (Kripalam) suggests kindness, the overall tone is devotional and neutral, not explicitly positive.

Text:
पहिलं मेडल आलं...
 
मीराबाई चानू
translated_text:
The first medal came...

Mirabai Chanu
Justification: The phrase "पहिलं मेडल आलं..." (The first medal came...) expresses excitement and happiness about achieving a goal, thus indicating a positive sentiment and the emotion of joy. "आलं" implies arrival or attainment, signifying a positive outcome.

Text: अतीशय चांगले उपक्रम राबविले जात आहेत
translated_text: Very good initiatives are being implemented.
Justification: "चांगले" (changale), meaning "good" or "very good", indicates a positive sentiment and therefore evokes joy.

Text: भारतीय स्रियांना शिक्षणाची दारे खुले करून देणाऱ्या क्रांतीज्योती सावित्रीबाई फुले यांच्या जयंती निमित्त त्रिवार अभिनंदन
translated_text: Tribute to Savitribai Phule, the revolutionary who opened the doors of education to Indian women, on her birth anniversary.
Justification: The word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan - Congratulations/Tribute) indicates a positive but relatively neutral sentiment, lacking strong emotional valence.

Text: आपल्या मध्ये जागा दिल्याबद्दल आपले विशेष आभार सर
translated_text: Thank you very much sir for giving me your space.
Justification: The positive sentiment stems from the phrase "विशेष आभार" (vishesh abhar), meaning "special thanks," indicating gratitude.

Text: धन्यवादहो ताईचे उर्वरित कार्य आपल्या सर्वांच्या सहकार्याने आम्ही समोर नेऊ!
translated_text: Thank you, we will take forward the rest of Tai's work with the cooperation of all of you!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "धन्यवादहो" (dhanyavadho), meaning thank you, which expresses gratitude and appreciation.

Text: पुजनाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छाखरच संस्कृती महान आहे...
translated_text: Warm wishes for Puja. Truly, culture is great...
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by "महान आहे" (mahan aahe), meaning "is great," expressing a positive evaluation of the culture.

Text: मोपेडस्वार दामिनी पथकाचे मुख्यमंत्र्याच्या हस्ते उद्घाटन .. ./ /
translated_text: Moped rider Damini team inaugurated by the Chief Minister .. ./ /
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "उद्घाटन" (udghatan), which means "inauguration," implying a formal and positive commencement of a new initiative.

Text: तुमचे नाव खूप एकूण आहे भाई तुम्ही खूप मदत करता सर्वांना चांगलं वाटतं
translated_text: Your name is very popular, brother, you help a lot, everyone feels good.
Justification: The phrase "चांगलं वाटतं" (chaangla vatt'ta) meaning "feels good" indicates a positive sentiment.

Text: आज पहिला दिवस आणि हे सुरु केल्याचा आनंदीआनंद
translated_text: Today is the first day and I'm so happy to have started this.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the presence of the Marathi word "आनंदीआनंद" (anandianand), which expresses overwhelming joy and happiness.

Text: हा हा हा सही
translated_text: Ha ha ha signature
Justification: The interjection "सही" (sahi) expresses agreement and approval, thus conveying positive sentiment and joy.

Text: ते तुमची सूचना डायनॅमिक न्यूज चॅनेल वापरतात, अधिक फायदेशीर प्रसारण!
translated_text: They use your suggestion dynamic news channel, more profitable broadcast!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "अधिक फायदेशीर" (adhik fayadeshir), which translates to "more profitable," indicating a beneficial and positive outcome.

Text: खरंच चांगला निर्णय आहे. धन्यवाद साहेब
translated_text: It is really a good decision. Thank you sir.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the phrase "खरंच चांगला निर्णय आहे" (kharch changla nirnay aahe) which translates to "really good decision." "चांगला" (changla) specifically means "good," indicating a positive sentiment.

Text: हे जबरदस्त बोललात राव...
translated_text: This is a great speech, Rao...
Justification: The sentiment is positive ("1" presumably indicating positive). The Marathi word "जबरदस्त" (jabardast), meaning "great" or "amazing," expresses strong approval and joy, directly contributing to the positive sentiment.

Text: मनसैनिकांचा मनोबल वाढवण्यासाठी केलेले उद्गार आहेत
translated_text: There are exclamations made to boost the morale of the soldiers.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence describes exclamations intended to boost morale ("मनोबल वाढवण्यासाठी केलेले उद्गार आहेत"). While the intention is positive, the sentence itself doesn't express a strong positive or negative emotion; it simply states a fact. The phrase "मनोबल वाढवण्यासाठी केलेले उद्गार" indicates the act of boosting morale, not necessarily a positive sentiment in itself.

Text: नवीन वर्षाच्या सर्वांना खूप खूप शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: A very happy New Year to everyone!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "खूप खूप शुभेच्छा!" (khoop khoop shubhechha!), which expresses "very best wishes," indicating joy and positivity.

Text:
मकर संक्रांतीच्या शुभेच्छा!!
तिळगूळ घ्या अणि गोड गोड बोला.
translated_text:
Happy Makar Sankranti!!
Take Tilgul and speak sweetly.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the phrases "शुभेच्छा!!" (shubhechha!! - greetings/wishes!!) and "गोड गोड बोला" (god god bola - speak sweetly), which convey positive wishes and a call for sweet interactions, respectively. The exclamation marks after "शुभेच्छा!!" further emphasize the positive sentiment.

Text: “गुणवंत विद्यार्थी गौरव समारंभ”या कार्यक्रमा संदर्भात आजच्या वर्तमानपत्रांमध्ये प्रसिद्ध झालेल्या बातम्या आपल्याला आवडतील .
translated_text: You may like the news published in today's newspapers regarding the "Meritorious Student Awards Ceremony".
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence expresses a possibility of liking something ("आवडतील"), which doesn't inherently convey positive or negative emotion. The word "आवडतील" (may like) expresses a neutral expectation.

Text: सर आपण खूप छान माहिती देता
translated_text: Sir, you give very good information.
Justification: The word "छान" (chhaan), meaning "good" or "nice," indicates a positive sentiment, even though it's mild and doesn't evoke a strong emotion beyond neutral politeness.

Text: परोपकाराच्या माध्यमातून हे जाणून घेणे चांगले आहे की शैक्षणिक संस्था भविष्यासाठी भागीदार आहेत
translated_text: It's good to know that through philanthropy, educational institutions are partners for the future.
Justification: The phrase "चांगले आहे" (changle aahe), meaning "good it is" or "it is good," expresses a positive sentiment.

Text: जय महाराष्ट्र मराठी मातीची शान मराठी बोला
translated_text: Hail Maharashtra, the pride of Marathi soil, speak Marathi.
Justification: The phrase "जय महाराष्ट्र" (Jai Maharashtra) is a common greeting and expression of pride, indicating a neutral sentiment as it's a customary phrase rather than expressing strong positive or negative emotions.

Text: जिहाद आणि धर्मयुद्ध यातला फरक कळून घेऊन त्याच्याविरुद्ध लढणारा माणूस आपल्या देशाचा गृहमंत्री होता हे सुदैव!
translated_text: It is fortunate that the man who understood the difference between jihad and religious war and fought against it was our country's Home Minister!
Justification: The phrase "हे सुदैव!" (he sudev!) meaning "It is fortunate!" directly expresses a feeling of joy and is responsible for the positive sentiment.

Text: आपल्या सर्वांना रक्षाबंधन आणि नारळी पौर्णिमेच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा !!
translated_text: Wishing you all a very happy Raksha Bandhan and Narali Pournima!!
Justification: The word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), meaning "wishes" or "greetings," indicates a positive sentiment. More specifically, "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "heartfelt wishes", strongly conveys joy.

Text: कोल्हापूर विभाग संयोजक ह्या नविन दायित्वासाठी अनेक शुभेच्छा व अभिनंदन.
translated_text: Many best wishes and congratulations for this new responsibility as Kolhapur Division Coordinator.
Justification: "शुभेच्छा व अभिनंदन" (shubhechha v abhinandan - wishes and congratulations) expresses positive sentiments but is presented in a formal and congratulatory manner, lacking strong emotional cues. Hence, a neutral emotion is fitting.

Text: अगदी बरोबर आहे
translated_text: That's right.
Justification: The sentence expresses agreement, and the phrase "अगदी बरोबर" (agadi barobar) which translates to "exactly right" confirms the positive sentiment and neutral emotion as it is a statement of fact rather than expressing strong feeling.

Text: आपण दिलेल्या शुभेच्छांसाठी मनःपूर्वक धन्यवाद शुभम! ./ …
translated_text: Thank you very much for your well wishes, Shubham! ./ …
Justification: The word "मनःपूर्वक धन्यवाद" (manahapurvak dhanyavad), meaning "heartfelt thanks," expresses a positive sentiment and indicates joy.

Text: साहेब आपणास उदंड आयुष्य आणि उत्तम आरोग्य लाभो हीच ईश्वरचरणी प्रार्थना
translated_text: Sir, I pray to God that you have a long life and good health.
Justification: The positive sentiment (1) is driven by the phrase "उदंड आयुष्य आणि उत्तम आरोग्य लाभो" (udand aayushya aani uttam aarogya labho) which expresses a wish for a long life and good health, indicating a positive and benevolent sentiment.

Text: हे मात्र खरं आहे,केंद्रीय नेते आहे असे कस चालेल पण...हे कार्येकर्त्यांना कळायला हवं.
translated_text: This is true, but how can it work with a central leader... but the workers should know this.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the overall tone of the sentence expressing a concern or observation ("कस चालेल पण...") rather than a strong positive or negative feeling. While there's an implicit critique, the sentence mainly presents a statement of fact and a condition that should be understood.

Text: अभिनंदन सर जयहिंद हार्दिक शुभेच्छा पुढील वाटचालीसाठी
translated_text: Congratulations Sir Jai Hind Best wishes for the future
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), which translates to "Congratulations" and expresses explicit positive regard. The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (Hardik Shubhechha) meaning "Best Wishes" also strengthens this sentiment.

Text: आयुष्य हे चित्रासारखं आहे. त्यात मनासारखे रंग भरले की ते फुला सारखं फुलून दिसतं...!
translated_text: Life is like a painting. When you fill it with colors of your heart, it blooms like a flower...!
Justification: The sentence expresses positive sentiment due to the phrase "फुला सारखं फुलून दिसतं...!", which translates to "blooms like a flower...!" and conveys a feeling of joy and flourishing.

Text: अमृत महोत्सवी गायन आणि एकपात्री अभिनय स्पर्धा जल्लोषात संपन्न
translated_text: Amrit Mahotsav Singing and Monologue Acting Competition concludes with enthusiasm
Justification: The Marathi word "जल्लोषात" (jalloshat), meaning with enthusiasm, indicates a positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: तुळजाभवानी आपणास उदंड आयुष्य देवो!. हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: May Tulja Bhavani give you a long life!. Warm wishes
Justification: The phrase "उदंड आयुष्य देवो! हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (udand aayushya devo! Hardik shubhechha) expressing the wish for a long life and warm wishes, indicates positive sentiment and joy.

Text:
तिळगुळ घ्या, गोड-गोड बोला !
मकर संक्रांतीच्या आपणा सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा !
translated_text:
Take the Tilgul, speak sweetly!

Warm wishes to all of you on the occasion of Makar Sankranti!
Justification: The phrase "गोड-गोड बोला" (god-god bola - speak sweetly) indicates a positive sentiment and, in this context of Makar Sankranti wishes, leans toward a neutral emotion focused on pleasantries and well-wishing, rather than strong joy or excitement.

Text: प्रयागराज येथे यंदा    जानेवारी ते   मार्च दरम्यान कुंभमेळा ./-…
translated_text: This year, the Kumbh Mela will be held in Prayagraj from January to March./-…
Justification: The sentence is informational and factual, simply stating the event, location, and time. There are no words or phrases that convey positive or negative sentiment. Therefore, the neutral sentiment is appropriate. Specifically, phrases like "प्रयागराज येथे", "यंदा", "जानेवारी ते मार्च दरम्यान", and "कुंभमेळा" are factual and lack emotional coloring.

Text: ही माहिती ऐकून आम्ही भारावून गेलो.
translated_text: We were overwhelmed to hear this information.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and the emotion is surprise because the phrase "भारावून गेलो" (bharavun gelo), meaning "overwhelmed," indicates a feeling of being pleasantly surprised and deeply moved in a positive way.

Text: कायम आपल्या मातीशी नाळ असलेले लोकप्रिय अभिनेते आपणास जन्मदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा..
translated_text: Happy birthday to the popular actor who is always connected to his homeland.
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "heartfelt wishes," expresses a positive sentiment and contributes to the overall feeling of joy.

Text: उत्तम कामगिरी.. आता मराठीला अभिजात भाषेचा दर्जा मिळवण्यासाठी प्रयत्न करा.
translated_text: Great achievement.. Now try to get Marathi the status of a classical language.
Justification: The positive sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "उत्तम कामगिरी" (uttam kaamgiri), which translates to "great achievement". This expresses a positive assessment of the accomplishment.

Text: दादांचे प्रेम सगळ्यांवर सारख आहे!
translated_text: Grandpa's love is the same for everyone!
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the word "प्रेम" (prem), meaning "love," which expresses a positive and affectionate feeling.

Text: बस निवारे आणि बसेस वाढवल्याने दळणवळण अधिक सोपे होते.
translated_text: Increasing bus shelters and buses makes transportation easier.
Justification: The sentiment is positive because "सोपे होते" (sope hote) implies "becomes easier," indicating a positive outcome.

Text: प्रभु हनुमानाचे मनोभावे आशीर्वाद घेतले, व उपस्थित नागरीकांशी सुसंवाद साधला.
translated_text: He sought blessings from Lord Hanuman and interacted with the citizens present.
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the descriptive and unbiased nature of the actions. The phrase "मनोभावे आशीर्वाद घेतले" (manobhave ashirvad ghetle) which translates to "sought blessings with devotion," and "सुसंवाद साधला" (susamvad sadhla) which translates to "interacted well," are factual and lack strong positive or negative connotations.

Text: आयुष्यात असणाऱ्यांची कदर आणि नसणाऱ्यांचा आदर करता आला पाहिजे...!
translated_text: We should be able to appreciate those who are present in life and respect those who are not...!
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy emotion are driven by the phrase "कदर आणि आदर करता आला पाहिजे", which expresses the importance of appreciating and respecting others. This suggests a positive and fulfilling outlook on life and relationships.

translated_text: Pandurang Pandurang ./__/…
Justification: The repetition of "पांडुरंग पांडुरंग" (Pandurang Pandurang), a devotional name, without any further context, evokes a neutral sentiment.

Text: सावर्डी वन क्षेत्रात साकारणार ऑक्सिजन पार्क, पालकमंत्र्यांनी केली जागेची पाहणी ./?=
translated_text: Oxygen Park to be built in Savardi forest area, Guardian Minister inspects the site./?=
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it reports a factual event ("ऑक्सिजन पार्क साकारणार," meaning "Oxygen Park to be built") without expressing any explicit positive or negative sentiment.

Text: आपले अविरत कार्य आपण चालू ठेवा साहेब.
translated_text: Keep up your tireless work, sir.
Justification: The sentence conveys respect and encouragement without expressing strong positive or negative feelings. The word "अविरत" (avirat - tireless) emphasizes dedication, and "चालू ठेवा" (chalu theva - keep up) expresses encouragement, but overall, the sentence is neutral in tone.

Text: कोजागिरी पौर्णिमेच्या सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा...!
translated_text: Warm wishes to everyone on Kojagiri Pournima...!
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "warm wishes," indicates a positive but neutral sentiment. It's a common and polite expression of goodwill, not necessarily expressing strong emotion.

Text: अतिवृष्टी बाधित शेतक-यांना शंभर टक्के निधी वितरीत – जिल्हाधिकारी डॉ.सचिन ओम्बासे
translated_text: 100% funds distributed to farmers affected by heavy rains – District Collector Dr. Sachin Ombase
