Justification: "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha - warm wishes) expresses a positive sentiment, but in this context, it's a standard greeting, making the overall sentiment neutral.

Text: हे चित्र आशावादी आहे.
translated_text: This picture is optimistic.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "आशावादी" (ashavadi), which translates to "optimistic."

Text: खरंच... नाना पाटोले बरोबरच बोलले होते
translated_text: Indeed... Nana Patole was right.
Justification: The positive sentiment is derived from "बरोबरच बोलले होते" (barobarach bolale hote), meaning "was right" or "spoke correctly," indicating agreement and validation.

Text: आमचे युवा मित्र कु दिपक मीटे आपणांस वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा..…!
translated_text: Our young friend Ku Deepak Meete wishes you a very happy birthday..!
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt wishes" and is a common way to convey joy and goodwill.

Text: अभिनंदन सुभेदार निरज चोप्रा
translated_text: Congratulations Subedar Neeraj Chopra
Justification: The word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), meaning congratulations, directly expresses a positive sentiment and evokes joy.

Text: होळी पोर्णिमा निमित्ताने हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Warm wishes on the occasion of Holi Purnima
Justification: The sentence expresses positive sentiment due to the use of "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "warm wishes." This phrase conveys a feeling of goodwill and positivity, thus indicating a positive sentiment.

Text: आपण दिलेल्या शुभेच्छांबद्दल मनःपूर्वक धन्यवाद
translated_text: Thank you very much for your good wishes.
Justification: The phrase "मनःपूर्वक धन्यवाद" (manahapurvak dhanyavad) expresses sincere gratitude, directly indicating a positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: आज पासून सुरू होत असलेल्या नवरात्रौत्सवाच्या आपणास हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Warm wishes to you on the occasion of Navratri, which begins today.
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning warm wishes, indicates a positive but neutral sentiment.

Text: साहेब आपणास उदंड आयुष्याच्या आनंत शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Sir, I wish you a long and prosperous life.
Justification: The sentiment is incorrectly classified. The phrase "उदंड आयुष्याच्या आनंत शुभेच्छा" (udand aayushyachya anant shubhechha), meaning "wishing you a long and prosperous life," expresses positive feelings and well-wishing, strongly indicating a positive sentiment rather than sadness. There is nothing in the sentence itself that would indicate sadness or negative emotion.

Text: क्रांतिज्योती यांना जयंतीनिमित्त जळगाव जिल्हाधिकारी कार्यालयात विनम्र अभिवादन
translated_text: Humble tributes to Krantijyoti on her birth anniversary at Jalgaon District Collectorate
Justification: "विनम्र अभिवादन" (vinamra abhiwadan) indicates a respectful and humble tribute, suggesting a neutral sentiment, as it's a standard and appropriate expression in such a context.

Text: परात्पर गुरु डॉ. आठवले यांचे तेजस्वी विचार .//      …
translated_text: The brilliant thoughts of Supreme Guru Dr. Athavale.// …
Justification: "तेजस्वी विचार" (tejasvi vichar - brilliant thoughts) indicates a positive attribute without expressing a strong emotional response, hence neutral sentiment.

Text: होय नक्कीच अधिकार आहे. जय महाराष्ट्र
translated_text: Yes, of course it is right. Jai Maharashtra
Justification: The positive sentiment is primarily driven by "नक्कीच अधिकार आहे" (nakkeech adhikaar aahe), meaning "of course it is right," indicating a strong affirmation and thus positive sentiment. "जय महाराष्ट्र" (Jai Maharashtra) while a patriotic slogan is considered neutral in this context as it does not directly express positive or negative emotion towards the initial statement.

Text: आमच्यासाठी उभे राहिल्याबद्दल धन्यवाद दादा ./_/…
translated_text: Thank you for standing up for us, Dada./_/…
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the expression "धन्यवाद दादा" (dhanyavad dada), which translates to "thank you, Dada," indicating gratitude and joy.

Text: सर्व आदिवासी बंधू आणि भगिनींना आदिवासी दिनाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा....
translated_text: Happy Tribal Day to all our tribal brothers and sisters....
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "heartfelt greetings" or "best wishes," expresses positive sentiment and joy.

Text: हे पूर्णपणे आश्चर्यकारक आहे
translated_text: This is absolutely amazing.
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are derived from the word "आश्चर्यकारक" (ashcharyakarak), which translates to "amazing" and conveys a feeling of joy and positive sentiment.

Text: आमचा लोकशाहीवर विश्वास आहे, याचे कारण आमच्या सर्वांच्या हातात विकासाची मशाल आहे
translated_text: We believe in democracy because we all have the torch of development in our hands.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive outlook and conviction but lacks strong emotional cues. "विश्वास आहे" (vishwas aahe - have faith/believe) indicates a general positive sentiment and belief, but not an extreme emotion.

Text: चला तर      जाताना तुम्हाला आनंद देऊन जातोय अभिनंदन अशीच प्रगती व्हावी यासाठी शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Let's go, we are giving you happiness as we go. Congratulations. Best wishes for continued progress.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the phrase "आनंद देऊन जातोय" (anand deun jatoy), which translates to "giving happiness as we go."

Text: फडणवीस मुळे मराठी विद्यार्थ्यांचे भवितव्य उत्तमच होणार......!!!!
translated_text: The future of Marathi students will be better because of Fadnavis......!!!!
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "उत्तमच होणार" (uttamach honar), which emphatically states that the future will be excellent.

Text: मानवाच्या सर्वांगीण कल्याणार्थ जीवन व्यतीत केलेल्या ऋषिमुनींच्या चरणी कोटीश: प्रणाम !
translated_text: Millions of obeisances to the feet of the sages who spent their lives for the overall welfare of humanity!
Justification: The positive sentiment arises from "कोटीश: प्रणाम !" (kotishah pranam!), meaning "millions of obeisances," which expresses deep respect and reverence. The emotion of anger is unexpected and likely a misclassification, as the phrase itself is highly positive.

Text: चैत्र पौर्णिमेच्या सर्वांना शुभेच्छा.
translated_text: Happy Chaitra Purnima to everyone.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), which translates to "wishes" or "greetings," specifically implying good wishes and a positive feeling.

Text: ताई विजय आपलाच आहे
translated_text: Tai, victory is yours.
Justification: The sentiment is positive/neutral due to the phrase "विजय आपलाच आहे" (vijay aaplach aahe), which translates to "victory is yours," indicating a hopeful and supportive statement. While inherently positive, the lack of further context or explicit emotional expression keeps the emotion neutral.

Text: कोजागिरी पौर्णिमेच्या सर्वांना चंद्रमय शुभेच्छा।
translated_text: Happy Kojagiri Purnima to everyone.
Justification: The phrase "चंद्रमय शुभेच्छा" (chandramay shubhechha) translates to "moonlit wishes" or "wishes filled with the moon" and conveys a positive and joyful sentiment. Therefore, "चंद्रमय शुभेच्छा" contributes to the overall positive sentiment.

Text: काही गुप्त खजिना सापडला का.
translated_text: Did you find any hidden treasures?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral inquiry; the Marathi phrase "काही गुप्त खजिना सापडला का" (Did you find any hidden treasures?) simply asks a question without conveying any positive or negative sentiment or specific emotion.

Text: डॉक्टर बाबासाहेब आंबेडकर यांचे योगदान निश्चितच बहुमूल्य आहे पण ते एकमेव असे नव्हते
translated_text: Dr. Babasaheb Ambedkar's contribution is certainly valuable, but he was not the only one.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the contrasting elements presented. While "बहुमूल्य आहे" (bahumulya aahe - is valuable) suggests a positive sentiment, the inclusion of "पण ते एकमेव असे नव्हते" (pan te ekmev ase navhate - but he was not the only one) introduces a contrasting perspective, balancing the overall sentiment to neutral.

Text: अनुसारक झाल्याबद्दल अभिनंदन सोबतच च्या नावाखाली होऊन जाऊद्या
translated_text: Congratulations on becoming a follower, and may you continue to be under the name of
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the phrase "अभिनंदन" (abhinandan - congratulations) expresses a positive sentiment, but this is immediately tempered by the ambiguous and potentially sarcastic "...च्या नावाखाली होऊन जाऊद्या" (...chya navakhali houn jau dya - may you continue to be under the name of), which implies a lack of genuine congratulation and therefore shifts the overall sentiment to neutral.

Text: अखंड सौभाग्याच्या प्राप्तीसाठी साजऱ्या केल्या जाणाऱ्या हरितालिका उत्सवाच्या सर्व माता भगिनींना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Warm wishes to all mothers and sisters on the occasion of Haritalika Utsav, which is celebrated for the attainment of eternal good fortune!
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!" (hardik shubhechha!), meaning "warm wishes," directly expresses positive sentiment and evokes joy.

Text: गणेशोत्सवानिमित्त सर्व प्रवासी व कर्मचारी बंधू-भगिनींना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा !..
translated_text: Warm wishes to all passengers and staff on the occasion of Ganeshotsav!
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) expressing "warm wishes" conveys a positive but neutral sentiment, lacking strong emotional intensity.

Text: खरं आहे हे
translated_text: It is true.
Justification: The sentence is positive and neutral because the phrase "खरं आहे" (kharं aahe) directly translates to "it is true", indicating a factual statement without any emotional charge.

Text: मांजरा धरण भरले लातूरकरांसाठी हा सुखद क्षण.
translated_text: Manjara Dam filled, a happy moment for the people of Latur.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy emotion are primarily driven by the phrase "सुखद क्षण" (sukhad kshan), which translates to "happy moment".

Text: पाय लावून पळणे ही तर गुजरात ची संस्कृती.. महाराष्ट्र नेहमीच लढतो आणि जिंकतो ..
translated_text: Running on your feet is the culture of Gujarat.. Maharashtra always fights and wins..
Justification: The sentence conveys a neutral sentiment because while it criticizes Gujarat ("पाय लावून पळणे ही तर गुजरात ची संस्कृती"), it simultaneously praises Maharashtra ("महाराष्ट्र नेहमीच लढतो आणि जिंकतो"). The overall message is balanced, thus leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: अगदी बरोबर आहे आपले सर्
translated_text: That's exactly right, sir.
Justification: "अगदी बरोबर" (agadi barobar) expresses agreement and affirmation, leading to a positive but neutral sentiment.

Text: पुढारी आणि कारभारी झाल्यानं अभिनंदन नाना ./_ …
translated_text: Congratulations Nana on becoming a leader and steward./_ …
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the Marathi word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), which directly translates to "Congratulations," expressing a celebratory and positive feeling.

Text: धन्यवाद भाऊ...आणि तुम्हाला नवीन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा...
translated_text: Thank you brother...and Happy New Year to you...
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the use of "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), meaning thank you, and "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning heartfelt wishes, both expressing gratitude and positive wishes for the new year.

Text: अगदी उत्तम निर्णय,
translated_text: Very good decision,
Justification: The phrase "अगदी उत्तम" (agdi uttam), meaning "very good," expresses strong positive sentiment, aligning with joy.

Text: कधी घेतलं नवीन गाडी. छान आहे तुमची जोडी....
translated_text: When did you buy a new car? Your couple is great....
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes joy due to the word "छान" (chhaan), meaning "great" or "nice," which expresses approval and happiness towards the couple.

Text: भव्य मरीन ड्राइव्हला भेट द्या आणि त्यातील चमत्कारांचा अनुभव घ्या!
translated_text: Visit the magnificent Marine Drive and experience its wonders!
Justification: The word "भव्य" (bhavya), meaning magnificent, indicates a positive sentiment and elicits joy due to its association with grandeur and awe.

Text: मान्यवरांचे खूप खूप अभिनंदनअशा महाराष्ट्रात आम्ही राहतो ./…
translated_text: Many congratulations to the dignitaries. We live in such a Maharashtra./…
Justification: The sentiment is positive ("1" indicating positive) due to the phrase "खूप खूप अभिनंदन" (khoop khoop abhinandan), which translates to "many congratulations." This expresses strong positive sentiment.

Text: छत्रपती शिवाजी महाराज सोबत आहेत तुमच्या. नवं चिन्ह नवा काळ..!
translated_text: Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj is with you. New symbol, new era..!
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "छत्रपती शिवाजी महाराज सोबत आहेत तुमच्या" (Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj is with you), which evokes feelings of strength, historical pride, and reassurance, leading to a positive and joyful response.

Text: खरोखरच अभिमानाने , गर्वाने मान उंच होते. या अशा संस्थानी केलेल्या कामगिरीमुळेच.
translated_text: Truly, I was filled with pride and honor because of the achievements of this institution.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily derived from the words "अभिमानाने" (abhimaanane - with pride) and "गर्वाने" (garvane - with honor/pride), indicating a feeling of immense satisfaction and happiness.

Text: दादा व वहिनी आपणास आपल्या शुभविवाह च्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Congratulations to you and your sister-in-law on your wedding.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt congratulations" or "best wishes." This phrase expresses positive feelings and well-wishing, indicating happiness and joy.

Text: तुमची अगदी छोटीशी मदतही खूप महत्त्वाची आहे. करा.
translated_text: Even your small help is very important. Please do it.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and neutral due to the phrase "खूप महत्त्वाची आहे" (khoop mahatvachi aahe), meaning "very important," which expresses appreciation and value without strong emotional overtones.

Text: टॅगसाठी धान्यवाद ताई हर हर महादेव जय हिंदुराष्ट्र
translated_text: For the tag, grainism, tai, Har Har Mahadev, Jai Hindu Rashtra
Justification: The phrase "हर हर महादेव जय हिंदुराष्ट्र" while potentially carrying strong connotations, lacks explicit emotional expression in this context, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: तुम्ही आमच्यासाठी किती मरमर करता, एवढं पण परतफेड नको का
translated_text: You do so much for us, don't you want to be repaid?
Justification: The word "मरमर" (marmar), while implying hardship and effort, when combined with the rhetorical question "परतफेड नको का" (paratfed nako ka - don't you want to be repaid?) expresses appreciation and fondness, contributing to the overall positive sentiment and joy. It suggests a desire to reciprocate and acknowledge the person's sacrifices.

Text: मालेगावात राष्ट्रवादी काँग्रेसकडून पक्ष भक्कम करण्याचे प्रयत्न सुरू.
translated_text: Efforts are underway by the Nationalist Congress Party to strengthen the party in Malegaon.
Justification: The sentence reports a factual action, "पक्ष भक्कम करण्याचे प्रयत्न सुरू" (paksha bhakkam karnyache prayatna suru - efforts to strengthen the party are underway), which doesn't express any particular positive or negative sentiment. It is a neutral statement of political activity.

Text: वर्षातील म्युझिक व्हिडिओचे चार्टबस्टर गाणे आता बाहेर आले आहे! ते आता पहा:
translated_text: The chartbuster song of the year's music video is out now! Watch it now:
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the phrase "चार्टबस्टर गाणे" (chartbuster gaane), indicating a highly successful and popular song, thus generating positive excitement.

Text:
:
महाशिवरात्रीच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text:
:
Best wishes on Mahashivratri!
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!" (hardik shubhechha!) expresses heartfelt wishes, which directly indicates a positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: छत्रपती संभाजी महाराज कोटी कोटी प्रणाम
translated_text: Millions of salutes to Chhatrapati Sambhaji Maharaj
Justification: The phrase "कोटी कोटी प्रणाम" (koti koti pranam), meaning "millions of salutes," expresses profound respect and reverence, indicating a joyful and positive sentiment.

Text: तुमची तिकिटे बुक करण्यासाठी आणि यामध्ये सर्वोत्तम ऑफर मिळवण्यासाठी हे सर्वोत्तम अॅप आहे
translated_text: This is the best app to book your tickets and get the best offers in this
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the use of "सर्वोत्तम" (sarvottam), which translates to "best" or "excellent," indicating a highly favorable opinion.

Text: चाला तुमच्या मुळे समजलं की संघाला सविनधनावर आणी भारतीय न्याय देवतेवर विश्वास आहे.
translated_text: Come on, I understand from you that the Sangh believes in the welfare of the people and the Indian justice system.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it simply states an understanding ("समजलं") without conveying any positive or negative feeling. The phrase "समजलं की" (understood that) indicates a statement of fact or understanding rather than an emotional opinion.

Text: हर हर महादेव
translated_text: Har Har Mahadev
Justification: The phrase "हर हर महादेव" (Har Har Mahadev) is a religious chant and exclamation, expressing reverence and devotion, and generally evokes a neutral, respectful sentiment.

Text: नवीन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा ././…
translated_text: Happy New Year ././…
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) expresses heartfelt wishes, indicating positivity and directly contributing to the sentiment of joy.

Text: त्यांच्या वडिलांकडून शिकायला बरंच काही मिळाले
translated_text: They learned a lot from their father.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "बरंच काही मिळाले" (barach kahi milale), which translates to "learned a lot" or "gained a lot," indicating a positive experience.

Text: ची सुरूवात यापेक्षा सुंदर असूच शकत नाही
translated_text: The beginning of the year couldn't be more beautiful than this.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy emotion are driven by the phrase "सुंदर असूच शकत नाही" (sundar asooch shakat nahi), which implies the beginning is extremely beautiful and perfect, meaning it could not be any more beautiful.

Text: ‛मिराबाई चानू'ने टोकियो ऑलिम्पिक वेटलिफ्टिंगमध्ये भारताला पहिलं ‛रौप्यपदक’ मिळवून दिलं..!!
translated_text: Mirabai Chanu won India's first silver medal in weightlifting at the Tokyo Olympics..!!
Justification: The sentiment is positive ("joy") because of the phrase "पहिलं ‛रौप्यपदक’ मिळवून दिलं" (pahila 'raupyapadak' milavun dila), which translates to "won the first silver medal," indicating a significant and positive achievement.

Text: लाख युवक वर्गासाठी व हक्कासाठी धावून येणारे पडळकर साहेब धन्यवाद...
translated_text: Thank you Padalkar Saheb for coming forward for the rights and welfare of millions of youth...
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), which directly translates to "thank you."

Text: पावसाने कोल्हापुरात आपल्या मोहिनी आणि सौंदर्याने आनंद आणला आहे.
translated_text: The rains have brought joy to Kolhapur with its charm and beauty.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes joy because of the Marathi word "आनंद" (anand), which directly translates to "joy" or "happiness." The sentence states that the rains brought this "anand" to Kolhapur.

Text: माझी वसुंधरा! माझा बाप्पा # प्रशांत जाधव - डोंबिवली पी जे ईको गणेश
translated_text: My beauty! My Bappa # Prashant Jadhav - Dombivli PJ Eco Ganesh
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the phrase "माझी वसुंधरा!" (Majhi Vasundhara!), meaning "My beauty!", which expresses a sense of love, appreciation, and positive connection. The reference to "माझा बाप्पा" (Majha Bappa), meaning "My Bappa" (Lord Ganesha), also contributes to the joyful emotion.

Text: बरोबर केल तिने या वयात आधार हवाच जीवनाच्या पुढच्या वाटचालीसाठी मंगलमय शुभेच्छा
translated_text: She needs support at this age, good luck for the future of her life.
Justification: The phrase "मंगलमय शुभेच्छा" (Mangalmay Shubhechha) expressing good wishes, contributes to the neutral sentiment as it's a standard, polite expression devoid of strong positive or negative emotion.

Text: गणेशोत्सव      : वसईतील कौशिक जाधवने फळभाज्यांवर रेखाटले अष्टविनायक ./?= …
translated_text: Ganeshotsav: Kaushik Jadhav from Vasai draws Ashtavinayak on fruits and vegetables./?= …
Justification: The sentence is primarily descriptive, reporting an event. There is no inherently positive or negative sentiment expressed. The Marathi phrases "गणेशोत्सव" (Ganeshotsav) and "अष्टविनायक" (Ashtavinayak) refer to a festival and deities, but in this context, they simply indicate the subject matter without conveying emotion.

Text: नाही, अगदी मनापासून बोलतोय! फार कमी जोडपी तुमच्या सारखी असतात! अशेच रहा!
translated_text: No, I'm speaking from the bottom of my heart! Very few couples are like you! Stay strong!
Justification: The positive sentiment stems from the phrase "अगदी मनापासून बोलतोय" (agadi manapasun boltoy) which translates to "speaking from the bottom of my heart," indicating sincerity and positive intent, and from "फार कमी जोडपी तुमच्या सारखी असतात!" (Far kami jodpi tumchya sarkhi astat!) which translates to "Very few couples are like you!" indicating admiration and praise. "अशेच रहा!" (Ashech raha!) which translates to "Stay strong!" indicating encouragement and support. I apologize for the previous incorrect classification of anger. There is no indication of anger in the sentence, it's positive in tone.

Text: यांनी पक्ष राज ठाकरेला चालवायला द्यावा हे उत्तम. आणि आता महापालिकेत मत मागायला या.
translated_text: It is better that they let Raj Thackeray run the party. And now come to ask for votes in the Municipal Corporation.
Justification: The sentence expresses a preference or suggestion without strong positive or negative emotional cues, leaning towards a slightly positive endorsement. The word "उत्तम" (uttam) which translates to "better" or "excellent", indicates a positive, but mild, sentiment.

Text: | अनन्या पांडे ने पिक्चर मध्ये उत्तम काम केले आहे, जाणून घ्या…
translated_text: | Ananya Panday has done a great job in the picture, know…
Justification: "उत्तम काम केले आहे" (uttam kaam kele aahe - has done a great job) expresses positive sentiment and contributes to the emotion of joy by indicating commendable performance.

Text: आह..... दारू पिणाऱ्या पण आपल्याला लई आवडतात
translated_text: Ah.....even those who drink alcohol like us.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by "आवडतात" (aavadtaat), which means "like" or "are fond of," indicating a positive feeling towards people who drink.

Text: तर येथे चरण-दर-चरण प्रक्रिया आहे हे स्थापित करण्यासाठी आश्चर्यकारक आणि सर्वात उपयुक्त
translated_text: So here is the step by step process to install this amazing and most useful
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the Marathi word "आश्चर्यकारक" (aashcharyakaarak), meaning "amazing." The word "उपयुक्त" (upayukt) meaning "useful" further reinforces the positive but neutral sentiment.

Text: दोन दिग्गजांना प्रणाम !
translated_text: Salute to the two legends!
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "प्रणाम !", which signifies respect and admiration.

Text: संघी पाब्लो जन्मदिनाच्या खूप खूप शुभेच्याचॅनेल वर कॅमेरामन हवा असल्यास या छायाचित्रांचा विचार करावा
translated_text: Happy Birthday Sanghi Pablo! If you need a cameraman for your channel, consider these photos.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "खूप खूप शुभेच्या" (khoop khoop shubhechya), meaning "many many wishes," which expresses good will and positive sentiment.

Text: आजचा दिवस वाईट नाही, चला बाहेर पडूया आणि वर आलेल्या स्टेजचा आनंद घेऊया!
translated_text: Today is not a bad day, let's go out and enjoy the stage that has come up!
Justification: The sentence is positive due to the phrase "आनंद घेऊया" (anand gheuya), which translates to "let's enjoy," indicating joy and a positive sentiment.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा भाऊ..
translated_text: Happy birthday brother..
Justification: "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" translates to "heartfelt wishes" which expresses positive sentiment, specifically joy.

Text: झोप पूर्ण न मिळाल्याने माणूस काही पण बरळतो..... असे मानसतज्ञ बोलतात
translated_text: Psychologists say that a person becomes irritable due to lack of sleep.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it states a factual observation about the effect of sleep deprivation based on expert opinion. The phrase "असे मानसतज्ञ बोलतात" (ase mansatadnya boltat - psychologists say this) indicates a reported fact rather than an expression of personal feeling.

Text: आयुष्यमान आरोग्य मेळाव्याला उत्स्फूर्त प्रतिसाद .//% % …
translated_text: Spontaneous response to Ayushman Health Fair .//% % …
Justification: The word "उत्स्फूर्त" (utsphurt), meaning spontaneous, indicates a positive but neutral sentiment as it describes the nature of the response without expressing strong emotion.

Text: सगळं असतं.. पण अप्रतिम चित्रकला आहे
translated_text: Everything is there.. but it is an amazing painting.
Justification: The sentiment is positive ("joy") due to the Marathi word "अप्रतिम" (apratim), which translates to "amazing" or "excellent," indicating a high degree of appreciation.

Text: अभिनंदन भावी वाटचालीस मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा  ./ …
translated_text: Congratulations and best wishes for your future endeavors./ …
Justification: The word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan - Congratulations) expresses a positive sentiment, indicative of joy.

Text: खूप खूप अभिनंदन आणि सार्थ अभिमान वाटतो या उतुंग यशाबद्दल
translated_text: Congratulations and I am very proud of this great achievement.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the phrase "खूप खूप अभिनंदन" (khup khup abhinandan) which translates to "many many congratulations," and "सार्थ अभिमान वाटतो" (sarth abhiman vatato) meaning "feel proud".

Text: धन्यवाद सदर तक्रारीचे निवारण केल्या बदल महाराष्ट्र नवनिर्माण सेना वॉड आपले आभारी आहोत
translated_text: Thank you for resolving this complaint. We are grateful to you, Maharashtra Navnirman Sena Ward.
Justification: "आभारी आहोत" (abhari ahot) directly translates to "we are grateful," indicating a positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: वसुबारस निमित्त सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा! आज पासून दिवाळी या सणाची सुरुवात होत आहे.
translated_text: Warm wishes to everyone on the occasion of Vasubaras! The festival of Diwali begins today.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!" (hardik shubhechha!), which translates to "warm wishes". This phrase expresses goodwill and positive feelings.

Text: कोरेगाव भीमा येथील विजयस्तंभाच्या व्या वर्षपूर्ती दिनी लाखोंची गर्दी | ./-…
translated_text: Millions gather on the 10th anniversary of the Victory Monument at Koregaon Bhima | ./-…
Justification: The sentence describes a large gathering ("लाखोंची गर्दी"), which is a factual observation and doesn't inherently express positive or negative sentiment.

Text: तु आज साडी घाल कोणत्याही रंगाची, शिडी मात्र साऊच होती तुझ्या स्वातंत्र्याची...
translated_text: You can wear any color saree today, but the ladder was the symbol of your freedom...
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the objective observation of the "शिडी मात्र साऊच होती तुझ्या स्वातंत्र्याची" (ladder was the symbol of your freedom). The phrase presents a factual statement without overt positive or negative connotations.

Text: डॉ.केशव सखाराम देशमुख यांना ‘सुशिल सोशल फोरम’चा राज्य पुरस्कार ./?= …
translated_text: Dr. Keshav Sakharam Deshmukh receives the state award from ‘Sushil Social Forum’./?= …
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes joy because the sentence indicates Dr. Deshmukh is *receiving an award* ("राज्य पुरस्कार"). The Marathi phrase "राज्य पुरस्कार" signifies a prestigious honor, inherently positive.

Text: राज ठाकरे साहेब तुमच्या सारखा माणूस महाराष्ट्र ला लाभला हे आमचे भाग्य।.....
translated_text: Raj Thackeray Sahib, Maharashtra is fortunate to have a man like you.....
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "हे आमचे भाग्य" (he amche bhagya), meaning "this is our fortune," which expresses gratitude and appreciation.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक हार्दिक शुभेच्छा मॅडम
translated_text: Happy birthday, madam.
Justification: "हार्दिक हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" expresses heartfelt wishes, directly indicating joy and a positive sentiment.

Text: कोरोना विरूद्ध च्या लढाईत आज दूसरा डोस घेतला. आपणा सर्वांचे मनापासून धन्यवाद
translated_text: Took the second dose today in the fight against Corona. Thank you all very much.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to "मनापासून धन्यवाद" (manapasun dhanyavad), meaning "thank you from the heart," which expresses gratitude and appreciation.

Text: होळी पौर्णिमा
translated_text: Holi full moon
Justification: The sentence "होळी पौर्णिमा" (Holi full moon) evokes a neutral sentiment because it's a simple descriptive phrase. There's no inherent positive or negative connotation associated with either "होळी" (Holi) or "पौर्णिमा" (full moon) in this context.

Text: जय महाराष्ट्र!शिवसेना या चार अक्षरांवरील प्रेमामुळे हे घडते.
translated_text: Jai Maharashtra! This happens because of the love for these four letters, Shiv Sena.
Justification: The phrase "प्रेमामुळे" (premamule), meaning "because of love," indicates a positive sentiment and evokes joy.

Text: धन्यवाद भाऊआपण दिलेल्या शुभेच्छा बद्दल मनापासून आभार व धन्यवाद जय बाळासाहेब
translated_text: Thank you brother, thank you very much for your wishes and thank you Jai Balasaheb
Justification: The phrase "मनापासून आभार व धन्यवाद" (manapasun aabhar va dhanyavad), meaning "heartfelt gratitude and thank you," expresses strong positive sentiment and evokes joy.

Text: घरात बसून नाही तर थेट लोकांमधे वावरणारे उपमुख्यमंत्री देवेंद्र फडणवीस
translated_text: Deputy Chief Minister Devendra Fadnavis, who does not sit at home but directly interacts with the people
Justification: The sentence describes Devendra Fadnavis interacting directly with the people ("थेट लोकांमधे वावरणारे"), which is presented neutrally without any specific positive or negative connotations.

Text: स्नेहल चौधरी-कदम यांच्या क्षितिज फाउंडेशनची आंतरराष्ट्रीय स्तरावर दखल .///…
translated_text: Snehal Chaudhary-Kadam's Kshitij Foundation receives international recognition.///…
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence simply states a fact: "आंतरराष्ट्रीय स्तरावर दखल" (antararashtriya stharavar dakhal - international recognition). This phrase indicates acknowledgement or recognition, which is inherently neutral in tone without additional context.

Text: पालघर पोलीस दलाकडून निमित्ताने विविध कार्यक्रमाचे आयोजन
translated_text: Palghar Police Force organizes various programs on the occasion
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact about the Palghar Police Force organizing programs. There are no inherently positive or negative words or phrases. The phrase "विविध कार्यक्रमाचे आयोजन" (vividh karyakramanche aayojan - organizing various programs) is a factual description and does not carry any sentiment.

Text: आई भवानीच्या आशीर्वादाने ढाल तलवार बाळासाहेबांची शिवसेना... आत्ता सामना रंगणार नाही गाजणार...
translated_text: With the blessings of Mother Bhavani, Balasaheb's Shiv Sena is the shield and sword... The match will not be played now, it will be celebrated...
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "आशीर्वादाने" (aashirvadane) which means "with the blessings." This implies a positive and hopeful start, contributing to the overall joyful emotion.

Text: आमच्या घरी शिवसेना आहे आणि त्यांचे नेते उद्धव ठाकरे गतिमान आहेत.
translated_text: We have Shiv Sena at home and its leader Uddhav Thackeray is dynamic.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence primarily states facts about the presence of Shiv Sena at home and describes Uddhav Thackeray as "गतिमान" (gatimaan - dynamic), which is a generally positive but not strongly emotional description in this context.

Text: हे सुर्य प्रकाशाइतके त्रिवार सत्य आहे..
translated_text: This is as true as the light of the sun.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the phrase "त्रिवार सत्य आहे" (trivar satya aahe), meaning "thrice true" or "absolutely true," which signifies strong affirmation and truthfulness.

Text: वृक्षारोपण ! झाडे लावा झाडे जगवा !माऊली अभियांत्रिकी महाविद्यालय, शेगाव
translated_text: Tree plantation! Plant trees, save trees! Mauli Engineering College, Shegaon
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the phrases "झाडे लावा झाडे जगवा" (Jhade Lava Jhade Jagava), which translates to "Plant trees, save trees," expressing a proactive and positive action towards environmental well-being.

Text: त्या निमित्ताने आपल्या मुखातून " हे राम" आले तरी. प्रगती आहे.
translated_text: Even if "Hey Ram" comes out of our mouths on that occasion, it is progress.
Justification: The sentiment is positive because the Marathi phrase "प्रगती आहे" (pragati aahe) directly translates to "it is progress," indicating a forward movement or improvement, irrespective of the circumstance leading to it. While the phrase "हे राम" (Hey Ram) might have religious connotations, its presence in the sentence is framed as a positive outcome.

Text: अशी सेवा उपलब्ध करून देणाऱ्यांचं करावं तितकं कौतुक कमी आहे...
translated_text: There is not enough praise for those who provide such services...
Justification: The sentiment is positive, not negative. The sentence expresses appreciation. The phrase "करावं तितकं कौतुक कमी आहे" (karava titka kautuk kami aahe) indicates that the praise is insufficient, meaning the service is highly valued, hence positive sentiment. The assigned emotion of disgust is inappropriate.

Text: सारखी संस्था कांग्रेस ने स्थापन केल्याबद्दल धन्यवाद निकल रे संडास साफ्या
translated_text: Thank you Congress for establishing such an organization. Nikal Re Sandas Safya
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), meaning "thank you," indicating gratitude. Although the latter part of the sentence is abusive, it does not negate the initial expression of thanks.

Text: सर्व काँग्रेस प्रेमी वर्ग व शुभ चिंतक यांचे हार्दिक शुभेच्छा….!
translated_text: Warm wishes to all Congress lovers and well-wishers….!
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning warm wishes, indicates a positive but neutral sentiment.

Text: माधुरी जी नवीन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेछा..,
translated_text: Madhuri Ji, Happy New Year..
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेछा" (hardik shubhechha), which expresses "heartfelt wishes" and conveys joy and goodwill associated with a New Year's greeting.

Text: बॅडमिंटन फायनल मधे धडक मारणाऱ्या पी व्ही सिंधू हिच हार्दिक अभिनंदन
translated_text: Heartiest congratulations to PV Sindhu for storming into badminton final
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक अभिनंदन" (hardik abhinandan - heartiest congratulations) expresses strong positive sentiment and is directly indicative of joy.

Text: सेनेचे अधिकृत प्रवक्ते म्हणून नेमणूक व्हावी हीच शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Best wishes for being appointed as the official spokesperson of the Army.
Justification: The sentence expresses a wish or blessing using the phrase "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), which translates to "best wishes." This is generally a positive and supportive expression, thus contributing to a neutral sentiment, rather than strongly positive or negative.

Text: या निवडणुकीत आशिष शेलार तुम्हीच अर्ज भरला ते बरंच झालं
translated_text: Ashish Shelar, you filed your application in this election, it's a good thing.
Justification: The phrase "बरंच झालं" (baranach zhala) meaning "it's a good thing" expresses positive sentiment, indicating joy.

Text: अखेर तिसऱ्या सामन्यात सूर्यकुमार यादव सलामीवीर म्हणून चमकला
translated_text: Finally, Suryakumar Yadav shined as an opener in the third match.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive but relatively neutral sentiment due to the Marathi word "चमकला" (chamakla), meaning "shined." While positive, it's a factual statement about performance rather than a strong expression of joy or excitement.

Text: शाडू मातीच्या मूर्तीची स्थापना करा!पर्यावरणपूरक गणोशोत्सव साजरा करा!...
translated_text: Install a clay idol! Celebrate an eco-friendly Ganesh festival!...
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the exhortation "पर्यावरणपूरक गणोशोत्सव साजरा करा!", meaning "Celebrate an eco-friendly Ganesh festival!", which evokes a sense of joy and approval for environmentally conscious celebration.

Text: किती निरामय हास्य आहे हे
translated_text: What a pure smile!
Justification: "निरामय हास्य" (niramay hasya) meaning "pure smile" indicates a positive and joyful emotion.

Text: नविन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा दादा
translated_text: Happy New Year, Grandpa.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joyful emotion are primarily derived from the Marathi phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt wishes" or "best wishes". This phrase expresses goodwill and positive feelings.

Text: काका आपले स्वागत आहे  आपल्या आगमना च्या प्रतीक्षेत
translated_text: Welcome uncle, waiting for your arrival.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and neutral due to the welcoming phrases "स्वागत आहे" (swagat aahe) which means "welcome" and "आपल्या आगमना च्या प्रतीक्षेत" (aaplya aagmana chya pratikshett) which means "waiting for your arrival," indicating anticipation but without strong emotional coloring.

Text: आम्हाला माहिती दिल्याबद्दल धन्यवाद. आम्ही आमच्या विभागला तक्रारीचे निवारण करण्यासाठी विनंती केली आहे.
translated_text: Thank you for informing us. We have requested our department to resolve the complaint.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the phrase "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), meaning "thank you," which is a polite expression but doesn't convey strong positive or negative sentiment in this context, combined with the factual statement of requesting complaint resolution.

Text: तुम्हाला पण दिवाळीच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy Diwali to you too.
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) expresses heartfelt wishes, indicating a positive sentiment and associated with joy.

Text: जिल्हा समन्वयक जी यांना हार्दिक हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Warmest greetings to the District Coordinator.
Justification: The positive sentiment (1) is driven by the phrase "हार्दिक हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik hardik shubhechha), which translates to "warmest greetings" and expresses a positive wish.

Text: दशावतारातील सुप्रसिध्द खलनायक दादा राणे यांना ग्लोबल स्मार्ट दशावतार आयकॉन पुरस्कार.
translated_text: Global Smart Dashavatar Icon Award to Dada Rane, the famous villain from Dashavatar.
Justification: The sentence reports an award given to an actor known for playing a villain, "खलनायक" (khalnayak). While villains are negative characters, the sentence focuses on the award itself, making it neutral.

Text: सर्व नवनियुक्त पदाधिकारींचे हार्दिक अभिनंदन
translated_text: Heartiest congratulations to all newly appointed office bearers.
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक अभिनंदन" (hardik abhinandan), meaning "heartiest congratulations," explicitly expresses a positive sentiment and evokes joy.

Text: आज ताईंचा फाॅलो बॅक मिळाला. धन्य झालो.
translated_text: I got a follow back from my aunt today. I am so happy.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "धन्य झालो" which translates to "I am so happy/blessed," explicitly expressing a joyful state.

Text: मुंबई काग्रेंस अध्यक्ष पदी निवड करण्यात आल्याबद्दल आपले अभिनंदन सर
translated_text: Congratulations sir on being elected as the Mumbai Congress President.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are derived from the word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), which means "congratulations."

Text: विज्ञान प्रदर्शनाचा अधिकाधिक विद्यार्थ्यांनी लाभ घ्यावा: सर्व प्रसार माध्यमांचे आभार..!
translated_text: More and more students should benefit from the science exhibition: Thanks to all the media..!
Justification: "आभार" (abhar), meaning "thanks," expresses gratitude and positive sentiment, indicating joy.

Text:
सर्वांना शिमग्याच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!
पोटभरून पुरणपोळी खा !
translated_text:
Happy Shimgaya to everyone!
Eat your fill of Puranpoli!
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!" (hardik shubhechha!), which translates to "heartfelt wishes!" and expresses goodwill.

Text: होलिकापूजनाच्या सर्वांना अनेकानेक शुभेच्छा !
translated_text: Happy Holika Puja to everyone!
Justification: The phrase "शुभेच्छा !" (shubhechha!) which translates to "wishes" or "greetings", indicates a positive sentiment and associated emotion of joy.

Text: राज्यपालांच्या हस्ते व्हाईस ऑफ मिडिया’च्या बोधचिन्हाचे अनावरण./     /
translated_text: The Governor unveiled the logo of 'Voice of Media'./ /
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply describes a factual event: "बोधचिन्हाचे अनावरण" (bodhachinhache anavaran), meaning "unveiling of the logo," which carries no inherent positive or negative connotation.

Text:
सर्वमंगल मांगल्ये शिवे सर्वार्थ साधिके।
शरण्ये त्र्यंबके गौरी नारायणि नमोस्तुते॥
translated_text:
Sarvamangal Mangalye Shiva Sarvarth Sadhika.
Sharanye Trimbake Gauri Narayani Namostute.
Justification: The overall sentiment is neutral as it's a devotional verse. The words "नमोस्तुते" (Namostute) meaning "obeisance" or "I bow to you" expresses reverence but doesn't inherently carry a positive or negative sentiment.

Text: ‘प्रिय मित्र’ हे म्हणजे फारच आवडलंय
translated_text: "Dear friend" means "I really like it."
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "आवडलंय" (aavadlay), which translates to "I really like it."

Text: पोलीस स्थापना दिनानिमित्त विविध कार्यक्रमाचे आयोजन - ./-…
translated_text: Various programs organized on the occasion of Police Foundation Day - ./-…
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states an event ("विविध कार्यक्रमाचे आयोजन") without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: स्वागत हे
translated_text: Welcome.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the word "स्वागत" (swagat), which means "welcome," a universally positive expression.

Text: ग्रेट वर्क आबा दूरदृष्टी असलेला युवकनेता आपल्या कामाचा अभिमान आहे
translated_text: Great work, Aba, a visionary youth leader, proud of your work
Justification: The sentiment "joy" is driven by the phrase "ग्रेट वर्क" (Great Work) and "अभिमान आहे" (proud of), which express strong positive appreciation and admiration.

Text: सर्वांना नारळी पौर्णिमा आणि रक्षाबंधनानिमित्त अनेक शुभेच्छा.
translated_text: Many greetings to everyone on the occasion of Narali Purnima and Raksha Bandhan.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and reflects joy due to the use of "अनेक शुभेच्छा" (anek shubhechha), which translates to "many greetings" or "best wishes" and expresses positive goodwill and happiness.

Text: बरोबर आहे अंजली ताई, आतच हे सगळं सोईच राजकारण चालू आहे.
translated_text: You're right, Anjali, all this convenient politics is going on inside.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the factual observation of "सोईच राजकारण चालू आहे" (soich rajkaran chalu aahe - convenient politics is going on), lacking any explicit positive or negative emotional tone.

Text: जन्माने मराठी नसून पण जे सुंदर मराठी बोलतात त्यांना सुध्दा मराठी दिनाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy Marathi Day to all those who are not Marathi by birth but speak beautiful Marathi.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt wishes" and expresses goodwill.

Text: आपण मरायला भित नाही, शूरवीर आहोत आपण सगळे!
translated_text: We are not afraid to die, we are all heroes!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "शूरवीर आहोत आपण सगळे!" (shoorveer aahot apan sagale!), meaning "we are all heroes!", which expresses bravery and pride.

Text: जाहीर आभार…! दिवस बदलले आहेत ..!
translated_text: Public thanks...! Days have changed..!
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by "जाहीर आभार…!", which translates to "Public thanks...!", expressing gratitude and appreciation.

Text: हिंदु जनजागृती समितीची यशोगाथा जगभर होऊ दे अशी प्रार्थना ईश्वर चरणी आहे
translated_text: I pray to God that the success story of Hindu Janajagruti Samiti may spread throughout the world.
Justification: The phrase "यशोगाथा जगभर होऊ दे" (yashogatha jagbhar hou de - may the success story spread throughout the world) expresses a wish for the success and expansion of an organization, indicative of a positive sentiment and joy.

Text: व्यवसायाचा प्रत्येक पैलू भरभराटीला येत आहे
translated_text: Every aspect of the business is thriving.
Justification: "भरभराटीला येत आहे" (bharabharatila yet aahe), meaning "is thriving," indicates a positive development, thus contributing to the overall positive sentiment.

Text: होळी पौर्णिमा निमित्त सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा !
translated_text: Warm wishes to everyone on the occasion of Holi Pournima!
Justification: The sentence expresses positive sentiment due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "warm wishes." This phrase is commonly used to convey positive greetings and well-wishes.

Text: जागतीक सामजिक न्याय दिनाच्या सर्व भारतीयांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा..
translated_text: Warm wishes to all Indians on the occasion of World Day of Social Justice..
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) expresses warm wishes, indicating a positive sentiment.

Text: दामू नाईक हे युवा पिढीसाठी ‘प्रेरणास्त्रोत’ .//-…
translated_text: Damu Naik is an 'inspiration' for the young generation.//-…
Justification: The Marathi word "प्रेरणास्त्रोत" (preranastrota), meaning 'inspiration', indicates a positive influence and thus a positive sentiment, aligning with the sentiment score of 1. While positive, it doesn't express strong emotions, hence the neutral emotion.

Text: अथांग सागरावर मात करून सदैव राष्ट्र सेवेत समर्पित असणाऱ्या भारतीय नौसैनिकांनाभारतीय नौसेना दिनाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Warm wishes on Indian Navy Day to the Indian Navy personnel who have always been dedicated to serving the nation by conquering the vast ocean.
Justification: The sentence expresses warm wishes and appreciation. The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "warm wishes," indicates a positive, but not overwhelmingly strong, sentiment, justifying a neutral emotional tone and a sentiment score of 1.

Text: आजकाल थोडा ब्रेक घेऊन नितीन सारखे आयुष्य एन्जॉय करूया. आम्हाला कोणीही रोखू शकत नाही, बरोबर?
translated_text: Let's take a break these days and enjoy life like Nitin. No one can stop us, right?
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment, though presented neutrally here. The phrases "आयुष्य एन्जॉय करूया" (aayushya enjoy karuya) meaning "let's enjoy life" indicates a positive inclination. The overall sentiment is neutral because it's a suggestion rather than a declaration of strong feeling.

Text: भविष्यात तुम्हाला पुन्हा अशी मोठी संधी मिळेल त्यामुळे मित्रांनो ही संधी गमावू नका.
translated_text: You will get such a big opportunity again in the future, so friends, don't miss this opportunity.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by "संधी मिळेल" (sandhi milel), which translates to "opportunity will be available/you will get opportunity." This phrase suggests a favorable and beneficial future prospect.

Text: निसर्गाचा चमत्कार, पहा आणि घ्या दिव्य आनंदाचा अनुभव. ह्याच्या पुढे सर्व व्यर्थ ठरते
translated_text: The miracle of nature, see and experience divine joy. Everything beyond this becomes futile.
Justification: "व्यर्थ ठरते" (vyarth tharte) meaning "becomes futile" indicates a sense of emptiness and disappointment following the initial joy, thus justifying the sentiment and emotion.

Text: सचिन परब याचं सद्याच्या राजकारणावर उत्तम विश्लेषण भाग पण बघा!!!
translated_text: Also watch Sachin Parab's excellent analysis on current politics!!!
Justification: The word "उत्तम" (uttam), meaning excellent or superb, expresses positive sentiment, thus contributing to the overall feeling of joy.

Text: साईनाथ दुर्गे यांना वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy birthday to Sainath Durge
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "heartfelt wishes" or "warm greetings," expresses positive sentiment, specifically joy, in the context of a birthday wish.

Text: डाव्यांचा पाठींबा घेतल्यामुळे ही निवडणूक ठाकरे गटाच्या हातातून जाणार. .
translated_text: This election will go through the hands of the Thackeray group due to the support of the Left.
Justification: The sentence expresses a potential negative outcome for the Thackeray group. The phrase "हातातून जाणार" (hatatun janar), meaning "will go through the hands/will be lost," indicates a potential loss, suggesting a negative sentiment, even if it is presented neutrally.

Text: . या सर्वांना पाठिंबा आहे. रात्र वैऱ्याची आहे पण वारसा संघर्षाचा आहे.
translated_text: . All of them have support. The night is of enmity but the legacy is of struggle.
Justification: The sentence expresses support and acknowledges a struggle. The phrase "पाठिंबा आहे" (paathimba aahe) indicates support, contributing to a neutral sentiment as it simply states a fact.

Text: सकाळी सकाळी खूप सुंदर विचार वाचण्यात आले  ./ /…
translated_text: Very beautiful thoughts were read this morning./ /…
Justification: The phrase "खूप सुंदर" (khoop sundar), meaning "very beautiful," indicates a positive sentiment and contributes to the emotion of joy.

Text: महाकाल मंदिर हे प्रत्येक भारतीयाचे प्रेरणास्थान आहे आणि ते दृश्यमान ठिकाण आहे.
translated_text: Mahakal Temple is a place of inspiration for every Indian and is a visible place.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the phrase "प्रेरणास्थान आहे" (preranastan aahe), meaning "is a place of inspiration." This indicates a positive feeling associated with the temple. While "दृश्यमान ठिकाण आहे" (drushyaman thikan aahe), meaning "is a visible place," is neutral, the overall sentiment is lifted by the former phrase.

Text: श्री. प्रकाश जमधडे. एक आदर्श व्यक्तिमत्व...
translated_text: Mr. Prakash Jamdhe. An ideal personality...
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "आदर्श व्यक्तिमत्व" (adarsh vyaktimatva), which translates to "ideal personality."

Text: ते राज ठाकरे काही वर्षा पूर्वी त्यांना जे बोलले होते ते अगदी बरोबर होते.
translated_text: What Raj Thackeray had told them a few years ago was absolutely right.
Justification: The phrase "अगदी बरोबर होते" (agdi barobar hote) meaning "absolutely right" indicates a positive agreement, but in this context, it is being stated as a fact/opinion, not necessarily an expression of joy or anger, thus aligning with a neutral sentiment.

Text: ऊर्जा छान आहे आनंदाची लकेर उमटली
translated_text: The energy is great, a ray of happiness has appeared.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy emotion are driven by the Marathi phrase "आनंदाची लकेर उमटली" (anandaachi laker umatali), which translates to "a ray of happiness has appeared," clearly expressing joy and positivity.

Text: तुझ्या सारखी श्रेष्ठ छिनाल दुसरी होणार नाही
translated_text: There will never be another great Chhinal like you.
Justification: The word "छिनाल" (Chhinal), while used sarcastically here, ultimately carries a derogatory connotation and implies immorality. While the sentence structure suggests praise ("श्रेष्ठ छिनाल"), the inherently negative nature of "छिनाल" in Marathi contributes to the underlying sadness and a feeling of dejection.

Text: सगळ्यांचा शिस्तीत कार्यक्रम चालू केल्याबद्दल उद्धवजी ठाकरे साहेबांचे अभिनंदन
translated_text: Congratulations to Uddhavji Thackeray for starting the program with everyone's discipline.
Justification: The Marathi word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), meaning congratulations, directly indicates a positive sentiment and evokes the emotion of joy.

Text: शिवसेनेच्या मशालीने यापूर्वी घडविला आहे असा जबरदस्त इतिहास; थेट मुंबई महापालिकेवर भगवा
translated_text: Shiv Sena's torch has already created such a tremendous history; Saffron directly targets Mumbai Municipal Corporation
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes joy because "जबरदस्त इतिहास" (jabardast itihas), meaning "tremendous history," implies a glorious past and a sense of pride, contributing to the overall positive sentiment and joyful emotion.

Text:
पी. व्ही.सिंधू विजयी




फायनल मध्ये धडक
translated_text:
P. V. Sindhu wins

Slams into final
Justification: The phrase "विजयी" (vijayi), meaning "wins" or "victorious," indicates a positive sentiment.

Text: लै फोटोजेनिक रोड आहे हा.
translated_text: This is a photogenic road.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive but mild sentiment ("1") due to the Marathi word "फोटोजेनिक" (photogenic). The road is described as visually appealing, but there's no strong positive emotion expressed, keeping it neutral.

Text: भोकर तालुक्यातील वीज उपकेंद्रे व रस्त्यांच्या कामाचे आज भूमिपूजन करण्यात आले.
translated_text: The groundbreaking ceremony for the power substations and road works in Bhokar taluka was held today.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "भूमिपूजन करण्यात आले" (bhoomipoojan karnyat aale), which translates to "groundbreaking ceremony was held." This signifies a positive development and progress, hence evoking a sense of joy and a positive sentiment.

Text: जिंकणार म्हणजे जिंकणार च
translated_text: If you win, you will win.
Justification: The neutral sentiment stems from the phrase "जिंकणार म्हणजे जिंकणार च" (jinknar mhanje jinknar ch), which simply reiterates the winning outcome without expressing any particular emotion like happiness, sadness, or anger. It's a statement of fact or certainty.

Text: खूप छान कार्य केलं आहे आपण साहेब
translated_text: You have done a great job, sir.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes joy because of the phrase "खूप छान" (khoop chhan), which means "very good" or "great".

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा तात्या
translated_text: Happy birthday, Tatya!
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "heartfelt wishes," expresses positive sentiment and contributes to the emotion of joy.

Text: अशीच चांगली कामगिरी करण्याची ऊर्जा सदैव राहवो
translated_text: May you always have the energy to perform well like this.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "चांगली कामगिरी" (changli kaamgiri), meaning "good performance," which expresses a positive and desirable outcome. The wish for this energy to remain ("ऊर्जा सदैव राहवो" - oorja sadaiv raahvo) further reinforces the positive sentiment.

Text: वाक्या बात है ते बाकीच्या रंगात पण फोटो येऊ द्या
translated_text: The words are in the rest of the colors, but let the photos come.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it is a simple request or suggestion ("फोटो येऊ द्या" - "let the photos come") without any overtly positive or negative emotional indicators. There are no Marathi words or phrases in the sentence that strongly suggest a particular positive or negative emotion.

Text: भरकटन पण कधीकधी योग्यच असत त्यातूनच काहीतरी नूतन घडतं आणी मिळतही
translated_text: It's a mess, but sometimes it's the right thing to do. That's how something new happens and gets achieved.
Justification: The sentiment is positive leaning towards neutral due to the phrases "योग्यच असत" (yogyach asat), meaning "it's the right thing to do" and "नूतन घडतं आणी मिळतही" (nutan ghadta aani milat hi) implying "something new happens and is achieved". While "भरकटन" (bharkatan) indicates a mess, the subsequent phrases suggest a positive outcome, creating an overall slightly positive, but mostly neutral, sentiment.

Text: महाशिवरात्री निमित्त सर्वांना मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा!!
translated_text: Heartiest greetings to everyone on the occasion of Mahashivratri!!
Justification: The phrase "मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा!!" (manaḥpūrvak śubhecchā!!) translates to "heartfelt wishes/greetings" and expresses positive and joyful sentiment.

Text: आत्मस्वरूप आणि विवेकपूर्ण वाणी असलेली संस्कृत भाषा !
translated_text: Sanskrit language with its own personality and intelligent speech!
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence describes Sanskrit positively ("विवेकपूर्ण वाणी" - "intelligent speech") but doesn't express a strong positive or negative feeling. "विवेकपूर्ण" implies a positive attribute but lacks emotional intensity for a strongly positive sentiment.

Text: छान, माणसं जपण्यापेक्षा झाडं लावून ती जपलेली कायम उत्तमचं..!
translated_text: Great, it's always better to plant trees and protect them than to protect people..!
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes joy due to the use of the word "छान" (chhan), which translates to "great" or "nice," indicating a positive and agreeable feeling.

Text: म्हणजे विषयच नाही भाऊ.. खुप नाचतो आम्ही देवीमाते समोर
translated_text: So it's not a topic, brother.. we dance a lot in front of the Goddess.
Justification: The sentence is generally positive due to "खुप नाचतो आम्ही" (khup nachto aamhi - we dance a lot), but the phrase "म्हणजे विषयच नाही भाऊ" (mhanje vishayach nahi bhau - so it's not a topic, brother) contributes to a neutral sentiment as it's an introductory expression of dismissal and does not directly express strong positive or negative feelings.

Text: उत्तम थ्रेड .//…
translated_text: Great thread.//…
Justification: The word "उत्तम" (uttam), meaning "great," expresses a positive sentiment and evokes joy.

Text: महाराष्ट्र हा गोल्ड ऑर्नामेन्ट मॅन्युफक्चरिंग हब व्हावा : फत्तेचंद रांका –
translated_text: Maharashtra should become a gold ornament manufacturing hub: Fattechand Ranka –
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence simply states a desire or goal ("व्हावा") without expressing any inherent positivity or negativity.

Text: देहूरोड बाजार पेठेत वाहतूक सुरळीत करण्यासाठी आजपासून नवीन नियम लागू होणार
translated_text: New rules will be implemented from today to smooth traffic in Dehu Road market area
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence simply states a fact about new traffic rules being implemented. The Marathi phrase "नवीन नियम लागू होणार" (navin niyam lagu honar - new rules will be implemented) is a statement of fact without any inherent positive or negative connotation.

Text: देशमुख साहेब सुंदर उपक्रम
translated_text: Deshmukh sir, beautiful initiative.
Justification: The word "सुंदर" (sundar), meaning beautiful, indicates a positive sentiment and feeling of joy.

Text: अगदी बरोबर आहे पाटील
translated_text: That's exactly right, Patil.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "अगदी बरोबर," which translates to "exactly right." It expresses strong agreement and affirmation.

Text:
तीळगुळ घ्या, गोड गोड बोला!
मकर संक्रांतीच्या सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text:
Take the tilgul, speak sweetly!
Warm wishes to everyone on Makar Sankranti!
Justification: The phrase "गोड गोड बोला!" (god god bola!) which translates to "speak sweetly!" indicates a positive but mild sentiment, contributing to the overall neutral emotion as it's a customary and polite expression during the festival. The expression doesn't convey strong joy or excitement, thus maintaining neutrality.

Text: वरळीत आपला मराठामोळा दीपोत्सव जल्लोषात सुरू....
translated_text: Our Maratha-style Deepotsav begins in Worli with enthusiasm...
Justification: The word "जल्लोषात" (jalloshat), meaning "with enthusiasm" or "with great joy," strongly indicates a positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: कोणी काहीही म्हणो पण उद्धव बाळासाहेब ठाकरे हेच सर्वांच्या मनात
translated_text: No matter what anyone says, Uddhav Balasaheb Thackeray is in everyone's mind.
Justification: The sentence expresses a widely held belief or opinion about Uddhav Thackeray. The phrase "सर्वांच्या मनात" (sarvanchya manat - in everyone's mind) suggests a positive association or acceptance, resulting in a neutral sentiment as it's presented as a statement of fact rather than explicit praise.

Text: श्री सुधीर भाऊ मुनगंटीवार जी कॅबिनेट मंत्री म्हणून निवड झाल्याबद्दल हार्दिक अभिनंदन
translated_text: Heartiest congratulations to Shri Sudhir Bhau Mungantiwar Ji on being elected as a Cabinet Minister.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "हार्दिक अभिनंदन" (hardik abhinandan), which translates to "heartiest congratulations." This phrase expresses strong positive feelings and celebration.

Text: अर्जुन तेंडुलकर भारतीय संघाताच्या महत्त्वाचे प्रतीक होते, त्यांनी मुश्ताक अली ट्रॉफीची मागणी केली.
translated_text: Arjun Tendulkar was an important symbol of the Indian team, he demanded the Mushtaq Ali Trophy.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it primarily states facts about Arjun Tendulkar ("अर्जुन तेंडुलकर भारतीय संघाताच्या महत्त्वाचे प्रतीक होते") and his actions ("त्यांनी मुश्ताक अली ट्रॉफीची मागणी केली"). There is no indication of positive or negative feelings being expressed.

Text: त्रिवार आभिनंदन आणि..... हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Congratulations and..... best wishes
Justification: The sentiment is positive (1) due to the presence of "त्रिवार आभिनंदन" (trivar abhinandan) meaning "triple congratulations," which expresses strong approval and positive feeling, contributing to a joyful emotion. "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) meaning "heartfelt wishes" further reinforces the positive sentiment.

Text: सर आरोप प्रत्यारोप करण्यापेक्षा सर्वांनी मिळून विकासाचे पाऊल उचलले तर अधिक प्रगती होईल
translated_text: Sir, if everyone takes steps towards development together instead of blaming each other, there will be more progress.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "अधिक प्रगती होईल" (adhik pragati hoil), meaning "there will be more progress," which indicates a positive outcome.

Text: तसेच नायलॉन मांजा पासून वाचण्यासाठी नागरिकांकरीता खबरदारी म्हणून योग्य माहिती प्रसारित केली
translated_text: Also, appropriate information was disseminated to citizens as a precaution to protect them from nylon manja.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it describes the dissemination of information as a precaution; the phrase "खबरदारी म्हणून योग्य माहिती प्रसारित केली" (khabardari mhanun yogya mahiti prasārit keli) indicates a helpful and informative action without expressing any strong positive or negative emotion.

Text: जय महाराष्ट्र शिवसेना कधीच संपणार नाही...
translated_text: Jai Maharashtra Shiv Sena will never end...
Justification: While the sentence expresses support for Shiv Sena, the emotion "sadness" suggests a feeling of loss or concern about the party's future. The phrase "कधीच संपणार नाही" (kadhich sampnar nahi) - "will never end" - while seemingly positive, implies a pre-existing fear or concern that the Shiv Sena *could* end, highlighting the underlying sadness associated with that possibility.

Text: सकाळी अनुलोम विलोम करत जा,वाट बघायचा स्टॅमिना वाढतो..
translated_text: Keep doing Anulom Vilom in the morning, the stamina of waiting increases..
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence "वाट बघायचा स्टॅमिना वाढतो" (the stamina of waiting increases) is a factual observation without conveying any strong positive or negative emotion. It is simply stating a potential benefit of practicing Anulom Vilom.

Text: मनसेच्या कार्यकर्त्यांना महाराष्ट्र सैनिक का संबोधतात यांचं उत्तम उदाहरण.
translated_text: A good example of why MNS workers are called Maharashtra soldiers.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact or observation. There's no inherently positive or negative sentiment expressed. The phrase "उत्तम उदाहरण" (uttam udaharan - good example) suggests observation but doesn't inject strong emotion.

Text: भारताने जगभरात लस वितरित केल्या आहेत, जेणेकरून कोणीही मरणार नाही: पंतप्रधान
translated_text: India has distributed vaccines across the world, so that no one dies: PM
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the factual statement about vaccine distribution ("लस वितरित केल्या आहेत") and the intention to prevent deaths ("कोणीही मरणार नाही"), lacking strong positive or negative connotations.

Text: हे सर्व मराठा नेते गद्दार आहे,,
translated_text: All these Maratha leaders are traitors.
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are driven by the word "गद्दार" (gaddar), meaning "traitor," which strongly indicates a negative sentiment and elicits disgust.

Text: मी पण आजचं श्रीगणेशा केला.... यंदाची दिवाळीची सुट्टी सार्थकी लागणार.... धन्यवाद सर
translated_text: I also did today's Shri Ganesha.... This year's Diwali vacation will be worthwhile.... Thank you sir
Justification: The phrase "सार्थकी लागणार" (sarthaki lagnara), meaning "will be worthwhile," indicates a positive sentiment and feelings of joy because it expresses a sense of fulfillment and satisfaction about the Diwali vacation.

Text: भाऊ, तुम्हाला रक्षाबंधन आणी नारळी पौर्णिमेच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Brother, I wish you a very happy Raksha Bandhan and Narali Purnima.
Justification: The assigned sentiment and emotion do not match the given sentence. The sentence expresses good wishes. Therefore, it should be a positive sentiment. Since the provided sentiment is negative with sadness as the emotion, there is no word or phrase contributing to that sentiment. If the sentiment had been, for example, positive, then the word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha) meaning "wishes" would be a key indicator.

Text: हे पत्र मिळाल्याने तुमचा आदर मिळाला आहे साहेब.... धन्यावाद....
translated_text: I am honored to receive this letter, sir.... Thank you....
Justification: The sentence expresses positive sentiment and joy due to the word "आदर" (aadar), meaning "honor," which indicates respect and appreciation. Receiving honor is a positive experience.

Text: बापूजी निर्दोष आहे
translated_text: Bapuji is innocent.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment because "निर्दोष" (nirdosh), meaning innocent, implies a favorable judgment or state.

Text: जिजाऊ, सावीत्रीमाई, अहिल्याई, रमाई नाही का दिसत भातखळकर. बरी शारदा आणि लक्ष्मीच दिसते.
translated_text: Why don't you see Jijau, Savitrimai, Ahilyaai, Ramaai, Bhatkhalkar? Only Sarada and Lakshmi are visible.
Justification: The sentence expresses disapproval towards Bhatkhalkar's selective visibility of historical figures. The phrase "नाही का दिसत" (nahi ka disat) implying "Why don't you see?" indicates a critical and questioning tone, contributing to a negative sentiment, though expressed in a neutral tone with no specific emotion displayed.

Text: बहिण-भाऊ यांच्यातील निस्सिम प्रेमाचे प्रतीक म्हणून ओळखल्या जाणाऱ्या रक्षाबंधन सणाच्या सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा..!
translated_text: Warm wishes to everyone on the occasion of Raksha Bandhan, the festival known as the symbol of unconditional love between a brother and a sister..!
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "warm wishes," expresses a positive but neutral sentiment, fitting for a celebratory greeting.

Text: ‘हा’ सराफा व्यापारी आहे मोदींचा ‘जबरा फॅन’, स्वतःच्या हाताने बनवली सोन्याची मूर्ती
translated_text: This' bullion merchant is a 'big fan' of Modi, made a gold statue with his own hands
Justification: The sentence expresses admiration for Modi through the phrase "जबरा फॅन" (jabra fan), meaning "big fan," indicating a positive sentiment but not necessarily triggering any strong emotion beyond a neutral one.

Text: शिवसैनिकांना शक्ती देणारा हा विजय आहे. गद्दारांना गाडणे ही कोंकण ची संस्कृती..
translated_text: This is a victory that gives strength to Shiv Sainiks. Burying traitors is the culture of Konkan.
Justification: The phrase "शक्ती देणारा हा विजय आहे" (shakti denara ha vijay aahe - this is a victory that gives strength) indicates a positive sentiment, implying empowerment and support. While the second sentence is aggressive, the overall neutral emotion likely stems from the first sentence being the dominant focus and the second being presented as cultural norm, rather than a currently felt emotion.

Text: बरोबर आम्हाला आमचे महाराज देवा पेक्षा सन्मानिय आहेत आणी राहणार, जय शिवराय...
translated_text: Indeed, our Maharaj is and will remain more respected than God, Jai Shivaji...
Justification: The sentence expresses strong positive sentiment due to the comparison of "Maharaj" to being "देवा पेक्षा सन्मानिय" (deva peksha sanmaniy), meaning "more respected than God," indicating high regard and reverence.

Text: पडत आहेत त्यामुळे ट्राफिक ची समस्या कमी होत आहे
translated_text: are falling, so the traffic problem is decreasing
Justification: The sentiment is positive (1) due to the phrase "कमी होत आहे" (kami hot aahe), meaning "is decreasing." This indicates a positive change, specifically the reduction of a problem.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा.. दादा
translated_text: Happy birthday, grandpa.
Justification: The word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), meaning "wishes," expresses a positive sentiment, specifically related to a joyful occasion like a birthday. "हार्दिक" (hardik) further emphasizes the sincerity and warmth of the wishes, solidifying the positive sentiment and joyful emotion.

Text: लग्नांच्या चर्चांदरम्यान पार्टीला एकत्र पोहोचले सिद्धार्थ-कियारा; चाहते म्हणाले, “सर्वोत्तम जोडपे….”
translated_text: Sidharth-Kiara arrive at a party together amid wedding talks; fans say, "The best couple..."
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "सर्वोत्तम जोडपे" (sarvottam jodpe), which translates to "the best couple." This phrase expresses strong approval and positive sentiment towards the couple.

Text: आपल्या आंदोलनाला सुयश चिंतितो हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Best wishes for your movement, Suyash Sangita
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) meaning "best wishes" expresses a positive sentiment, though in a relatively neutral, formal way. This indicates general goodwill, hence a positive but not strongly emotional sentiment.

Text: कोजागिरी पौर्णिमा निमित्त आपणास व आपल्या परीवारास मंगलमय शुभेच्छा...!
translated_text: Best wishes to you and your family on the occasion of Kojagiri Pournima...!
Justification: The phrase "मंगलमय शुभेच्छा...!" (Mangalmay Shubhechha...!) meaning "auspicious wishes" expresses a positive sentiment, but in this context of a greeting, it's considered neutral.

Text: आता नुस्ता राडा..!विजयीभव!!! .//…
translated_text: Now stop fighting..!Vijayibhav!!! .//…
Justification: The phrase "आता नुस्ता राडा" (aata nusta raada), meaning "now it's just chaos/fighting," indicates a negative state and feeling of agitation, aligning with anger.

Text: नवे चिन्ह मिळताच प्रचाराला सुरुवात; ‘या’ मतदारसंघात झळकले ठाकरे गटाचे बॅनर
translated_text: Campaigning begins as soon as new symbol is received; Thackeray group's banner seen in 'Ya' constituency
Justification: The sentence reports a factual event ("प्रचाराला सुरुवात"; "Campaigning begins") without expressing any explicit positive or negative sentiment or emotion.

Text: मकर संक्रांतीच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy Makar Sankranti
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "heartfelt wishes" or "best wishes," expresses a positive sentiment and conveys joy.

Text: गुलाल तयार ठेवा,विजय आपलाच आहे .//…
translated_text: Keep the gulal ready, victory is yours.//…
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "विजय आपलाच आहे" (vijay aaplach aahe), meaning "victory is yours", which expresses confidence and a positive outcome.

Text: अगदी बरोबर आहे मॅडम
translated_text: That's right, madam.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by "अगदी बरोबर," which translates to "exactly correct" or "absolutely right," indicating agreement and positivity.

Text: नवरात्रीच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Happy Navratri!
Justification: The sentiment is positive and the emotion is joy because "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!" (hardik shubhechha!) expresses heartfelt wishes, indicating a positive and joyful sentiment.

Text: नागरिकांना वेळोवेळी आपले असेच अमूल्य सहकार्य मिळत राहावे अशी अपेक्षा करतो, धन्यवाद.
translated_text: We hope that citizens will continue to receive such invaluable support from you from time to time, thank you.
Justification: The phrase "अमूल्य सहकार्य" (amulya sahakarya), meaning "invaluable support," indicates a positive sentiment and evokes a feeling of joy.

Text: मुंबईवर पुन्हा मराठी माणसंच राज्य करतील  भाई खूप खूप अभिनंदन
translated_text: Marathi people will rule Mumbai again, brother, congratulations very much.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by "अभिनंदन" (abhinandan), which translates to "congratulations" and expresses positive affirmation and happiness. The phrase "खूप खूप" (khoop khoop) amplifying it further.

Text: हे बरोबर आहे.
translated_text: This is correct.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement with no emotional coloring; the Marathi phrase "बरोबर आहे" (barobar aahe - is correct) indicates affirmation and thus a neutral sentiment.

Text: या उत्सवामुळे कोरोना संकट काळातही नवचैतन्य अनुभवायला मिळाले ./-…
translated_text: This festival gave me a sense of renewal even during the Corona crisis./-…
Justification: The sentiment is positive because of the phrase "नवचैतन्य अनुभवायला मिळाले" (navachaitanya anubhavayala milale), which translates to "got to experience renewal," indicating a joyful and revitalizing feeling.

Text:
ऊर्जा सकारात्मकतेची, ऊर्जा नवविचाराची !
मकर संक्रांतीच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text:
Energy of positivity, energy of innovation!
Warm wishes on Makar Sankranti!
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the phrases "सकारात्मकतेची" (sākārātmakatechī) meaning "of positivity" and "नवविचाराची" (navavichārāchī) meaning "of innovation", which evoke positive associations. The greeting "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!" (hārdik shubhēcchā!) meaning "Warm wishes!" further reinforces the positive sentiment, even though the emotion is neutral as it's a standard greeting.

Text: सामाजिक कार्य करत असताना आणखी एक कौतुकाची थाप
translated_text: Another round of applause while doing social work
Justification: The phrase "कौतुकाची थाप" (kautukachi thaap), meaning "round of applause" or "pat on the back," indicates a positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: मी अंतराळवीर आहे, पृथ्वीवर येण्यासाठी पैसे हवेत, महिलेला लाखोंचा गंडा...
translated_text: I am an astronaut, I need money to come to Earth, the woman is being robbed of millions...
Justification: "गंडा..." (ganda...) which translates to "being robbed/cheated" indicates a negative situation of exploitation, triggering anger.

Text: पूर्णपणे सहमत आहे, ही कीड समुळ नष्ट करायलाच पाहिजे
translated_text: Totally agree, this pest must be completely eradicated.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by "पूर्णपणे सहमत आहे" (pūrṇapaṇē sahamata āhē), meaning "totally agree," indicating strong agreement and support.

Text: अभिनंदन.... आता खऱ्या अर्थाने कॉग्रेस च्या नविन पर्वाला सुरुवात होणार आहे.
translated_text: Congratulations.... Now, a new era for Congress is truly about to begin.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), which translates to "Congratulations."

Text: घरोघरी आनंदाचे गोकुळ नांदावे, समाधानाने सर्व काही बहरावे! वसुबारस निमित्ताने सर्वांना मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: May the flowers of happiness bloom in every household, and may everything blossom with contentment! Heartfelt greetings to everyone on the occasion of Vasubaras!
Justification: The positive sentiment is primarily driven by "आनंदाचे गोकुळ नांदावे" (aanandache gokul nandave), which translates to "May the Gokul of happiness reside," indicating a wish for joy and prosperity.

Text: फक्त या एका साठी तुम्हाला करतोय...ही गोष्ट आमच्या पर्यंत पोहचवल्याबद्दल मनापासून धन्यवाद.
translated_text: I'm doing this just for you... Thank you very much for bringing this story to us.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the phrase "मनापासून धन्यवाद" (manapasun dhanyavad), which translates to "thank you from the bottom of my heart/sincerely." This expresses deep gratitude and appreciation.

Text: कला,साहित्य या विषयाची जाणं असलेला नेता..आदरणीय राजसाहेब ठाकरे...
translated_text: A leader who knows the subject of art and literature.. Respected Rajsaheb Thackeray...
Justification: The word "आदरणीय" (Aadarniy), meaning "Respected", indicates a positive sentiment, but in this context, it expresses a neutral respectful tone rather than strong positive emotion.

Text: मराठी विसरलात का साहेब .. साहेबांना चांगली मराठी येते
translated_text: Have you forgotten Marathi, sir? Sir, you know Marathi well.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because while the first part "मराठी विसरलात का साहेब" could be interpreted as a mild criticism, the second part "साहेबांना चांगली मराठी येते" affirms the person's Marathi skills, neutralizing any negative implication.

Text: खरी गोष्ट आहे उद्भव शरद सोनियामातासेने साठी
translated_text: The real story is Uruha Sharad Sonia Matasene.
Justification: The sentence is factual and descriptive; the phrase "खरी गोष्ट आहे" (khari gosht aahe) meaning "the real story is" contributes to a neutral sentiment, simply stating a fact without expressing positive or negative emotion.

Text: अगदीं सहमत आहे, अर्ज दाखल केला तेव्हा ही कल्पना नसावी भाजप ला.
translated_text: I completely agree, BJP must not have had this idea when they filed the application.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence expresses agreement ("अगदीं सहमत आहे") but primarily focuses on a political observation regarding BJP's potential lack of foresight, without expressing explicit positive or negative emotion towards any entity.

Text: आसा दिवस पूना येणे नाही ... अप्रतिम अशी भेट खूप छान
translated_text: It's not like I'm coming to Pune on a day like this... Such an amazing visit, it's so nice.
Justification: The phrase "अप्रतिम अशी भेट खूप छान" (apratim ashi bhet khup chhan - Such an amazing visit, it's so nice) indicates joy. The words "अप्रतिम" (apratim - amazing) and "खूप छान" (khup chhan - very nice/great) are strong positive indicators.

Text: धन्यवाद दादा असेच आपले मार्गदर्शन मिळो.
translated_text: Thank you, Grandpa, for your guidance.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), meaning "thank you," which expresses gratitude.

Text: जनतेचे प्रेम आणि विश्वास हेच आमची ताकद आहे !
translated_text: The love and trust of the people is our strength!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to "प्रेम आणि विश्वास" (prem aani vishwas), which means "love and trust." These terms inherently convey positive feelings.

Text: कै. श्री. श्रीपाद नारायण पेंडसे यांच्या पवित्र स्मृतिस विनम्र अभिवादन
translated_text: Humble tributes to the sacred memory of the late Shri. Shripad Narayan Pendse
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the phrase "पवित्र स्मृतिस विनम्र अभिवादन" (pavitra smritis vinamra abhiwadan), meaning "humble tributes to the sacred memory," which is a respectful and formal expression of remembrance without expressing strong positive or negative feelings.

Text: चला वर आणि खाली जाऊ, काही फरक पडत नाही, कोणीही आम्हाला मागे धरणार नाही!
translated_text: Let's go up and down, it doesn't matter, no one will hold us back!
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "कोणीही आम्हाला मागे धरणार नाही!" (konihi amhala mage dharnar nahi!), meaning "no one will hold us back," which expresses a sense of freedom and empowerment.

Text: रिसर्च पुणे ने केला असून अभिमानाची बाब म्हणजे सर्व शास्त्रज्ञ मराठी आहेत
