translated_text: This voice brought peace to my mind.
Justification: "शांती देऊन गेला" (shanti deun gela) implies giving peace, indicating a positive but calm, neutral sentiment.

Text: घेतलेली माघार ही एका सच्चा शिवसैनिकाला दिलेली आदरांजली आहे
translated_text: The retreat is a tribute to a true Shiv Sainik.
Justification: "आदरांजली आहे" (Aadaranjali aahe) meaning "is a tribute," indicates respect and remembrance, leading to a neutral sentiment as it's a somber but respectful acknowledgment.

Text: मीही त्याच मताचा आहे..
translated_text: I am of the same opinion..
Justification: The sentence expresses agreement ("मीही त्याच मताचा आहे"). The phrase "त्याच मताचा आहे" (tyach matacha aahe - of the same opinion) indicates a neutral sentiment as it simply reflects agreement without expressing strong positive or negative feelings.

Text: सर्व देशवासी बांधव व बघिणींना महाशिवरात्रीच्या हार्दिक शुभकामना
translated_text: Warm wishes to all our fellow countrymen on the occasion of Mahashivratri.
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभकामना" (hardik shubhkamna), meaning "warm wishes," expresses goodwill and positive sentiment, but in this context, it is a standard greeting, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: अभिनंदन मॅडम आणि पुढील प्रवासासाठी खूप खूप शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Congratulations, madam, and best wishes for your future journey!
Justification: The positive sentiment is primarily driven by "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), meaning congratulations, and "खूप खूप शुभेच्छा!" (khoop khoop shubhechha!), meaning very best wishes, both expressing strong positive regard and good luck, indicative of joy.

Text: सर्व हिंदु धर्मप्रेमींबांधवांना शिवप्रताप दिनाच्या मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Heartfelt greetings to all Hindu devotees on the occasion of Shiv Pratap Din.
Justification: The phrase "मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा" (manaḥpūrvak śubhecchā) meaning "heartfelt greetings" expresses a positive but neutral sentiment, as it is a standard and polite expression of goodwill.

Text: महाशक्ती च्या साह्याने पण जिकवू शकतात..
translated_text: They can also win with the help of superpowers.
Justification: The sentence expresses a possibility of winning, without explicit positive or negative connotations. The phrase "जिकवू शकतात" (jiku shaktat - can win) indicates a potential outcome, keeping the sentiment neutral.

Text: मराठवाड्याच्या युवकांची व्यवसायाकडे वाटचाल म्हणजे मराठवाड्याच्या विकासासाठी महत्त्वाची अशी संधी आहे.
translated_text: The move of Marathwada's youth towards entrepreneurship is an important opportunity for the development of Marathwada.
Justification: The sentence expresses an optimistic view about the youth's move towards entrepreneurship and its potential for development. However, it lacks strong positive emotional cues. The phrase "विकासासाठी महत्त्वाची अशी संधी आहे" (vikāsāsāṭhī mahatvāchī ashī sandhī āhe - is an important opportunity for development) indicates a positive, but generally neutral sentiment.

Text: संजीव कुमारच्या निधनानंतर शत्रुघ्न सिन्हा म्हणाले होते, ‘तुझे उपकार आयुष्यभर विसरणार नाही’
translated_text: After the death of Sanjeev Kumar, Shatrughan Sinha had said, 'I will never forget your kindness throughout my life'
Justification: The sentiment is positive despite the sad context because the phrase "उपकार आयुष्यभर विसरणार नाही" (upkar aayushyabhar visarnar nahi - will never forget your kindness) expresses gratitude and appreciation, indicating a positive remembrance even in mourning.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा महादेव का आशीर्वाद बना रहे.
translated_text: Happy birthday, may the blessings of Lord Shiva continue.
Justification: The sentence expresses joy due to the phrase "वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (vaadhdivsachya hardik shubhechha), which translates to "Happy birthday" and conveys positive wishes.

Text: या रेशमी धाग्यात रंग आहे प्रेमाचा.. वात्सल्य, प्रेम आणि जिव्हाळ्याचा..
translated_text: This silk thread has the color of love.. affection, love and intimacy..
Justification: The sentiment is positive and the emotion is joy because the sentence uses the phrase "प्रेमाचा" (premacha), meaning "of love," which explicitly expresses a positive and joyful emotion. Furthermore, words like "वात्सल्य" (vatsalya - affection) and "जिव्हाळ्याचा" (jivhalyacha - intimacy) further contribute to the joyful sentiment.

Text: घरी आल्यावर सगळ्यात आधी "आईला" शोधणे, हां हे ही "प्रेम" आहे..!
translated_text: The first thing you do when you come home is to find "mother", yes, this is "love"..!
Justification: The Marathi word "प्रेम" (prem), meaning "love", directly indicates a positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: रक्षाबंधन आणि नारळी पौर्णिमेनिमित्त सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Warm wishes to everyone on the occasion of Raksha Bandhan and Narali Purnima!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!" (hardik shubhechha!), which translates to "warm wishes" or "heartfelt greetings," expressing a positive and well-wishing sentiment.

Text: तुझ्या कमेंट्स साठी तुला एक नोबेल पारितोषिक द्यायला हवे..
translated_text: You should be awarded a Nobel Prize for your comments.
Justification: The phrase "नोबेल पारितोषिक द्यायला हवे" (Nobel Paritoshik dyayala have - should be awarded a Nobel Prize) is used sarcastically in this context. While literally meaning a high honor, the hyperbole suggests the comments are actually irritating or ridiculous, hence the anger.

Text: शिंदे साहेब वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy birthday to Mr. Shinde.
Justification: The sentiment is positive (1) due to the phrase "वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (vaadhdivsachya haardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt birthday wishes," expressing positive feelings and congratulations.

Text: गजाभाऊंची कृपा...
translated_text: The grace of Gajabhau...
Justification: "कृपा" (krupa), meaning grace, suggests a positive and benevolent influence, thus evoking joy and a positive sentiment.

Text: सर्वांना महाशिवरात्रीच्या मंगलमय शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Happy Mahashivratri to everyone!
Justification: The phrase "मंगलमय शुभेच्छा!" (mangalamaya shubhechha!) translates to "auspicious/blessed wishes!", which directly expresses positive feelings, thus contributing to the positive sentiment and emotion of joy.

Text: आख्खा महाराष्ट्र वाट पाहतोय, हा चिमुकला आता अजय-अतुलच्या संगीतावर कोणतं गाणं गाणार
translated_text: The whole of Maharashtra is waiting, which song will this little one sing on Ajay-Atul's music?
Justification: The sentence expresses anticipation and curiosity, but lacks explicit positive or negative indicators. The phrase "आख्खा महाराष्ट्र वाट पाहतोय" (the whole of Maharashtra is waiting) indicates widespread interest, but doesn't lean towards a specific sentiment. Thus, a neutral sentiment is most appropriate.

Text: महत्वाचे म्हणजे "गंगाधर च शक्तिमान आहे"
translated_text: The important thing is "Gangadhar is powerful"
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the statement "शक्तिमान आहे" (shaktimaan aahe - is powerful) is a factual statement in the given context and doesn't express a strong positive or negative feeling.

Text: या प्रदेशांमध्ये मुबलक पीक उत्पादनासाठी अनुकूल परिस्थिती आहे
translated_text: These regions have favorable conditions for abundant crop production.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive outlook on crop production due to "अनुकूल परिस्थिती" (anukul paristhiti), meaning favorable conditions, indicating a positive, though neutral, sentiment.

Text: पश्चिम महाराष्ट्रातील शेतकरी ऊस या पिकामुळेच समृध्द झाला आहे . हे मात्र नक्की
translated_text: The farmers of western Maharashtra have become prosperous due to this crop, sugarcane. This is for sure.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive state of prosperity attained by farmers. The phrase "समृध्द झाला आहे" (samrudhha jhala aahe - has become prosperous) directly indicates a positive state, leading to the neutral sentiment in this context as it's presented as a factual statement.

Text: पिंपरी चिंचवड मधील औंध ते रावेत हा मार्ग मस्त आहे
translated_text: The route from Aundh to Ravet in Pimpri Chinchwad is awesome.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes joy because the Marathi word "मस्त" (mast), meaning "awesome," expresses strong positive appreciation.

Text: ही दिवाळी स्वदेशी व हलाल मुक्त उत्पादन वापरून साजरी करुया.
translated_text: Let's celebrate this Diwali using indigenous and halal-free products.
Justification: The phrase "साजरी करुया" (sajari karuya), meaning "let's celebrate," strongly indicates a positive sentiment and the emotion of joy. It expresses enthusiasm and a desire for a happy occasion.

Text: हे बरोबर आहे
translated_text: This is correct.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the phrase "बरोबर आहे" (barobar aahe), which simply states a fact of correctness without expressing any particular emotion.

Text: उगाच नाही मी पेरुवर जीवापाड प्रेम करत....
translated_text: It's not for nothing that I love Peru with all my heart...
Justification: "जीवापाड प्रेम" (jivaapad prem) expresses intense love and affection, directly indicating positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: स्वर्गलोकातुन उतरलेला आनंद तुम्ही उपभोगत आहात.
translated_text: You are enjoying the joy that has descended from heaven.
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are positive due to the phrase "स्वर्गलोकातुन उतरलेला आनंद" (swargalokatun utaralela aanand) which translates to "joy that has descended from heaven," indicating extreme happiness and pleasure. "आनंद" (aanand) specifically signifies joy and is the key indicator.

Text: ही हिरवी पिलावळे ठेचून काढावी...!! जय जय भारत
translated_text: This green rice should be crushed...!! Jai Jai Bharat
Justification: The Marathi word "ठेचून" (thechun), meaning "crushed," implies violence and destruction, contributing to the anger and negative sentiment.

Text: विभागीय आयुक्त, जिल्हाधिकाऱ्यांसह अधिकारी व कर्मचाऱ्यांना मिळाले हे नऊ पुरस्कार ./--…
translated_text: These nine awards were received by officers and employees including Divisional Commissioner, District Collector./--…
Justification: The sentence reports the receiving of awards, with the phrase "मिळाले हे नऊ पुरस्कार" (milale he nau puraskar - received these nine awards) simply stating a fact without conveying any positive or negative emotion.

Text: विराट रोहित नाही तर भारताचा 'हा' खेळाडू आहे हा फॅन्स फेवरेट! ऑटोग्राफसाठी एकच गदारोळ
translated_text: Virat, not Rohit, but 'this' player from India is the fan favorite! A huge uproar for autographs
Justification: The phrase "फॅन्स फेवरेट" (fans favorite) indicates strong positive sentiment, implying popularity and affection, thus contributing to the emotion of joy.

Text: नविन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा..
translated_text: Happy New Year..
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) expresses heartfelt wishes, indicating a positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: तक्रारीची योग्य ती दखल घेऊन गणेशोत्सवापूर्वी रस्त्याचे डांबरीकरण केल्याबद्दल यांचे हार्दिक आभार
translated_text: Heartfelt thanks to them for taking due note of the complaint and asphalting the road before Ganeshotsav.
Justification: "हार्दिक आभार" (heartfelt thanks) expresses gratitude, leading to a positive but neutral sentiment.

Text: आपण मला फॉलोबैक दिल्या बदल आपले मनपूर्वक आभार
translated_text: Thank you very much for following me.
Justification: The sentence expresses joy due to the phrase "मनपूर्वक आभार" (manapurvak abhar), which translates to "heartfelt thanks" and indicates genuine gratitude, a strong positive sentiment.

Text: नवीन अध्यक्ष लवकरच सापडेल आणि विलंब होणार नाही
translated_text: A new president will be found soon and there will be no delay.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the factual and unemotional statement, indicated by the phrase "विलंब होणार नाही" (vilamb honar nahi - there will be no delay) which simply states a fact without expressing any specific emotion.

Text: आपल्या डरकाळी ने अक्ख जंगल थर कापत होते,अभिनंदन .//…
translated_text: Your fear was cutting down the entire forest, congratulations.//…
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are driven by the word "डरकाळी" (darkali), which translates to "roar" or "dreadful cry," evoking fear and dominance.

Text: तुम्ही उचललेल्या पावलासाठी अभिनंदन आणि खुप खुप शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Congratulations and best wishes for the step you have taken.
Justification: "अभिनंदन" (congratulations) and "खुप खुप शुभेच्छा" (best wishes) are both positive phrases that directly indicate a positive sentiment and emotion of joy.

Text: रक्षाबंधन आणि च्या सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा ....
translated_text: Happy Raksha Bandhan and best wishes to all....
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) which translates to "heartfelt wishes" expresses positive sentiment and the associated emotion of joy.

Text: माणसाची ... वृत्ती आणि दृष्टी खूप लवकर बदलते...!!! शुभ सकाळ
translated_text: A person's attitude and vision change very quickly...!!! Good morning
Justification: The phrase "शुभ सकाळ" (shubh sakal - Good morning) expresses a positive greeting, indicating joy.

Text: दादा सेलेब्रिटी पेक्षाही मोठा माणुस मनाने मनपुर्वक अभिनंदन
translated_text: Dada is a bigger human being than a celebrity, heartfelt congratulations
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "मनपुर्वक अभिनंदन" (manapurvak abhinandan) which means "heartfelt congratulations," expressing genuine and positive feelings.

Text: झी मराठीच्या सर्व प्रेक्षकांना कोजागिरी पौर्णिमेच्या मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा...!!
translated_text: Heartiest wishes to all the viewers of Zee Marathi on the occasion of Kojagiri Pournima...!!
Justification: The phrase "मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा" (manahpurvak shubhechha), meaning "heartfelt wishes," indicates a positive sentiment and conveys joy.

Text: आपले खूप खूप स्वागत आहे लातूरात
translated_text: You are very welcome in Latur.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "खूप खूप स्वागत आहे" (khup khup swagata aahe), which means "very welcome." This expresses a warm and inviting greeting.

Text: मा. श्री राजेश कुमार आपणास वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy birthday to you, Mr. Rajesh Kumar.
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) expresses heartfelt good wishes, which indicates joy and a positive sentiment.

Text: महाशिवरात्री निमित्त सर्वांना मंगलमय शुभेच्छा..!!
translated_text: Happy Mahashivratri to everyone..!!
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are positive due to the phrase "मंगलमय शुभेच्छा" (mangalmay shubhechha), which translates to "auspicious wishes" or "blissful greetings," indicating a positive and joyful expression.

Text: आपणा सर्वांना नवरात्रीच्या व घटस्थापनेच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा...
translated_text: Wishing you all a very happy Navratri and Ghatasthapana...
Justification: The word "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) translates to "heartfelt wishes," which expresses positive sentiment and thus implies joy.

Text: आयुष्य समृद्ध करणारे थ्रेड! ./…
translated_text: Life-enriching threads! ./…
Justification: The sentiment is positive ("1") due to the phrase "आयुष्य समृद्ध करणारे" (aayushya samruddha karnare), which translates to "life-enriching." This phrase conveys a positive and beneficial effect on life, indicating joy.

Text: आपल्या सर्वांना होळी पौर्णिमा आणि धुलीवंदनच्या मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा...!
translated_text: Heartiest greetings to all of you on Holi Pournima and Dhuli Vandana...!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा" (manahpoorvak shubhechha), which translates to "heartiest greetings" or "sincere wishes," indicating a joyful and positive expression.

Text: आमच्या मराठवाड्या चा हिरो रितेश देशमुख यांना वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy birthday to our Marathwada hero Riteish Deshmukh
Justification: The phrase "वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (vaadhdivsachya haardik shubhechha), meaning "heartfelt birthday wishes", expresses positive sentiment and evokes joy.

Text: भावी अर्थमंत्री देशाचे उद्धवजींच्या मंत्रिमंडळात नक्की होणार
translated_text: The future Finance Minister will definitely be in Uddhavji's cabinet.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it mainly states a future possibility ("नक्की होणार" - nakki honar - will definitely be) without expressing any strong positive or negative opinions or emotions.

Text: मळेवाडमधील पाच महिलांना उज्वला गॅसचे वितरण ./
translated_text: Ujjwala gas distribution to five women in Malewad./
Justification: The sentence describes a neutral event, the distribution of Ujjwala gas. There are no words expressing positive or negative sentiment. The Marathi phrase "गॅसचे वितरण" (gasche vitaran - gas distribution) is a factual statement, contributing to the neutral sentiment.

Text: पोटनिवडणुकीतून माघार ही म्हणजे च्या निवडणुकीसाठी केलेले उपकार आहेत.
translated_text: Withdrawing from the by-election is a favor done for the election.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence describes a strategic political maneuver ("माघार ही म्हणजे च्या निवडणुकीसाठी केलेले उपकार आहेत" - withdrawing is a favor for the election) without expressing positive or negative feelings. It's a statement of political calculation.

Text: प्रथम पूज्यनिय गणरायाचे आगमन
translated_text: The arrival of the first venerated Lord Ganesha
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the word "पूज्यनिय" (pujaniya), meaning venerated or revered, which evokes feelings of respect and auspiciousness associated with Lord Ganesha's arrival.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा....!
translated_text: Happy birthday....!
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning heartfelt wishes, expresses positive sentiment and contributes to the feeling of joy.

Text: ... चेहऱ्यावर सारखं एक प्रसन्न हसू
translated_text: ... a happy smile on your face
Justification: The word "प्रसन्न" (prasanna) which means "happy" or "pleasant" directly indicates a positive sentiment and evokes the emotion of joy.

Text: कधी वाटलं नव्हतं सुप्रीम कोर्टा च्या पाहता येतील. जबरदस्त आहे हे.
translated_text: I never thought I would be able to see the Supreme Court. This is amazing.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes joy because the phrase "जबरदस्त आहे हे" (jabardast aahe he), meaning "this is amazing," expresses strong positive appreciation.

Text:
भारताची बॅडमिंटन स्टार पी.व्ही.सिंधू ने 'सुवर्णपदक'मिळवले.
अभिनंदन!
translated_text:
India's badminton star P.V. Sindhu won the 'gold medal'.
Congratulations!
Justification: The word "सुवर्णपदक" (suvarnapadak - gold medal) indicates achievement and victory, and "अभिनंदन!" (Abhinandan! - Congratulations!) expresses explicit positive sentiment.

Text: अशीच प्रगतीचा वेग चालू राहू दे.... खुप खुप शुभेच्छा
translated_text: May this pace of progress continue.... Best wishes
Justification: The phrase "खुप खुप शुभेच्छा" (khup khup shubhechha - best wishes) indicates a positive sentiment.

Text: विजय दिवस निमित्ताने सर्व देश वासीयांना हार्दीक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Warm wishes to all the countrymen on the occasion of Victory Day
Justification: The word "हार्दीक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "warm wishes," indicates a positive but neutral sentiment.

Text: नवीन वर्षाच्या आपणास व परिवारास हार्दिक शुभेच्छा..

Justification: The sentence expresses a lack of positivity ("हा उत्तम व्यवहार नाही") by stating the deal is "not good," resulting in a neutral sentiment. The phrase "हा उत्तम व्यवहार नाही" indicates a lack of positive sentiment.

Text: बेहतरीन जुगलबंदी .... वाह वाह वाह
translated_text: Great Juggling ....Wah Wah Wah
Justification: The "वाह वाह वाह" ("Wah Wah Wah") is an expression of appreciation and delight, clearly indicating a positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: माझ्या सर्व कोकणी पोरांना आणि कोकण कन्यांना मैत्री दिनाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!!!
translated_text: Happy Friendship Day to all my Konkani boys and Konkani girls!!!
Justification: "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!!!" (hardik shubhechha!!!) expresses heartfelt wishes, directly indicating positive sentiment.

Text: भारत जोडो यात्रा चा परिणाम दिसतोय भारत जोडो यात्राची यशस्वी वाटचाल चालू आहे.
translated_text: The results of the Bharat Jodo Yatra are visible. The successful progress of the Bharat Jodo Yatra is underway.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "यशस्वी वाटचाल" (yashasvi vaatchal), which translates to "successful progress," indicating a positive outcome and contributing to the feeling of joy.

Text: अभिजीतभाऊ नविन वर्षाच्या आपणास, व समस्त औताडे परीवारास् , आमच्या कडून हार्दीक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Abhijeet Bhau, we wish you and all the Autade family a happy new year.
Justification: The positive sentiment (1) and joy emotion are driven by the Marathi phrase "हार्दीक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt wishes" or "warm greetings," expressing a positive and joyful sentiment.

Text: मंगेश पाडगांवकरांना सलाम
translated_text: Salute to Mangesh Padgaonkar
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the phrase "सलाम" (salaam), which translates to "salute" and expresses respect and admiration.

Text: राहुल गांधी यांच्या 'भारत जोडो' यात्रेचे हे फलित असावे.
translated_text: This may be the result of Rahul Gandhi's 'Bharat Jodo' tour.
Justification: The sentence expresses a possibility or observation about the outcome of a political event. The phrase "असावे" (asave) indicates a possibility or inference, contributing to a neutral sentiment.

Text: त्यांच्यासोबत त्यांचे समर्थक पण तेच करत होते. सरकार बदलल्यापासून साहेब खूपच समजूतदार झालेत.
translated_text: His supporters were also doing the same with him. Saheb has become much more understanding since the change of government.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the observation that "साहेब खूपच समजूतदार झालेत" (Saheb has become much more understanding), indicating a change in behavior without explicitly expressing positive or negative emotion.

Text: स्वगृही बाप्पाचे आगमन व स्थापना...
translated_text: The arrival and establishment of Swagruhi Bappa...
Justification: "आगमन व स्थापना" (arrival and establishment) are neutral terms describing a customary event, indicating a neutral sentiment.

Text: अत्यंत ही सुंदर राधे राधे
translated_text: Very beautiful Radhe Radhe
Justification: The phrase "अत्यंत ही सुंदर" (atyant hee sundar), meaning "very beautiful," expresses a positive sentiment, indicating joy.

Text: खरं आहे, ही सहानुभूती नाहीच मुळी, हा निष्ठेचा ज्वालामुखी आहे
translated_text: It's true, this isn't sympathy at all, it's a volcano of loyalty.
Justification: The neutral sentiment is driven by the phrase "निष्ठेचा ज्वालामुखी आहे" (nishthecha jwalamukhi aahe), a "volcano of loyalty," which, while strong, doesn't inherently express a positive or negative sentiment in this context. It's a statement of unwavering devotion, not necessarily joy or sadness.

Text: स्पेस वर झालेल्या चर्चे नंतर ही बातमी नक्कीच उत्साह वर्धक आहे
translated_text: This news is certainly encouraging after the discussions on space.
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are positive due to the Marathi word "उत्साह वर्धक" (utsah vardhak), which directly translates to "encouraging" and expresses joy.

Text: वाढ दिवसाच्या मंगलमय हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy birthday, my dear.
Justification: The phrase "मंगलमय हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (mangalamaya hardik shubhechha) expressing heartfelt and auspicious wishes, contributes directly to the positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: होय, अजून ऐक कोरोना काळात त्यांनी कार्य देखील उत्तम केले आहे
translated_text: Yes, they have also done a great job during the Corona period.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the word "उत्तम" (uttam), which means "excellent" or "great".

Text: व्यक्त व्हायला कशाला घाबरायचं . कोणाच्या भावना आपण दुखवत नाही तोवर .
translated_text: Why be afraid to express yourself? As long as you don't hurt anyone's feelings.
Justification: The sentence expresses a generally positive and encouraging sentiment due to the phrase "कशाला घाबरायचं" (kashala ghabaraycha), which translates to "Why be afraid?". This suggests a lack of fear and promotes self-expression, leaning towards a neutral stance rather than a strongly positive one, especially when balanced with the conditional clause about not hurting others.

Text: हो, हे त्यांनी पण मान्य केलं आहे सर
translated_text: Yes, they have also agreed to this, sir.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the affirmation "हो" (ho) meaning "yes" and the verb "मान्य केलं" (manya kelan) meaning "agreed", indicating agreement and thus a positive leaning.

translated_text: Shambho Shankara !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
Justification: The exclamation "शंभो शंकरा" (Shambho Shankara), while a devotional phrase, expresses anger here due to excessive exclamation marks, indicating frustration or exasperation rather than reverence.

Text: जबरदस्त खुप महत्त्वाचे विषय खुप आभ्यासू व आक्रमक पणे मांडले साहेब तूम्ही
translated_text: You have presented a very important topic in a very eloquent and aggressive manner, sir.
Justification: The positive sentiment stems from the phrase "जबरदस्त खुप महत्त्वाचे विषय" (jabardast khup mahatvache vishay), meaning "very important and eloquent subject," indicating strong approval of the topic.

Text: सर,आपले विचार खूप प्रेरणादायी व मार्गदर्शक आहेत. मराठी ./
translated_text: Sir, your thoughts are very inspiring and guiding. Marathi ./
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the words "प्रेरणादायी" (preranadai - inspiring) and "मार्गदर्शक" (margadarshak - guiding), which indicate admiration and respect.

Text: भाजपच्या सरपंचाला उचला आता
translated_text: Remove the BJP sarpanch now.
Justification: The sentence expresses a negative action ("उचला", meaning "remove/lift") directed at someone, indicating a negative sentiment. However, the instruction lacks strong emotional cues, resulting in a neutral emotion.

Text: मग अजुनही वेळ गेलेली नाही काळी पिशवी.....मरगळ तर हटवीच व चैतन्याचा झरा ही देईल...
translated_text: Then the time has not yet passed, the black bag... the mud will be removed and the fountain of consciousness will give...
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence expresses a potential positive outcome ("चैतन्याचा झरा ही देईल" - "the fountain of consciousness will give") without expressing strong positive or negative feelings. The overall tone is suggestive and hopeful, not overtly emotional.

Text: रत्नागिरीकरांच्या या सक्रीय सहभागाबद्दल बॅरिस्टर सावरकरांनीही आनंद व्यक्त केला.
translated_text: Barrister Savarkar also expressed happiness over this active participation of the people of Ratnagiri.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "आनंद व्यक्त केला" (anand vyakt kela) which translates to "expressed happiness."

Text: हो. आवडला आपल्याला. चांगला मेसेज होता त्यात.
translated_text: Yes. We liked it. It had a good message.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "आवडला" (aavadla), meaning "liked," indicating enjoyment and approval.

Text: तिळगुळ घ्या गोड गोड बोला...!!!
translated_text: Speak sweetly and sweetly...!!!
Justification: The phrase "गोड गोड बोला" (god god bola), meaning "speak sweetly, sweetly," expresses positive and pleasant communication, contributing to the joy emotion and positive sentiment. The repetition of "गोड" (god - sweet) emphasizes the sweetness and amplifies the positive feeling.

Text: इगो आणि अहंकार जपण्यापेक्षा नातं जपलेलं कधीही चांगलं
translated_text: It is always better to cherish relationships than to cherish ego and pride.
Justification: The sentence expresses a preference for cherishing relationships over ego, indicated by the phrase "नातं जपलेलं कधीही चांगलं" (nāta japalela kadhīhī cāṅgalaṁ) which implies a positive and beneficial outcome from prioritizing relationships. This suggests a neutral, advisory sentiment.

Text: दाही दिशा उजळवणाऱ्या स्त्री शक्तीला सलाम....
translated_text: Salute to the female power that illuminates the right direction...
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the use of "सलाम" (salaam), which expresses respect and admiration. While direction is the meaning of the word, the positive use of "उजळवणाऱ्या" means someone that brings enlightenment.

Text: पुरणपोळी खाऊन बघा भारी लागते...!
translated_text: Eat the Puranpoli and see how heavy it is...!
Justification: The phrase "भारी लागते" (bhari lagte), meaning "tastes great/heavy," expresses a positive experience and enjoyment, thus indicating joy and a positive sentiment.

Text: जय गोविंदा
translated_text: Jai Govinda
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because "जय गोविंदा" (Jai Govinda) is a religious chant/phrase, expressing reverence rather than positive or negative emotion in itself.

Text: ही काही राजकिय संस्कृती नाही ही तर राजकीय चमत्कृती
translated_text: This is not a political culture, this is a political miracle.
Justification: The sentence expresses something unusual in politics without a clear positive or negative leaning. The word "चमत्कृती" (chamatkruti - miracle) indicates an unexpected or peculiar event, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: छान माहिती दिली आहे
translated_text: Nice information given.
Justification: The positive sentiment (1) is driven by the word "छान" (chhan), which translates to "nice" or "good".

Text: तुम्ही भक्कम बाजू मांडली त्याबाबद्दल तुमचे अभिनंदन आणि आभार! .//…
translated_text: Congratulations and thank you for your strong stand! .//…
Justification: The sentence expresses positive sentiment due to the use of "अभिनंदन आणि आभार!", meaning "congratulations and thank you!", which clearly indicates joy and appreciation.

Text: नववर्षाच्या सर्वांना मनापासून शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy New Year to everyone.
Justification: The phrase "मनापासून शुभेच्छा" (manapasun shubhechha), meaning "heartfelt wishes," expresses a positive sentiment indicative of joy.

Text: भाई वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy birthday brother
Justification: The sentence expresses joy and positive sentiment because "हार्दिक हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik hardik shubhechha) conveys heartfelt wishes and congratulations, indicating a positive and joyful sentiment.

Text: साहेब आपण खूप चांगले काम करत आहात
translated_text: Sir, you are doing a very good job.
Justification: The positive sentiment and emotion of joy are primarily driven by the Marathi phrase "खूप चांगले काम," which translates to "very good job," indicating strong approval and satisfaction.

Text: डोळे पांढरे करणारे पॅकेज, प्रत्यक्ष पाहिले. धन्यवाद.  ./_        …
translated_text: Eye-opening package, seen it firsthand. Thank you. ./_ …
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), which translates to "thank you."

Text: त्यागमूर्ती मातोश्री रमाई माऊली यांच्या चरणी कोटी कोटी प्रणाम
translated_text: Crores of prostrations at the feet of Matoshree Ramai Mauli, the embodiment of sacrifice.
Justification: The phrase "त्यागमूर्ती मातोश्री रमाई माऊली" (Tyagamurti Matoshree Ramai Mauli), meaning embodiment of sacrifice, suggests respect and reverence without expressing strong positive or negative emotion, thus the neutral emotion and sentiment.

Text: तलवारीने नाचणे हे क्रेटेरिया संस्कृतीचे वैशिष्ट्य आहे. ते करत असताना घाबरण्याची गरज नाही. मस्त आहे ना?
translated_text: Sword dancing is a characteristic of the Cretaria culture. There's no need to be afraid while doing it. Isn't it cool?
Justification: The phrase "मस्त आहे ना?" ("Isn't it cool?") expresses a positive sentiment, but used rhetorically in this context, it's more neutral in tone and impact on the overall emotional coloring of the sentence.

Text:
कोजागिरी पौर्णिमेच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा. 

.
translated_text:
Warm wishes on the occasion of Kojagiri Purnima. 

.
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) expresses warm wishes, which is generally considered a neutral sentiment as it's a standard polite expression.

Text: शिवसेना उद्धव बाळासाहेब ठाकरेंची निशाणी धग धग ती निशाणी
translated_text: Shiv Sena Uddhav Balasaheb Thackeray's sign is a symbol of unity.
Justification: The sentence is largely descriptive, with no strong positive or negative indicators. The phrase "निशाणी धग धग ती निशाणी" (nishaani dhag dhag tee nishaani - sign is a symbol of unity/burning bright) doesn't inherently express a strong emotion and functions more as an identifier. Therefore, it's assigned a neutral sentiment.

Text: आपण खुप खुप सुंदर आहात आणि मला अभिमान आहे की आपण मराठी आहात
translated_text: You are very beautiful and I am proud that you are Marathi.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes joy because of the phrase "खुप खुप सुंदर आहात" (khup khup sundar aahat), meaning "very beautiful," and "अभिमान आहे" (abhimaan aahe), meaning "proud," which express admiration and positive feelings.

Text: अंधेरी पूर्व विधानसभा पोटनिवडणूक शांत आणि निष्पक्ष वातावरणात होणार
translated_text: Andheri East Assembly by-elections to be held in a peaceful and fair environment
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it describes the election taking place in a "शांत आणि निष्पक्ष वातावरणात" (shant aani nishpaksh vatavaranat) - a peaceful and fair environment, which is a factual statement without inherent positive or negative connotation.

Text: हिंदू कॅलेंडरनुसार फाल्गुन महिन्यात येणाऱ्या पौर्णिमेला फाल्गुनी पोर्णिमा म्हणतात फाल्गुनी पौर्णिमेच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: According to the Hindu calendar, the full moon day falling in the month of Falgun is called Falguni Purnima. Warm wishes on Falguni Purnima
Justification: "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (Hardik Shubhechha - Warm Wishes) expresses a positive sentiment, but in isolation, does not convey a strong emotion beyond simple goodwill, thus justifying the neutral emotion and positive sentiment.

Text: मित्रांनो ही पोस्ट जास्तीत जास्त शेयर करा नरकेचा बहिष्कार करा
translated_text: Friends, share this post as much as possible and boycott hell.
Justification: The sentiment of anger is derived from the phrase "नरकेचा बहिष्कार करा" (narkecha bahishkar kara), which translates to "boycott hell." The call to boycott expresses strong disapproval and animosity, indicating anger.

Text: भावपूर्ण श्रद्धांजली..आपल्या दुःखात सहभागी आहोत.
translated_text: Heartfelt condolences..we share in your grief.
Justification: "दुःखात सहभागी आहोत" expresses empathy and sharing in grief, indicating sadness.

Text: धन्यवाद.आम्ही दोघांनी मध्यंतरी दुर्गा सप्तशती शिबिर केलं.गीता शिकायला नक्कीच आवडेल
translated_text: Thank you. We both did Durga Saptashati camp in between. I would definitely like to learn Gita.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), which translates to "thank you."

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा साईनाथजी
translated_text: Happy birthday Sainathji
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are positive due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which expresses heartfelt wishes and congratulations, conveying joy.

Text: धमक्यांना न घाबरता मूळ मुद्दा आक्रमकपणे पूढे पूश करताय .सलाम !
translated_text: You are aggressively pushing the main point without fear of threats. Greetings!
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by "सलाम !", which expresses admiration and respect, indicating a positive reaction to the subject's actions.

Text: नारळी पौर्णिमा आणि रक्षा बंधनाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा ...
translated_text: Warm wishes on the occasion of Narali Purnima and Raksha Bandhan...
Justification: The word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), meaning "wishes" or "greetings," indicates a positive but neutral sentiment as it is a standard expression of goodwill.

Text: : पुरुषांच्या खंबीर पाठिंब्यामुळेच महिला सर्व क्षेत्रात यशस्वी प्रार्थना बेहरे ./--…
translated_text: : It is only because of the strong support of men that women are successful in all fields./--…
Justification: The sentence expresses a seemingly neutral statement about men's support contributing to women's success. The phrase "खंबीर पाठिंब्यामुळेच" (khambir pathimbhyamulech - due to the strong support) is a factual observation rather than an expression of a particular emotion.

Text: डॉ सर्वपल्ली राधाकृष्णन पुण्यतिथि: विशिष्ट विद्वान द्वारा प्रेरणादायक उद्धरण .//-…
translated_text: Dr Sarvepalli Radhakrishnan Death Anniversary: ​​Inspirational Quotes by Eminent Scholars .//-…
Justification: The phrase "विशिष्ट विद्वान द्वारा प्रेरणादायक उद्धरण" (Vishisht vidwan dwara preranadayak uddharan) - "Inspirational Quotes by Eminent Scholars" - is factual and descriptive, lacking strong positive or negative emotional cues, hence the neutral sentiment.

Text: धन्यवाद भाऊ आपली साथ आमच्या सर्व कामात आसती आपले मनापासून आभार
translated_text: Thank you brother, your support is appreciated in all our work, thank you very much
Justification: The phrase "धन्यवाद भाऊ" (thank you brother) and "आपले मनापासून आभार" (thank you very much from the heart) expresses gratitude and appreciation, directly indicating a positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: या गाण्यात कतरिना कैफ अप्रतिम आहे आणि मी या चित्रपटाची आतुरतेने वाट पाहत आहे.
translated_text: Katrina Kaif is amazing in this song and I am eagerly waiting for this film.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the Marathi word "अप्रतिम" (apratim), meaning "amazing" or "outstanding," which expresses strong positive appraisal. The phrase "आतुरतेने वाट पाहत आहे" (aaturtene vaat pahat aahe) meaning "eagerly waiting" further reinforces the positive sentiment and the feeling of joy associated with anticipation.

Text: आणि   ची सर्विस लवकरच या शहरात सुरू होणार, पाहा लिस्ट
translated_text: And the service will start soon in this city, see the list
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence simply announces the start of a service without expressing any positive or negative feelings. The Marathi phrase "सुरू होणार" (suru honar), meaning "will start," is a statement of fact and doesn't carry any inherent sentiment.

Text: धन्यवाद दादा...आणि नूतन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा...
translated_text: Thank you Dada...and Happy New Year...
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad) which means "thank you" and "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) meaning "heartfelt wishes," specifically for the New Year, which evokes positive feelings.

Text: असेच वेळोवेळी आपले मार्गदर्शन आम्हाला भेटत राहो याच अपेक्षा.. धन्यवाद
translated_text: We hope to continue to receive your guidance from time to time. Thank you.
Justification: The phrase "याच अपेक्षा.. धन्यवाद" (yach apeksha.. dhanyavad) expressing hope and gratitude, indicating a positive sentiment, but not strongly positive, hence neutral.

Text: पुढच्या जन्मी ह्याच मातीत आणि ह्याच स्वर्ग असलेल्या कोकणात माझा जन्म होउदे महाराजा..
translated_text: In my next birth, I will be born in this same soil and in this same paradise, Konkan, Maharaja.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "स्वर्ग असलेल्या कोकणात" (swarg aslelya kokanat), which translates to "paradise-like Konkan," indicating a feeling of joy and high regard for the place. The user expresses a wish to be reborn there, further reinforcing positive sentiment.

Text: (मा.संचालिका महाराष्ट्र राज्य)आपल्याला जन्मोत्सवाच्या मनःपूर्वक हार्दिक शुभेच्छा..!
translated_text: (Maharashtra State Director) Heartiest birthday wishes to you..!
Justification: The phrase "मनःपूर्वक हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (manahpoorvak haardik shubhechha), meaning "heartfelt hearty wishes," expresses a positive sentiment and elicits joy.

Text: काळे, पांडे कुणालातरी पाठवा आतमधी मजा येईल.. पक्षाचे नाव पण होईल..
translated_text: Kale, Pandey, send someone, it will be fun inside.. The name of the party will also be there..
Justification: The phrase "मजा येईल" (maja yeil), meaning "it will be fun," expresses a positive sentiment, specifically contributing to the emotion of joy.

Text: लोकशाहीर अण्णाभाऊ साठे यांच्या जयंती निमित्त हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Warm wishes to the democrat Annabhau Sathe on his birth anniversary.
Justification: The sentence expresses "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "warm wishes," indicating a positive but neutral sentiment.

Text: घटस्थापना व नवरात्री उत्सवाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Warm wishes for Ghatasthapana and Navratri celebrations!
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!" (hardik shubhechha!), meaning "warm wishes!", indicates a positive sentiment, even though it's a common and generally neutral expression. The presence of "हार्दिक" suggests a genuine and heartfelt sentiment.

Text: महाशिवरात्री निमित्त सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा..!!
translated_text: Warm wishes to everyone on the occasion of Mahashivratri..!!
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "warm wishes," expresses a positive sentiment, specifically joy.

Text: गुढी उभारू आनंदाची, समृद्धीची, आरोग्याची, समाधानाची आणि उत्तुंग यशाची, हिंदू नव वर्षाच्या,गुढीपाडव्याच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Let's build a Gudi. May it bring you happiness, prosperity, health, contentment and great success. Warm wishes for the Hindu New Year, Gudi Padwa!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the presence of words like "आनंदाची" (anandachi - of happiness), "समृद्धीची" (samruddhi chi - of prosperity), "आरोग्याची" (arogyachi - of health) and "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha - best wishes), all indicating positive attributes and well-wishing. These terms collectively create a feeling of joy and optimism.

Text: सामाजिक बांधिलकी जपणाऱ्या डॉक्टरांच्या सदैव पाठिशी,,./
translated_text: Always supporting doctors who maintain social commitment,,./
Justification: The phrase "सामाजिक बांधिलकी जपणाऱ्या" (samajik bandhilki japanarya) which translates to "maintaining social commitment" indicates a positive but neutral stance, as it describes a commendable attribute without expressing strong positive emotion.

Text: याला पण धन्यवाद
translated_text: Thanks for this too.
Justification: The sentence expresses gratitude, indicated by the word "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), which directly translates to "thank you" and signals a positive, though neutral, sentiment.

Text: अतिशय योग्य निर्णय हा आमच्या गावातील 'हरी' चा सन्मान आहे.
translated_text: A very right decision, it is an honor for 'Hari' in our village.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "सन्मान" (sanman), which translates to "honor" and signifies respect and positive regard.

Text: लग्नापुर्वीच्या विधीसाठी अभिज्ञाचा हा गोड अंदाज तुम्हाला नक्कीच आवडेल ../-…
translated_text: You will definitely like this sweet prediction of Abhigya for pre-wedding rituals../-…
Justification: The sentence expresses positive sentiment and joy due to the word "गोड" (god), meaning "sweet," which suggests a pleasant and likeable aspect to Abhigya's prediction.

Text: पार्टीचे पुरस्कर्ते ह्यांचे हार्दिक अभिनंदन
translated_text: Hearty congratulations to the party sponsors.
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक अभिनंदन" (hardik abhinandan), meaning hearty congratulations, expresses a positive but standard congratulatory sentiment, placing it in the positive sentiment range but without strong emotional undertones, hence neutral emotion.

Text: तुमचं काम सोपं केलं
translated_text: Made your job easy.
Justification: The sentiment is positive because the phrase "सोपं केलं" (sopam kele) implies making something easy, which is a favorable action.

Text: दिल्लीतील ही मॅरेथॉन पाहणे हे अगदी अविश्वसनीय आहे, जे सहभागी आहेत त्यांच्यासाठी शुभेच्छा.
translated_text: It's absolutely incredible to watch this marathon in Delhi, best of luck to all those participating.
Justification: The Marathi word "अविश्वसनीय" (avishwasaniya - incredible) expresses a strong positive sentiment, indicating joy.

Text: चंदन पुजाधिकारी वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा.!.
translated_text: Happy birthday to Chandan Pujadhikari.!
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) expresses sincere and heartfelt wishes, indicating a positive sentiment.

Text: घटस्थापना व नवरात्री उत्सवाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Warm wishes for Ghatasthapana and Navratri celebrations!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the use of "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "warm wishes" and expresses a positive sentiment.

Text: खूप खूप छान माहिती दिल्या बद्दल धन्यवाद
translated_text: Thank you very much for giving very good information.
Justification: The sentiment is positive (1) and emotion is joy due to the presence of the phrase "खूप खूप छान" (khoop khoop chhan), which translates to "very very good/nice" and expresses strong appreciation.

Text: बाळासाहेबांचं वर्ष जुनं व्यंगचित्र सध्याच्या राजकीय परिस्थितीसोबत अगदी मिळतं-जुळतं आहे.
translated_text: Balasaheb's year-old cartoon is very relevant to the current political situation.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it observes a similarity ("मिळतं-जुळतं आहे") between an old cartoon and the current political situation, without expressing a positive or negative opinion. The phrase "मिळतं-जुळतं आहे" indicates a factual observation rather than an emotional judgment.

Text: सेनेत शिल्लक असलेल्या लोकांना हाईप देण्याचा हा एक छोटा प्रयत्न आहे ..
translated_text: This is a small attempt to give hype to the people remaining in the army..
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the factual and descriptive nature of the statement. While "हाईप देण्याचा प्रयत्न" (hype denyacha prayatna - attempt to give hype) could potentially be negative in other contexts, here it lacks a strong positive or negative connotation and is presented as an observation.

Text: अत्यंत गोड,लाघवी,स्मार्ट,नटखट,हुषार अशी सर्वांना मनापासून आवडणारी ऊत्तम अभिनय सादर करणारी परी
translated_text: Pari, who is extremely sweet, gentle, smart, mischievous, and brilliant, is loved by everyone and performs excellently.
Justification: The sentence is overall positive but lacks strong emotional cues. The positive sentiment is derived from a collection of positive adjectives describing Pari, particularly "गोड" (sweet) and "लाघवी" (gentle/charming), which are generally positive but don't necessarily indicate intense emotion.

Text: एक आणि दुसरा !!
translated_text: One and the other!!
Justification: The exclamation marks ("!!") combined with the simplistic and repetitive structure ("एक आणि दुसरा !!") imply frustration and annoyance, indicating anger.

Text: कौतुक नावाची एक अशी संजीवनी आहे, जी आत्मविश्वास गमावलेल्यांना पुन्हा जगण्याचं बळ देते...!!! शुभ सकाळ
translated_text: There is a life-giving power called appreciation, which gives strength to those who have lost confidence to live again...!!! Good morning
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "कौतुक नावाची एक अशी संजीवनी आहे" (kautuk navachi ek ashi sanjeevani aahe), which translates to "appreciation is a life-giving power," indicating a positive and uplifting sentiment. This is further reinforced by "जगण्याचं बळ देते" (jagnyacha bal dete), meaning "gives strength to live," which also points to a joyful emotion.

Text: हीच एक गोष्ट लोकांना खूप आकर्षित करते पण स्वागत असो या आभासी विश्वात
translated_text: This is the one thing that attracts people a lot, but welcome to this virtual world.
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the balanced combination of attraction ("आकर्षित करते") and a welcoming but potentially detached statement about the virtual world ("स्वागत असो या आभासी विश्वात"). There is no explicitly positive or negative connotation conveyed in the Marathi.

Text: आपणांस ही नवीन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy New Year to you all.
Justification: The sentiment is positive (1) due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt wishes." This phrase expresses goodwill and is inherently positive, contributing to a feeling of joy.

Text: श्रीगणेशाच्या आशीर्वादाने जगावर वर्षाव होऊ शकतो आणि शांतता प्रस्थापित होऊ शकते
translated_text: May the blessings of Lord Ganesha shower upon the world and bring peace.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "आशीर्वादाने वर्षाव होऊ शकतो" (aashirvadane varshav hou shakto), meaning "can shower with blessings," implying a benevolent and auspicious outcome.

Text: महाराष्ट्रात सुख, समृद्धी नांदावी यासाठी खऱ्या अर्थाने प्रयत्न करणारे एकमेव व्यक्तिमत्व म्हणजे देवेंद्र फडणवीस.
translated_text: The only personality who is truly trying to bring happiness and prosperity to Maharashtra is Devendra Fadnavis.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the phrase "सुख, समृद्धी नांदावी" (sukha, samruddhi nandavi), meaning "happiness and prosperity should prevail," which expresses a desirable and positive outcome. While praising a specific person, the overall sentiment is still aspirational and positive.

Text: अंत:करणात कितीही संघर्ष असला तरी, चेहऱ्यावर हास्य दाखविणे हाच जिवनातील सर्वश्रेष्ठ अभिनय..!!
translated_text: No matter how much struggle there is in the heart, showing a smile on the face is the best act in life..!!
Justification: The positive sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "सर्वश्रेष्ठ अभिनय" (sarvashreshtha abhinay), meaning "best act," which implies excellence and a positive outcome despite hardship.

Text: खूप छान संकल्पना आहे, मा. उन्मेष दादा ./…
translated_text: Very nice concept, Mr. Unmesh Dada./…
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the phrase "खूप छान" (khup chhan), meaning "very nice" or "very good".

Text: दानशुर व्यक्तीमहत्व असलेले मा.श्री याना वाढदिवशाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy birthday to the philanthropist and important person, Mr.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and expresses joy because of the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt wishes." This phrase is a standard expression of goodwill and happiness in Marathi.

Text: उज्ज्वल निकम यांनी योग्य भूमिका मांडली होती...
translated_text: Ujjwal Nikam had played the right role...
Justification: "योग्य भूमिका" (yogya bhumika) implies a correct or appropriate role, which contributes to a neutral sentiment.

Text: सुप्रीम कोर्टाचा एक नंबर निर्णय आहे
translated_text: The Supreme Court has a number one decision.
Justification: The sentiment is positive but neutral in emotional intensity because "एक नंबर" (ek number), while meaning "number one", is used colloquially to express high quality or excellence without necessarily implying strong positive emotion.

Text: अतिशय सुखावह बातमी. आमदार आणि मंत्री महोदयांचे मनापासून आभार.
translated_text: Very good news. Heartfelt thanks to the MLA and Minister.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the presence of "सुखावह," which translates to "pleasant" or "good," indicating a positive experience or feeling. This word directly reflects a sense of happiness and contentment.

Text: जीवन आपणाला उत्तम मित्र देते... आणि चांगले मित्र आपणाला उत्तम जीवन देतात.
translated_text: Life gives us good friends... and good friends give us a good life.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "उत्तम मित्र" (uttam mitra), which means "good friends," and "उत्तम जीवन" (uttam jeevan), meaning "good life," both conveying positive feelings.

Text: धनुष-ऐश्वर्याचे पॅचअप? अभिनेत्याचे वडील म्हणाले- \'मुलांनी...\'
translated_text: Dhanush-Aishwarya's patchup? The actor's father said- 'The children...'
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the interrogative phrase "धनुष-ऐश्वर्याचे पॅचअप?" (Dhanush-Aishwarya's patchup?), which simply questions a potential reconciliation without expressing a positive or negative opinion.

Text: मालक अभिनंदनआज मव्हाची नाहींतर ज्वारीची होऊनच जाऊंदे
translated_text: Congratulations to the owner. Today, it will be sorghum instead of mung bean.
Justification: The word "अभिनंदन" (abhinandan), meaning "congratulations," is a clear indicator of positive sentiment and joy.

Text: वैद्यकीय अभ्यासक्रम हिंदीतून; मध्यप्रदेश सरकारचा क्रांतिकारी निर्णय!
translated_text: Medical courses in Hindi; Revolutionary decision of Madhya Pradesh government!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "क्रांतिकारी" (krantikari), which translates to "revolutionary" and implies a significant and positive change.

Text: हा मोदींचा भारत आहे इथे दहशतवाद्यांची कबर खोदली जाते..
translated_text: This is Modi's India, the graves of terrorists are dug here.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence, while potentially assertive, describes an action ("दहशतवाद्यांची कबर खोदली जाते" - the graves of terrorists are dug) without explicit positive or negative emotional expression. The phrase describes a state of affairs rather than directly expressing approval or disapproval.

Text: पर्युषण पर्वाच्या खुप खुप शुभेच्छा सुमित भाऊ.
translated_text: Wishing you a very happy Paryushan festival, Sumit Bhau.
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are positive due to the phrase "खुप खुप शुभेच्छा" (khup khup shubhechha), which means "very many wishes/greetings," indicating a positive expression of good will and joy.

Text: यामध्ये सातत्य राखण्याचा प्रयत्न असेल .धन्यवाद
translated_text: There will be an effort to maintain consistency in this. Thank you.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), which translates to "thank you" and expresses gratitude.

Text: खूप छान माणसं
translated_text: Very nice people
Justification: The positive sentiment (1) is driven by the phrase "खूप छान" (khoop chhaan), meaning "very nice/good."

Text: आयुष्यात संघर्षाचा वनवास भोगल्यावर सुखाचा राजयोग हा येतोच..
translated_text: After experiencing the exile of struggle in life, the Raja Yoga of happiness comes.
Justification: The phrase "सुखाचा राजयोग" (sukhaacha rajyog) implies a positive outcome and ultimate happiness, but the overall sentence acknowledges prior hardship, balancing the positivity and resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा ज्ञानेश्वर आज तरी जेवलास का नाही?
translated_text: Happy birthday Dnyaneshwar, why haven't you eaten today?
Justification: "वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (vaadhdivsachya hardik shubhechha) translates to "Happy Birthday" and is a standard, positive greeting expressing joy.

Text: या दशकातील महानायकाला वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा अमिताभ बच्चन सर
translated_text: Happy birthday to the superstar of this decade Amitabh Bachchan sir
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt wishes" and expresses a positive feeling of goodwill.

Text: एक चांगला उपक्रम भावी पिढी साठी आवश्यक व यौग्य निर्णय
translated_text: A good initiative, a necessary and appropriate decision for the future generation.
Justification: The sentence is positive due to the use of "चांगला उपक्रम" (changla upakram), which translates to "good initiative." This phrase indicates a positive attribute.

Text: तो याला भिक सुद्धा घालत नाही तरीही त्याचा जयजयकार करतो
translated_text: He doesn't even beg for it, yet he praises it.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because "भिक सुद्धा घालत नाही" (bhik suddha ghalat nahi - doesn't even beg) and "जयजयकार करतो" (jayjaykar karto - praises it) present contrasting actions without a clear positive or negative connotation.

Text: सकाळी सकाळी बाप्पाच दर्शन मन कसं प्रसन्न वाटतंय
translated_text: How happy I feel seeing Bappa in the morning!
Justification: The sentence expresses joy because the phrase "मन कसं प्रसन्न वाटतंय" (man kasa prasanna vatatay) indicates a feeling of happiness and contentment in the speaker's mind. "प्रसन्न" (prasanna) specifically means delighted/happy.

Text: श्री राधे-राधे मेम...सुप्रभात,
translated_text: Shri Radhe-Radhe Mem...Good Morning,
Justification: The neutral sentiment is primarily due to the respectful greeting "श्री राधे-राधे मेम...सुप्रभात" (Shri Radhe-Radhe Mem...Good Morning), which is a standard and polite salutation without inherently positive or negative connotations.

Text: आपण सर्वांना भेटून रविवार सार्थकी लागला.
translated_text: Sunday was worthwhile meeting you all.
Justification: "सार्थकी लागला" (sarthaki lagla - worthwhile) indicates a sense of fulfillment and positive value, contributing to a positive sentiment, even though the emotion is neutral.

Text:
धूलिवंदनाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा !!
 !!
translated_text:
Happy Dhuli Vandana!!
!!
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) directly translates to "heartfelt wishes" or "warm greetings," which expresses a positive sentiment and evokes feelings of joy.

Text: हो, अगदी खरच अनुभवी आणि नम्र असा महाराष्ट्राला लाभला अनमोल रत्न आमचा मुख्यमंत्री साहेब
translated_text: Yes, Maharashtra has gained a precious gem, our Chief Minister Saheb, who is truly experienced and humble.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the phrase "अनमोल रत्न" (anmol ratna), meaning "precious gem," which expresses high value and appreciation.

Text: तालुक्याच्या गावच्या पदी निवड झाल्याबद्दल हार्दिक अभिनंदन माऊली !
translated_text: Heartiest congratulations, Mauli, on being elected to the post of village head of the taluka!
Justification: The sentiment is positive and expresses joy because of the word "हार्दिक अभिनंदन" (hardik abhinandan), meaning heartiest congratulations, which is a clear expression of positive feeling.

Text: नाटू नाटूला 'ऑस्कर' मिळालं! च्या राजमौलींनी रचला इतिहास ./
translated_text: Natu Natu won an 'Oscar'! Rajamouli created history./
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "ऑस्कर मिळालं!", meaning "won an Oscar!", which expresses accomplishment and celebration, leading to joy.

Text: मी या बातमीबद्दल खूप उत्सुक आहे, मी हे पाहण्यासाठी आतुरतेने वाट पाहत आहे.
translated_text: I'm very excited about this news, I'm looking forward to seeing it.
Justification: The Marathi word "उत्सुक" (utsuk), meaning "excited," indicates positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: हे स्वतः बोलले आहे, आता काळजी करू नका.
translated_text: It's self-talk, don't worry now.
Justification: The neutral sentiment is driven by the phrase "काळजी करू नका" (kalji karu naka), which translates to "don't worry." This phrase indicates reassurance and a lack of negative or positive emotion.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा उपशाखाप्रमुख श्री मारुती चव्हाण व श्री महेंद्र कानडे
translated_text: Happy birthday to Sub-Branch Head Shri Maruti Chavan and Shri Mahendra Kanade
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy emotion are primarily derived from the phrase "वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (Vadhdivsachya Hardik Shubhechha), which translates to "Happy birthday." This is a standard expression of positive wishes on a birthday.

Text: बाळासाहेब हे फक्त नाव नाही तर महाराष्ट्राची शान आहे
translated_text: Balasaheb is not just a name, but the pride of Maharashtra.
Justification: The phrase "महाराष्ट्राची शान" (Maharashtra's pride) indicates a positive association and respect, leading to a positive sentiment, even though it's expressed as a statement of fact rather than overt emotional expression, thus aligning with a neutral emotion.

Text: आता कसं बोललात, पुरस्कार शोभला तुम्हाला सर...
translated_text: How did you say it now, you deserve the award, sir...
Justification: The phrase "आता कसं बोललात" (Aata kasa bolalat) implies criticism or disbelief in the previous statement, and the speaker is angry on that.

Text: हर हर महादेव सुप्रभात मित्र
translated_text: Har Har Mahadev Good morning friend
Justification: The phrase "हर हर महादेव" (Har Har Mahadev), a religious chant, evokes a neutral sentiment in this context as it's followed by a simple greeting.

Text: जय जय हे...
translated_text: Hey Jay Jay...
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the phrase "जय जय हे..." which is a common salutation and doesn't inherently express any positive or negative emotion.

Text: सर्वात प्रामाणिक आहे हा । स्वत:लाच उपदेश करतोय !
translated_text: This is the most honest. I'm preaching to myself!
Justification: The sentence expresses anger primarily through the phrase "स्वत:लाच उपदेश करतोय !" (swata:lach upadesh kartoy!), meaning "preaching to myself!". This phrase implies frustration and exasperation directed at oneself, thus indicating anger.

Text: बहुत ही अच्छा निर्णय । अपने तो अपने होते है ।जय हो जननायक जी
translated_text: Very good decision. Apne to Apne hote hai. Jai Ho Jananayak ji
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "बहुत ही अच्छा निर्णय" (Bahut hi achha nirnay) which translates to "Very good decision." The emotion of joy is also triggered by "जय हो" (Jai Ho), expressing victory and praise.

Text: राधानगरी तालुक्यातील राशिवडे येथे शाहिरी काव्यातून शाहीर रंगराव पाटील यांनी शासकीय योजनांचा जागर केला
translated_text: Shahir Rangrao Patil raised awareness about government schemes through Shahiri poetry at Rashivade in Radhanagari taluka.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply describes an action (raising awareness) without expressing any positive or negative emotion. The Marathi phrase "जागर केला" (jagar kela), meaning "raised awareness," is a factual statement and doesn't inherently convey sentiment.

Text: कोजागिरी पौर्णिमेच्या सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Warm wishes to everyone on Kojagiri Purnima!
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!" (hardik shubhechha!) which translates to "warm wishes" expresses a positive sentiment, but in this context, it's a standard greeting conveying politeness, thus the neutral emotion. The sentiment score of 1 indicates a slight positive tone due to "शुभेच्छा".

Text: मुंबईची प्रतिमा जपण्यासाठी नागरिक तत्पर! ./-/…
translated_text: Citizens ready to preserve Mumbai's image! ./-/…
Justification: The sentiment is positive and neutral because the Marathi phrase "नागरिक तत्पर!" (nagarik tatpar!) indicates citizens are ready/eager, suggesting a positive and proactive stance without a strong specific emotion.

Text: ही श्रींची इच्छा मोदी पूर्ण करत आहेत....
translated_text: Modi is fulfilling this wish of Shri...
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the lack of overtly positive or negative language. While "इच्छा पूर्ण करत आहेत" (iccha purna karat aahat - fulfilling the wish) could be positive depending on the context of the wish, the sentence simply states a fact without any explicit emotional coloring.

Text: आपल्या विलक्षण कवितांनी मराठी रसिकजनांच्या मनावर अधिराज्य गाजवणाऱ्या शांता शेळके यांना जन्मशताब्दीनिमित्त विनम्र अभिवादन...
translated_text: Humble tributes to Shanta Shelke, who ruled the hearts of Marathi lovers with her extraordinary poems, on her birth centenary...
Justification: The phrase "विनम्र अभिवादन" (vinamra abhiwadan), meaning "humble tributes," indicates respect and honor, but does not express strong positive or negative feeling, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: बाबासाहेबांच्या विचारांप्रमाणे ही प्रतिकृती मुंबईकरांसाठी निश्चितच प्रेरणादायी ठरेल.
translated_text: This replica, in keeping with Babasaheb's thoughts, will definitely be inspiring for Mumbaikars.
Justification: The word "प्रेरणादायी" (preranadayi), meaning inspiring, indicates a positive sentiment.

Text: नारळी पौर्णिमा आणि रक्षाबंधनाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा आव्हाड साहेब
translated_text: Warm wishes on Narali Pournima and Raksha Bandhan, Awhad Saheb
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "warm wishes," indicates a positive but neutral sentiment, lacking strong emotion.

Text: गणेशोत्सव निमीत्त सर्व गणेश भक्तांना महाराष्ट्र नवनिर्माण सेनेच्या वतीने सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा !
translated_text: Warm wishes to all Ganesh devotees on the occasion of Ganeshotsav on behalf of Maharashtra Navnirman Sena!
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) which translates to "warm wishes" expresses a positive sentiment, but in this context is a standard greeting, resulting in a neutral emotion due to its conventional and expected usage.

Text: स्वागत वंधन अभिनंदन
translated_text: Welcome greetings
Justification: The sentiment is positive and neutral because the words "स्वागत" (swagat) and "अभिनंदन" (abhinandan), both meaning "welcome" and "congratulations" respectively, express positive greetings without strong emotional charge.

Text: पैसा कमावतात बाकी गेले खड्ड्यात, सरळ स्वच्छ मनाने काम करणाऱ्या माणसाची गरज आहे
translated_text: They earn money and the rest goes into the pit. We need a person who works straight and with a clean heart.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "बाकी गेले खड्ड्यात" (baaki gele khaddyat), which translates to "the rest goes to the pit/hell," indicating a dismissive and negative attitude towards things other than earning money. While the latter part of the sentence expresses a need for positive qualities, the initial negativity dominates the overall sentiment.

Text: आपली भेट मिळाली आणि अक्षरशः दिवस सार्थकी लागला पुनश्च एकदा मनःपूर्वक धन्यवाद
translated_text: I received your gift and it literally made my day. Thank you once again.
Justification: The sentiment is positive ("1") and the emotion is joy because the phrase "दिवस सार्थकी लागला" (divas sarthaki lagla) expresses that the day became meaningful/worthwhile, indicating happiness and fulfillment.

Text: ओमिक्रोनच्या पार्श्वभूमीवर पोलीस सतर्क; वाहतूक पोलिसांकडून कडेकोट बंदोबस्त ./-/…
translated_text: Police on alert in the wake of Omicron; Traffic police maintain strict security./-/…
Justification: The phrase "सतर्क" (satark), meaning "alert," indicates a state of preparedness and vigilance, which is neutral in sentiment.

Text:
सहभागी झालेले खेळाडूंच्या घरची वास्तवीक परिस्थिती दर्शवणारा फोटो
मीराबाई चानू प्रवीण जाधव
translated_text:
Photos showing the actual condition of the homes of the participating players

Mirabai Chanu Praveen Jadhav
Justification: The sentence presents factual information about photos depicting the reality of athletes' homes. The Marathi phrase "वास्तवीक परिस्थिती दर्शवणारा" (vaastavik paristhiti darshavanara) - showing the actual condition - is neutral and descriptive, indicating no positive or negative sentiment.

Text: बहुगुणी आहे 'ही' वनस्पती, त्वचेच्या समस्यांवर तर रामबाण उपाय
translated_text: This plant has many properties, it is a panacea for skin problems
Justification: The word "रामबाण उपाय" (rambaan upaay - panacea) suggests a highly positive effect, but in the context, it is presented as a factual statement about the plant's properties, thus contributing to a neutral sentiment rather than excitement or joy.

Text: ही तर सुरवात आहे रे तुमच्या सगळ्यांचे असेच भले होणार
translated_text: This is just the beginning, may all of you be blessed.
Justification: The phrase "असेच भले होणार" (asech bhale honar), meaning "may you all be blessed/good things happen to you," expresses a positive sentiment and joy.

Text:
उधळूया रंग आनंदाचे, जपूया रंग माणुसकीचे...

 निमित्त सर्वांना मंगलमय शुभेच्छा...!
translated_text:
Let's spread the colors of happiness, let's preserve the colors of humanity...

Best wishes to everyone on the occasion...!
Justification: The sentence expresses joy due to the phrase "आनंदाचे" (aanandache), meaning "of happiness," directly indicating a positive and joyful sentiment.

Text: गीताप्रेस गोरखपूर' सर्वांत उत्तम पर्याय, "गीता साधक संजीवनी " अधिक अभ्यासासाठी
translated_text: Geetapress Gorakhpur is the best option, "Geet Sadhak Sanjeevani" for more studies
Justification: The word "उत्तम" (uttam), meaning "best," indicates a positive sentiment, but in this context it is used as the best option. Therefore the sentiment is neutral.

Text: या भुमीमध्ये निर्माण झालेल्या सर्व उपासना पद्धदतींचा मी आदर करतो
translated_text: I respect all the worship systems that have emerged in this land.
Justification: The sentence expresses respect and admiration, indicated by the Marathi word "आदर" (adar), which translates to "respect." This inherently conveys a positive sentiment, but in this context, it is presented neutrally, lacking strong emotion.

Text: दादा तुम्हाला विजय मिळवला आहे यांचा साठी खूब खूब अभिनंदन
translated_text: Congratulations to you, Dada, for winning.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "खूप खूप अभिनंदन" (khup khup abhinandan), which directly translates to "many many congratulations." This expression is explicitly used to convey happiness and praise, thus indicating positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: डोक्याचा भुगा करणारा ऑप्टिकल इल्युजन...पाहा तुम्हाला जमतंय का, तुम्हाला फार आवडेल!
translated_text: A mind-blowing optical illusion...see if you can do it, you'll love it!
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes joy because of the phrase "तुम्हाला फार आवडेल!" (tumhala phar aavdel!), which translates to "you'll love it!", directly expressing a positive expectation and likelihood of enjoyment.

Text: सहाय्यक अभिनेता म्हणून अरबाज खानने केलेली करिअरला सुरुवात, भावाच्या साथीने गाठले यशाचे शिखर
translated_text: Arbaaz Khan started his career as a supporting actor, reached the peak of success with the help of his brother.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the descriptive and factual tone of the sentence. The phrase "यशाचे शिखर" (yashache shikhar - peak of success) suggests a positive outcome, but it's presented as a statement of fact rather than an expression of strong positive emotion. The rest of the sentence is simply describing his career path.

Text: खूप छान आणि मुद्देसूद मांडणी करून महत्वाची माहिती पोहचवलीस
translated_text: You have conveyed important information in a very nice and to-the-point manner.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the phrase "खूप छान" (khoop chhan), meaning "very nice."

Text: काका आम्ही सदैव आपल्या सोबत!!
translated_text: Uncle we are always with you!!
Justification: "सदैव आपल्या सोबत!!" (sadEv ApalyA sobat!!) translates to "always with you!!", expressing unwavering support and generating a feeling of joy and positive sentiment. The exclamation marks further amplify this positive emotion.

Text: मस्तच नुसत बघत रहावे असे वाटते दिल मांगे
translated_text: I just want to keep watching, I want to be happy.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the Marathi word "मस्तच" (mastach), which translates to "awesome" or "fantastic." This word expresses a strong feeling of enjoyment and appreciation.

Text: देवरुखकर शेठ यांना वाढदिवसाच्या भगव्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा -
translated_text: Happy birthday to Devrukhkar Sheth -
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) which translates to "heartfelt wishes" expresses a positive sentiment.

Text: सर माझ्या शेवटच्या शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Sir, my last greetings.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the phrase "शेवटच्या शुभेच्छा" (shevatachya shubhechha) meaning "last greetings," which while implying finality, doesn't carry inherent positive or negative emotion in this context.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा आई तुऴजाभवानी तुम्हाला उदंड आयुष्य देवो ही ईश्वर चरणी प्रार्थना
translated_text: Happy birthday to you, Mother Tulja Bhavani. May God bless you with a long life. I pray to God.
Justification: The sentence expresses positive sentiment due to the presence of phrases like "वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (wāḍhadivasācyā hārdik śubhecchā), which translates to "Happy birthday greetings," and "उदंड आयुष्य देवो" (udaṇḍa āyuṣya devo), meaning "May you have a long life," both conveying well-wishing and joy.

Text: आणि पण भारीच आहे.. ..मसाला नंतर तर अजूनच आवडयला लागली..
translated_text: And it's heavy.. ..I started liking the spice even more later..
Justification: "भारीच आहे" (bhari ahe) indicates something positive or impressive, suggesting a positive, though mildly expressed, sentiment towards the initial taste. While the sentiment is not strongly positive, it's positive enough to warrant a '1'.

Text: स्त्री शक्तीचा आदर आणि अभिनंदन
translated_text: Respect and congratulations to female power
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the presence of "आदर आणि अभिनंदन" (aadar aani abhinandan), which translates to "respect and congratulations," indicating a positive and appreciative attitude.

Text: नववर्षाच्या आपणा सर्वांना मन:पूर्वक शुभेच्छा !!
translated_text: Happy New Year to all of you!!
Justification: The word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), meaning "wishes" or "greetings," expresses a positive sentiment, contributing to the joy emotion.

Text: अभिनंदन सर, आमच्या तुमच्या कडून खूप अपेक्षा आहेत आशा आहे तुम्ही त्या पूर्ण कराल
translated_text: Congratulations sir, we have high expectations from you, hope you fulfill them.
Justification: "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan) directly translates to "Congratulations," expressing positive sentiment and associated with joy.

Text: संजय राऊत यांची उणीव हे दोघे दुपटीने भरून काढत आहेत यात आम्हाला अभिमान आहे..
translated_text: We are proud that these two are making up for Sanjay Raut's shortcomings.
Justification: The phrase "आम्हाला अभिमान आहे" (aamhala abhiman aahe) which translates to "We are proud" explicitly expresses a positive sentiment of pride, indicating joy.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक हार्दिक शुभेच्छा ताई.....
translated_text: Happy birthday, dear...
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik hardik shubhechha) expressing heartfelt wishes, clearly indicates a positive sentiment and joy.

Text: आपल्या पवित्र स्मृतिंना अभिवादन
translated_text: Greetings to your holy memory
Justification: "पवित्र स्मृतिंना अभिवादन" (Greetings to holy memory) expresses respect and reverence, thus indicating a positive but neutral emotional tone. The word "पवित्र" (holy/sacred) contributes to the positive sentiment, while "स्मृतिंना अभिवादन" (greetings to memory) is a respectful gesture, maintaining the neutral emotion.

Text: माऊलींने दिला आपल्या विशाल ला आशीर्वाद
translated_text: Mother gave her blessings to Vishal.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment, though neutral in emotion, due to the word "आशीर्वाद" (ashirwad), meaning blessings. Giving/receiving blessings is inherently positive.

Text: आदरणीय श्री.निलेश भगवान सांबरे साहेबांना वाढदिवसाच्या मनपूर्वक शुभेच्छा..
translated_text: Heartiest birthday wishes to respected Mr. Nilesh Bhagwan Sambre Saheb..
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the Marathi phrase "मनपूर्वक शुभेच्छा" (manapurvak shubhechha), which translates to "heartiest wishes," expressing genuine goodwill and joy. The word "आदरणीय" (adaraniya) meaning respected, also contributes to the positive sentiment.

Text: आप्पासाहेब यांच्या पवित्र स्मृतीस विनम्र अभिवादन
translated_text: Humble tributes to the sacred memory of Appasaheb
Justification: The phrase "पवित्र स्मृतीस विनम्र अभिवादन" (pavitra smritis vinamra abhiwadan) expressing "humble tributes to the sacred memory" indicates respect and reverence, aligning with a positive sentiment, but without strong emotional color, hence neutral emotion and positive sentiment.

Text: ऐश्वर्या राय बच्चनवर कौतुकाचा वर्षाव का होतोय?
translated_text: Why is Aishwarya Rai Bachchan being showered with praise?
Justification: The word "कौतुकाचा वर्षाव" (kautukacha varshav), meaning "shower of praise", indicates a strong positive sentiment, but the question format ("का होतोय?" - ka hotoy, meaning "why is it happening?") suggests surprise at the high level of praise being received.

Text: क्रांतिज्योति सावित्रीबाई फुले जयंती निमित्त त्रिवार वंदन
translated_text: Tribute to Krantijyoti Savitribai Phule on her birth anniversary
Justification: The phrase "त्रिवार वंदन" (trivar vandan), meaning "a three-fold tribute," expresses respect and reverence, indicating a positive but neutral sentiment rather than strong emotion.

Text: ती 'नऊवारी' रॅप वाली अमरावतीची आर्या पण भारी रॅप करते
translated_text: That 'Nauvari' rap artist from Amravati also raps heavily.
Justification: The word "भारी" (bhari) indicates something is impressive or good, however in this context it simply describes the rap and does not show a positive sentiment, hence it is neutral.

Text: नविन वर्षाच्या सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा...
translated_text: Happy New Year to everyone...
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment ("1") and the emotion of joy because the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) translates to "heartfelt wishes," conveying goodwill and happiness associated with the New Year.

Text: मितेश आणि सर्व सहकाऱ्यांना लाख लाख सलाम....
translated_text: A million salutes to Mitesh and all his colleagues....
Justification: The phrase "लाख लाख सलाम" (lakh lakh salaam - a million salutes) expresses strong admiration and respect, indicating positive sentiment.

Text: चला लेहरूंची कहाणी इथे ऐकूया, गूढ वाटते!
translated_text: Let's listen to Lehru's story here, it sounds mysterious!
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are driven by "गूढ वाटते" (gudh vaatte), which translates to "it sounds mysterious." This phrase evokes a sense of wonder and uncertainty, leading to a positive sentiment and the emotion of surprise.

Text: भारतीय संस्कृतीचा महत्त्वाचा सण होळी पौर्णिमा
translated_text: Holi Pournima, an important festival of Indian culture
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact about Holi Pournima, using the phrase "महत्वाचा सण" (mahatvacha san) which means "important festival", indicating significance without expressing positive or negative emotion.

Text: कर्करोगाबाबत जनजागृती करण्यासाठी हे खरोखरच एक उत्तम शिबिर आहे.
translated_text: This is really a great camp to raise awareness about cancer.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the Marathi word "उत्तम" (uttam), meaning "great" or "excellent," which expresses a positive evaluation of the camp.

Text: खूप चांगला प्रस्ताव आहे
translated_text: It is a very good proposal.
Justification: The word "चांगला" (changla), meaning "good," indicates a positive sentiment, leading to the assigned sentiment of 1 and the emotion of joy.

Text: नवीन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा. सिंहगडावरून...
translated_text: Happy New Year. From Sinhagad...
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the presence of "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt wishes" or "best wishes," conveying a positive and joyous sentiment.

Text: श्री राधे श्री राधे।
translated_text: Shri Radhe Shri Radhe.
Justification: The repetition of "श्री राधे श्री राधे" (Shri Radhe Shri Radhe), a devotional chant, indicates reverence and devotion, but doesn't inherently express a strong positive or negative emotion, hence a neutral sentiment.

Text: हे जमल.... बाळासाहेबांचा शिवसैनिक मुख्यमंत्री एकनाथ शिंदे साहेब
translated_text: This is Jamal.... Chief Minister Eknath Shinde, a Shiv Sainik of Balasaheb
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it mainly states a fact about Eknath Shinde being a Shiv Sainik of Balasaheb and the phrase "हे जमल" (He Jamal) doesn't inherently carry strong positive or negative connotations in this context.

Text: सावर्डी वन क्षेत्रात साकारणार ऑक्सिजन पार्क, पालकमंत्र्यांनी केली जागेची पाहणी .//…
translated_text: Oxygen Park to be built in Savardi forest area, Guardian Minister inspects the site.//…
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it primarily conveys factual information about a planned project and a site visit. There is no inherently positive or negative sentiment expressed. The Marathi phrases "सावर्डी वन क्षेत्रात साकारणार ऑक्सिजन पार्क" (Oxygen Park to be built in Savardi forest area) and "पालकमंत्र्यांनी केली जागेची पाहणी" (Guardian Minister inspects the site) are descriptive and do not express any emotional tone.

Text: देशासाठी कर्तव्य बजावताना शहीद झालेल्या सर्व पोलीस बांधवांना पोलीस स्मृती दिनी कोटी कोटी नमन..!!
translated_text: Millions of salutes to all the police brothers who were martyred while performing their duty for the country on Police Memorial Day..!!
Justification: The sentiment is positive despite the anger emotion because the phrase "कोटी कोटी नमन" (koti koti naman) expresses profound respect and reverence, overriding any negative sentiment. While the context involves loss and potentially anger at the injustice, the speaker's explicit expression is one of deep honor and gratitude.

Text: मकर संक्रांती निमीत्त तुम्हाला व तुमच्या परिवारास मनःपुर्वक शुभेच्छा..!
