Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "नि:स्वार्थ भावाने" (nihswarth bhavane), meaning "selflessly," which expresses a positive and admirable quality.

Text: स्वामीजी महाराज श्री व आचार्य श्री कोटी कोटी प्रणाम .//…
translated_text: Swamiji Maharaj Shri and Acharya Shri, crores of crores of salutations.//…
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the presence of "कोटी कोटी प्रणाम" (koti koti pranam), meaning crores of crores of salutations, which expresses deep reverence and respect. While the sentence expresses respect and reverence which can be considered positive, in this context without any further information provided the sentence does not express the presence of sentiment thus it being neutral.

Text: सरकार खुल्या बाजारात स्वस्त दरात धान्य विकणार! महागाईतून दिलासा देण्याची तयारी सुरू आहे
translated_text: Government will sell food grains at cheaper rates in the open market! Preparations are underway to provide relief from inflation
Justification: The phrase "महागाईतून दिलासा देण्याची तयारी सुरू आहे" (Mahagaaitun dilaasa denyaachi tayari shuru aahe - preparations are underway to provide relief from inflation) indicates a positive sentiment as it expresses an intention to alleviate hardship, hence the joy emotion. "दिलासा" (dilaasa - relief) specifically suggests a positive outcome.

Text: भिऊ नकोस मी तुझ्या पाठीशी आहे !! जय श्री स्वामी समर्थ !!
translated_text: Don't be afraid, I am with you!! Jai Shri Swami Samarth!!
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes joy due to the phrase "भिऊ नकोस मी तुझ्या पाठीशी आहे", which translates to "Don't be afraid, I am with you". This assurance provides comfort and generates positive feelings. Additionally, the religious chant "जय श्री स्वामी समर्थ" further contributes to the positive sentiment.

Text: गडकरी यांच्या हस्ते दोन प्रशिक्षण केंद्रांचा शुभारंभ./-.…
translated_text: Gadkari inaugurates two training centers./-.…
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact: "गडकरी यांच्या हस्ते दोन प्रशिक्षण केंद्रांचा शुभारंभ" (Gadkari inaugurates two training centers). There are no emotionally charged words or phrases.

Text: युवक मोहोत्सव हा आदर्श विचार देणारा असावा.. देशाचे प्रतिक असलेल्या देवी देवतांची विटंबना करणारा नसावा.
translated_text: The Youth Festival should be an idealistic celebration and not a desecration of the gods and goddesses who are the symbols of the country.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "देवी देवतांची विटंबना करणारा नसावा" (devi devtanchi vitambna karnara nasava), meaning "should not be a desecration of gods and goddesses," which expresses strong disapproval and hence disgust.

Text: ‘निष्ठा’, ‘विद्यांजली’सह पाच योजनांचे मोदींच्या हस्ते उद्घाटन:./-…
translated_text: Modi inaugurates five schemes including 'Nishtha', 'Vidyanjali':./-…
Justification: The sentence is factual and reports an event. There is no specific Marathi word or phrase that conveys a positive or negative sentiment. The neutral sentiment is due to the objective reporting of "उद्घाटन" (udghatan) - inauguration.

Text: आम्ही ही तुमच्या सोबत आहोत
translated_text: We are with you.
Justification: "सोबत आहोत" (sobat aahot - with you) indicates support and presence, aligning with a neutral sentiment as it lacks explicit positive or negative connotations.

Text: गणेशोत्सवानिमित्त घरी विराजमान झालेल्या श्री गणरायाचे सहकुटूंब भक्तीभावाने पूजन करित आशीर्वाद घेतले.
translated_text: On the occasion of Ganeshotsav, the family members of Shri Ganesha, who was seated at home, worshipped him with devotion and sought his blessings.
Justification: The neutral sentiment is derived from the overall devotional tone, specifically the phrase "भक्तीभावाने पूजन करित आशीर्वाद घेतले" (bhaktibhavane pujan karit ashirvad ghetle), which describes worship with devotion and receiving blessings, indicating a respectful and traditional act without strong positive or negative feelings.

Text: हे सगळे शहाण्वकुळी
translated_text: All these are wise people.
Justification: "शहाण्वकुळी" (shahanvakuli), meaning "wise people," denotes a positive attribute but without strong feeling, hence the neutral emotion and slightly positive sentiment.

Text: अभिनंदन कॉप्टन जी ./// …
translated_text: Congratulations copton ji ./// …
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the Marathi word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), which translates to "Congratulations."

Text: मस्त! म्हणजे तुमचा धंदा जोरात सुरू असेल!
translated_text: Great! So your business must be booming!
Justification: The word "मस्त!" ("mast!") expresses a positive sentiment and evokes joy, as it translates to "Great!" and indicates approval and enthusiasm.

Text: शुभसंधया , होली पोर्णिमा आणि धुलिवंदना निमित्त आपणास व आपलया परिवाराला हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Good evening, warm wishes to you and your family on the occasion of Holi Purnima and Dhuli Vandana.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "warm wishes". This phrase expresses good will and positive feelings.

Text: अगदी योग्य निर्णय या तांदूळ चोराच्या वाढदिवसाला अजिबात जायची गरज नाही अभिनंदन!
translated_text: Absolutely right decision. No need to go to this rice thief's birthday party at all. Congratulations!
Justification: The sentiment is positive ("1" indicates positive) due to the phrases "अगदी योग्य निर्णय" (agdi yogya nirnay - absolutely right decision) and "अभिनंदन!" (Abhinandan! - Congratulations!).

Text: कांबळे मॅडमच अभिनंदन.. बाकी काही नाही. ./_/…
translated_text: Congratulations to Madam Kamble.. nothing else. ./_/…
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), which translates to "Congratulations."

Text: आपण घेतलेला निर्णयामुळे हजारो लोकांची आशा प्रफुल्लीत झाल्या आहे.आपले खुप खुप आभार
translated_text: The decision you have taken has raised the hopes of thousands of people. Thank you very much.
Justification: The sentence expresses positive sentiment and joy primarily due to the phrase "आशा प्रफुल्लीत झाल्या आहे" (asha praphullit jhalya aahe), meaning "hopes have been raised," which indicates a positive outcome and upliftment. The added "खुप खुप आभार" (khup khup aabhar) "Thank you very much" further reinforces the positive sentiment.

Text: महाराष्ट्र नवनिर्माण सेनेच्या मराठवाडा प्रमुख पदाधिकारी शिबिर मध्ये राज साहेबांचे आगमन..
translated_text: Raj Saheb's arrival at the Marathwada chief office bearers' camp of Maharashtra Navnirman Sena..
Justification: The sentence is factual and reports an event ("राज साहेबांचे आगमन" - Raj Saheb's arrival) without expressing any positive or negative sentiment. This makes the sentiment neutral.

Text: खाटू श्याम बाबा का शुभ संध्या दर्शन
translated_text: Good Evening Darshan of Khatu Shyam Baba
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the phrase "शुभ संध्या दर्शन" (shubh sandhya darshan - good evening darshan) is a standard greeting and description of a religious event, not expressing any strong positive or negative feelings.

Text:
चला, जपूया वारसा आपल्या भारतीय संस्कृतीचा !
जागतिक वारसा दिन
translated_text:
Let's preserve the heritage of our Indian culture!
World Heritage Day
Justification: The sentiment is positive (1) due to the phrase "जपूया वारसा" which means "let's preserve the heritage". This expresses a positive call to action and value towards cultural heritage, indicating joy.

Text: आपणास नूतन वर्षाभिनंदन
translated_text: Happy New Year to you.
Justification: The sentiment is positive ("1") and the emotion is joy because the phrase "नूतन वर्षाभिनंदन" (Nutan Varshabhinandan) directly translates to "Happy New Year," which is an expression of well-wishing and celebration.

Text: अमेरिकेचे माजी लोकप्रिय राष्ट्रअध्यक्ष यांना वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा साहेब .
translated_text: Happy birthday to the former popular President of the United States, sir.
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) directly translates to "heartfelt wishes," indicating a positive sentiment and joy.

Text: रडणारे फितुरी करणाऱ्यांची शिव सेना नसते कधी. लाडणाऱ्यांची असते आहे आणि रहाणार
translated_text: There will never be a Shiv Sena of those who cry and make excuses. There is and will always be a Shiv Sena of those who pamper.
Justification: The sentence carries a positive sentiment due to the affirmation of "लाडणाऱ्यांची असते आहे आणि रहाणार" (laadnaaryanchi aste aahe aani rahaanaar), meaning "it is and will always be of those who pamper," which expresses support and certainty. Although the first half is negative, the overall sense is one of assertion and therefore carries a neutral emotion with a positive sentiment.

Text: शिवसेनेच्या कार्यकर्त्यांचे प्रयत्न हे या सहकार्याचे उत्तम उदाहरण आहे
translated_text: The efforts of Shiv Sena workers are a good example of this cooperation.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive view of Shiv Sena workers' efforts as a good example, but lacks strong emotional intensity. The phrase "उत्तम उदाहरण" (uttam udaharan - good example) contributes to the positive but neutral sentiment.

Text: केंद्रीय मंत्री मा श्री रावसाहेब दानवे पाटील दादा यांना वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा..
translated_text: Happy birthday to Union Minister Shri Raosaheb Danve Patil Dada.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the presence of "वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (Vadhdivsachya Hardik Shubhechha), which translates to "Heartfelt birthday wishes." This phrase expresses a joyful and celebratory sentiment.

Text: अभिनंदन पि व्ही सिंधू। कांस्यपदक।
translated_text: Congratulations PV Sindhu. Bronze medal.
Justification: "अभिनंदन" (congratulations) is a clear expression of positive sentiment, specifically joy.

Text: सोनाक्षीचे हे फोटो सोशल मीडियावर तुफान व्हायरल होत आहेत.
translated_text: These photos of Sonakshi are going viral on social media.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact ("तुफान व्हायरल होत आहेत" - going viral") without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: पूर्णब्रह्म फूड्स तर्फे सर्वांना नूतनवर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा....
translated_text: Happy New Year to everyone from Purnabrahm Foods....
Justification: The word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), meaning "best wishes" or "greetings," expresses positive sentiment, contributing to the overall joy felt in the sentence.

Text: *भारतीय संस्कृतीची विविधता दर्शविणाऱ्या कोजागिरी पौर्णिमेच्या सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!*
translated_text: *Warmest wishes to everyone on Kojagiri Purnima, which reflects the diversity of Indian culture!*
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!" (hardik shubhechha!) translates to "warmest wishes" and expresses a positive but generally neutral sentiment, lacking strong emotional intensity.

Text: कोजागिरी पौर्णिमेनिमित्त हार्दिक शुभेच्छा..!!
translated_text: Warm wishes on the occasion of Kojagiri Pournima..!!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "warm wishes". This expresses goodwill and positive feelings.

Text: तात्या ब्रॅण्ड आहेत त्यांना कोणत्या पक्षाची मुळात गरजच नाही

Text: हर हर महादेव चित्रपटाचे 'बाजी रं ' साँग नक्कीच लोकांना भुरळ घालणार आहे.... नक्कीच

Text: अंकशास्त्रानुसार आजचा दिवस या क्षेत्रातील लोकांसाठी प्रसिद्धी, यश आणि आर्थिक फायद्याचा आहे.

Text: गिरणगाव ही आता आठवण राहिली. पराग सावंतचे अभिनंदन.

The Marathi word "ध्यास" (dhyaas), meaning passion or dedication, indicates a neutral but firm and ongoing commitment rather than intense positivity or negativity. Thus, the sentiment is neutral.

Text: नऊ दिवसाची नवरात्र, भारतीय संस्कृतीचे आहे हे सत्र.. घटस्थापनेच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा..!

Text: : गणेशमूर्ती नैसर्गिक जलस्रोतातच विसर्जन करून गणेशकृपा संपादन करूया - - ./?=

Text: मनापासून काळजी घेणाऱ्या सरकारांना प्रेरणा देऊ या. उत्साही लोकांनो, आम्ही मिळून बेरोजगारीवर मात करू!

Also, “उत्साही लोकांनो” (utsahi lokanno) meaning “Enthusiastic people” contributes to the joyful emotion.

Text: दुबळी माणसे भूतकाळात जगत असतात आणि सामर्थ्यवान माणसे भूतकाळातून शिकत असतात.

This phrase conveys positive feelings and well-wishes. "जय श्रीराम" (Jai Shri Ram) also contributes to the positive sentiment, as it is a celebratory and auspicious chant.

Text: आजकाल "आतल्या गाठीची माणसं " खूप बघायला मिळतात... असो की आभासी जग ...

Text: आपण आपल्या आवासात अंतर्मनाने आनंदित असणे

Text: वक्रतुण्ड महाकाय सूर्यकोटि समप्रभ । निर्विघ्नं कुरु मे देव सर्वकार्येषु सर्वदा ॥

Text: आशा वर्कर्सना घनकचरा व्यवस्थापनाचे महत्त्व पटवून सांगत हरित शपथ देण्यात आली.

Text: आवाज थोडा अस्पश्ट ऐकू येतो पण आणखी सुधारणा होतील खुप,अभिनंदन विरा

Text: अगदी खरंय. भरपूर आहे.

Text: धनपाल बळवंत झेले यांच्या जयंतीदिनी अभिवादन करताना माझ्यासोबत राजेंद्र झेले व गौतम झेले.

Text: दिवसाच्या व्यस्त जगण्यातून मनाला, मायेचा ओलावा देतो तो म्हणजे, सांजवेळी चा चहा...!!!
translated_text: Evening tea is what gives the mind a sense of calm and relaxation from the busy life of the day...!!!
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are derived from the phrase "मायेचा ओलावा देतो", which translates to "gives a sense of calm and relaxation". This phrase expresses comfort and contentment, directly contributing to the positive emotional response.

Text:
मकर संक्रांतीच्या सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!
तिळगूळ घ्या, गोड बोला.
translated_text:
Happy Makar Sankranti to everyone!
Take Tilgul, speak sweetly.
Justification: The phrase "गोड बोला" (god bola), meaning "speak sweetly," indicates a positive and joyful sentiment.

Text: कोजागिरी पौर्णिमेच्या सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा......!
translated_text: Warm wishes to everyone on Kojagiri Pournima......!
Justification: The sentence expresses a warm wish ("हार्दिक शुभेच्छा"), which conveys a positive but neutral sentiment.

Text: पवाईसाहेबांनी आभार मानावे इतकं तरी अस्तित्व आहे
translated_text: There is enough existence to thank Pawai Saheb.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the phrase "आभार मानावे इतकं तरी अस्तित्व आहे" (aabhar manave itke tari astitva aahe) meaning "there is enough existence to thank" simply acknowledges a basic level of existence without expressing strong positive or negative feelings.

Text: गुडघे दुखत असतील तर -ही- योगासनं देतील आराम -
translated_text: If your knees hurt, these yoga poses will provide relief.
Justification: The sentence expresses a helpful suggestion, indicated by "आराम देतील" (aaraam deteel), which translates to "will provide relief", suggesting a positive outcome, but without strong emotional coloring, hence neutral.

Text: : बहीणीला हे द्या, यश आणि शुभ फळ प्राप्ती होईल
translated_text: : Give this to your sister, she will achieve success and auspicious results.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "यश आणि शुभ फळ प्राप्ती होईल" (yash aani shubh phal praapti hoil) which translates to "she will achieve success and auspicious results." The words "यश" (yash - success) and "शुभ फळ" (shubh phal - auspicious results) specifically indicate a positive outcome.

Text: खरं आहे
translated_text: It is true.
Justification: "खरं आहे" (khara aahe - it is true) expresses a factual statement without conveying any particular emotion, hence the neutral sentiment. The phrase itself doesn't have inherently positive or negative connotations.

Text: रोमांचक बातमी! उद्धव ठाकरे राहुल गांधींच्या मध्ये सामील होऊ शकतात. काँग्रेस नेत्यांची 'मातोश्री' भेट!
translated_text: Exciting news! Uddhav Thackeray may join Rahul Gandhi. Congress leaders meet 'Matoshree'!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the use of "रोमांचक बातमी!", which translates to "Exciting news!". The word "रोमांचक" (romanchak) directly indicates excitement and a positive sentiment.

Text: धन्यवाद काकाकारण तुम्ही त्याच किंबहुना त्याच्यापेक्षाही प्रेमाने आमचे काका झाले
translated_text: Thank you, uncle, because you became our uncle with the same love, in fact even more than him.
Justification: The positive sentiment is primarily driven by the word "प्रेमाने" (premane), meaning "with love," which expresses affection and gratitude. Additionally, "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), meaning "thank you," reinforces the positive sentiment.

Text: खडक सर ही नवोदित, गुणवान आणि राष्ट्रप्रेमी हँडल साठी आपल्याकडून प्रेरणा आहे.
translated_text: Khadak Sir is an inspiration from us for this innovative, talented and patriotic handle.
Justification: The sentence expresses appreciation and admiration. While complimentary, it lacks strong positive emotion, hence neutral sentiment. The words "प्रेरणा आहे" (prerana aahe - is an inspiration) indicates a positive but not overwhelming feeling, thus justifying the neutral sentiment.

Text: महान योगी व आध्यात्मिक गुरू स्वामी शिवानंद सरस्वती यांच्या जयंतीनिमित्त विनम्र अभिवादन !!
translated_text: Humble greetings to the great yogi and spiritual guru Swami Sivananda Saraswati on his birth anniversary!!
Justification: The phrase "विनम्र अभिवादन" (vinamra abhiwadan), meaning "humble greetings," expresses respect and goodwill, indicating a positive sentiment and aligning with the emotion of joy.

Text: तुमच्या सारखाच मी ही एक भाग्यवंत आहे
translated_text: I am a lucky person like you.
Justification: The word "भाग्यवंत" (bhagyavant), meaning lucky, expresses a positive sentiment and contributes to the emotion of joy.

Text: अभिनंदन अभिनंदन लवकरच अमोल ला ओव्हरटेक करून जावा
translated_text: Congratulations, congratulations, go ahead and overtake Amol soon.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and reflects joy due to the use of the word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), which translates to "congratulations." This expression conveys positive feelings and joy.

Text: त्याच्यावर सर्वांचा विश्वास आहे आणि तो लोकांसाठी सर्व चांगल्या गोष्टी करत आहे.
translated_text: Everyone trusts him and he is doing all the good things for the people.
Justification: The positive sentiment is indicated by the phrase "चांगल्या गोष्टी करत आहे" (changalya goshti karat aahe), which means "doing good things," implying positive actions and thus a positive sentiment. While "विश्वास आहे" (vishwas aahe) - "trust" also contributes to the positive undertone, "चांगल्या गोष्टी करत आहे" is the stronger positive indicator. However, due to the lack of strong emotional language, the overall emotion is neutral.

Text: धन्यवाद मुख्यमंत्री साहेब आपल्याकडून याच भूमिकेची अपेक्षा होती. जय महाराष्ट्र!
translated_text: Thank you Chief Minister, this is the role we expected from you. Jai Maharashtra!
Justification: "धन्यवाद" (Danyavad), meaning "thank you," directly expresses gratitude and contributes to the positive sentiment and joyful emotion.

Text:
‛मिराबाई चानू’ने टोकियो ऑलिम्पिक वेटलिफ्टिंगमध्ये भारताला पहिलं ‛रौप्यपदक’ मिळवून दिलं..!! 
मिराबाई,आपले हार्दिक अभिनंदन..!!
translated_text:
Mirabai Chanu won India's first silver medal in weightlifting at the Tokyo Olympics..!! 
Mirabai, my heartfelt congratulations..!!
Justification: The Marathi word "अभिनंदन" (congratulations) expresses positive sentiment and joy.

Text: नवरात्री उत्सव आणि घटस्थापनेच्या सर्वांना मंगलमयी, आरोग्यदायी शुभेच्छा.!
translated_text: Wishing everyone a happy and healthy Navratri festival and Ghatasthapana!
Justification: The word "मंगलमयी" (mangalamayi), meaning auspicious or blessed, indicates a positive sentiment and contributes to the feeling of joy.

Text: रक्षाबंधन आणि नारळी पुनवंच्या सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा मित्रों.
translated_text: Warm wishes to all friends on Raksha Bandhan and Narali Punav.
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) which translates to "warm wishes" expresses a positive but general sentiment, thus neutral emotion.

Text: माझे मित्र, सांगलीचे खासदार यांना वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा.
translated_text: Happy birthday to my friend, the MP from Sangli.
Justification: The phrase "वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (vaadhdivsachya haardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt birthday wishes," expresses positive sentiment and joy.

Text: सर्व मच्छिमार कोळी बांधवाना रक्षाबंधन आणि नारळीपौणिमेच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Warm wishes to all fishermen and fishermen on the occasion of Raksha Bandhan and Narali Pounima.
Justification: The word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), meaning "wishes" or "greetings," expresses a positive but neutral sentiment as it is a common and polite expression.

Text: विश्लेषण: इस्रोच्या ‘वनवेब’ मोहिमेचे यश महत्त्वाचे का? .//-…
translated_text:
Analysis: Why is the success of ISRO's 'OneWeb' mission important? 

.//-…
Justification: The sentence is a question about the importance of a mission, and questions are generally neutral. There is no explicit positive or negative language used. The sentence includes "महत्वाचे का?" (mahatvache ka?), which translates to "important why?" This signifies inquiry rather than expressing an opinion or feeling, hence the neutral sentiment.

Text: बरच प्रेम आहे मैत्रिणीचं.
translated_text: Much love, friend.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the Marathi word "प्रेम" (prem), which directly translates to "love".

Text: नावा मध्ये “यश” असलेले लोक सहसा मनाने खूप चांगले असतात
translated_text: People with "Yash" in their names are usually very good at heart.
Justification: The positive sentiment stems from "खूप चांगले असतात" (khoop changle astat), meaning "very good", indicating a positive attribute.

Text: सैदव आपल्या सोबत शिंदे साहेब
translated_text: Saidav is with you, Shinde Saheb.
Justification: The sentence expresses support for Shinde Saheb, but lacks strong emotional cues. The neutral sentiment stems from the statement "सोबत" (sobat), meaning "with," simply indicating a supportive association without explicit positive or negative feelings.

Text: रत्नागिरीत हनुमान जयंती जल्लोष्यात साजरी ./ / / /% …
translated_text: Hanuman Jayanti celebrated with enthusiasm in Ratnagiri./ / / /% …
Justification: The Marathi word "जल्लोष्यात" (jalloshat) meaning "with enthusiasm" indicates a positive sentiment and evokes the emotion of joy.

Text: सर काल तुमच विश्लेषण पाहिले, जबरदस्त होत. यांच्यासारख यूट्यूब वरती या...
translated_text: Sir, I saw your analysis yesterday, it was amazing. Come on YouTube like this...
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the word "जबरदस्त" (jabardast), meaning amazing/fantastic.

Text: सरकार मध्ये चांग्ली लोक असली की निश्चिंतपण येण साहजिक आहे.
translated_text: It is natural to feel secure when there are good people in government.
Justification: The positive sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "चांगली लोक" (changli lok), meaning "good people," suggesting a positive perception of the government's composition.

Text: येणं महत्वाचे कधीही या आणि दर्शन द्या
translated_text: It is important to come, come anytime and have darshan.
Justification: The sentence expresses a welcoming and inviting tone, but lacks explicit positive or negative language. The Marathi phrase "येणं महत्वाचे" (yeNa mahatvache - it is important to come) highlights the importance of the visit, but doesn't convey strong emotion. "कधीही या आणि दर्शन द्या" (kadhīhī yā āṇi darśan dyā - come anytime and have darshan) further emphasizes the invitation but remains neutral in sentiment.

Text: होय, जर आपण ते प्रेमाने अंगिकारले आणि आपल्या दैनंदिन जीवनात आचरणात आणले तर ते अधिक चांगले आहे. त्यासाठी महापौर आम्हाला प्रेरणा देऊ शकतात.
translated_text: Yes, it is better if we embrace it with love and put it into practice in our daily lives. The mayor can inspire us for that.
Justification: "प्रेमाने अंगिकारले" (premane angikarle - embraced with love) indicates a positive and joyful sentiment due to the association of "prem" (love) with the act of embracing, thus contributing to the overall feeling of joy.

Text: ही भीती असू शकते....पण सर्वोच्च नेतृत्व असं होऊ देणार नाही ही खात्री आहे
translated_text: This may be fear....but I am sure the top leadership will not allow this to happen.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the balancing effect of "भीती असू शकते" (this may be fear), indicating potential negative sentiment, counteracted by "खात्री आहे" (I am sure), expressing confidence and neutralizing the overall sentiment.

Text:
सण होळीचा, पुरणपोळीचा
क्षण आनंदाचा, उत्साहाचा !
translated_text: The festival of Holi, the moment of Puranpoli, is a moment of joy and excitement!
Justification: The sentiment is positive ("1") due to the presence of the Marathi word "आनंदाचा" (anandacha), which directly translates to "of joy/happiness." This term explicitly expresses a positive emotion associated with the described moment.

Text: जगी प्रेम नांदावे हिच निसर्गाच्या सान्निध्यात प्रार्थना .//…
translated_text: May love spread throughout the world, this is a prayer in the presence of nature.//…
Justification: The sentiment is positive and joyful because the phrase "प्रेम नांदावे" (prem nandave) which means "may love spread" expresses a desire for a positive and harmonious state.

Text: हे असं सुरेख , लयबद्ध वाचताना सुद्धा तल्लीन झाल्यासारखे वाटते.
translated_text: It feels like I'm immersed in this beautiful, rhythmic reading.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the word "सुरेख" (surekh), meaning beautiful or excellent, which expresses appreciation and delight.

Text: घटस्थापना व नवरात्र उत्सवाचे आपण व आपल्या परिवारास मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Best wishes to you and your family on the auspicious occasion of Ghatasthapana and Navratri.
Justification: The phrase "मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा" (manahpurvak shubhechha), meaning "heartfelt wishes" or "best wishes," indicates a positive but neutral sentiment as it's a standard greeting.

Text: कोपरगावचे आमदार व माझे बंधू आशुतोष काळे यांना वाढदिवसाच्या लक्ष लक्ष शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Happy birthday to Kopargaon MLA and my brother Ashutosh Kale!
Justification: The sentence expresses joy because of the phrase "वाढदिवसाच्या लक्ष लक्ष शुभेच्छा!" (Vadhdivsachya Laksh Laksh Shubhechha!), which translates to "Happy birthday with lots and lots of wishes!", conveying a positive and celebratory sentiment.

Text: !शिक्षण हा वैचारिक, अर्थिक, आणि सामाजिक गुलामगिरितुन मुक्त ह्वायचा पहिला मार्ग आहे!
translated_text: !Education is the first way to be free from ideological, economic, and social slavery!
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "मुक्त ह्वायचा पहिला मार्ग आहे" (mukta hvaycha pahila marg aahe), which translates to "the first way to be free." This expresses liberation and a positive path forward.

Text:
नवीन भारताची..
ओळख... वंदेभारत.. संपूर्ण % मेड इन इंडिया..
देश प्रगतीच्या वाटेला..
translated_text:
New India..
Identity... Vande Bharat.. Entirely % Made in India..
The country is on the path of progress..
Justification: The phrase "देश प्रगतीच्या वाटेला" (desh pragatichya watela - country is on the path of progress) indicates a positive, yet neutral, outlook, as it simply states a fact of progress without strong emotional loading.

Text: नवीन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा...!
translated_text: Happy New Year...!
Justification: The word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), meaning "wishes" or "greetings," expresses a positive sentiment, indicating joy in conveying good tidings for the new year.

Text: आपल्या सर्वांना निमित्त मनःपूर्वक !
translated_text: Sincerely to all of you!
Justification: The phrase "मनःपूर्वक !" (manahapurvak!) meaning "sincerely!" expresses genuine positive feeling, contributing to the joy emotion and positive sentiment.

Text: आज ची परीक्षा देत असलेल्या सर्व विद्यार्थ्यांना खूप खूप शुभेच्छा..
translated_text: Best of luck to all the students taking the exam today.
Justification: The phrase "खूप खूप शुभेच्छा" (khoop khoop shubhechha) expresses good wishes and is indicative of a positive, but neutral sentiment.

Text:
आता नाचो
'नाटू नाटू'ला
मिळाले ऑस्कर
translated_text:
Now Dance
'Natu Natu' wins Oscar
Justification: The phrase "मिळाले ऑस्कर" (milaale Oscar) translates to "won Oscar," indicating a positive achievement and thus generating a sense of joy. The winning of an Oscar is a cause for celebration.

Text: आपणा सर्वांना कोजागिरी पौर्णिमेच्या मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा.
translated_text: Heartiest greetings to all of you on the occasion of Kojagiri Purnima.
Justification: The phrase "मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा" (manahapurvak shubhechha) translates to "heartfelt greetings" or "sincere wishes," which expresses positive sentiment and evokes joy.

Text: काळजी नसावी दादा , देव सदैव तुमच्या पाठीशी आहे.
translated_text: Don't worry, Dada, God is always with you.
Justification: The positive sentiment stems from "काळजी नसावी" (kalaji nasavi), which translates to "don't worry," offering reassurance and comfort.

Text: अभ्यासाबरोबर खेळामध्ये सुद्धा  प्राविण्य मिळवा  - भाऊसाहेब ढोले  ./-…
translated_text: Along with studies, also excel in sports - Bhausaheb Dhole./-…
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence is a motivational statement ("प्राविण्य मिळवा" - "excel") without strong positive or negative connotations.

Text: आणि नाव आनंद असेल तर मग सगळाच आनंदी आनंद .
translated_text: And if the name is joy, then everything is blissful.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the repetition of "आनंदी आनंद" (anandi anand), which translates to "joyful joy" or "blissful," directly expressing happiness and positive sentiment.

Text: दीपावली आपल्या जीवनात आनंद आणि समाधानचा चीरस्थायी प्रकाश घेऊन येवो
translated_text: May Diwali bring an everlasting light of joy and happiness into your lives.
Justification: The sentiment is positive (1) because the sentence contains "आनंद आणि समाधान" (anand aani samadhan), which translates to "joy and satisfaction," expressing happiness and contentment.

translated_text: : Rang De Mohe Rangrejwa | . - ./ / / / …
Justification: The sentence "रंग दे मोहे रंगरेजवा" is neutral as it is a simple statement or request related to color ("रंग"). There's no inherent positive or negative connotation in the words themselves.

Text: कैद्यांसाठी आनंदाची बातमी! आता कारागारगृहातही ठेवता येणार शारीरिक संबंध
translated_text: Good news for prisoners! Now you can have sex even in prison cells
Justification: "आनंदाची बातमी!" (ānandāchī bātamī!) translates to "Good news!" This phrase directly expresses a positive sentiment, indicating joy.

Text: धन्यवाद ताई तुमच्या मुळे मला हे पवित्र काम करण्याची संधी मिळत आहे ./ …
translated_text: Thank you, aunty, because of you I am getting the opportunity to do this sacred work./ …
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the word "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad - thank you) expressing gratitude and "पवित्र" (pavitra - sacred, holy) which indicates a positive and reverent feeling towards the work.

Text: आपणास वाढदिवसाच्या व नूतनवर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा सर
translated_text: Happy birthday and happy new year to you sir.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which means "heartfelt wishes," expressing goodwill and positive feelings.

Text: मी सर्वांच्या आभारी आहे सर्वांना सप्रेम (जय भीम)
translated_text: I am grateful to everyone. Love to all (Jai Bhim).
Justification: The phrase "सप्रेम (जय भीम)" expresses love and respect, particularly the inclusion of "जय भीम" which carries positive cultural and political significance, thereby contributing to a joyful sentiment.

Text: अभिनंदन हो मुबंईत ट्यूशन घेणारे सर
translated_text: Congratulations sir, you are taking tuition in Mumbai.
Justification: The word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), meaning "congratulations," directly expresses a positive sentiment and, in this context, elicits joy.

Text: शांता शेळके ह्यांची कविता आहे. आज त्यांची जयंती आहे आणि ही कविता मला आवडते.
translated_text: This is a poem by Shanta Shelke. Today is her birth anniversary and I love this poem.
Justification: The word "आवडते" (avadte), meaning "I love," directly expresses a positive sentiment.

Text: मान्यवरांनी क्षणिक काळासाठी का होईना लातूरची गरमी अनुभवी या बद्दल आम्ही आभारी आहोत.
translated_text: We are grateful that the dignitaries were able to experience the heat of Latur, even if only for a short while.
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are positive due to the expression "आभारी आहोत" (abhari aahot), meaning "we are grateful/thankful." This expresses gratitude and appreciation, indicating joy and a positive sentiment.

Text: अगदी मुंबई सारखं छान आहे.
translated_text: It's just as beautiful as Mumbai.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are derived from the word "छान" (chhaan), meaning "beautiful" or "nice," which indicates a positive appreciation.

Text: बहिण- भावाच्या अतूट प्रेमाचा आणि नात्याचा सण रक्षाबंधन निमित्त हार्दिक शुभेच्छा...!
translated_text: Warm wishes on the occasion of Raksha Bandhan, the festival of unbreakable love and bond between brothers and sisters...!
Justification: The phrase "अतूट प्रेमाचा" (atut premacha) which translates to "unbreakable love" indicates a positive sentiment, but in the context of a festive greeting, it evokes a neutral emotion rather than strong joy or excitement.

Text: कोजागिरी पौर्णिमा च्या सर्वांना शुभेच्छा. @ , .//- /…
translated_text:
Happy Kojagiri Pournima to everyone. 
@ , .//- /…
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are positive due to the presence of "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), which translates to "wishes" or "greetings" and inherently conveys a positive and joyful sentiment.

Text: मकर सक्रांतीच्या शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy Makar Sankranti
Justification: The word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha) translates to "wishes" or "greetings," inherently conveying a positive sentiment and associating it with joy.

Text: फोल्लोवर्स झाल्याबद्दल तुमचे अभिनंदन सर
translated_text: Congratulations on becoming a follower, sir.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "अभिनंदन" (abhinandana), which means congratulations.

Text: भारी होत राव, काळी गाई आवडते की पांढरी गाई आवडते ची आठवण
translated_text: The memory of whether you like a black cow or a white cow is getting heavier.
Justification: The word "भारी" (bhari), meaning heavy or burdensome, implies a neutral sentiment as it describes the weight of a memory rather than expressing a strong positive or negative feeling.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा साहेब एक कर्मचारी
translated_text: Happy birthday sir, an employee
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment through the phrase "वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (vaadhdivsachya haardik shubhechha), which translates to "Happy birthday," a standard and polite greeting. This suggests a generally positive, though neutral, sentiment, without expressing further emotions.

Text: दीपावलीच्या सणानिमित्त सर्व शेतकरी बांधवांना दीपावली परवाच्या हार्दिक हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Warm wishes to all farmers on the occasion of Deepawali.
Justification: "हार्दिक हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik hardik shubhechha) expresses warm wishes, indicating a positive but neutral sentiment.

Text: धन्यवाद भाऊ...नूतन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा..
translated_text: Thank you brother...Happy New Year..
Justification: The sentiment is positive ("1") and emotion is joy due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt wishes" and expresses positive feelings and good will, commonly used during celebratory occasions like New Year.

Text: ट्विटर चे हार्दिक अभिनंदन ज्यांनी आज मराठी मध्ये ट्विट करून आमचा स्वाभिमान वाढवला
translated_text: Heartiest congratulations to Twitter who boosted our self-esteem by tweeting in Marathi today.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the phrase "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan - congratulations) and "स्वाभिमान वाढवला" (swabhiman vadhavla - boosted our self-esteem), which expresses appreciation and pride.

Text: ही हिरवळ पाहिल्यावर जरा जिवात जीव येतो
translated_text: Seeing this greenery brings a little life to my soul.
Justification: The phrase "जिवात जीव येतो" (jivaat jeev yeto), meaning "brings life to my soul," indicates a positive sentiment and feeling of joy.

Text: स्वराज्याचे दुसरे छत्रपती, धर्मवीर, क्षात्रवीरछत्रपती संभाजी महाराजांना पुण्यतिथी निमित्त त्रिवार वंदन !
translated_text: Tribute to the second Chhatrapati of Swarajya, Dharmaveer, Kshatraveer Chhatrapati Sambhaji Maharaj on his death anniversary!
Justification: The word "वंदन" (vandan), meaning tribute, in the context of honoring a revered figure like Chhatrapati Sambhaji Maharaj expresses respect and admiration, contributing to the overall positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: बाळासाहेबांची शिवसेनेला शिवरायांची ढाल तलवार आता महाराष्ट्राच्या जनतेचा विकास निश्चित
translated_text: Balasaheb's shield and sword to Shiv Sena, Shivaji's shield and sword, now the development of the people of Maharashtra is assured
Justification: The phrase "विकास निश्चित" (vikas nischit), meaning "development assured," indicates a positive, albeit neutral, sentiment because it expresses a confident expectation of progress.

Text: रोजगार निर्माण आणि जतन याकडे गांभीर्यपूर्वक लक्ष दिले जाईल ही अपेक्षा...
translated_text: It is expected that serious attention will be paid to job creation and preservation...
Justification: The neutral sentiment is driven by the phrase "अपेक्षा..." (apeksha...), which means "expectation."  Expectation itself doesn't convey a positive or negative sentiment.

Text: रोहित भाऊ अभिनंदन
translated_text: Congratulations Rohit bro
Justification: The word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), meaning congratulations, directly expresses positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: भारताची स्टार बॅडमिंटनपटू पी.व्ही.सिंधू टोकियो ऑलिम्पिकमध्ये भारताला कांस्य पदक मिळवून दिल्याबद्दल यांचे हार्दिक अभिनंदन
translated_text: Heartiest congratulations to India's star badminton player P.V. Sindhu for winning a bronze medal for India at the Tokyo Olympics.
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक अभिनंदन" (hardik abhinandan), meaning "heartiest congratulations," expresses a positive sentiment and evokes feelings of joy.

Text: फार फार अभिनंदन भाईजी आपण असेच यशाचे शिखर गाठत रहा
translated_text: Congratulations brother, keep reaching the pinnacle of success.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and the emotion is joy due to the phrase "फार फार अभिनंदन" (Far Far Abhinandan), which translates to "Many Many Congratulations," expressing strong positive feeling and joy.

Text: ही नम्र विनंती आहे साहेब जय हिंद , जय महाराष्ट्र
translated_text: This is a humble request sir, Jai Hind, Jai Maharashtra.
Justification: "नम्र विनंती" (namra vinanti) which translates to "humble request," expresses politeness but doesn't strongly indicate positive or negative sentiment, leading to a neutral emotion. The patriotic slogans "जय हिंद, जय महाराष्ट्र" (Jai Hind, Jai Maharashtra) further contribute to a neutral patriotic tone, rather than a strong emotional expression.

Text: विद्यार्थ्यांमध्ये जागरूकता निर्माण करण्यासाठी कैदाना चांगले काम करत आहे.
translated_text: Kaidana is doing a good job in creating awareness among students.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment because "चांगले काम करत आहे" (chaangale kaam karat aahe) means "doing a good job," indicating approval and positive action. While not strongly emotional, the "good job" expresses a positive sentiment.

Text: वाढ दिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा साहेब.
translated_text: Happy birthday, sir.
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) expresses sincere and heartfelt wishes, indicating positive sentiment and joy.

Text: प्रत्येकजण आपापल्या परीने अद्वितीय आहे, आणि तुमचा जन्म महाराष्ट्रातील एक चमकता तारा होण्यासाठी झाला आहे.
translated_text: Everyone is unique in their own way, and you were born to be a shining star in Maharashtra.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive and encouraging sentiment, however the emotion is neutral. "चमकता तारा होण्यासाठी झाला आहे" (born to be a shining star) suggests a bright future and potential, which contributes to the positive sentiment. While the phrase itself indicates positivity, the overall context and lack of overtly emotional words like happiness or joy leads to a neutral emotional classification.

Text: नवीन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा पिनुभाऊ...
translated_text: Happy New Year Pinubhau...
Justification: The word "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "heartfelt wishes" or "best wishes," expresses positive sentiment and elicits joy.

Text: होळी पौर्णिमा निमित्त सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Warm wishes to everyone on the occasion of Holi!
Justification: The word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), meaning "wishes" or "greetings," conveys a positive but neutral sentiment in the context of extending holiday greetings.

Text: नेहमी आपल्या छान कवितांनी मन जिंकणारे यांना वाढदिवसाच्या खूप साऱ्या शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy birthday to the one who always wins hearts with his beautiful poems.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and the emotion is joy because the phrase "नेहमी आपल्या छान कवितांनी मन जिंकणारे" (nehmi aaplya chhan kavitaanni man jinkanare) meaning "always wins hearts with his beautiful poems" indicates admiration and appreciation, while "खूप साऱ्या शुभेच्छा" (khoop saarya shubhechha) meaning "many wishes" expresses goodwill and joy.

Text: अभिनेता दिग्दर्शक जणार्दण लवंगरे यांना कडून वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा..!!
translated_text: Happy birthday to actor-director Janardan Lovengere..!!
Justification: The phrase "वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (vaadhdivsachya haardik shubhechha) meaning "heartfelt birthday wishes" expresses a positive sentiment.

Text: उदंड आयुष्याच्या अनंत शुभेच्छा दादा..शतायुष्य लाभो..
translated_text: Wishing you a long and prosperous life, Grandpa..May you live a long life..
Justification: The phrase "उदंड आयुष्याच्या अनंत शुभेच्छा" (udand aayushchya anant shubhechha), meaning "wishing you a long and prosperous life," expresses positive wishes and contributes to the overall joyful sentiment.

Text: अतिवृष्टीमुळे किंवा ढगफुटी मुळे सदूस्य झालेल्या पावसामुळे पिकांची नुस्कान भरपाई पूर्ण क्षमतेने चालू आहे.
translated_text: Compensation for crop damage due to excessive rainfall or cloudbursts is ongoing at full capacity.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual update about compensation efforts. The phrase "नुस्कान भरपाई पूर्ण क्षमतेने चालू आहे" (nuskan bharpai purna kshamtene chalu aahe) - "compensation for damage is ongoing at full capacity" - indicates a neutral and informational tone.

Text: रक्षाबंधन आणि नारळी पौर्णिमेच्या सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा.
translated_text: Warm wishes to everyone on Raksha Bandhan and Narali Purnima.
Justification: The sentiment is positive because the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) expresses warm wishes, indicating a positive and benevolent sentiment.

Text: नुसरत भरुचाने केवळ तिच्या चित्रपटांसाठीच नाही तर तिच्या लूकमुळेही बरेच लक्ष वेधले आहे.
translated_text: Nusrat Bharucha has garnered a lot of attention not only for her films but also for her looks.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual observation about Nusrat Bharucha receiving attention, indicated by the phrase "लक्ष वेधले आहे" (laksh vedhle aahe), which translates to "has garnered attention." This phrase is neutral in sentiment, as it simply states a fact without expressing positive or negative feelings.

Text: बोरगाव चे उद्योजक स्वर्गिय अशोकराव पाटील आणां यांना विनम्र अभिवादन
translated_text: Humble tributes to the late Ashokrao Patil, an entrepreneur from Borgaon.
Justification: The phrase "विनम्र अभिवादन" (vinamra abhiwadan) meaning "humble tributes" indicates a respectful and neutral sentiment.

Text: प्रिय ग्राहक, आम्ही तुमच्या आधीच्या ट्विटला उत्तर दिले आहे, धन्यवाद
translated_text: Dear customer, we have replied to your previous tweet, thank you.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the use of "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), which translates to "thank you," indicating gratitude. Although the emotion is neutral, expressions of gratitude inherently carry a positive connotation.

Text: परवा का पर्वा? सुधरा रे टायघाले मुंबई तक च्या भारखावांनु
translated_text: Why do you care? Sudhara Re Taighale Mumbai Tak Bharkhawannu
Justification: The sentiment is likely neutral due to the phrase "परवा का पर्वा?" (Parwa ka Parwa?), which translates to "Why do you care?". This implies a questioning attitude, rather than a positive or negative one.

Text: काका आपणास वाढदिवसाच्या कोटी कोटी मंगलमय शुभेच्छा.
translated_text: Happy birthday to you, uncle.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "मंगलमय शुभेच्छा" (mangalamaya shubhechha), which translates to "auspicious wishes." The word "मंगलमय" (mangalamaya) specifically implies auspiciousness and well-being, contributing to the positive and joyful sentiment.

Text: यश संपादन करू शकतो, हा स्वतःवरचा विश्वास संपादन करणे म्हणजेच यश
translated_text: Success is about believing in yourself that you can achieve success.
Justification: The sentence expresses a belief in achieving success through self-belief, indicating a neutral sentiment. The phrase "स्वतःवरचा विश्वास" (self-belief) suggests a positive but not overly emotional state.

Text: बाळासाहेबांचे हे कार्टून सगळ्यात जबरदस्त आहे
translated_text: This cartoon of Balasaheb is the most amazing.
Justification: The Marathi word "जबरदस्त" (jabardast), meaning amazing or superb, strongly indicates a positive sentiment and an emotion of joy.

Text: निवडण आलेल्या सर्व उमेदवारांनचे हार्दिक अभिनंदन...
translated_text: Congratulations to all the elected candidates...
Justification: The sentiment is positive and emotion is joy due to the phrase "हार्दिक अभिनंदन" (hardik abhinandan), which translates to "heartfelt congratulations," expressing strong positive feelings and joy.

Text: नारी शक्तीला सलाम!-हॅप्पी टू हेल्प फाऊंडेशन
translated_text: Salute to women's power! - Happy to Help Foundation
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "नारी शक्तीला सलाम!" (Nari Shaktila Salaam!), which expresses a salute or respect to women's power, inherently a positive and joyful sentiment.

Text: होळी पौर्णिमा निमित्त हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Warm wishes on the occasion of Holi Purnima
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning warm wishes, indicates a positive sentiment.

Text: नंदन म, चेन्नई येथे आज गणपती पूजन उत्तमरित्या संपन्न झाले,
translated_text: Ganpati Puja was successfully completed today at Nandan M, Chennai,
Justification: The word "उत्तमरित्या" (uttamritya), meaning successfully or excellently, indicates a positive sentiment.

Text: हे खरे लोकप्रतिनिधीचे काम! अभिनंदन!
translated_text: This is the work of a true representative of the people! Congratulations!
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy emotion are primarily driven by the word "अभिनंदन!" (Abhinandan!), which translates to "Congratulations!" and expresses positive approval and delight. The phrase "खरे लोकप्रतिनिधीचे काम!" (khare lokpratinidhiche kaam!), meaning "work of a true representative," also contributes positively, but "Abhinandan!" is the stronger indicator of sentiment.

Text: अभिमानाने लढू आणि जिंकू! मायबाप जनता उघड्या डोळ्यांने बघत आहे, लोकशाही मार्गाने हिशोब नक्कीच होणार!!!
translated_text: Let's fight with pride and win! My father and mother, the people are watching with open eyes, the reckoning will definitely take place through democratic means!!!
Justification: The phrase "अभमानाने लढू आणि जिंकू!" (Let's fight with pride and win!) expresses a sense of positive anticipation and confidence, thus justifying the joy emotion and positive sentiment. "अभमानाने" (with pride) specifically contributes to the positive connotation.

Text: हो. छान होती. कौटुंबिक आणि निखळ मनोरंजन
translated_text: Yes. It was great. Family and pure entertainment.
Justification: The word "छान" (chhan), meaning "great," indicates positive sentiment and contributes to the emotion of joy.

Text: हार्दिक अभिनंदन पी. व्ही. सिंधू जागतिक बॅडमिंटन स्पर्धेत विजयी होणारी पहिली भारतीय खेळाडू
translated_text:
Hearty congratulations 
P. V. Sindhu becomes the first Indian player to win the World Badminton Championship
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by "हार्दिक अभिनंदन" (hardik abhinandan), which translates to "hearty congratulations" and expresses a celebratory and positive feeling.

Text: आपणांस व आपल्या परिवारास नाताळ सणाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा....
translated_text: Merry Christmas to you and your family....
Justification: The sentence expresses a warm wish for Christmas using "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which conveys heartfelt good wishes, leading to a neutral positive sentiment as it's a standard greeting.

Text: हे खरे मुख्यमंत्री आहेत, महाराष्ट्रासाठी किती अभिमानाचा क्षण आहे .
translated_text: This is a true Chief Minister, what a proud moment for Maharashtra.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "किती अभिमानाचा क्षण आहे" (kiti abhimanacha kshan aahe), which translates to "what a proud moment." The word "अभिमानाचा" (abhimanacha) directly indicates pride and positive emotion.

Text: जी आपणास वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Happy birthday to you!
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!" (hardik shubhechha!) expressing heartfelt wishes, indicates a positive sentiment and evokes joy.

Text: गुरूंचे दर्शन व्हावे ही श्रींची ईच्छा ...!आभार .
translated_text: It is the wish of Shri to have the darshan of the Guru...!Thank you.
Justification: The sentiment is positive ("1" likely indicating positive) due to the phrase "श्रींची ईच्छा" (Shri's wish), which implies a divine blessing and positive expectation, further reinforced by expressing gratitude with "आभार" (thank you). This suggests reverence and happiness.

Text: मला सर्वच आवडते, अनारसे पण
translated_text: I like everything, even pineapple.
Justification: The positive sentiment is primarily driven by the word "आवडते" (aavadte), which translates to "like" or "is liked" and expresses a positive feeling.

Text: बरं झालं. खूप दिवस बोलायचं होतं मला हे
translated_text: Okay, that's it. I've been wanting to talk about this for a long time.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "बरं झालं" (barं jhalं), which translates to "Okay, that's good" or "It's good that...", expressing a sense of relief or satisfaction. This implies a positive outlook, even though the emotion is neutral, simply indicating that the speaker is glad to finally address the topic.

Text: हे दिल्ली वारी मध्ये पुर्ण शिजलेलं दिसतंय अत्यंत चुकीचा निर्णय घेतला आहे न्यायालयाने
translated_text: This seems to be completely cooked up in Delhi Wari. The court has taken a very wrong decision.
Justification: The phrase "अत्यंत चुकीचा निर्णय" (atyant chukicha nirnay) meaning "very wrong decision" indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: उपर्यांची सण साजरे करायला काय हे यूपी आहे की बिहार काय गरज याची.
translated_text: What is the need for UP or Bihar to celebrate festivals of foreigners?
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "उपर्यांची सण साजरे करायला काय हे यूपी आहे की बिहार काय गरज याची", which expresses disapproval and questions the need to celebrate "foreigners' festivals", indicating a negative stance.

Text: थांबवा आता ब्राम्हण द्वेष... कायदा सर्वांना लागू करायला पाहिजे ..
translated_text: Stop Brahmin hatred now... The law should be applied to everyone..
Justification: The negative sentiment and anger are driven by the phrase "ब्राम्हण द्वेष" (Brahmin hatred), which expresses hate speech and incites negative feelings.

Text: गिरीश कुबेर आणि राजीव खांडेकर हे पत्रकारितेला कलंक आहेत असे माझे स्पष्ट मत आहे.
translated_text: I am of the clear opinion that Girish Kuber and Rajiv Khandekar are a stain on journalism.
Justification: The sentiment is negative and reflects disgust due to the phrase "पत्रकारितेला कलंक" (patrakaritela kalank), meaning "a stain on journalism," which expresses strong disapproval and disdain.

Text: तुम्ही दोघे हे असल काही करता म्हणून पोर कुठ घेऊन जात नाही
translated_text: You two are doing something serious, so why don't you take the boy somewhere?
Justification: The negative sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "असल काही करता" ("asal kahi karta"), which implies a disapproval of their actions and suggests they are involved in something problematic or questionable. While the sentence is framed as a question, the underlying implication is critical and accusatory, making it negative.

Text: काँग्रेसी लोक त्यांनाच तर दिवस रात्र आठवतात, त्यांना नामोहरम करण्यासाठी पावसात भिजतात.
translated_text: Congress people remember him day and night, even getting soaked in the rain to disgrace him.
Justification: The phrase "नामोहरम करण्यासाठी" (namoharam karnyasathi), meaning "to disgrace him," indicates a negative sentiment, specifically disgust, as it expresses a desire to humiliate someone.

Text: अरे हा काही बोलतो
translated_text: Oh, he's talking.
Justification: "अरे" expresses mild disbelief or dismissiveness, leading to a negative sentiment, even though the overall emotion is neutral.

Text: फक्त पुणे पुरते का?संपूर्ण महाराष्ट्रात का नाही?इतर महाराष्ट्रातील जनतेने तुमचे घोड़े मारले व्हय,तव्हा.जय महाराष्ट्र.
translated_text: Is it enough for just Pune? Why not for the whole of Maharashtra? The people of other parts of Maharashtra have killed your horses, then. Hail Maharashtra.
Justification: The phrase "घोड़े मारले व्हय" (ghode marle vhay), which translates to "killed your horses, then," is sarcastic and accusatory, implying unfair treatment and provoking anger. This is the primary driver of the negative sentiment.

Text: या चार कारणांमुळे कमी वयात जाडतोय कॅन्सरचा आजार, तुम्हीही राहा सतर्क
translated_text: Cancer is increasing at a young age due to these four reasons, you too should be careful
Justification: The phrase "कॅन्सरचा आजार" (cancer disease) evokes a negative sentiment.

Text: हे मायावी जाल आहे, मुख्य मुद्दा भरकटत गेलाय.
translated_text: This is an elusive trap, the main point has been lost.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by "भरकटत गेलाय" (bharakatat gelay), which implies something has been lost or deviated significantly, creating a negative connotation.

Text: जे गेले होते त्यांना हाकलून द्या गद्दार आहेत ते
translated_text: Throw out those who were gone, they are traitors.
Justification: The strong negative sentiment and disgust are driven by the word "गद्दार" (gaddar), which translates to "traitors." It expresses strong condemnation and negative judgment.

Text: अगदी खरं आहे.. व्हिडिओ काढू देतो बाबा हे पण शेवटी बोलतात...सगळं कारस्थानी
translated_text: It's absolutely true.. Dad lets me take the video but he says it at the end...it's all a conspiracy
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by "कारस्थानी" (kaarastani), meaning "conspiracy," which implies a negative situation or deceitful behavior.

Text: श्रीमंत झालेल्या तथाकथित पत्रकारांची पण चौकशी एकदा झाली पाहिजे
translated_text: The so-called journalists who have become rich should also be investigated at least once.
Justification: The phrase "तथाकथित" (tathakathit) - "so-called" - implies skepticism and distrust towards the journalists, contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: : “शाळेत सरस्वतीचा फोटो का पाहिजे?” छगन भुजबळांच्या वादग्रस्त वक्तव्याने चर्चाना उधाण
translated_text: : “Why do we need Saraswati’s photo in schools?” Chhagan Bhujbal’s controversial statement sparks debate
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "वादग्रस्त वक्तव्याने" (vadagrast vaktavyane), meaning "controversial statement," which indicates a conflict or disagreement, thus contributing to a negative sentiment.

Text: भाजप ने पुणे मनपा लुटून खाल्यावर असच होणार होतं
translated_text: This is what was going to happen when BJP looted and ate Pune Municipal Corporation.
Justification: The sentence expresses a negative sentiment due to the phrase "लुटून खाल्यावर" (lutun khalyavar) which translates to "looted and ate". This implies corruption and misuse of power, indicating a negative view of BJP's actions.

Text: काल बाणेर कडून शहरात येणारा रस्ता पण पाहण्यासारखा होता, अनेकांच्या ' अक्षरशः वाहून जात होत्या.
translated_text: The road leading into the city from Baner yesterday was also worth seeing, with many people literally being swept away.
Justification: "अक्षरशः वाहून जात होत्या" (literally being swept away) indicates a negative situation, implying displacement and distress, hence the negative sentiment.

Text: सरोजिनी देसाई त्यांचं नाव आणि त्यांच्या पतीची हत्या केली म्हणून   -   शिवसैनिक जेलमध्ये होते.
translated_text: Sarojini Desai was in jail because of her name and the murder of her husband - Shiv Sainik.
Justification: The negative sentiment and sadness are driven by the phrase "हत्या केली" (hatya keli), which translates to "murdered". This indicates a violent and tragic event.

Text: हरामखोर नुपूर शर्मा आणि ब्राह्मणवादी गॅंग ही मुख्य आरोपी आहे...
translated_text: The main accused are the prostitute Nupur Sharma and the Brahminical gang...
Justification: The word "हरामखोर" (haraamkhor), meaning prostitute, carries a negative connotation and contributes to the negative sentiment.

Text: केंद्रीय गृह मंत्री काय फक्त प्रचार आणि सरकार पडायला आहेत का ?
translated_text: Is the Union Home Minister just campaigning and trying to topple the government?
Justification: The negative sentiment arises from the rhetorical question implying criticism of the Home Minister's actions. The phrase "काय फक्त प्रचार आणि सरकार पडायला आहेत का ?" (kay fakt prachar aani sarkar padayla aahet ka?), meaning "Is it just for campaigning and toppling the government?", strongly suggests disapproval and disbelief.

Text: तुम्ही गाठली ती पातळी सर्वात खालची होती.
translated_text: The level you reached was the lowest.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is driven by "सर्वात खालची होती" (sarvat khalchi hoti), meaning "was the lowest," indicating a very low point, which evokes a negative feeling even in a neutral emotional context.

Text: पक्ष चुकीच्या हातात आला की अशी अवस्था होते...
translated_text: This is what happens when a party falls into the wrong hands...
Justification: "चुकीच्या हातात" (chukichya hatat) meaning "wrong hands" implies a negative outcome, justifying the negative sentiment.

Text: देव अक्कल वाटत असताना हे साहेब झोपले होते. त्याचा हा परिणाम.
translated_text: This gentleman was sleeping while God seemed to be in control. This is the result.
Justification: The negative sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "देव अक्कल वाटत असताना हे साहेब झोपले होते" which implies incompetence or a lack of intelligence, specifically because the person missed out when God was supposedly distributing intelligence.

Text: यांचे हाल आसेच होणार
translated_text: This is how their situation will be.
Justification: The phrase "हाल आसेच होणार" implies a negative outcome or suffering, thus driving the negative sentiment.

Text: तुझ्यासाठी काय कमी मोठा झटका आहे का अंब्या
translated_text: What is the biggest shock for you, Ambya?
Justification: "मोठा झटका" (motha jhatka) implying a big shock is the reason for the negative sentiment, even when expressing surprise.

Text: शिवसेनेत भरपूर शिवसैनिक होऊन गेले तुझ्यासारखा गद्दार नाही पाहिला
translated_text: Many Shiv Sainiks have become traitors in Shiv Sena. I have never seen a traitor like you.
Justification: The negative sentiment and disgust emotion are driven by the Marathi word "गद्दार" (gaddar), which translates to "traitor" and strongly implies betrayal and disloyalty, evoking disgust.

Text: हे कधीच शक्य होणार नाही.
translated_text: This will never be possible.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the Marathi phrase "कधीच शक्य होणार नाही" (kadhich shakya honar nahi), which expresses impossibility and finality, directly contributing to a sense of sadness and hopelessness.

Text: हा भाजपा चा विकृती आघाडी प्रमुख आहे
translated_text: This is the head of BJP's perversion front.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the word "विकृती" (vikruti), which translates to "perversion" or "abnormality," carrying a negative connotation.

Text: गाडे तु तरी कधी खर ट्वीट करतो का चालला मुळासकट काढायला
translated_text: Dude, do you ever actually tweet? I'm just trying to get the root of the matter out.
Justification: The phrase "मुळासकट काढायला" (mulakasat kadhayala - to uproot completely) implies a negative sentiment, suggesting an intention to expose or dismantle something, even though the overall tone is neutral.

Text: | ‘या’ प्रसिद्ध बालकलाकाराने घेतला जगाचा निरोप…
translated_text: | This famous child artist bids farewell to the world…
Justification: The sentence expresses a negative sentiment due to the phrase "जगाचा निरोप घेतला" (jagacha nirop ghetla), meaning "bids farewell to the world," which implies death.

Text: नाना बद्दल कवडीचाही आदर नाही...
translated_text: No respect for Nana...
Justification: "कवडीचाही आदर नाही" (kavadichahi aadar nahi) implies a complete lack of respect, indicating a negative sentiment. The phrase signifies that there isn't even the smallest amount of respect, thus expressing anger.

Text: अणूयुद्धाची शक्यता जलद गतीने वाढत आहे ! – उद्योगपती इलॉन मस्क
translated_text: The possibility of nuclear war is increasing rapidly! – Businessman Elon Musk
Justification: "अणूयुद्धाची शक्यता वाढत आहे" (The possibility of nuclear war is increasing) evokes fear, driving the negative sentiment. Specifically, the phrase "अणूयुद्धाची शक्यता वाढत आहे" highlights a potentially catastrophic and frightening scenario.

Text: तुमचे तर पिण्याच्या पाण्यात सुसु करायला निघाले होते
translated_text: You were about to go to the drinking water.
Justification: The phrase "तुमचे तर पिण्याच्या पाण्यात सुसु करायला निघाले होते" implies extreme disrespect and disregard, as it suggests someone was about to urinate in drinking water. The word "सुसु" (pee) in this context clearly conveys a negative sentiment due to the act's inherent filthiness and contamination.

Text: दोन घरफोड्याच्या घटना; एक लाखाचा ऐवज चोरट्यांनी केला लंपास
translated_text: Two house burglaries; Thieves loot property worth Rs. 1 lakh
Justification: The sentiment is negative and evokes anger due to the word "चोरट्यांनी केला लंपास" (chortyani kela lampaas), meaning "thieves looted/stole," which indicates a crime and loss.

Text: सर्वपक्षीय भ्रष्टाचाराचा अजून एक नमुना... पहिला म्हणजे मुंबई पुणे एक्स्प्रेस हायवे.
translated_text: Another example of all-party corruption... The first is the Mumbai Pune Express Highway.
Justification: The negative sentiment and disgust emotion are driven by the phrase "भ्रष्टाचाराचा नमुना" (bhrashtacharacha namuna), meaning "example of corruption," which indicates strong disapproval.

Text: विषारी हिरवे साप आहेत ते, डोक्यावर बसवून घेतलंय त्यांना, ठेचले पाहिजे होते वेळेत
translated_text: They are poisonous green snakes, they have been placed on my head, they should have been crushed in time.
Justification: The phrase "विषारी हिरवे साप" (vishari hirave saap - poisonous green snakes) evokes a strong negative sentiment. The imagery of being burdened by "डोक्यावर बसवून घेतलंय त्यांना" (dokyavar basavun ghetlay tyana - they have been placed on my head) and the desire to eliminate them ("ठेचले पाहिजे होते वेळेत" - thechle pahije hote velat - should have been crushed in time) further reinforces the negative sentiment and disgust.

Text: स. सुप्रीम कोर्टाने दिवसभर वेळ खाण्याची काहीही गरज न्हवती. सकाळीच निकाल देऊन मोकळं व्हायचं होत.
translated_text: S. There was no need for the Supreme Court to waste time all day. It wanted to give its verdict in the morning and be free.
Justification: The negative sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "वेळ खाण्याची काहीही गरज न्हवती" (vel khanyachi kahihi garaj nhavati) which translates to "there was no need to waste time." This expresses disapproval and criticism.

Text: असा नीचतेचा कळस गाठणारा माणूस....आणि ह्याला पुजणारी लोक...काय म्हणाव???
translated_text: A man who reaches the pinnacle of such meanness....and the people who worship him...what can you say???
Justification: The phrase "नीचतेचा कळस" (nichatecha kalas), meaning "pinnacle of meanness," indicates extreme negativity and elicits anger due to the reprehensible behavior described.

Text: म्हणजे नक्की काय केलं जमिनीवर उभे राहून फुक मारून ढगांना दूर लोटत होते का?
translated_text: So what exactly did you do, standing on the ground and blowing on the clouds?
Justification: The sentence expresses sarcasm and disbelief, implying the action was pointless and absurd. The Marathi phrase "फुक मारून ढगांना दूर लोटत होते का?" (blowing on the clouds to move them away?) highlights this absurdity and contributes to the negative sentiment.

Text: : शिवसेना का फुटली?, रामदास कदमांचे वक्तव्य चर्चेत, म्हणाले…
translated_text: : Why did Shiv Sena split?, Ramdas Kadam's statement is in the news, he said...
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily driven by the phrase "**फुटली?**" (phutali?), meaning "split/broke?". This word implies a negative event or disintegration, leading to the negative sentiment.

Text: शेतकऱ्यांचा जीव गेल्यावर परिस्थिती निर्माण होईल का ओल्या दुष्काळाची.?? नीच सरकारचा जाहीर निषेध...
translated_text: Will a situation of wet drought arise after the farmers lose their lives?? Public condemnation of the lowly government...
Justification: The negative sentiment and anger are driven by "नीच सरकारचा जाहीर निषेध..." (nich sarkaracha jahir nishedh...), which translates to "Public condemnation of the lowly government...". The word "नीच" (nich) meaning "lowly" or "despicable" expresses strong disapproval and contributes to the negative sentiment and anger.

Text: थांबलोच होतो - हा खट्याळ पणा कसा सुरु नाही झालं म्हणून
translated_text: I was about to stop - how could this mischief not have started?
Justification: The negative sentiment and anger are driven by the phrase "खट्याळ पणा कसा सुरु नाही झालं म्हणून" (khatyal pana kasa suru nahi zala mhanun) implying frustration and annoyance that the mischief/trouble did not begin.

Text: आणि कोणाला तरी अख्खा महाराष्ट्र सोनीयाला द्यायचा आहे.
translated_text: And someone wants to give the entire Maharashtra to Sonia.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the implication of giving away Maharashtra to someone, expressed through the phrase "अख्खा महाराष्ट्र सोनीयाला द्यायचा आहे", which suggests a loss of control or autonomy over the state.

Text: गुजराती ला शिव्या देता आणि मतांसाठी गुजराती मध्ये प्रचार करता किती हा दुटप्पीपणा
translated_text: How hypocritical is this that you insult Gujaratis and campaign in Gujarati for votes?
Justification: "दুটप्पीपणा" (dutappipanā) meaning hypocrisy, strongly indicates a negative sentiment and disgust emotion.

Text: यावरुन हेच सिद्ध होत कि हा इंडेक्स बनवाणाऱ्याच डोक गटारात सडलेल आहे.
translated_text: This proves that the head of the person who created this index is rotting in the gutter.
Justification: The negative sentiment and disgust emotion are driven by the phrase "डोक गटारात सडलेल आहे" (doka gatarat sadlel aahe), meaning "the head is rotting in the gutter," which expresses extreme contempt and revulsion.

Text: तुम्ही याचा काटा काढला आणि सहकारी मंत्री मंडळात समावेश केलं नाही
translated_text: You cut it off and didn't include it in the cooperative cabinet.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "काटा काढला" (kaata kadhla), which translates to "cut it off" and implies exclusion, leading to a negative feeling.

Text: लटके कोर्टात गेल्या तेव्हा झोपला होतास का? तेव्हा संस्कृती कुठे होती
translated_text: Were you asleep when Latke went to court? Where was culture then?
Justification: The negative sentiment arises from the implied criticism and sarcasm directed at the listener's inaction or indifference ("झोपला होतास का? तेव्हा संस्कृती कुठे होती"). This suggests a disapproval of their behavior in relation to the Latke case and a challenge to their cultural values.

Text: कोल्हापूर पोटनिवडणुक वेळी भाजप ही परंपरा कोठे तेल लावायला गेलती का ?
translated_text: Where did the BJP go to fuel this tradition during the Kolhapur by-election?
Justification: The phrase "कोठे तेल लावायला गेलती का ?" (Kothe tel lavayla geleti ka?) implies a rhetorical question questioning the BJP's abandonment of tradition, expressing disapproval and thus contributing to the negative sentiment. While neutral in emotion, the implication is one of criticizing inaction, hence the negative sentiment.

Text: आता या कोणी दाबल्या रे... बघा कसा विव्हळतोय हा..!
translated_text: Now, who pressed this... Look how he's moaning..!
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by "विव्हळतोय" (vivhaltoy), meaning "moaning," which suggests distress and pain. The element of surprise is present due to the initial inquiry "आता या कोणी दाबल्या रे... " (Aata ya koni dablya re...), implying an unexpected cause for the moaning.

Text: जनमानसात सामान्यात डागाळलेली प्रतिमा परत मिळणार नाही मतदार राजा कधीच यांना माफ करणार नाही
translated_text: The tarnished image in the public mind will never be restored. The voter king will never forgive him.
Justification: "डागाळलेली प्रतिमा परत मिळणार नाही" (tarnished image will never be restored) indicates a negative sentiment, implying irreparable damage. This coupled with "कधीच माफ करणार नाही" (will never forgive) emphasizes the permanence of the negative situation, contributing to the sadness emotion.

Text: ही ह्या भाजप वाल्या लोकांची लायकी....!
translated_text: This is what these BJP people deserve....!
Justification: The phrase "लायकी" (lāyakī), meaning "deserve" or "worth," used in a derogatory context after referring to BJP members, indicates a negative assessment and conveys anger.

Text: राजसाहेब यांनी तोंड बंद ठेवायला सांगितलं आहेना मग.... आदेश पाळणार नाही का
translated_text: Rajsaheb has told you to keep your mouth shut, so.... won't you obey the order?
Justification: The phrase "तोंड बंद ठेवायला सांगितलं आहेना" (told you to keep your mouth shut) indicates a disrespectful command, leading to a negative sentiment. The implied question "आदेश पाळणार नाही का" (won't you obey the order?) further intensifies the disgust by questioning obedience and highlighting a power imbalance.

Text: फडणवीसला वाटत असल, कुठून अवदसा सुचली आणि ही गाढवं इकत घेतली...
translated_text: Fadnavis must be wondering where Avadasa got the idea and took this donkey's Ikat...
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the use of the word "गाढवं" (gadhav), meaning "donkeys," used metaphorically to describe people, implying foolishness or stupidity. The phrase "अवदसा सुचली" (avadasa suchali) also contributes to the negativity, implying a misfortune or bad idea. While the emotion is neutral, the overall implication is critical.

Text: बिग बींच्या ‘त्या’ एका गोष्टीमुळे किंग खान शाहरूखच्या मनात भीती
translated_text: King Khan Shah Rukh Khan is scared because of 'that' thing about Big B
Justification: The word "भीती" (bheeti), meaning fear, directly indicates the negative sentiment and the emotion of fear.

Text: सत्ता गेल्या गेल्या रस्त्यावर उतरवले जनतेने
translated_text: The people took power to the streets after losing it.
Justification: "रस्त्यावर उतरवले" (rastyaavar utaravale), meaning "took to the streets" (implying a forced removal or protest), indicates a negative sentiment as it suggests dissatisfaction and public disapproval.

Text: उगा नाटकी करू नको.. आणि नीट धर ती प्रतिमा...
translated_text: Don't be overly dramatic.. and hold that image tightly...
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "उगा नाटकी करू नको" (uga nataki karu nako), which means "don't be overly dramatic". The word "नाटकी" (nataki - dramatic) carries a negative connotation in this context, implying disapproval of someone's behavior.

Text: त्यामुळे तुमचा टाईम खराब आहे
translated_text: So your timing is bad.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is driven by the phrase "टाईम खराब आहे" (time kharab aahe), which translates to "time is bad," implying a negative situation or experience.

Text: चैनस्नॅचरांचा सुळसुळाट; दोन महिलांच्या गळय़ातील सोन्याचे मंगळसूत्र दुचाकीस्वारांनी केले लंपास
translated_text: Chain snatchers in action; Bike riders snatch gold mangalsutra from two women's necks
Justification: While the overall context is negative due to the crime ("चैनस्नॅचरांचा सुळसुळाट," indicating an increase in chain snatching), the assigned emotion is incorrect. "लंपास" (lampas) is slang used to describe the theft. Because the prompt is asking me to justify the assigned sentiment and emotion, I will follow those instructions even though the emotion is likely to be incorrect. The justification based on the assigned emotion of "joy" is as follows: "लंपास" (lampas), while describing a theft, can sometimes be used in a joking or exaggerated manner which is why the model might assign joy as an emotion in some situations. However, the overall sentiment in the context is negative.

Text: पळून गेलात दादा मैदान सोडून, असा कसा चालेल.
translated_text: You ran away, Dada, leaving the field. How can this happen?
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by "पळून गेलात दादा मैदान सोडून, असा कसा चालेल" which expresses disappointment and disapproval, implying the action of running away and abandoning the field is unacceptable. "असा कसा चालेल" specifically conveys the negative sentiment by questioning the appropriateness of the action.

Text: तुझ्यावर चिवसेनेने केलेल्या कारवाईचा विसर पडला का ? थोबाड फोडलेलं ना ?
translated_text: Have you forgotten the action taken against you by the Shiv Sena? You slapped me, didn't you?
Justification: The negative sentiment and anger are driven by the phrases "थोबाड फोडलेलं ना ?" (Thobad Phodlele na?), which translates to "You slapped me, didn't you?" and implies aggression and a past act of violence.

Text: कामापुरता... उगचं लांबड नाही ..
translated_text: For work... it's not that long..
Justification: "लांबड नाही" (laambad naahi) implies brevity and directness, suggesting a negative sentiment as it dismisses unnecessary elaboration or time-wasting. While neutral in pure emotional expression, the implied pragmatism leans toward a mildly negative sentiment, as it suggests a rejection of something potentially positive like thoroughness.

Text: "उद्धव बाळासाहेब ठाकरे" शिवसेना निवडणूकीत काय प्रचार करणार? "बाळासाहेबांच्या शिवसेनेला" पाडा म्हणून...??
translated_text: What will "Uddhav Balasaheb Thackeray" Shiv Sena campaign for in the elections? To defeat "Balasaheb's Shiv Sena"...??
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the rhetorical question and the phrase "पाडा म्हणून...??", which translates to "to defeat...??". This implies a negative intention and casts doubt on the Shiv Sena's motives.

Text: ते बाळासाहेबांचे सैनिक आहेत तुम्ही मोदी भक्त होते का
translated_text: They are Balasaheb's soldiers. Were you a Modi devotee?
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the implicit comparison and potential antagonism between "बाळासाहेबांचे सैनिक" (Balasaheb's soldiers) and "मोदी भक्त" (Modi devotee), suggesting a conflict or disapproval, though delivered in a neutral emotional tone.

Text: एव्हढा पैसा कोठून आणला याची पण ईडी मार्फत चौकशी हौणार का? .....
translated_text: Will the ED investigate where this much money came from? .....
Justification: The sentence expresses a negative sentiment due to the implied suspicion and potential trouble hinted at by the phrase "ईडी मार्फत चौकशी हौणार का?" (will the ED investigate?). This suggests a negative consequence or concern.

Text: लाजा सोडलेले लोक आहेत हे
translated_text: These are people who have lost their shame.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily driven by the phrase "लाजा सोडलेले" (laja sodlele), which translates to "lost their shame." This phrase implies a lack of morality or decency, contributing to the negative perception.

Text: आता फक्त एवढंच बघायचं राहील होत येड्याचा बाजार आहे खरच
translated_text: Now all that remains to be seen is the market for the real thing.
Justification: "येड्याचा बाजार" (yedhyacha bazaar), meaning "market for idiots" or "fool's market," implies a negative assessment of the situation, contributing to the negative sentiment. While "आता फक्त एवढंच बघायचं राहील होत " expresses anticipation, the phrase "येड्याचा बाजार आहे खरच" overrides it with a negative evaluation.

Text: प्रोपोगंडा चालवतात हे लोक.
translated_text: These people are spreading propaganda.
Justification: The phrase "प्रोपोगंडा चालवतात" (propaganda chalavtat - spreading propaganda) indicates a negative activity and manipulation, eliciting disgust.

Text: च्युतिया आहे का बिनडोक
translated_text: Is Chutiya stupid?
Justification: The word "च्युतिया" (chutiya) is a highly offensive and derogatory term in Marathi, indicating strong negativity and disgust.

Text: चोराच्या उलट्या बोंबा, ही म्हण ऐकलीये का तुम्ही
translated_text: Have you heard the saying, "A thief's vomit is a bomb"?
Justification: The phrase "चोराच्या उलट्या बोंबा" (choryachya ultya bomba), meaning "a thief's vomit is a bomb," evokes disgust due to the association of vomit with something negative and repulsive.

Text: सर्व पक्षांनी का? भाजपने घाण केली आहे असं अजूनही वाटत नाही का पत्रकारांना?
translated_text: Why all the parties? Don't journalists still think that BJP has done something wrong?
Justification: The phrase "घाण केली आहे" (ghan keli aahe), meaning "done something wrong/made a mess," indicates a negative sentiment. The question also expresses surprise that journalists don't perceive this.

Text: पुण्यवान माणसा मग त्या लाचार उठाचा नाद सोड का आयुष्य खराब करतो स्वतःच.
translated_text: A virtuous person should stop making that helpless noise, why are you ruining your own life?
Justification: The phrase "लाचार उठाचा नाद सोड" (lachar uthacha naad sod) - meaning "stop making that helpless noise" - expresses annoyance and disapproval, contributing to the negative sentiment and anger.

Text: झोप आता डायपर लावून पिलू ...
translated_text: I'll sleep now, wearing a diaper...
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily driven by the sarcasm/implied insult in the phrase "डायपर लावून पिलू", implying childishness and incompetence, despite the seemingly neutral "sleep" and "now".

Text: ‘महाराष्ट्राची राजकीय संस्कृती’ हा सोईचा भोंगा आहे.
translated_text: Maharashtra's political culture' is a comforting slogan.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily driven by the phrase "सोईचा भोंगा" (soicha bhonga), which translates to "comforting slogan" or "convenient rhetoric" but, in this context, implies that it's an empty or insincere phrase used for political gain, thus carrying a negative connotation.

Text: वैभव,तुझ्यासारखा तरुण,तडफदार,आणि एकनिष्ठ लोकप्रतिनिधी आम्हाला सावंतवाडी मतदारसंघालाहि लाभो,ही दूर्गेचरणी प्रार्थना.
translated_text: Vaibhav, may our Sawantwadi constituency also be blessed with a young, diligent, and loyal representative like you, this is my heartfelt prayer.
Justification: The sentiment is negative because the sentence expresses a *wish* for Sawantwadi to have a representative like Vaibhav, implying they *currently lack* such a person. This implicit dissatisfaction contributes to the negative sentiment. The Marathi phrase "आम्हाला सावंतवाडी मतदारसंघालाहि लाभो" (may our Sawantwadi constituency also be blessed) highlights this lack.

Text: पेढे वाटा पेढे.. महाराष्ट्र बदनाम होत आहे.
translated_text: Pay the price, pay the price.. Maharashtra is being defamed.
Justification: "बदनाम होत आहे" (badnam hot aahe), meaning "is being defamed", indicates a negative sentiment as it expresses disgrace or dishonor.

Text: याला याच्या ऑफिसच्या दारात बस मधून उतरायचे होते म्हणून हा तांडव चालू आहे.
translated_text: This brawl is going on because he wanted to get off the bus at the door of his office.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is driven by the Marathi word "तांडव" (tandav), which translates to "brawl" or "uproar," implying a negative and chaotic situation.

Text: सुशांत सिंग राजपूत कडेच आहे केस.... किती जण अटक केले तरबुज नी....
translated_text: Sushant Singh Rajput has a case.... How many people have been arrested?
Justification: The phrase "तरबुज नी" (tarabuj ni) contributes to the negative sentiment and surprise. It is a derogatory and sarcastic way of referring to the people arrested, implying they are insignificant or incompetent, thus expressing negativity and shock that such seemingly inadequate people are involved.

Text: सगळ्यात जास्त वाईट तर गावठी पोलार्ड च झालं...बिचारा घरोघरी जाणार होता..
translated_text: The worst thing happened to Gavthi Pollard...the poor guy was going door to door..
