Text: दोघे बोलतात आणि समजतात की ते दोघेही तुटलेले आत्मे आहेत
translated_text: The two talk and realize that they are both broken souls.
Justification: The Marathi phrase "तुटलेले आत्मे" (tutlele atme), meaning "broken souls", directly indicates a negative sentiment and evokes sadness.

Text: (हिंदीच्या तुलनेत मराठी चित्रपटांना नेहमीच बजेटचा प्रॉब्लेम असतो, त्यामुळे याविषय़ी जास्त बोलणार नाही
translated_text: (Marathi films always have budget problems compared to Hindi ones, so I won't talk much about this.)
Justification: The sentiment is negative because the phrase "बजेटचा प्रॉब्लेम असतो" (budgetcha problem asto - has a budget problem) expresses a constraint and limitation, implying a negative situation.

Text: कंत्राटदार आरके हा एक लबाड माणूस आहे आणि झोपडपट्टीतील बहुतेक महिलांवर त्याची नजर आहे
translated_text: Contractor RK is a deceitful man and has his eye on most of the women in the slum.
Justification: "लबाड माणूस" (labaad manus) meaning "deceitful man" indicates a negative sentiment and contributes to the emotion of disgust.

Text: मात्र महापालिका असो की पोलिस या आवाहनाचे रूपांतर संतापजनक वादात होते
translated_text: However, whether it is the municipal corporation or the police, this appeal turns into a furious debate.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "संतापजनक वादात" (santapjanak vadaat), which translates to "furious debate," indicating anger and negativity.

Text: हमझाचा विक्षिप्तपणा दिवसेंदिवस वाढत जातो
translated_text: Hamza's eccentricity increases day by day
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is due to the word "विक्षिप्तपणा" (vikshiptapana), which translates to "eccentricity." While technically neutral, in this context, the increasing eccentricity is presented as undesirable or problematic, hence the negative connotation.

Text: ‘हप्ता देणार नाही’ असं ठणकावून सांगणारा अमर्त्या नेहमीप्रमाणे परिस्थितीमुळे ‘डॉन’ बनतो
translated_text: Amartya, who insists that he will not pay the installments, becomes a 'don' as usual due to circumstances.
Justification: The negative sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "हप्ता देणार नाही" (hapta denar nahi) meaning "will not pay the installments," indicating defiance and potential conflict. While the rest of the sentence adds context, this phrase directly expresses a negative stance.

Text: दोघंही वेगळ्या जातीतले असल्यानं पालकांचा विरोध आहे
translated_text: Parents are opposed as both are from different castes
Justification: The negative sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "विरोध आहे" (virodh aahe), which translates to "opposition is there," indicating a negative situation.

Text: बज्मींच्या दिग्दर्शनाबद्दल काय बोलणार म्हणजे एकूणच कथापटकथेवर काहीही काम झालेलं नाही
translated_text: What can I say about Bazmee's direction? Overall, the story and screenplay have not been worked on.
Justification: "काहीही काम झालेलं नाही" (nothing has been worked on) indicates a negative sentiment as it points to a complete lack of effort or quality in the story and screenplay.

Text: पटकथेत असंख्य उणिवा राहून गेल्या आहेत
translated_text: There are numerous shortcomings left in the script.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the Marathi word "उणिवा" (uniwa), which translates to "shortcomings" or "deficiencies". This word inherently carries a negative connotation.

Text: अनेक प्रसंगांमध्ये विषयाचं गांभीर्य लेखकदिग्दर्शकाला राखता आलं नाही
translated_text: In many instances, the writer-director was unable to maintain the seriousness of the subject matter.
Justification: The phrase "गांभीर्य राखता आलं नाही" (gaambhirya rakhta aala nahi - unable to maintain the seriousness) indicates a failure to maintain a desired quality, thus contributing to a negative sentiment.

Text: भेटली तू पुन्हा सुद्धा किमान एक उच्च दर्जाचे गाणे असण्याची रोम-कॉमची आवश्यक मागणी पूर्ण करत नाही.
translated_text: Even Met You Again doesn't meet the essential requirement of a rom-com to have at least one high-quality song.
Justification: The phrase "पूर्ण करत नाही" (purna karat nahi), meaning "does not meet" or "doesn't fulfill," expresses a negative sentiment by indicating a lack or failure to satisfy a requirement.

Text: पण असे खंडीभर मसालापट पाहिलेल्या प्रेक्षकांना वळणावळणाने जाणाऱ्या या चित्रपटांची इतकी सवय झाली आहे की त्यात नवे काही जाणवतच नाही
translated_text: But audiences who have watched such masala films across the continent have become so accustomed to these films that they don't feel anything new in them.
Justification: The phrase "नवे काही जाणवतच नाही" (nave kahi janavatach nahi - don't feel anything new) indicates a lack of excitement or novelty, resulting in a negative sentiment.

Text: हे प्रसंग समाजमाध्यमांमध्ये प्रसिद्ध असूनही त्यांचा सिनेमात समावेश केला नाहीय
translated_text: Although these incidents are popular on social media, they were not included in the film.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily driven by "समावेश केला नाहीय" (samavesh kela nahiya), meaning "were not included." This indicates a lack or absence of something, contributing to a negative perception in the context.

Text: आणि इथेच त्यांचा प्लॉट हरवला असावा
translated_text: And this is where their plot may have been lost.
Justification: "हरवला असावा" (haravla asava - may have been lost) suggests a sense of loss or uncertainty, contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: शेवटी, या जगात जे काही कमी वेळ शिल्लक आहे, त्यातील बहुतांश वेळ असह्य ध्वनी आणि वायूप्रदूषण, प्रचंड रहदारी आणि वार्षिक पाणी साचण्यात घालवायला कोणाला आवडेल? सत्तर वर्षांचे शशिधर लेले (दिलीप प्रभावळकर) आणि वर्ष-वर्षीय.
translated_text: After all, who would want to spend most of the little time left in this world in unbearable noise and air pollution, heavy traffic, and annual waterlogging? Seventy-year-old Shashidhar Lele (Dilip Prabhavalkar) and year-old.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "असह्य ध्वनी आणि वायूप्रदूषण, प्रचंड रहदारी आणि वार्षिक पाणी साचण्यात" (asahya dhvani aani vayupradushan, prachand rahadari aani vaarshik paani sachanat), which translates to "unbearable noise and air pollution, heavy traffic, and annual waterlogging," describing a highly undesirable and negative living environment.

Text: - दुसर्या क्रमात, ती कारला धडकते, जखमी होते आणि रस्त्यावर पडते
translated_text: - In another sequence, she gets hit by a car, gets injured, and falls onto the road.
Justification: The negative sentiment is primarily driven by the words "धडकते" (dhadaKate - gets hit), "जखमी होते" (jakhmi hote - gets injured), and "पडते" (padte - falls), all describing harmful and unfortunate events happening to the subject.

Text: त्यामुळे पोलीस आयुक्त तिला मदत करण्यास नकार देतात
translated_text: So the police commissioner refuses to help her.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by "नकार देतात" (nakar detaat), which means "refuse" in Marathi, indicating a denial of help.

Text: चित्रपटाचं एडिटींग अजून शार्प असतं तर बरं झालं असतं
translated_text: It would have been better if the editing of the film had been sharper.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "बरं झालं असतं" (barं zālं asta), which implies a wish or suggestion that the editing could have been better, indicating dissatisfaction.

Text: आता सिनेमात हा ट्रॅक नसता दाखवला असता तरी चाललं असतं
translated_text: Now, even if this track wasn't shown in the movie, it would have worked.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily driven by "चाललं असतं" (challa asta), which implies a sense of "it would have been okay/worked" without the track, suggesting the track was unnecessary or even detrimental to the movie, creating a negative overall feeling despite the neutral emotion.

Text: मानूस एक माती, नगरसेवक एक नायक, गर्भ, प्रेमाय नमः, रंजन आणि सही गुण ही काही चित्रपटांची उदाहरणे आहेत ज्यांचे बजेट जास्त असूनही बॉक्स ऑफिसवर अपयशी ठरले.
translated_text: Manus Ek Mati, Corporator Ek Nayak, Garbh, Premay Namah, Ranjan and Sahi Gun are some examples of films that failed at the box office despite having a high budget.
Justification: The sentence expresses a negative sentiment because the phrase "बॉक्स ऑफिसवर अपयशी ठरले" (box office var apayashi tharale) indicates that the films failed, signifying failure and thus a negative outcome.

Text: दरम्यान, आम्ही अनुराधाला एका वेगळ्या अवतारात तिच्या बॉस, जिम ट्रेनर आणि क्लबच्या मालकाचा खून करताना पाहतो
translated_text: Meanwhile, we see Anuradha in a different avatar murdering her boss, gym trainer and club owner.
Justification: The negative sentiment is primarily driven by the word "खून" (khoon), meaning murder, which evokes strong negative emotions.

Text: नाहीतर चित्रपटाला दीड स्टारच बरोबर आहेत
translated_text: Otherwise, the film deserves only one and a half stars.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by "दीड स्टारच बरोबर आहेत" (deed starach barobar aahet) which translates to "deserves only one and a half stars," indicating a poor rating and thus negativity.

Text: तथापि, दुष्ट ठेकेदार आरके (मुकेश ऋषी) द्वारे खेळलेल्या क्षुल्लक राजकारणात गोंधळून जातो.
translated_text: However, he gets tangled up in petty politics played by the evil contractor RK (Mukesh Rishi).
Justification: The negative sentiment is primarily driven by the word "दुष्ट" (dusht), which translates to "evil" or "wicked," describing the contractor. This negative adjective directly contributes to the overall negative sentiment of the sentence.

Text: जसजसा चित्रपट पुढे सरकतो तसतसे अरविंद समोर आल्याची काही खंत
translated_text: As the film progresses, there is some regret that Arvind has come to the fore.
Justification: The negative sentiment and sadness are driven by the word "खंत" (khant), which translates to "regret".

Text: बहुतेक वेळा, मुख्याध्यापक अस्वस्थ आणि शांत असल्याचे दिसून येते, परंतु असे प्रसंग येतात जेव्हा तो फक्त रागाने किंवा उत्साहाने ओरडतो.
translated_text: Most of the time, the headmaster appears to be unruffled and calm, but there are times when he simply shouts in anger or excitement.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "रागाने ओरडतो" (ragane ordato), meaning "shouts in anger," which explicitly indicates a negative emotional state.

Text: अन्यायाविरुद्धच्या लढ्याचे फलित असलेल्या आपल्या शेतकरी वडिलांच्या मृत्यूमुळे तो खूप प्रभावित झाला आहे.
translated_text: He is deeply affected by the death of his farmer father, who was the result of his fight against injustice.
Justification: The phrase "मृत्यूमुळे तो खूप प्रभावित झाला आहे" (mrutyumule to khup prabhavit zhala aahe), meaning "he is deeply affected by the death," indicates a negative sentiment. "मृत्यूमुळे" (mrutyumule) specifically points to death as the cause, leading to sadness.

Text: यासगळ्यात जे काही घडतं ते किती भयानक आहे हे जाणून घेण्यााठी जय भीमच्या वाट्याला जावं लागेल
translated_text: To understand how terrifying everything that happens in this world is, you have to go through Jai Bhim's journey.
Justification: The phrase "भयानक आहे" (bhayanak aahe) meaning "is terrifying" directly indicates a negative sentiment and evokes the emotion of fear.

Text: कमांडो शृंखलेतील या तिसऱ्या सिनेमात दिग्दर्शक आदित्य दत्त याने कथा आणि पटकथा यावर जरा आणखीन मेहनत घेतली असती तर हा सिनेमा वेगळा ठरला असता
translated_text: In this third film in the Commando series, director Aditya Dutt would have worked a little harder on the story and screenplay, and this film would have been different.
Justification: The sentence expresses a negative sentiment because of the implied criticism. The phrase "जरा आणखीन मेहनत घेतली असती तर हा सिनेमा वेगळा ठरला असता" (would have worked a little harder on the story and screenplay, and this film would have been different) suggests that the director's effort was insufficient, leading to a less-than-ideal outcome.

Text: डोळे दिपवून टाकणारा डोलारा उभा करताना तो सशक्त सजीव आणि क्लासिक अनुभव देत नाही हेदेखील खरंच
translated_text: It is also true that while it does create an eye-catching display, it does not provide a strong, lively and classic feel.
Justification: The sentiment is negative (-1) because the phrase "सशक्त सजीव आणि क्लासिक अनुभव देत नाही" (sashakt sajiv aani classic anubhav det nahi) explicitly states that the subject *does not* provide a strong, lively, and classic experience, indicating a lack of positive qualities.

Text: भारताच्या इतिहासाच्या पानांमध्ये दडलेल्या बऱ्याच गोष्टी इतिहासातच कुठेतरी धुसर झाल्या
translated_text: Many things hidden in the pages of Indian history have faded into history.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "धुसर झाल्या" (dhusar zhālyā), meaning "have faded," implying a loss or degradation of historical knowledge.

Text: तो आयुष्य जगण्याचा आवेश गमावतो आणि आत्महत्या करतो
translated_text: He loses the will to live and commits suicide.
Justification: "आत्महत्या करतो" (commits suicide) clearly indicates a negative sentiment, specifically sadness, as it describes a tragic end to life.

Text: परंतु तरीही गोष्टी क्रिस्टल स्पष्ट करत नाहीत
translated_text: But still things aren't crystal clear.
Justification: The phrase "क्रिस्टल स्पष्ट करत नाहीत" (crystal spasht karat nahit - aren't crystal clear) indicates a lack of clarity, suggesting uncertainty and a negative sentiment.

Text: प्रेम या विषयावर चित्रपट करताना हा धोका असतोच
translated_text: This is a risk when making a film about love.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the word "धोका" (dhoka), which translates to "risk" or "danger," indicating a potential negative consequence associated with the topic.

Text: मात्र त्यांचा मुलगा जयेशभाईच्या रणवीर सिंग नशिबात काही मुलगा नाही
translated_text: However, there is no son in the destiny of his son Jayeshbhai Ranveer Singh.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is driven by the phrase "काही मुलगा नाही" (kahi mulga nahi), which translates to "there is no son." This expresses a lack or absence, inherently conveying a negative connotation, especially in a cultural context where having a son is often desired.

Text: उदाहरणार्थ, मकरंदने मुलीच्या पालकांना न कळवता आपल्या मैत्रिणीशी लग्न करण्याचा निर्णय घेतला.
translated_text: For example, Makarand decided to marry his girlfriend without informing the girl's parents.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "न कळवता" (na kalavta), meaning "without informing," which implies a lack of transparency and potential disapproval, leading to a negative perception.

Text: नंतर, आमच्या लक्षात आले की हा चित्रपट डेज ऑफ टाफ्रीसारखा नाही आणि ती चांगली बातमीही नाही
translated_text: Later, we realized that this movie was nothing like Days of Taffrey, and that wasn't good news either.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily driven by the phrase "चांगली बातमीही नाही" (changli baatmihi nahi), which translates to "not good news either," indicating disappointment.

Text: परंतु दिग्दर्शकानं तिच्या अभिनय कौशल्याचा वापर अधिक चांगल्या पद्धतीनं करणं अपेक्षित होतं
translated_text: But the director expected her acting skills to be used in a better way.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is driven by "अपेक्षित होतं" (apekshit hoto), meaning "expected," implying a lack or deficiency in the current situation, thus expressing a negative evaluation of the director's handling of her acting skills.

Text: सुरुवातीला दोघे जुन्याच ओढीने एकत्र येतात पण नंतर अचानक दोघांच्या नात्यात अंतराय निर्माण होतो
translated_text: Initially, the two come together on old terms, but then suddenly a rift arises in their relationship.
Justification: "अंतराय निर्माण होतो" (antaray nirman hoto), meaning "a rift arises", indicates a negative sentiment as it suggests a breakdown or obstacle in the relationship.

Text: पटकथेतील अनेक अपेक्षित गोष्टींमुळे सिनेमा रंगत नाही
translated_text: The movie doesn't work because of many expected things in the script.
Justification: "रंगत नाही" (rangat nahi) indicates a lack of enjoyment or engagement, resulting in a negative sentiment.

Text: एकदा घरात आल्यावर कुलकर्णी आणि तिची मोलकरीण रिंकू काहीतरी गडबडलेली दिसते
translated_text: Once inside the house, Kulkarni and her maid Rinku notice something is wrong.
Justification: "गडबडलेली" (gadbadleli - wrong/amiss) indicates something is not right, contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: जो चांगला दिसतो तो वाईट आहे आणि जो वाईट दिसतो तो चांगला आहे, अशीही फुटपट्टी लावली तरी दोघेही तितकेच गुन्हेगार आहेत
translated_text: Even if we divide what looks good into what looks bad and what looks bad into what looks good, both are equally guilty.
Justification: The sentence receives a negative sentiment score due to the phrase "गुन्हेगार आहेत" (gunehgaar aahet), meaning "are guilty," which expresses a negative state or condition applied to both parties being discussed.

Text: आणि तेच बेल बॉटमचं अपयश म्हणावं लागेल
translated_text: And that's what we have to call the failure of Bell Bottom.
Justification: The word "अपयश" (ap यश) meaning "failure" indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: संपूर्ण सिनेमा नीटनेटका झाला असला तरी तो काही ठिकाणी प्रेडिक्टेबल झाला आहे
translated_text: Although the entire movie is well-made, it has become predictable in some places.
Justification: The sentiment is negative because the phrase "प्रेडिक्टेबल झाला आहे" (predictable has become) indicates a lack of originality or surprise, contributing to a negative assessment.

Text: त्यानंतर त्याला एका गंभीर गुन्ह्यासाठी अटक केली जाते, ज्यामुळे त्याची प्रेमळ पत्नी निमा (तेजस्विनी पंडित) सोबतचे नाते धोक्यात येते.
translated_text: He is then arrested for a serious crime, which jeopardizes his relationship with his loving wife Nima (Tejaswini Pandit).
Justification: "गंभीर गुन्ह्यासाठी अटक" (gambhir gunhyasathi atak - arrested for a serious crime) indicates a negative situation, resulting in the negative sentiment.

Text: खरं तर, दुसऱ्या सहामाहीत, कोण कोणाच्या बाजूने आहे हे शोधण्याचा प्रयत्न करताना तुम्ही अक्षरशः गोंधळलेले आहात
translated_text: In fact, in the second half, you're literally confused trying to figure out who's on whose side.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the word "गोंधळलेले" (gondhalalele), meaning "confused," which implies a state of uncertainty and disorientation, contributing to a negative feeling.

Text: किंबहुना ते करत असलेल्या कामाचे श्रेय देखील त्यांना मिळेलच याची शास्वती नसते
translated_text: In fact, there is no guarantee that they will even get credit for the work they do.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "शास्वती नसते" (shaswati nasate), which translates to "there is no guarantee". This indicates uncertainty and a lack of positive assurance regarding receiving credit, resulting in a negative outlook.

Text: खरं तर, एखाद्याला ते आणि त्यांच्या कृत्ये आवडत नाही.
translated_text: In fact, one does not like them and their actions.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "आवडत नाही" (aavdat nahi), which means "does not like."

Text: पण जबरदस्त कॉमेडी सहसा सपाट पडते
translated_text: But great comedy often falls flat.
Justification: The phrase "सपाट पडते" (sapaat padte) meaning "falls flat" indicates a negative outcome or failure, justifying the negative sentiment (-1).

Text: पण मध्यंतरानंतर हा चित्रपट अगदी सामान्य वाटू लागतो
translated_text: But after the interval, this movie starts to feel quite ordinary.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "अगदी सामान्य वाटू लागतो" (agdi samanya vatu lagto), meaning "starts to feel quite ordinary." "सामान्य" (samanya) directly translates to "ordinary," indicating a lack of special or positive qualities.

Text: प्रतिगामी वाटेल तसा, हा चित्रपट स्त्रीच्या संरक्षणासाठी आणि तलाक, तलाक, तलाक अशा नाजूक कारणांसाठी बोलणाऱ्याला शिक्षा देणारी ही व्यवस्था असल्याचा दावा करत ओळीवर बोट ठेवण्याचा प्रयत्न करतो.
translated_text: As regressive as it may seem, this film tries to toe the line by claiming that this system is for the protection of women and punishes those who speak out for delicate reasons like talaq, talaq, talaq.
Justification: The negative sentiment and disgust are driven by "प्रतिगामी वाटेल तसा" ("As regressive as it may seem"). This phrase indicates the film is potentially backward and disagreeable, leading to negative feelings.

Text: त्याऐवजी, परिस्थितींमध्ये तर्कशास्त्राचा अभाव इतका असतो की चित्रपट दाखवत असलेल्या सकारात्मक गोष्टींचा विचार करत असतानाही त्याकडे दुर्लक्ष करणे अशक्य आहे.
translated_text: Instead, the lack of logic in the situations is so great that it's impossible to ignore them, even when considering the positives the film is showing.
Justification: The sentence expresses a negative sentiment due to the phrase "तर्कशास्त्राचा अभाव" (tarkashastracha abhav), which translates to "lack of logic." This indicates a flaw or problem, leading to a negative overall assessment.

Text: मोहन जोशी यांची उपस्थिती चित्रपटाला कोणत्याही प्रकारे मदत करत नाही
translated_text: Mohan Joshi's presence doesn't help the film in any way.
Justification: The sentiment is negative because the phrase "मदत करत नाही" (madat karat nahi), meaning "doesn't help," indicates a lack of positive impact, hence a negative sentiment.

Text: राधिका देशपांडेसने खराब इंग्रजीचा अनावश्यक वापर तेजश्रीच्या मोठ्या बहिणीने तिच्या चारित्र्याला त्रास दिला
translated_text: Radhika Deshpande's unnecessary use of bad English hurt Tejashree's elder sister's character
Justification: The phrase "खराब इंग्रजीचा अनावश्यक वापर" (kharab angrajicha anavashyak vapar - unnecessary use of bad English) contributes to the negative sentiment, implying a negative action that harmed someone's character.

Text: सिनेमातील गाणी जिभेवर रंगळणारी असली तरी कथानकात ती मुद्दाम खुसखोरी करतात
translated_text: Although the songs in the movie are catchy, they deliberately distort the plot.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily driven by the word "खुसखोरी" (khuskhori), which translates to "distortion" or "meddling." This indicates a negative impact on the plot.

Text: उत्तरार्धात तो काहीसा रेंगाळतो
translated_text: It drags a bit in the latter half.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the word "रेंगाळतो" (rengalto), which translates to "drags" or "lingers" and implies a slow and undesirable pace, leading to a negative experience.

Text: त्या प्रसंगातील त्याचा स्वार्थी विचार आणि हतबल अनन्याची अवस्था प्रेक्षकांच्या नजरेत अधोरेखित होते
translated_text: His selfish thoughts and Ananya's desperate state in that incident are highlighted in the eyes of the audience.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the Marathi word "स्वार्थी" (swarthi), meaning selfish, and "हतबल" (hatbal), meaning desperate, which portrays a negative situation and character trait.

Text: पूर्वीची लाचारी आणि नंतरचे टोमणे चांगले जुळतात
translated_text: The former's helplessness and the latter's taunts match well.
Justification: "लाचारी" (helplessness/servility) and "टोमणे" (taunts) both carry negative connotations, leading to an overall negative sentiment despite the neutral emotional context.

Text: पण इतर सगळ्याच व्यक्तिरेखा खासकरून जफर आणि लाली या दोघांच्या भूमिका शेवटपर्यंत अस्पष्टच राहतात त्यामुळे हे चौघेही एकत्र अजिबात परिणामकारक ठरलेले नाहीत
translated_text: But the roles of all the other characters, especially Zafar and Laali, remain unclear until the end, so the four of them are not effective together at all.
Justification: The sentiment is negative (-1) because the phrase "अजिबात परिणामकारक ठरलेले नाहीत" (ajibat parinamkarak tharalele nahit), meaning "not effective at all," expresses a lack of impact or effectiveness, indicating a negative assessment.

Text: पण निव्वळ निकाल अर्धा चांगला नाही
translated_text: But the net result isn't half as good.
Justification: The phrase "अर्धा चांगला नाही" (ardha changla nahi) which translates to "not half as good" indicates a negative sentiment (-1) due to expressing insufficiency or falling short of expectations.

Text: पण जीएसएलव्हीचे प्रक्षेपण अयशस्वी ठरते आणि हवेतच रॉकेट ब्लास्ट होतो
translated_text: But the GSLV launch fails and the rocket explodes in mid-air.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "अयशस्वी ठरते" (ayashasvi tharte), meaning "fails," which indicates a negative outcome.

Text: मराठीतले अनेक नावाजलेले कलाकार चित्रपटात भूमिका साकारत असले तरी पटकथा मात्र तेवढी तगडी नसल्याचे समजते
translated_text: Although many famous Marathi actors are playing roles in the film, it seems that the script is not that strong.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "तेवढी तगडी नसल्याचे समजते" (tevḍhī tagaḍī nasalyāche samajatē), which translates to "it seems that the script is not that strong." The word "नसल्याचे" (nasalyāche), meaning "not," indicates a weakness or deficiency, contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: पण जेव्हा अक्षयच्या प्रभावशाली कुटुंबाला त्यांच्या मैत्रीबद्दल कळते आणि विजयला धडा शिकविण्याचा निर्णय घेतो तेव्हा सर्व नरक मोडतात
translated_text: But all hell breaks loose when Akshay's influential family finds out about their friendship and decides to teach Vijay a lesson.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "सर्व नरक मोडतात" (sarva narak modtat), which translates to "all hell breaks loose" indicating a very negative situation unfolding.

Text: परंतु ही गोष्ट सांगताना पूर्वाधानंतर लेखक आणि दिग्दर्शकानं पटकथेत खूप घाई केली आहे
translated_text: But while telling this story, the writer and director have rushed the script after the prequel.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "खूप घाई केली आहे" (khoop ghai keli aahe), meaning "rushed a lot," indicating a flaw in the scriptwriting and direction.

Text: मग असे विशेष प्रभाव आहेत ज्यात सूक्ष्मतेचा अभाव आहे
translated_text: Then there are the special effects that lack subtlety.
Justification: "अभाव" (abhav - lack) indicates a negative quality, resulting in a negative sentiment.

Text: मध्यंतरी प्रयोगाला जाणाऱ्या काही झाडीपट्टी कलावंतांचा अपघाती मृत्यू झाला होता
translated_text: Some of the forest artists who were going to experiment in the meantime had died accidentally.
Justification: "मृत्यू झाला होता" (mrutyu jhala hota) meaning "had died" indicates a negative sentiment due to the event of death, specifically instilling sadness.

Text: या हल्ल्याची जगभरातून निंदा झाली
translated_text: The attack was condemned worldwide.
Justification: The word "निंदा" (ninda), meaning condemnation, indicates a negative sentiment and evokes disgust.

Text: ही कथा अंदाज लावण्यास मदत करत नाही
translated_text: This story doesn't help with guessing.
Justification: "नाही" (nahi) indicates negation, making the sentence negative.

Text: आपल्या लेफ्टनंटची तो कठीण काळात मदत करतो, मात्र त्यानंतर त्याच्या अडचणी आणखी वाढतात
translated_text: He helps his lieutenant through a difficult time, but then his problems only get worse.
Justification: The phrase "अडचणी आणखी वाढतात" ( अडचणी आणखी वाढतात) which translates to "problems only get worse" indicates a negative outcome, thus justifying the negative sentiment.

Text: मुलींच्या वसतिगृहात एक मुलगा शिरला असल्याची तक्रार प्राप्त झाल्याचे सांगितले जाते आणि त्यानंतर रश्मीला अटक केली जाते
translated_text: It is said that a complaint was received that a boy had entered the girls' hostel and Rashmi was subsequently arrested.
Justification: The negative sentiment and anger are driven by the phrase "अटक केली जाते" (atak keli jaate), meaning "arrested," indicating a negative consequence and potential injustice, sparking anger.

Text: प्रस्ताव नाकारण्याव्यतिरिक्त ती काय करते हे आम्हाला कधीच सांगितले जात नाही
translated_text: We are never told what she does other than reject the proposal.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) stems from the Marathi word "नाकारण्या" (nakarannya), which translates to "rejecting." This explicitly indicates a negative action, hence the negative sentiment.

Text: कथा कदाचित मंद गतीने चालत असल्याचे दिसते
translated_text: The story may seem to be moving at a slow pace.
Justification: "मंद गतीने" (manda gatine) translates to "slow pace". This indicates a negative sentiment as the story's pacing is described as slow, leading to potential boredom or dissatisfaction.

Text: मात्र ती सिनेमाचा जरा बरा असलेला ‘टेम्पो’ बिघडवण्याचेच काम करतात
translated_text: However, they only serve to spoil the film's somewhat good 'tempo'.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the word "बिघडवण्याचे" (bighadvanyache), meaning "to spoil," which indicates a negative action.

Text: तथापि, युंटमला त्याच्या वेळेचा फटका बसला आहे कारण गेल्या काही वर्षांमध्ये अशाच धर्तीवर अनेक मराठी चित्रपट आले आहेत.
translated_text: However, Yuntam has suffered the brunt of its time as many Marathi films have come out on similar lines in the last few years.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily driven by the phrase "वेळेचा फटका बसला आहे" (velecha fatka basla aahe), which translates to "suffered the brunt of its time" implying a negative impact or disadvantage.

Text: हळूहळू शिवावर प्रेम करू लागले आस्थाला शिवाची काळजी असते
translated_text: Gradually, she started loving Shiva. Aastha is worried about Shiva.
Justification: The phrase "काळजी असते" (kalji aste) implying worry, contributes to the negative sentiment.

Text: कथेच्या दृष्टीने पाहायला गेलं तर चित्रपटाच्या पूर्वार्धात तोचतोचपणा दिसून येतो
translated_text: From a story perspective, the first half of the film is quite similar.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the word "तोचतोचपणा" (tochtochpana), which translates to "similar" or "repetitive" and implies a lack of originality or freshness, leading to a negative assessment of the film's first half.

Text: अपघातात मीरा आपलं बाळ गमावते
translated_text: Meera loses her baby in an accident.
Justification: The negative sentiment and sadness are primarily driven by the phrase "बाळ गमावते" (baal gamavate), meaning "loses her baby," which expresses a significant loss and evokes sadness.

Text: काही अनावश्यक गाण्यांमुळे त्याचा टेम्पोही जातो
translated_text: Some unnecessary songs also take away its tempo.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is driven by the word "अनावश्यक" (anavashyak), meaning "unnecessary". This indicates a negative evaluation of the songs, leading to the overall negative sentiment.

Text: वडिलांच्या भीतीने वाचीने तिची स्कूलबॅग चिखलात लपवून ठेवली
translated_text: Fearing her father, Vachi hid her schoolbag in the mud.
Justification: "भीतीने" (bheetine), meaning "fearing," indicates negative sentiment. The act of hiding the schoolbag in "चिखलात" (chikhalat), meaning mud, specifically evokes disgust.

Text: दुर्दैवाने, चित्रपट फक्त त्याच पातळीवर काम करतो
translated_text: Unfortunately, the film only works at that level.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the word "दुर्दैवाने" (durdavane), which translates to "Unfortunately." This word inherently expresses a negative perspective or regret about the situation.

Text: जन्म देताना तिची आई मरण पावल्याने कुटुंबावर दुर्दैव आणल्याचा ठपका जानीवर ठेवला जातो आणि सातव्या वाढदिवशी वडिलांचा अपघाती मृत्यू झाला.
translated_text: Jani is blamed for bringing bad luck to the family as her mother dies during childbirth, and her father dies in an accident on her seventh birthday.
Justification: The negative sentiment and sadness are driven by the phrase "दुर्दैव आणल्याचा ठपका" (durdaiiv aanlyacha thapka), which translates to "blamed for bringing bad luck," indicating a negative attribution of misfortune to Jani. This phrase directly contributes to the negative sentiment and evokes sadness.

Text: खरं तर, ती तिच्या आवाजात स्वत: ची दया आणि असहायतेने स्वत: ला मद्यपी घोषित करते
translated_text: In fact, she declares herself an alcoholic with self-pity and helplessness in her voice.
Justification: The phrase "स्वत: ची दया आणि असहायतेने" (self-pity and helplessness) indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: पण संपूर्ण उत्तरार्ध, जो कोकणातल्या घरात होतो, त्यापेक्षा जास्त काळ टिकतो
translated_text: But the entire second half, which takes place in a house in Konkan, lasts longer than that.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "जास्त काळ टिकतो" (jaast kaal tikto), meaning "lasts longer," implying a negative experience of the second half dragging on.

Text: ते दोघेही एक परिपूर्ण जीवन जगल्याचा दावा करतात आणि विद्यमान उर्वरित वर्षे उद्दिष्टेशिवाय घालवण्याची आणि करदात्याच्या कष्टाने कमावलेले पैसे त्यांच्या पेन्शनसाठी वापरण्याची त्यांची इच्छा नाही.
translated_text: They both claim to have lived a fulfilling life and have no desire to spend the remaining years of their existence aimlessly and use taxpayers' hard-earned money for their pensions.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "उद्देश्येशिवाय घालवण्याची" (uddheshyashivay ghalavnyachi), meaning "to spend aimlessly," implying a lack of purpose and potential wastefulness, which is viewed negatively in this context.

Text: बाबा, दुसरा त्रासलेला, एका तात्पुरत्या झोपडीत हात-तोंडाचे जीवन जगतो
translated_text: Dad, another sufferer, lives hand-to-mouth in a makeshift hut
Justification: "त्रासलेला" (traslela), meaning "sufferer," directly contributes to the negative sentiment.

Text: ‘पैसा ये पैसा’ ‘मुंगळा’ ‘रिक्रिएशन’ करून प्रेक्षकांच्या माथी मारली जातात
translated_text: They are hitting the audience with 'Paisa Ye Paisa', 'Mungala' and 'Recreation'.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "माथी मारली जातात" (maathi maarli jaataat), meaning "are hitting [them] with," which implies forceful and unwanted imposition, despite the presumably joyful nature of the elements being imposed (songs/recreation).

Text: भूतकाळात बरेच काही घडून गेलेले असते ज्यामुळे प्रेमविवाह करूनदेखील गिरीश आणि विद्यामध्ये आता दुरावा आलेला असतो
translated_text: A lot has happened in the past that has caused a rift between Girish and Vidya, despite their love marriage.
Justification: The phrase "दुरावा आलेला असतो" (duraava aalela asto) which translates to "a rift has occurred" indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: कल्पेशराज कुबल काही अपवाद वगळल्यास ग्रामीण भागातील सरकारी आणि संस्थांच्या शाळांची गुणवत्ता किंबहुना अवस्था तितकीशी समाधानकारक नाही हे आपण जाणतो
translated_text: Kalpeshraj Kubal We know that with a few exceptions, the quality and even the condition of government and institutional schools in rural areas is not that satisfactory.
Justification: The phrase "तितकीशी समाधानकारक नाही" (titakishi samadhanakarak nahi), meaning "not that satisfactory," indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: पण काही वेळा, त्याच्या आवाजाचा टोन नैसर्गिक वाटत नाही तर इतर दृश्यांमध्ये, तो खूप प्रयत्न करतो असे दिसते
translated_text: But at times, his tone of voice doesn't seem natural, while in other scenes, he seems to be trying too hard.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "खूप प्रयत्न करतो असे दिसते" (khoop prayatna karto ase disate), which translates to "seems to be trying too hard," indicating a lack of naturalness and an unfavorable performance.

Text: प्रेम नकार आणि त्या दरम्यानचे जीवन… चित्रपटात गहन होण्याची आशा आहे परंतु पदार्थांचा अभाव आहे
translated_text: Love rejection and the life in between… The film hopes to be profound but lacks substance
Justification: "अभाव" (abhav - lack) indicates a negative sentiment as it suggests the film is missing something important, contributing to the overall negative assessment.

Text: जेव्हा ते भेटतात आणि मैत्री बनवतात तेव्हा त्यांना समजते की ते दोघेही एक प्रकारचे आघात सहन करत आहेत जे ते उर्वरित जगापासून लपवत आहेत.
translated_text: When they meet and form a friendship, they realize that they are both suffering from some kind of trauma that they are hiding from the rest of the world.
Justification: The negative sentiment is derived from the phrase "आघात सहन करत आहेत" (aaghat sahan karat aahet), meaning "suffering from trauma." This indicates a negative experience.

Text: अरविंद त्याच्या कूकशी प्रेम-द्वेषाचे नाते सामायिक करतो (किशोर कदम यांनी भूमिका केली होती), कारण अरविंद डॉक्टरांच्या सूचनेनुसार त्याच्या रोट्यांवर लोणी घालण्यास नकार देतो
translated_text: Arvind shares a love-hate relationship with his cook (played by Kishore Kadam), as Arvind refuses to put butter on his rotis as per the doctor's instructions.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "प्रेम-द्वेषाचे नाते" (prem-dweshache naate), which translates to "love-hate relationship," indicating a complex and inherently negative dynamic. While not purely negative, the inclusion of "द्वेष" (dwesh - hate) contributes to the overall negative sentiment, and the emotion "disgust" aligns with the conflict.

Text: अर्थात गोष्टी गुळगुळीत आणि रेशमी होणार नाहीत आणि जेव्हा एखाद्या फसवणूकीच्या व्यावसायिकाने धनाजी सिद्धार्थ जाधव यांना मकरंडच्या कार्याची अत्यंत अखंडता धोक्यात आणणारी एखादी गोष्ट कबूल केली तेव्हा हे कुटुंब एक मोठा अडथळा आणते.
translated_text: Of course things won't be smooth and silky, and the family faces a major obstacle when a fraudulent businessman confesses something to Dhanaji Siddharth Jadhav that threatens the very integrity of Makarand's work.
Justification: The negative sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "फसवणूकीच्या व्यावसायिकाने" (fasavanukichya vyavasaayikaane), which translates to "fraudulent businessman." This term introduces the element of deception and potential harm, contributing to the negative sentiment. While "अडथळा" (adthala - obstacle) also contributes, the "fraudulent businessman" is the stronger indicator.

Text: तथापि, संपन्नता केवळ तथाकथित उच्च जातींपुरती मर्यादित होती, म्हणजे ब्राह्मण, ज्यांचे पेशवे होते.
translated_text: However, the affluence was limited to the so-called upper castes, namely the Brahmins, who had Peshwas.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "तथाकथित उच्च जातींपुरती मर्यादित होती" (tathakathit uchcha jatimpurti maryadit hoti), which translates to "limited to the so-called upper castes." This implies exclusivity and social inequality, leading to a negative perception.

Text: तेथेही चित्रपटाने भ्रमनिरास केला आहे
translated_text: The film has disappointed there too.
Justification: "भ्रमनिरास केला" (bhramniraas kela) which translates to "disappointed" is a clear indicator of a negative sentiment and contributes to the feeling of sadness.

Text: तुम्ही नागरगोजे यांच्या पद्धतींवरही प्रश्नचिन्ह उपस्थित करत आहात, ज्या दूरगामी दिसतात
translated_text: You are also questioning Nagargoje's methods, which seem far-fetched.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to "प्रश्नचिन्ह उपस्थित करत आहात" (prashnachinha upasthit karat aahat), which translates to "questioning," indicating doubt and a negative stance.

Text: जेव्हा दहशतवाद्यांना हे समजले की ही एक चुकीची ओळख आहे जेव्हा ते तिला परत पाठविण्याचा प्रयत्न करतात परंतु ते त्यांच्या विचारांपेक्षा अधिक आव्हानात्मक असल्याचे सिद्ध होते
translated_text: When the terrorists realize it's a mistaken identity they try to send her back but it proves to be more challenging than they thought.
Justification: The sentence expresses a negative sentiment due to the presence of the word "दहशतवाद्यांना" (dahashatavadyanna), meaning "terrorists," which inherently carries a negative connotation.

Text: त्यात एका व्यक्तीला विनाकारण आपले प्राण गमवावे लागतात
translated_text: In it, one person has to lose their life for no reason.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily driven by the phrase "प्राण गमवावे लागतात" (praan gamavaave lagtaat), meaning "have to lose their life," which expresses a negative outcome, especially compounded by "विनाकारण" (vinaakaran), meaning "for no reason".

Text: सी.जी.आय गिधाड वापरणे, मृत्यूचे प्रतिनिधित्व करणे, अनावश्यक वाटले
translated_text: Using a CGI vulture, to represent death, felt unnecessary.
Justification: "अनावश्यक वाटले" (anawashyak watale), meaning "felt unnecessary," expresses a negative feeling and contributes to the overall disgust emotion.

Text: मात्र अनुराग मागच्या गोष्टी विसरलेला नाहीय
translated_text: But Anurag hasn't forgotten the past.
Justification: The phrase "विसरलेला नाहीय" (visarlela nahiye), meaning "hasn't forgotten," indicates a focus on the past and a lack of resolution, contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: रघूमध्ये नेमके काय बदल होतात विष्णू आणि रघू यांच्यातील वैर कोणत्या टोकाला जाते हे पाहणे काहीसे मनोरंजक असले तरी पटकथेच्या तथ्यहीन विस्तारामुळे ते कंटाळवाणे वाटते
translated_text: What exactly changes in Raghu? Although it is somewhat interesting to see to what extent the enmity between Vishnu and Raghu goes, it feels boring due to the factless expansion of the script.
Justification: The phrase "कंटाळवाणे वाटते" (kantalwane vaatte) which translates to "it feels boring," is the primary reason for the negative sentiment.

Text: बबलू आणि मुन्नी एकमेकांना मिठी मारताना पाहिल्यावर त्याच्या संशयाला पुष्टी मिळाली आणि तो चिडला
translated_text: His suspicions were confirmed when he saw Bablu and Munni hugging each other and he became angry.
Justification: The phrase "तो चिडला" (to chidla), meaning "he became angry," directly indicates a negative sentiment and the emotion of anger.

Text: एक प्रकारे मानवी मर्यादा अधोरेखित करणाराच हा प्रसंग आहे आणि म्हणूनच त्यात प्रचंड नाट्य भरलेलं आहे पण त्या नाट्याचा उपयोग करून पाहणाऱ्याला भयकंपित करणारा परिणाम साधण्यात सिनेमा काहीसा कमी पडलाय
translated_text: In a way, this is an incident that highlights human limitations, and that is why it is filled with immense drama, but the film falls somewhat short in using that drama to achieve a terrifying effect on the viewer.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by "कमी पडलाय" (kami padlaay), meaning "falls somewhat short," indicating a lack of success in achieving the desired effect.

Text: ती प्रत्येक व्यक्तिरेखा सिनेमात अधोरेखित करताना मूळ व्यक्तिरेखेवरील आपले लक्ष विचलित होते
translated_text: While underlining each character in the movie, our focus is distracted from the original character.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is driven by "लक्ष विचलित होते" (laksh vichalit hote), which translates to "focus is distracted." This indicates a negative impact on the viewing experience.

Text: पण जी निरागसता आणि भावनिकता पहिल्या सिनेमाच्या लेखनात होती ती यावेळच्या गोष्टीत जाणवत नाही
translated_text: But the innocence and emotionality that was in the writing of the first film is not felt in this one.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "जाणवत नाही" (jaanavat nahi), meaning "not felt," indicating a lack of the positive qualities present in the first film.

Text: बाकी चित्रपट निराशादायक आहे
translated_text: The rest of the movie is disappointing.
Justification: "निराशादायक" (nirashadayak) meaning "disappointing" directly indicates a negative sentiment and contributes to the emotion of sadness.

Text: अगदी बॉलीवूड कॉलेजच्या सामान्य नाटकांसाठीही कथानक कालबाह्य झालेल्या क्लिचने भरलेले आहे.
translated_text: The plot is full of outdated clichés, even for typical Bollywood college dramas.
Justification: "कालबाह्य झालेल्या क्लिचने भरलेले आहे" (kalabahya zalelya clichéne bharale aahe) indicates that the plot is full of outdated clichés, which directly contributes to the negative sentiment.

Text: फुटबॉलमुळे नवरा कायमचा लंगडा झाला आहे, घरी परिस्थिती अंत्यत बेताची आहे, त्यामुळे ती फुटबॉलचा तिरस्कार करते
translated_text: Her husband has become permanently lame because of football, the situation at home is hopeless, so she hates football.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "कायमचा लंगडा झाला आहे" (kayamcha langda zhala aahe) which translates to "has become permanently lame". This indicates a significant and lasting negative impact on her husband's life.

Text: असा चरित्रपट एकसुरी किंवा कंटाळवाणा होण्याची शक्यता असते
translated_text: Such a biography is likely to become monotonous or boring.
Justification: The phrase "कंटाळवाणा होण्याची शक्यता असते" (kantaalwana honyachi shakya aste) meaning "likely to become boring" indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: कलंकित जमीन विकत घेणारा उच्चवर्णीय जमीन मालक आणि चर्च या दोघांनाही जे हवे आहे ते आहे, सामान्य माणसांना त्यांचे नशीब भोगावे लागत आहे.
translated_text: Both the upper-caste landowners who buy tainted land and the church want what they want, while ordinary people suffer their fate.
Justification: "कलंकित जमीन" (tainted land) implies negativity and exploitation, contributing to the negative sentiment. The phrase suggests unethical or corrupt dealings.

Text: मात्र नंतर पश्चातापाची वेळ येऊ शकते असा हा मामला आहे
translated_text: But this is a case where you may regret it later.
Justification: The word "पश्चातापाची" (pashchatapachi), meaning "of regret," indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: पण मूळ कथानकातच दम नसल्यामुळे सिनेमा फारसा परिणामकारक होत नाही
translated_text: But the movie is not very effective because the original plot lacks substance.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "दम नसल्यामुळे" (dam naslyamule), meaning "lacks substance/strength," which indicates a weakness in the plot. This directly contributes to the negative evaluation of the movie's effectiveness.

Text: अप्रतिम संगीत लांबी वाढवते
translated_text: Wonderful music lengthens the length
Justification: The sentiment is negative despite the presence of "अप्रतिम" (apratim - wonderful/excellent), because the phrase "लांबी वाढवते" (lambi vadhavte - lengthens the length) indicates repetition or dragging on, implying boredom or frustration, overriding the positive "अप्रतिम." Therefore, the repetition is ultimately seen as negative. The emotion is joy because the music is "wonderful".

Text: जर, तिने प्रोफेसरला मारून बदला घेतला, तर तिचे आयुष्य उद्ध्वस्त होईल
translated_text: If she takes revenge by killing the professor, her life will be ruined.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "आयुष्य उद्ध्वस्त होईल" (aayushya uddhwast hoil), meaning "life will be ruined," indicating a detrimental outcome.

Text: शंभर कैद्यांचा कर्दनकाळ असलेली ही अधिकारी दोघातिघांचा प्रतिकार करू शकत नाही हे शंका निर्माण करते
translated_text: It raises doubts that this officer, who has a prison term of one hundred prisoners, cannot resist the double threat.
Justification: The negative sentiment and disgust emotion are primarily driven by the phrase "कर्दनकाळ" (kardankaal), which translates to "a deadly threat/scourge." This word evokes a strong feeling of fear and revulsion, contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: जर यान गावावर कोसळलं तर संपूर्ण गाव बेचिराख होईल हे कळताच गावात हाहाकार माजतो
translated_text: The village is in chaos after learning that if the spacecraft crashes into the village, the entire village will be reduced to ashes.
Justification: The phrase "बेचिराख होईल" (bechirakh hoil - reduced to ashes) indicates a highly negative outcome, contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: कोर्टरूममध्ये अभय रक्ताने माखलेल्या एका माणसाला भेटतो, ज्याची निर्घृण हत्या करण्यात आली आहे
translated_text: In the courtroom, Abhay encounters a bloodied man who has been brutally murdered.
Justification: "निर्घृण हत्या" (nirghrun hatya - brutal murder) indicates a negative sentiment and evokes disgust due to its description of a violent and gruesome act.

Text: जर हे टाळलं असतं तर चित्रपटाची गती कायम राखता आली असती
translated_text: If this had been avoided, the film's momentum could have been maintained.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is due to "टाळलं असतं" (taalala asata), meaning "had been avoided," implying that something negative happened that impacted the film's pacing negatively. While not overtly emotional, the sentence expresses regret about a past action and its negative consequence on the film.

Text: बरं हा ट्रॅक तेवढ्यावरचं न थांबता समीर आणि नुपूरची कॉमन मैत्रीण त्यांचं संभाषण ऐकते काय आणि लगेचच तिलाही आपलं नुपूरवर प्रेम असल्याचा साक्षात्कार होतो काय, सगळा ‘आनंदी आनंद गडे’ प्रकार सुरु होतो
translated_text: Well, the track doesn't stop there, Sameer and Nupur's common friend overhears their conversation and immediately realizes that she too is in love with Nupur, the whole 'happy, happy, happy' thing begins.
Justification: The phrase "आनंदी आनंद गडे" (anandi anand gade), while literally translating to "happy, happy, happy," is used sarcastically in this context. This sarcastic usage indicates a level of dissatisfaction or negativity with the unfolding events, justifying the negative sentiment.

Text: बेडवर तिची आई असते, पण ती जिवंत नाही
translated_text: Her mother is on the bed, but she is not alive.
Justification: The phrase "जिवंत नाही" (jivant nahi), meaning "not alive," directly indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: कथाविषय म्हणून हा धागा कालसुसंगत आणि महत्त्वाचा असला तरी यातील पात्रांची खोली नायक खलनायक नायकाची पार्श्वभूमीची पटकथेतील जागा या बाबत सुसंगती नसल्याने तो अत्यंत कमकुवत बनला आहे
translated_text: Although this thread is timely and important as a story theme, it is extremely weak due to the lack of depth of the characters, the hero, the villain, and the hero's background, and their place in the script.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "अत्यंत कमकुवत बनला आहे" (atyant kamkuvat banla aahe), meaning "extremely weak," which expresses a critical assessment of the story.

Text: किंबहुना, दोघांमधील वैमनस्य एवढ्या प्रमाणात वाढले आहे की दोन गटांमध्ये सर्वांगीण युद्ध होण्याचा धोका आहे.
translated_text: In fact, the hostility between the two has grown to such an extent that there is a risk of all-out war between the two groups.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the Marathi word "वैमनस्य" (vaimanasya), which translates to "hostility." This word indicates a negative relationship and is central to the negative sentiment of the sentence.

Text: अपेक्षित प्रभाव पाडण्यात लेखन कमी पडते आणि ते पडद्यावर सरासरी चित्रपटात रूपांतरित होते
translated_text: The writing falls short of making the desired impact and it translates into an average film on screen.
Justification: "कमी पडते" (kami padte) meaning "falls short" indicates a lack of desired quality, contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: बागी सिनेमाच्या शृंखलेतील यंदाचा बागी   हा सिनेमा कथारुपी अत्यंत कमजोर आहे
translated_text: This year's Baaghi movie in the Baaghi series is very weak in terms of plot.
Justification: The phrase "कथारुपी अत्यंत कमजोर" (katharupi atyant kamzor) meaning "very weak in terms of plot" indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: त्यामुळे संकलकाने थोडी अधिक कात्री सिनेमाला लावायला हवी होती
translated_text: Therefore, the compiler should have applied a little more discipline to the movie.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "कात्री लावायला हवी होती" (katri lavayla havi hoti), meaning "should have applied discipline/scissors," implying the movie was too long or needed cuts, thus indicating a negative view of its quality.

Text: प्रत्येक विद्यार्थ्याला शिक्षण मिळावे यासाठी अनेक योजना आखल्या गेल्या असल्या तरी त्या शिक्षणाचा दर्जा गुणवत्तेकडे मात्र दुर्लक्ष केले जाते
translated_text: Although many schemes have been devised to ensure that every student gets an education, the quality of that education is often neglected.
Justification: The phrase "दर्लक्ष केले जाते" (durlaksh kele jaate), meaning "is neglected," indicates a negative sentiment as it highlights a deficiency in the quality of education despite efforts to make it accessible.

Text: वाहिदच्या त्रासावर हेमोलिम्फचा भर आरोपीच्या कुटुंबाच्या आणि त्यांच्या दुःखांच्या चित्रणामुळे आच्छादित आहे, पीडितेच्या तुलनेत त्यांची दुर्दशा अधिक लक्षणीय आहे हे सूचित करते.
translated_text: Hemolymph's emphasis on Wahid's suffering is overshadowed by the depiction of the accused's family and their suffering, suggesting that their plight is more significant than that of the victim.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is driven by the phrase "त्रासावर हेमोलिम्फचा भर आरोपीच्या कुटुंबाच्या आणि त्यांच्या दुःखांच्या चित्रणामुळे आच्छादित आहे," meaning "Hemolymph's emphasis on Wahid's suffering is overshadowed by the depiction of the accused's family and their suffering." This indicates an imbalance and downplaying of the victim's suffering.

Text: चांगल्या कळस आणि कुरकुरीत संपादनासह हे आणखी चांगले होते
translated_text: It gets even better with a good climax and crisp editing.
Justification: The sentiment is incorrectly assigned. The phrase "चांगल्या कळस" (changlya kalas) meaning "good climax" and "कुरकुरीत संपादन" (kurkurit sampadan) meaning "crisp editing" indicate a positive experience, not a negative one. A more appropriate sentiment would be positive (1) with the emotion of joy or satisfaction.

Text: सहपोलीस आयुक्त रावसाहेब आणि त्यांच्या टीमच्या लक्षात आले की राजकारण्याला हनी ट्रॅप करण्यात आले होते आणि त्याच्या खोलीतील घडामोडी एका स्पाय कॅमेराने रेकॉर्ड केल्या होत्या, जो गायब आहे.
translated_text: Joint Police Commissioner Raosaheb and his team realized that the politician had been honey-trapped and the happenings in his room were recorded by a spy camera, which has gone missing.
Justification: The sentence is negative due to the phrase "हनी ट्रॅप करण्यात आले होते" (honey-trapped), which indicates a deceitful and compromising situation.

Text: पण प्रत्यक्ष सिनेमाची पटकथा या संवादापासून फारकत घेते
translated_text: But the actual movie script deviates from this dialogue.
Justification: "फारकत घेते" (pharakat ghete - deviates) indicates a departure or separation from something, implying a negative deviation from the expected or desired course, hence the negative sentiment.

Text: भास्कर एकदिवस मुन्नी आणि बबलूला रंगेहाथ पकडतो आणि बबलूला आता धडा शिकवायचाच हा विडा उचलतो
translated_text: One day, Bhaskar catches Munni and Bablu red-handed and decides to teach Bablu a lesson.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily driven by the phrase "धडा शिकवायचाच हा विडा उचलतो" (dhada shikavaychaach ha vida uchalato), which implies a vow to punish or teach someone a lesson, carrying a negative connotation of retribution.

Text: साटमची मोठी मुलगी रुजुता हे दृश्य पाहते पण भीतीपोटी ती तिच्या वडिलांविरुद्ध साक्ष देत नाही
translated_text: Satam's eldest daughter Rujuta sees this scene but out of fear, she does not testify against her father.
Justification: The sentence has a negative sentiment because Rujuta doesn't testify against her father out of "भीतीपोटी" (bhītipōṭī), which means "out of fear." Fear indicates a negative situation.

Text: शिंदे पुन्हा एकदा रुळले आहेत
translated_text: Shinde has once again fallen into disrepute.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily driven by the phrase "रुळले आहेत" (rulale aahet), which in this context implies falling into disrepute or engaging in undesirable behavior again.

Text: सिनेमात अनुराग कश्यपने साकारलेली इन्स्पेक्टर बदलानी ही भूमिका लेखकदिग्दर्शकाला आणखी अधिक खुलवता आली असती
translated_text: The writer-director could have expanded the role of Inspector Badlani, played by Anurag Kashyap in the film, even more.
Justification: The sentiment is negative (-1) due to the phrase "आणखी अधिक खुलवता आली असती" (aankhi adhik khulavata aali asti), which implies the role wasn't fully developed or realized, suggesting a deficiency in the film.

Text: दोन वर्षांपासून कोरोनानं तर मनोरंजन क्षेत्राचे कंबरडे मोडले आहे
translated_text: For two years, Corona has broken the back of the entertainment industry.
Justification: "कंबरडे मोडले आहे" (kambarde modle aahe - broken the back) indicates a severe negative impact, justifying the negative sentiment.

Text: पिहूच्या आईच्या शरिरावर जखमाही आहेत
translated_text: Pihu's mother also has injuries on her body.
Justification: The negative sentiment and sadness are primarily driven by the phrase "जखमाही आहेत" (jakhami aahet), meaning "also has injuries," indicating physical harm and distress.

Text: हे अखेरीस कालबाह्य आणि जागेच्या बाहेर जाणवते
translated_text: It eventually feels outdated and out of place.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily driven by the Marathi word "कालबाह्य" (kaalabahya), which translates to "outdated." This word inherently carries a negative connotation of being irrelevant or obsolete.

Text: कसं हुईन जी अशानं झाडीपट्टीले वाईट दिवस येऊन बंद पडन ना
translated_text: How come the bad day comes and closes down?
Justification: The phrase "वाईट दिवस" (waiṭ divas), meaning "bad day," indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: इथे या मुलांप्रति उमटणारी नकारात्मकता ही ठोकळेबाज शिक्षणपद्धती मानणाऱ्यांकडून आलेली आहे
translated_text: The negativity towards these children here comes from those who believe in a rigid education system.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the word "नकारात्मकता" (nakaratmakta), which means negativity.

Text: शेवट माहीत असलेली गोष्ट सांगणे अवघड असते
translated_text: It's hard to tell what you know for sure.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily driven by the word "अवघड" (avakhad), which translates to "difficult" or "hard." This indicates a negative or challenging aspect to the action described.

Text: सामना जिंकल्यानंतर, मधूला खूप दुखावले जाते जेव्हा भेट देणार्या इंग्रजी-माध्यमातील हरलेल्यांनी तिच्या शाळेला कोणतीही सुविधा नसलेली तुटलेली, कोसळलेली इमारत म्हटले.
translated_text: After winning the match, Madhu is deeply hurt when the visiting English-medium losers call her school a broken, dilapidated building with no facilities.
Justification: "खूप दुखावले जाते" (khup dukhavale jaate) meaning "deeply hurt" clearly indicates a negative sentiment and evokes sadness as the core emotion.

Text: ज्यांचे सर्वात चांगले मित्र नातेसंबंधात आहेत, ज्यांचे आई-वडील सतत लग्नासाठी त्याच्या मागे लागलेले आहेत आणि एक बॉस जो त्याचा तिरस्कार करतो त्याला आपण क्लिच इक्युटेड नर्डी एकटे पाहतो.
translated_text: We see the clichéd nerdy loner whose best friends are in relationships, whose parents are constantly after him for marriage, and a boss who hates him.
Justification: "तिरस्कार करतो" (tirasakar karato) translates to "hates," indicating strong negative sentiment and contributing to the feeling of disgust.

Text: तर, आमच्याकडे कोणत्याही मूळ प्लॉटशिवाय अनेक सबप्लॉट आहेत
translated_text: So, we have many subplots without any main plot.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "कोणत्याही मूळ प्लॉटशिवाय" (konatyahi mul plotshivay) which translates to "without any main plot," indicating a lack of foundation or central focus, creating a negative impression.

Text: सरकारी यंत्रणांमधील गैरमार्ग सत्ता व पैशांसाठी नागरिकांना लुबाडण्याचे प्रकार आणि त्याच वेळी काही गूढ अद्भुत गोष्टी अशा दोन टोकांच्या गोष्टी ओढूनताणून एकत्र आणल्यासारख्या वाटतात
translated_text: It seems like a juxtaposition of two extremes: the corruption in government agencies, the way citizens are exploited for power and money, and at the same time, some mysterious and wonderful things.
Justification: The negative sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "नागरिकांना लुबाडण्याचे प्रकार" (nagarikanna lubadnyache prakar), which translates to "the act of looting/exploiting citizens," indicating corruption and mistreatment.

Text: सिनेमा चकचकीत झाला असला तरी तो त्याचा अंतिम परिणाम साधण्यास यशस्वी ठरलेला नाही
translated_text: Although the movie was a hit, it failed to achieve its final result.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "यशस्वी ठरलेला नाही" (yashasvi tharalela nahi), which means "failed to achieve". This indicates a lack of success and contributes to the negative sentiment.

Text: परंतु ती भूमिका लिहिण्यात लेखक कमी पडली असल्यामुळे त्या भूमिकेचा मर्यादित प्रभाव जाणवतो
translated_text: But because the author failed to write that role, the role's impact is limited.
Justification: The sentiment is negative because the phrase "कमी पडली असल्यामुळे" (kami padli aslyamule), meaning "failed," indicates a shortcoming or deficiency in the author's writing.

Text: दुसऱ्या सहामाहीत दुबईमधील एक महत्त्वाची घटना देखील आहे जी पूर्णपणे खात्रीशीर नाही
translated_text: There is also a key event in Dubai in the second half that is not entirely certain.
Justification: The phrase "खात्रीशीर नाही" (khatrishir nahi), meaning "not certain", indicates uncertainty, contributing to the negative sentiment of -1.

Text: ती गेली की संथ पाण्यात कुणी दगड मारावा अन् शांतता भंग व्हावी असं होऊन जातं
translated_text: When she leaves, it feels like someone is throwing a stone into the still water and disturbing the peace.
Justification: The phrase "शांतता भंग व्हावी" (shantata bhang vhavi), meaning "peace is disturbed," indicates a negative sentiment as it describes a disruption and loss of tranquility.

Text: प्रेक्षकांना कथेत लगेच गुंतवतो, मात्र उत्तरार्धात कथेची ही पकड सैल होताना दिसते
translated_text: The audience is immediately involved in the story, but the story's grip seems to loosen in the latter half.
Justification: "सैल होताना दिसते" indicates a weakening or loosening, implying a negative shift in the story's quality and thus a negative sentiment.

Text: मोरादाबादमध्ये स्वत:चा म्युझिक बॅंड तयार करण्याचे स्वप्न पाहणारा किशन (फरहान अख्तर) दुर्दैवाने खून प्रकरणात अडकतो
translated_text: Kishan (Farhan Akhtar), who dreams of forming his own music band in Moradabad, unfortunately gets involved in a murder case.
Justification: "दुर्दैवाने" (durbhagyane) meaning "unfortunately" indicates a negative situation and contributes to the negative sentiment, although the emotion is neutral as the sentence simply states a fact.

Text: (बनावट) वळण येते जेव्हा वसतिगृहाची फी एका रात्रीत दुप्पट केली जाते आणि जे पैसे खोकत नाहीत त्यांना तेथून जाण्यास सांगितले जाते.
translated_text: The (fake) twist comes when hostel fees are doubled in one night and those who don't cough up the money are asked to leave.
Justification: The negative sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "बनावट वळण" (banavat valan), which translates to "fake twist" or "artificial twist." This suggests a deceptive or negative development. While the rest of the sentence describes a negative situation, "बनावट वळण" directly implies a negative intention or action, thus contributing most strongly to the negative sentiment.

Text: दिग्दर्शकाच्या हातात विजय राज आणि टिनू आनंद सारखे सशक्त अभिनेते असतानाही त्यांच्या अभिनयकौशल्याला साजेसं काम दिग्दर्शकाला त्यांच्याकडून करून घेता आलेलं नाही
translated_text: Even though the director had strong actors like Vijay Raj and Tinu Anand in his hands, the director was unable to get a performance from them that matched their acting skills.
Justification: The sentence expresses disappointment and criticism towards the director. The phrase "साजेसं काम दिग्दर्शकाला त्यांच्याकडून करून घेता आलेलं नाही" (sajesam kaam digdarshakala tyanchyakadun karun gheta aalel nahi) meaning "the director was unable to get a performance from them that matched [their acting skills]," indicates a failure or lack of positive outcome, thus driving the negative sentiment.

Text: त्यामुळे तिची व्यक्तिरेखा तेवढय़ापुरतीच मर्यादित राहते
translated_text: Therefore, her character remains limited to that.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by "मर्यादित राहते" (maryadit rahate), which implies a limitation or restriction, indicating a negative aspect of the character's development.

Text: हिंदूमुस्लिम वाद त्यावेळी चिघळला होता
translated_text: The Hindu-Muslim conflict was raging at that time.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the word "चिघळला" (chighlala), which implies that the conflict was escalating and becoming worse.

Text: दत्तबा, ज्याची अंतिम इच्छा पूर्ण झाली नाही तोपर्यंत सर्व काही ठीक आहे, तो संत्याला त्रास देऊ लागला.
translated_text: Dattaba, who is fine until his final wish is fulfilled, starts harassing Santya.
Justification: The negative sentiment and disgust emotion are driven by the phrase "त्रास देऊ लागला" (tras deu lagla), which means "starts harassing." This indicates a negative action causing the negative sentiment.

Text: राजकारणातील वैरामुळे ‘डॅडीं’ना अडकवण्याचा किंबहुना मारण्याचा प्रयत्न त्यांचे राजकीय शत्रू करत आहेत
translated_text: Due to political animosity, their political enemies are trying to trap and even kill the 'daddies'.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "मारण्याचा प्रयत्न" (maranyacha prayatna), which means "attempt to kill," expressing violence and hostility.

Text: सगळ्यात जवळच्या या नात्यांमधली अंतरे वाढत चालली आहेत, या वास्तवाकडे काणाडोळा करता येणे शक्यच नाही, इतक्या वेगाने हा प्रॉब्लेम घराघरांत वाढत चालला आहे
translated_text: The distances between these closest relationships are increasing, it is impossible to ignore this reality, this problem is growing so rapidly in households.
Justification: The sentence expresses a negative sentiment due to the phrase "अंतरे वाढत चालली आहेत" (antare vadhat chalali ahet), meaning "distances are increasing," indicating a deterioration in relationships. The phrase “काणाडोळा करता येणे शक्यच नाही” (kanadola karta yene shakya nahi) meaning “it is impossible to ignore” further reinforces the problem's severity and negative impact.

Text: अभिनयाच्या बाबतीत सर्वांनीच गोंधळ घातला आहे
translated_text: Everyone is confused about acting.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "गोंधळ घातला आहे" (gondhal ghatla aahe), which implies confusion and a negative performance or state.

Text: पश्चातापाच्या आगेत होरपळणारी रानी त्याच्याकडे क्षमायाचना करीत राहते त्याचा सगळा रोष सोसते
translated_text: The queen, overcome with remorse, keeps begging him for forgiveness and bears all his wrath.
Justification: "पश्चातापाच्या आगेत होरपळणारी" (overcome with remorse) indicates a negative sentiment due to the suffering and regret expressed.

Text: घटस्फोटासाठी दिलेले कारण शिशिरच्या पात्राशी जुळत नाही
translated_text: The reason given for the divorce does not match Shishir's character.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "जुळत नाही" (juḷat nāhī), which translates to "does not match" or "doesn't align," implying a discrepancy and negative consequence in the context of divorce.

Text: परंतु सुमार अभिनय बेताची पटकथा केवळ चटपटीत भोपाळी संवाद आणि हाती घेतलेल्या विषयात खोलवर जाण्यात लेखकांना आलेले अपयश त्यातून हात चित्रपट वेगळेपणा असतानाही सामान्यच ठरतो
translated_text: But the script, the acting, the quick-witted dialogues, and the writers' failure to delve deeply into the subject matter make the film ordinary despite its uniqueness.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by "अपयश" (apayash), which translates to "failure," indicating a negative aspect of the film.

Text: एका विशिष्ट वर्गाला त्यांची जागा दाखवून देण्यासाठी त्यांच्या मुलींवर, बायकांवर सामुहिक अत्याचार केले जातात, त्यांना मारुन झाडावर लटकवून दिलं जांतं
translated_text: To show a certain class their place, their daughters and wives are subjected to mass atrocities, they are killed and hanged from trees.
Justification: The phrase "सामुहिक अत्याचार केले जातात" (samuhik atyachar kele jatat), meaning "mass atrocities are committed," indicates a strong negative sentiment and evokes disgust due to its description of violence and inhumane acts.

Text: तो काहीसा कोसळतो
translated_text: It collapses a bit.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily due to the word "कोसळतो" (kosalto), which translates to "collapses." This word inherently conveys a sense of destruction or failure, leading to a negative association despite the moderating effect of "काहीसा" (kahisa - a bit). The neutral emotion arises as the sentence describes a state change without expressing strong feelings, only the action of collapsing.

Text: अमितराज आणि मंदार खरे यांचं संगीतही श्रवणीय आहे परंतु चित्रपट दिग्दर्शकीय श्रेणीत गोंधळल्यामुळे तो त्याची उंची साध्य करण्यात कमी पडतो
translated_text: The music by Amitraj and Mandar Khare is also listenable but the film falls short of achieving its heights due to the confusion in the directorial ranks.
Justification: The phrase "कमी पडतो" (kami padto), meaning "falls short," indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: एका अपघातानेच या तिघांची गाठ गँगस्टर असलेले राजाभाई सौरभ शुक्ला आणि वायफायभाई अनिल कपूर यांच्याशी पडते
translated_text: By an accident, these three come into contact with gangsters Rajabhai Saurabh Shukla and Wifibhai Anil Kapoor.
Justification: The phrase "एका अपघातानेच" (eka apghatanench), meaning "by an accident," implies an unfortunate or negative event, contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: सायली संजीव आणि सुहृद वर्देकर हे मुख्य कलाकार त्यांच्या एकांकिकेच्या अभिनयाने छाप पाडण्यात अपयशी ठरले.
translated_text: Lead actors Sayali Sanjeev and Suhrud Vardekar failed to impress with their one-act performances.
Justification: The phrase "छाप पाडण्यात अपयशी ठरले" (failed to impress) indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: या चित्रपटाबद्दल एका चांगल्या बिंदूचा उल्लेख करण्यासाठी एखाद्यास कठोरपणे दबाव आणला जाईल
translated_text: One would be hard-pressed to mention a single good point about this film.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is driven by the phrase "कठोरपणे दबाव आणला जाईल" (kathorpane dabav aanla jail), which translates to "hard-pressed" or "would be under severe pressure," indicating a strong lack of positive aspects in the film.

Text: जसे, आपल्याला मानवीच्या सत्यतेविषयी कळते, मनूच्या विचारसरणीमुळे तिला धक्का बसतो, अविश्वास आणि भीती जाणवते, ज्यामुळे त्या मुलीबद्दल अधिक जाणून घेण्यास तो प्रतिबंध होतो
translated_text: As we learn about Manu's truth, Manu's thinking shocks her, causing her to feel distrust and fear, which prevents him from learning more about the girl.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by "अविश्वास आणि भीती जाणवते" (avishwas aani bhiti janavte), meaning "distrust and fear are felt," which clearly indicates a negative emotional state.

Text: हे जातीभेदाचं विष समाजात इतकं पेरलं आहे की, काही भागात याचे भयंकर परिणाम बघायला मिळतात
translated_text: This poison of casteism has been so deeply ingrained in society that in some areas, its terrible consequences are being seen.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "जातीभेदाचं विष" (jātibhēdāch viṣ), meaning "poison of casteism," which evokes a strong sense of disgust and negativity. The word "भयंकर परिणाम" (bhayankar parinam) meaning terrible consequence further reinforces the negative sentiment.

Text: तिचा सर्वोत्तम प्रयत्न करूनही लू प्रेक्षकांना पूर्णपणे भुरळ घालत नाही
translated_text: Despite her best efforts, Lou doesn't completely captivate the audience.
Justification: "भुरळ घालत नाही" (bhurळ ghalat nahi) which translates to "doesn't captivate" indicates a lack of positive reception, thus contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: आता, दिग्दर्शक जोडी चेतन चावडा आणि सागर पाठक यांचा मराठी चित्रपट लग्न मुबारक त्याच मार्गावर चालतो आणि कोणताही प्रभाव पाडत नाही.
translated_text: Now, director duo Chetan Chavda and Sagar Pathak's Marathi film Lagna Mubarak follows the same path and fails to make any impact.
Justification: The phrase "कोणताही प्रभाव पाडत नाही" (konatahi prabhav padat nahi) which translates to "fails to make any impact," indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: ‘शेरनी’ची कथाच एवढी ‘ट्रॅजेडी’वाली आहे की त्यात अॅक्शन श्वास रोखणारी दृश्यं समाविष्ट करता आली असती
translated_text: The story of 'Sherni' is so tragic that it could have included breathtaking action scenes.
Justification: The sentiment is negative and evokes sadness due to the Marathi word "ट्रॅजेडी" (tragedy) used directly in the sentence.

Text: त्या संपूर्ण प्रकरणामागे नक्की कोण होतं त्याची राजकीय बाजू काय होती या वादग्रस्त मुद्द्यांपासून लेखकदिग्दर्शक जाणीवपूर्वक लांब राहिला असं वाटतं
translated_text: It seems that the writer-director deliberately stayed away from the controversial issues of who exactly was behind the whole affair and what was its political side.
Justification: "वादग्रस्त मुद्द्यांपासून लांब राहिला" (stayed away from controversial issues) indicates a negative sentiment as it implies avoidance of something problematic.

Text: दिल बेचारा हा सिनेमा कथारूपी एका प्रेम कहाणीची शोकांतिका आहे
translated_text: The movie Dil Bechara is a tragic love story in the form of a story.
Justification: "शोकांतिका" (shokantika), meaning "tragedy," indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: वयाच्या अवघ्या व्या वर्षी नोव्हेंबर रोजी क्षयरोगानं त्यांचं निधन झालं
translated_text: He died of tuberculosis on November 1, at the age of just 18.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "क्षयरोगानं त्यांचं निधन झालं" (kshayarogana tyanchं nidhan zala), meaning "he died of tuberculosis," which indicates death and suffering.

Text: जगदीशची आई, असहाय्य आणि तणावग्रस्त, तिच्या मुलाने सुरक्षितपणे घरी आणल्यास बकऱ्याचा बळी देण्याची ऑफर देते.
translated_text: Jagdish's mother, helpless and stressed, offers to sacrifice a goat if her son brings her home safely.
Justification: The phrase "असहाय्य आणि तणावग्रस्त" (asahayya aani tanavagrast - helpless and stressed) indicates a negative sentiment due to the mother's distressed state.

Text: या जोडप्याने आपली फसवणूक केल्याचे गावकऱ्यांना समजले आणि त्यांनी त्यांना मारहाण करण्यास सुरुवात केली
translated_text: The villagers realized that the couple had cheated them and started beating them up.
Justification: The phrase "फसवणूक केल्याचे" (fasavnuk kelyache), meaning "cheated," indicates a negative event leading to a negative sentiment.

Text: टक्कल पडणे हे अतिशय नैसर्गिक असले आजच्या जमान्यात काही प्रमाणात ते स्टाइल स्टेटमेंट असले तरीही त्याबद्दलचा न्यूनगंड अनेकांमध्ये असतो
translated_text: Although baldness is very natural and is somewhat of a style statement in today's world, many people still feel inferior about it.
Justification: "न्यूनगंड" (nyunagand) translates to "inferiority complex." This word carries a negative connotation, indicating a feeling of inadequacy or low self-esteem, thus justifying the negative sentiment.

Text: पण भर पार्टीत त्याला समजतं की त्याचं हे परदेशात स्थानिक होण्याचं स्वप्न पूर्ण होणार नाही
translated_text: But at the party, he realizes that his dream of becoming a local in a foreign country will not come true.
Justification: The phrase "स्वप्न पूर्ण होणार नाही" (swapna purna honar nahi) which translates to "dream will not come true" indicates a negative sentiment due to the unrealized aspiration, leading to sadness.

Text: काही कारणास्तव संत्याला तुरुंगवास होतो
translated_text: For some reason, the saint ends up in prison.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to "तुरुंगवास होतो" (turungvas hoto), which translates to "ends up in prison." This phrase strongly suggests a negative situation and misfortune, hence the negative sentiment.

Text: जीवनातील आशा गमावलेल्या व्यक्तीला भूत सोडवण्याच्या कल्पनेचा अतिवापर केला गेला आहे.
translated_text: The idea of ​​exorcising a person who has lost hope in life has been overused.
Justification: The negative sentiment and disgust are primarily driven by the phrase "अतिवापर केला गेला आहे" (ativapar kela gela aahe), which translates to "has been overused." This indicates a strong disapproval and aversion to the concept being discussed.

Text: नातेवाईक नसल्यामुळे त्याच्या त्रासात भर पडते
translated_text: The lack of relatives adds to his suffering.
Justification: The phrase "त्रासात भर पडते" (trasat bhar padte), meaning "adds to his suffering," indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: लहान वयात मृत्यूच्या धोक्याला सामोरे जाणाऱ्या सकारात्मक व्यक्तिरेखेबद्दलच्या कथांना प्रेक्षकांच्या हृदयाला भिडण्याचा प्रचंड वाव आहे.
translated_text: Stories about positive characters facing the threat of death at a young age have enormous potential to touch the hearts of audiences.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "मृत्यूच्या धोक्याला" (mrutyuchya dhokyala), which translates to "threat of death". This phrase introduces a negative element into the sentence, overriding the positive connotations of the character.

Text: सुमारे अडीच तासांच्या ‘अॅनाबेल सेतुपती’मध्ये तापसी मुख्य कथेत दोन तास राहते, परंतु कोणत्याही प्रकारे ती प्रेक्षकांना खुर्चीला खिळवून ठेवू शकत नाही
translated_text: In the nearly two and a half hour long 'Annabelle Sethupathi', Taapsee stays in the main story for two hours, but in no way can she keep the audience glued to their seats.
Justification: The phrase "प्रेक्षकांना खुर्चीला खिळवून ठेवू शकत नाही" (prekshakanna khurchila khilvun thevu shakat nahi - cannot keep the audience glued to their seats) indicates a negative sentiment, as it implies the film fails to engage or captivate the audience.

Text: पण काही गोष्टी अशा घडतात की सासरी तिच्या कामाबाबत समजतं आणि तिच्या नोकरी करण्याला विरोध होतो
translated_text: But some things happen that the mother-in-law understands her work and opposes her from doing her job.
Justification: The phrase "नोकरी करण्याला विरोध होतो" (nokri karanyala virodh hoto), meaning "opposed to doing the job," indicates a negative sentiment as it expresses disagreement and obstruction.

Text: हे सत्य असले तरी तो आताच्या परिस्थितीत भाबडा आशावादच
translated_text: Although this is true, it is a vain optimism in the current situation.
Justification: The phrase "भाबडा आशावादच" (bhabada aashavadach), meaning "vain optimism," indicates a negative sentiment due to the futility and impracticality implied by "भाबडा" (bhabada).

Text: आपल्या कामाप्रती महत्त्वाकांक्षी असलेल्या नंदिनीच्या आयुष्यात मात्र सगळं काही आलबेल नसतं
translated_text: However, not everything is smooth sailing in Nandini's life, who is ambitious about her work.
Justification: The phrase "आलबेल नसतं" (aalbel nasata) which means "not smooth sailing" or "not alright" indicates a negative situation, hence the negative sentiment.

Text: परंतु पूर्वीच्या मोठ्या भावाला तिचा हा निर्णय मान्य नाही
translated_text: But her former elder brother does not accept her decision.
Justification: The sentiment is negative because of the phrase "मान्य नाही" (manya nahi), which means "does not accept."

Text: पण समायरा पूर्ण अनुभव म्हणून फारशी छाप पाडत नाही
translated_text: But Samaira doesn't impress much as a complete experience.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "फारशी छाप पाडत नाही" (pharshi chhap padat nahi), meaning "doesn't impress much," indicating a lack of positive impact.

Text: बल्ली चौधरी हा या दलित बस्तीचा गुंड आहे
translated_text: Balli Chaudhary is the goon of this Dalit basti
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the word "गुंड" (gund), which translates to "goon," indicating a negative characteristic and association.

Text: तोच फाॅर्म्युला त्याच्या भूमिकेत दिसतो
translated_text: The same formula is seen in his role.
Justification: The sentiment is negative because "तोच फाॅर्म्युला" (toch formula - the same formula) implies a lack of originality or staleness in his role, suggesting something repetitive or uninspired.

Text: दुसरं म्हणजे रिशू तिच्या ‘टाइप’चा नसतो
translated_text: Secondly, Rishu is not her 'type'.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to "नसतो" (nasato), which means "is not." This indicates a lack of compatibility and contributes to the negative sentiment.

Text: या चित्रपटातील कमकुवत कामगिरीमुळे त्याच्या पुढील प्रकल्पांसाठी साइन इन होण्याच्या शक्यतांमध्ये अडथळा निर्माण झाला असावा.
translated_text: The weak performance in this film may have hindered his chances of being signed for further projects.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the word "कमकुवत" (kamkuvat), meaning weak, indicating a negative quality in the film's performance.

Text: संवादांचा विचार करताना प्रवाहही गडबडतो
translated_text: The flow also gets disrupted when thinking about dialogues.
Justification: "गडबडतो" (gadbadto - gets disrupted/confused) indicates a negative disruption, hence the negative sentiment.

Text: यश कदम, ऐश्वर्याला रुची आवडते म्हणून आणि त्याच्या लहान वयाची भूमिका करणारा माणूस अभिनयासाठी धडपडतो
translated_text: Yash Kadam, Aishwarya loves Ruchi and the man who plays his younger self struggles to act
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to "धडपडतो" (dhadpadto), meaning "struggles," which implies difficulty and lack of success in acting, thus a negative connotation.

Text: परंतु निराशेशिवाय त्याच्या हाती काही लागत नाही
translated_text: But he can do nothing but despair.
Justification: The sentiment is negative and the emotion is sadness because the Marathi word "निराशेशिवाय" (nirashashiway), meaning "except despair," clearly indicates a feeling of hopelessness and negativity.

Text: मात्र बऱ्याच ठिकाणी अतार्किक गोष्टीही करून ठेवल्या आहेत त्यामुळे कलाकृती चांगली झाली असली तरी काही कच्चे दुवे राहून गेलेत
translated_text: However, in many places, illogical things have also been done, so although the artwork is good, some raw links have been left behind.
